author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, okubhekwe ukuthi aqhamuke neqhinga lokuqoqa amaphuzu kwi-Orbit College abazobhekana nayo kusasa emdlalweni weBetway Premiership Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUBUKEKA sezidlulile izivunguvungu ebezihlasele umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, othwale kanzima emasontweni adlule abalandeli bemfuna ukumthela isibhaxu ngenxa yokubhimba kwezinto kuleli qembu laseChloorkop. Ukuhluleka kweSundowns ukuwina izindebe ezimbili zokuqala zesizini okuMTN8 neCarling Knockout kubadinile abalandeli. Enye intukuthelo idalwe wukuba sengcupheni yokuphuma kwamaBrazilians kwiCaf Champions League. Nokho sekungumlando ukuthi leli qembu lidlulele kuma-quarterfinal emuva kokwehlula iMC Alger yase-Algeria. Empeleni lo mdlalo yiwona oshintshe konke kwiSundowns, yabuyela endleleni yokudlala eyaziwa ngayo, yathela isibhaxu i-Orlando Pirates. Nokho emasontweni adlule, ikhishwe yiTS Galaxy kwiNedbank Cup. KwiBetway Premiership, isiwine imidlalo eyisithupha ilandelana. AmaBrazilians asesicongweni se-log lapho ebambene khona ngamaphuzu angu-44 nePirates. UCardoso uvumile ukuthi udlule ebunzimeni ezinyangeni ezedlule. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal uwine umklomelo weBetway Premiership Coach of the Month kaJanuwari noFebhuwari. "Angikaze ngizizwe sengathi sekungilahlekele ukulawula iqembu. Kuyaziwa ukuthi uma ungawini, imimoya ayifani kunoma sindawonye (siwina). Kodwa siyakhumbula, siyakwazi esakwenza. Silahlekelwe yizindebe ezimbili kumaphenathi, ngebhadi lokho akusinikanga izindebe. Komunye wayo abangenanga ngisho kanye ebhokisini lethu noma bekhahlelele ipali. Kodwa ibhola linjalo," kusho uCardoso. "Kunzima ukuvuka ngosuku olulandelayo uma ulahlekelwa yizindebe kanjalo. Kodwa abadlali bayazi lapho okufanele babheke khona futhi abantu abaseqenjini bayasisiza ukuthi sihlale sibumbene. Njengoba ngihlale ngisho ukuthi iminyango yaseChloorkop iqinile. Okwenzeka  ngaphandle, kungaphandle. Okwenzeka ngaphakathi, olunye udaba. Kuningi okungenziwanga ngendlela efanele ezintweni eziningi kodwa ubungibona ukuthi bengihlala ngiwehlisile umoya. Angifuni ukubuyela emibuzweni yasekuqaleni kwesizini. Bekungelula kithina. Bekunzima. Kudingeke silwe, silwele yonke into." ISundowns izobhekana ne-Orbit College emdlalweni weligi ngoLwesibili ngo-7.30 ebusuku e-Olympia Park, eRustenburg. Lokhu kuyibeka ethubeni lokuvula igebe lamaphuzu amathathu esicongweni se-log phakathi kwayo nePirates ezodlala neRichards Bay ngoLwesithathu ngo-7.30 ebusuku, e-Orlando Amstel Arena. Emuva owe-Orbit, iSundowns izodlala neStade Malien yaseMali kuma-quarterfinal eChampions League ePitoli ngoLwesihlanu. "Ebholeni kufanele ucabange ngekusasa. Angicabangi ngemuva. Engikwaziyo wukuthi ngoLwesibili sizodlala ne-Orbit. Yileyo inselelo esinayo. Kusuka lapho, sizobona ukuthi simelwe yini ngaphambili kodwa okwamanje yi-Orbit. Akekho eqenjini ocabanga okunye ngaphandle kwe-Orbit," kusho uCardoso.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-CHRIS Q Radebe ongumbhali womdlalo othi Shut Up Men Are Talking UMLINGISI ophinde abe umbhali wemidlalo, uChris Q Radebe, useveze ukuthi yize umdlalo othakaselwe abaningi othi Shut Up Men Are Talking, nobukhonjiswa kwiYouTube, wanqatshwa iziteshi zethelevishini. Ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokukhonjiswa kwesiqephu sokugcina salo mdlalo nasikhiphe ngesonto eledlule kule nkundla yezokuxhumana. Abantu bamshayele ihlombe uChris ngalo mdlalo kodwa kwaba nemibuzo yokuthi kungani lo  ungekho kwithelevishini? Ekhuluma neSolezwe, uthe ngaphambi kokuthi umdlalo aqale awufake ekhasini lakhe kwiYouTube, wawuhambisa esiteshini esizimele iNetflix kodwa bawenqaba. "Angigcinanga lapho, ngaya nakwezinye iziteshi nakhona bakhombisa ukungawuthakaseli kodwa ngabona ukuthi ngendlela onesifundo ngayo, kumele ugcine ufinyelele ebantwini bawubone. Ngafikelwa umqondo wokuthi angiwufake ekhasini lami enkundleni engaziyo ukuthi abantu bayakwazi ukufinyelela kuyo futhi ngempela bawuthakasela kusukela ngiwumemezela kwaze kwaba sekugcineni. Kungijabulisile ukubona ukuthi singababhali isikhona enye indlela esingakhombisa ngayo imisebenzi yethu njengoba mina sengihlela ukuthi imidlalo ngiyibhale bese ngiyikhombisa ngale ndlela," kusho uChris. Uthe yena njengomuntu oneminyaka emkhakheni wokubhala imidlalo, akuqondayo ukuthi ababukeli bayayazi into abafuna ukuyibuka emizini yabo. "Yingakho ngabhala umdlalo ofana nalona okhombisa usizi abesifazane ababhekene nalo emizini yabo, ikakhulukazi emakhaya. "Iziteshi zethelevishini zithatha lokho ezikufunayo ngaleso sikhathi, lo mdlalo njengoba abantu bewubona uwulolu hlobo nje kwithelevishini ubungashintsha ube ngenye into kodwa mina ngiwulethe unjengoba unjalo ngoba ngazi ukuthi yimuphi umyalezio engifuna ukuwudlulisa. Ngiyakholelwa ekutheni ngelinye ilanga abantu abakhangisayo bayofinyelela kithi bese senza imali ngalokhu, njengoba ngalo mdlalo abalingisi ngibaholele ngemali yami," kusho yena. Uthe uyababonga kakhulu abalingisi asebenze nabo, nathemba ukuthi bazoqhubeka babambisane ukuya phambili.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithome OYISIQONGQWANE sasemuva kwiBafana Bafana, uMbekezeli Mbokazi, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu elizothembela kubona kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2026 e-USA, Mexico naseCanada OWAYENGUMDLALI wasesiswini kwiBafana Bafana, uBennet Mnguni, ukholwa wukuthi leli qembu linalo ithuba lokuqopha umlando ngokudlula esigabeni samaqoqo okokuqala kusukela iNingizimu Afrika yaqala ukudlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa. IBafana ezodlala okwesine koweNdebe yoMhlaba kusukela ngo-1998, iqhathwe neMexico, South Korea ne-Czech Republic kuGroup A kulo mqhudelwano ezobanjelwa e-USA, Mexico naseCanada kusukela ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19. Izodlala neMexico kowokuvula ngoJuni 11, e-Estadio Azteca, eMexico City. Kusukela iBafana idlala okokuqala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngo-1998, eFrance, ayikaze idlule esigabeni samaqoqo. Kanti ngo-2010 kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eyayidlalelwa eMzansi, yaqopha umlando omubi wokuba yizwe lokuqala emlandweni weNdebe yoMhlaba elaphuma esigabeni samaqoqo. “Ngicabanga ukuthi leli qembu leBafana Bafana eliqeqeshwa nguHugo Broos linabadlali abasezingeni nabanamava okuzibamba ziqine kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yakulo nyaka. Ngokwami iqoqo esikulona akulona iqoqo elinzima kangako ukuthi singakwazi ukudlula esigabeni samaqoqo. Angiyithathi kancane iCzech Republic neSouth Korea kodwa ngokwami akuwona amazwe anomlando ophathekayo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, ngakho leli yithuba lethu lokuqopha umlando ngokuthi sidlule okokuqala esigabeni samaqoqo. Kanti nayo iMexico akulona izwe eselike lasinika inkinga,” kusho uMnguni owayeseqenjini leBafana eladlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eyayiseKorea-Japan ngo-2002. “Okuhle ngaleli qembu likaHugo Broos wukuthi selidlale ndawonye isikhathi eside futhi likwazile nokudlala kwi-Africa Cup of Nations iminyaka ilandelana obekuyinto ebaluleke kakhulu. Ngaphandle kwalokho sinabadlali beSundowns (Mamelodi) abadlalile kwiFifa Club World Cup, ethi ayibe sezingeni elifanayo neleNdebe yoMhlaba. Leli yiqembu engingabazi ukuthi lizokwenza okungcono kunamanye amaqembu esizwe aphambilini, elikwaze ukuzibekisela indawo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngezikhwepha zalo okokuqala kusukela ngo-2010.” IBafana isadlale kanye neCzech Republic emlandweni emdlalweni owawungo-1997 kwiFifa Confederations Cup, zabambana ngo 2-2. Ayikaze idlale neSouth Korea, kanti isadlale amahlandla amathathu neMexico, yanqoba kabili, yadlala ngokulingana kanye koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2010.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UKAPUTENI we-Orlando Pirates uNkosinathi "Bhodlela" Sibisi uthumele umyalezo kubalandeli beqembu aliholayo IPHUPHO le-Orlando Pirates elingafezekanga emdlalweni owandulela owokusonga isizini yeBetway Premiership ngelokuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele phambi kwabalandeli emdlalweni wokugcina wasekhaya kodwa konke okunye kusahamba ngokohlelo. Lawa ngamazwi kakaputeni wePirates, uNkosinathi “Bhodlela” Sibisi, awatshele ithimba laleli qembu laseSoweto labezindaba kulandela ukuphunyukwa kwayo yithuba lokudla isicoco seligi okokuqala emuva kweminyaka engu-14. EZimnyama zibambane neDurban City ngo 0-0 e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ngoMgqibelo. Lokhu kuholele ekutheni abalandeli abebelindele ukuzobhiyoza baphume bedangele kule nkundla iqembu labo elijwayele ukusobozela amanye kuyona. IPirates inelinye ithuba lokugudluza iMamelodi Sundowns ekukhonyeni iligi enkulu yaseMzansi ngomdlalo wokugcina wesizini ne-Orbit College FC ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Isele ngamaphuzu amabili kwiSundowns esesicongweni ngawu-68. Lokhu kusho ukuthi kufanele inqobe noma yikanjani kwiMagesi. “Okungenzekanga kwebesikuhlelile wukuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele emdlalweni wokugcina ekhaya kodwa konke okunye kusesemgqeni. “Sikwenze konke obekudingeka ukuqinisekisa ukuthi sijabulisa abalandeli bethu ngamaphuzu agcwele ngempelasonto edlule kodwa kwaphika. “Akukho engikhala ngakho ngaphandle kwesitha esifike sihlelile ukuthi sizovala emuva. “Lokhu kusiphazamisile ekutheni sivale ngamaphuzu agcwele phambi kwabalandeli abasithwale cishe isizini yonke. Kokunye isabambe ngakho. Umsebenzi osihlalele emdlalweni wokugcina siyawazi," kusho uSibisi. “Kasidingi ukutshelwa ngokulindeleke kithina singabadlali ngempelasonto. Ngifisa ukuthi bangadikibali abalandeli ngabakubone emdlalweni odlule ngoba owokusonga isizini uzobe wehlukile. “Ngalokhu kangisho ukuthi sizoya ngobuso kwi-Orbit esaziyo ukuthi kukhona ekulwelayo kepha sizodlalisa okweqembu ebelivele lingadedeli lupho ngesikhathi isizini iqhubeka. “Sizokwenza njengoba besenza isizini yonke sigxile kwesihlele ukukwenza bese sibheka amaphutha esitha ukuthi singawenza kanjani ukuthi asebenzele thina." UBhodlela (30) unethuba lokuhamba ezinyathelweni zokaputeni abanomlando wokuphakamisa inkomishi ehamba nesicoco seligi njengoJohn Moeti ongasekho owakwenza ngesizini ka-1993-1994, Mbulelo “OJ” Mabizela (2002-2003) noLucky “Phinda Mzala” Lekgwathi okunguyena owagcina ngo-2020-2011 nango-2011-2012. UMabizela wayeneminyaka engu-22 ubudala ngesikhathi equkula kanti uLekgwathi wasidla waze wasiphinda kulandelana isicoco seligi. Lesi sitobha saKwaZulu Natal (KZN) sinethuba lokwenza okwehlula abanye okaputeni wePirates abaqavile okunguHappy Jele no-Innocent Maela.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Armand Hough / Independent Newspapers IKHOMISHINI yezoKhetho isiqinisekise ukuthi azizophazamiseka izivivinyo zika-matric uma sekuvotwa. Ikhomishini ithe yenze izinhlelo noMnyango wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo, ukuze izivivinyo zingaphazamiseki ngosuku lokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba 4, 2026. Okunye okuvezwe yikhomishini ngukuthi yengezelwe isabelomali ngo-R1.1 billion wokhetho. Lokhu kuvele ngesikhathi izikhulu zekhomishini zivele ngaphambi kwekomiti lasePhalamende. USihlalo wekomiti i-Appropriations ePhalamende, uDkt Mmusi Maimane, uthe kubaqinisa idolo ukwazi ukuthi izivivinyo ezibaluleke kangaka ekhalendeni lezikole, ngeke ziphazamiseke. "Ukhetho luzobanjwa ngesikhathi esimatasa sokubhalwa kwezivivinyo. Kuyasijabulisa ukuthi usuku lokhetho kuzoba yiholidi ngakho ngeke ziphazamiseke izivivinyo," kusho uMaimane. Uthe izikhungo eziningi okuvotelwa kuzona yizikole ngakho bebekhathazekile ngokuthi kuzokwenzakalani ngezivivinyo. UNksz Dawn Mbatha, isikhulu esiphethe izimali kwikhomishini, uthe isimo sabo sezimali sihle njengoba bethole uchatha. "Ngaphambi kokuba sisebenzise imali kudingeka silethe izitatimende zokusebenza kwemali ungakashayi uJulayi 31. Lo chatha usuvele ungakuthina sesilinde ukuwusebenzisa." Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi ikhomishini yahlinzekwa ngesabelomali sika-R3.2 billion sezinhlelo zokhetho. Le mali eyokusiza kugaywe amaphepha okuvota, ukukhokhela abasebenzi abengeziwe abazosebenza ngesikhathi sokhetho kanjalo nokwenza ezinye izinhlelo ezithinta ukhetho. UMaimane unxuse ikhomishini ukuthi iqinise imikhankaso yokunxenxa abantu ikakhulu intsha ukubhalisela ukuvota. "Liphansi kakhulu izinga lentsha ezibandakanya nokuvota kuleli. Sinxusa nokuthi igade abantu abasabalalisa izinto okungezona ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngokhetho." Iphini lesikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini uMnuz Masego Sheburi, lithe ahamba ngohlelo amalungiselelo okhetho. "Sihlabela phambili namalungiselelo njengoba kuzoba nempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota." Angaphezu kuka-500 amaqembu abhalisile kuleli kanti angu-20 wawo, abhaliswe kusuka ngo-Okthoba 2025 kuya kuFebhuwari 2026.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: KwaJetour bethule iT1 ne-T2 i-DM okuyizimoto ezingonhliziyombili njengoba zihamba ngenjini kaphethroli nekagesi webhethri ISIKHULU sakwaJetour emhlabeni jikelele sidalule ukuthi le nkampani yaseChina isezinhlelweni zokukhiqiza izimoto zayo eNingizimu Afrika. U-Andy Yuan, oyi-Vice President yakwaJetour International, wenze lesi simemezelo eSun Bet Arena kuleli sonto ngesikhathi le nkampani yethula izimoto zayo zokuqala kuleli ezingama-new energy vehicle (NEV). UYuan uthe basabalala emazweni angomakhelwane nawo adayisa izimoto ezishayelwa ngakwesokudla okubalwa kuwo iNamibia, Botswana, Zambia namanye. Uthe bafuna ukuvula ifemu yokwakha izimoto kuleli ukuze kunciphe izindleko futhi kudaleke amathuba omsebenzi. Ifemu izobe izihlanganisa izimoto, hhayi ukuzakha kusuka phansi. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iChery South Africa isanda kumemezela ukuthi ithenge ifemu yakwaNissan ePitoli. IJetour ingenye yezinkampani ezenganyelwe yiChery emhlabeni jikelele. Izimoto ebezethulwa yi-T1 iDM neT-2 iDM ezingama plug-in hybrid. Zisuselwe kuma-T1 neT2 ahamba ngophethroli nabamba elikhulu iqhaza ekundlondlobaleni kweJetour kuleli. I-T2 ingenye yezimoto ezibanga isicoco se-2026 SA Car of the Year. I-T1 i-DM inenjini kaphethroli nezimbili zikagesi okukhipha amandla ahlanganisiwe angu-250kW ne-torque engu-530Nm. Ibhethri eligcina ugesi lingu-18.4kWh futhi uyakwazi ukuyisebenzisa njenge-generator ekhipha amandla angu-3.3kW. Ukuyishaja endaweni esheshayo bathi kuthatha imizuzu engu-27 ukusuka ku-30% iye ku-80% kuthi ngogesi wasendlini kuthathe amahora alinganiselwa kwamathathu ukuthi igcwale. Uma ibhethri nophethroli kugcwele bathi ungahamba amakhilomitha angu-1 200, kuthi ngogesi wodwa uhambe angu-100. I-T2 i-DM yona inamandla angu-265kW ne-torque engu-610Nm. Nakuyo bathi ungahamba amakhilomitha alinganiselwa ku-1 200 kuthi ngogesi wodwa uhambe angu-90. Ibhethri layo nezikhathi zokushaja kuyafana nakwiT1 i-DM.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTREVOR Noah enozakwabo u-Eugene Khoza noNtosh Madlingozi kwiBafunny Bafunny KUBHEKWE ngabomvu ukumenyezelwa kohlu losomahlaya bakuleli abazoboshelwa eqenjini lesizwe iBafunny Bafunny. Ngokusho komsunguli nokaputeni waleli qembu, uTrevor Noah, iBafunny Bafunny izohlekisa ochungechungeni lwemicimbi ezokuba kuleli ngoSepthemba walo nyaka. UTrevor ubuye waqoka uzakwabo u-Eugene Khoza weWhat Now Podcast nomqeqeshi waleli qembu uNtosh Madlingozi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi leli qembu lesizwe lizoqala ukuhlekisa izethameli emcimbini oseSunBet Arena ePitoli ngoSepthemba 5 bese lidlulela eGrandWest Arena eCape Town ngoSepthemba 26. "INingizimu Afrika iyakudinga ukuhleka, ngakho neSavanna ngiletha iqembu ukuba lenze lokho. IBafunny Bafunny iqembu lesizwe losomahlaya. Kuzoba nemicimbi emihlanu, emadolobheni amathathu ngoSepthemba 2026. Ngiphethe u-Eugene Khoza oseqinisekisiwe nabanye osomahlaya bakuleli abaningi nabakwamanye amazwe abasazomenyezelwa." Uthe usazohlanganisa amakhanda nephini lakhe kanye nomqeqeshi ukumemezela abanye osomahlaya abazobe bebabophele kulolu chungechunge. UTrevor, oseke wahlabana amahlandla amabili kuma-Emmy Awards, uzohlekisa okokuqala kuleli kwiFestival of Comedy ekubeni ayegcine ukunandisa kwiSavanna Presents Trevor Noah Live in South Africa Tour ngoSepthemba 2023.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo uLusanda Beja oza eThekwini emcimbini iSilent Worship Experience: A Night of Songs ezoba ngenyanga ezayo KULINDELEKE ukuthi kuze kucishe kuse ekuseni kudunyiswa emcimbini wokudumisa ozobe uhanjelwe yizinkakha zabaculi, iSilent Worship Experience: A Night of Songs, ongowokuqala nozoba seDCC Jesus Dome eThekwini ngoMeyi 22. Kulo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi kuqopheke umlando njengoba izethameli zizodumisa zifake ama-earphone ezindlebeni. Ngeke kugcine lapho ngoba kwabazohambela umcimbi akekho ozobe ekhethekile njengoba amathikithi eVIP engekho. UKwezi Ndlovu-Mbambo, osethimbeni labahleli bomcimbi, uveze ukuthi bahlele into engakaze ibonakale nezoqala ukwenzeka kulo mcimbi njengoba abazobe bekhona bonke bezonikwa ama-earphone ukuze ulalele lonke uhlelo lomcimbi nokuyindlela abafuna umuntu asondelane ngayo noThixo njengoba kuzobe kugcwele umculo nomkhuleko. "Sihlele ukuthi umcimbi siwenze ngendlela engakaze ibonakale kuleli. Siyazi ukuthi abanye bazoba nokudideka kodwa njengoba sisho nje, ama-earphone azotholwa yiwona wonke umuntu ukuze azwe konke okuzokwenzeka, uma ungenawo ngeke uzwe lutho. Kanjalo akekho ozoba yiVIP ngenxa yokuthi sihlele ukuthi abantu babe ndawonye bazizwe bemunye. Abantu abazofika sifuna basondelane noNkulunkulu ngokubanika isikhathi somuntu ngamunye. Izingoma zonke nezintshumayelo abantu bazokuzwa ngalokhu abazobe bekufake ezindlebeni nokuyindlela esifuna ukuthi umuntu ngamunye asondelane ngayo noMdali wakhe," kusho uKwezi. Uthe kusasa njengoba besahambela izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme, bazoya oNgoye bayokhulekela izitshudeni futhi bazikhuthaze ezintweni ezihlukene. Uthe abaculi abazobe bekhona bonke ngeke bagcine nje ngokucula kuphela kodwa bazophinde bashumayele. Amathikithi okuthamela umcimbi aseyatholakala eWebtickets nasePick n Pay ngo-R250. Kubaculi abazobe bekhona kubalwa u-Oncemoresix, Khaya Mthethwa, Ncebakazi Msomi, Ntokozo Mbambo, Lusanda Beja noMpumi Mtsweni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Christo Botha obemele i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze KUSHONE obemele i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze, uMnuz Christo Botha. UBotha, obeyiphini lemeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze, ushone emva kokuxinwa ukugula. Izindaba zokushona kwakhe zimenyezelwe ngumholi we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema. UNgema uthe bagqemeke engeqiwa ntwala ngokushona kukaBotha. "Asilahlekelwanga nje iphini lemeya kodwa silahlekelwe umholi obesebenzela abantu. Uyena obezomela i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya eMhlathuze njengoba kuza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Angeke siwakhohlwe amagalelo akhe kuMasipala waseMhlathuze  nokulwela kwakhe abantu baseMhlathuze." UBotha ubephinde abe yikhansela lakuWard 2. USomlomo womkhandlu, uMnuz Tobias Gumede, unxuse abantu abahlala kuWard 2 abadinga usizo lomkhandlu ukuba bathinte ihhovisi lakhe namalungu ekomiti lekhansela kuWard 2 ukuze ezothola usizo. UGumende udlulise amazwi enduduzo emndenini kaBotha.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: U-ITUMELENG Khune noBrandon Petersen ngesikhathi besasebenza ndawonye kwiKaizer Chiefs UNOZINTI wodumo kwiKaizer Chiefs nakwiBafana Bafana, u-Itumeleng Khune, ubona uBrandon Petersen kunguyena okufanele abange ijezi noRonwen Williams eqenjini lesizwe kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, athole nomklomelo kanozinti ovelele, iBetway Premiership Goalkeeper of the Season. UKhune owayidla cishe yonke imiklomela yonozinti ebholeni laseMzansi ngaphambi kokuwagaxa emgibeni amagilavu, ubekhuluma nabezindaba emuva komdlalo wabakhaya osekungumlando ukuthi iChiefs idlale ngokulingana ngo 1-1 ne-Orlando Pirates. IChiefs kufanele ibonge uPetersen ngephuzu elithole kulo mdlalo kwazise lo nozinti waseKapa oneminyaka engu-31 ubudala, uvimbe amabhola amaningi amabi, wagcina eqokwe njengomdlali ovelele kulo mdlalo. UPetersen ungomunye wonozinti abagqamile kule sizini okufakazelwa ukuthi ubalwa nabazihola phambili ngokunqaba namagoli kwiligi. Njengoba sekusele izinsuku ukuthi umqeqeshi weBafana, uHugo Broos, amemezele isikwati azoya ngaso kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, uKhune ujoyine abalandeli ababona lo nozinti weChiefs kumfanele ukungena endizeni ebheke eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). “Umehluko phakathi kokuthi iChiefs ihlale endaweni yesithathu kwi-log nokuthi ingabi ngaphandle kwe-Top 8 yindlela uPetersen ayilwela ngayo kusukela kuqale isizini. “Uqokwe kufanele njengovelele emdlalweni wabakhaya kodwa okwangijabulisa nakakhulu ukuthi akayena unozinti okhuphula izinga uma kuyimidlalo emikhulu kuphela. “Uhlale eyihola njengesibani iChiefs. Okumnandi kakhulu uPetersen akwenze emdlalweni wabakhaya ukuthi uBroos uzibonele ngawakhe," kusho uKhune. “Ofuna ukwazi ukuthi kungani iChiefs yashaywa yiPirates ngo 3-0 kowabakhaya wangoFebhuwari, yingoba uPetersen wayengekho ngenxa yokugula. “Ngokwami kufanele ngabe kayisakhulunywa indaba yokuthi uPetersen uyaya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba noma cha kepha kufanele ngabe kukhulunywa ukuthi ngubani ozoqala imidlalo kwiBafana kweyoMhlaba phakathi kwakhe noRonza (Williams). “Ngiyaziqhenya ngoBrandon (Petersen) ngoba ngiyazazi izingqinamba ake abhekana nazo kwazise kunezingxenye zabalandeli ebezimqhathanisa nonozinti beChiefs baphambilini. “Ungumholi kwiChiefs futhi kufanele kuqokwe yena kowe-Goalkeeper of the Season ngoba ubuqhawe bakhe bufana ncamashi nobalaba abalishayela amagoli amqoka leli qembu."

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Image:  Fusz Photography/pexels.com UFUNA kuthathelwe abama-ambulensi izinyathelo umndeni waseCongo, eNanda, kulandela ukufa kosana lwawo ngenxa yokubambezeleka kanjalo nobudedengu babasebenzi bezimo eziphuthumayo. Usana obelunamasonto ayisikhombisa luzelwe, uSqiniseko Nxumalo, lushonele esibhedlela sikahulumeni iMahatma Gandhi Memorial, ePhoenix ngo-Ephreli 29. Ngokusho kukanina, uNksz Lindokuhle Nxumalo, izinkinga eziholele ekushoneni kwendodana yakhe eyiwele, zaqala ngayizolo, ebona ukuthi ayiphilile, waya emtholampilo wendawo. Uthe wafika khona ngo-9 ekuseni, wangawubamba ngisho nolayini ngoba wayebona isimo sendodana yakhe ukuthi sibi. “Abahlengikazi bamxilonga ngo-9.30, maqede bathi asingabe sisagoduka. Bambizela i-ambulensi eyayizosithatha isidlulisele esibhedlela iMahatma Gandhi,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uthe bahlala kwaze kwaba yileyo ndaba, ingabonwa nangokhalo i-ambulensi. “Yaze yafika ngo-4. Nakhona yafika ingawuphethe umbhede wezingane ezisuke zizalwe singakafiki isikhathi. Kwaphoqa ukuthi ijike, iyowulanda. Nokwathi uma isibuya okwesibili, kwatholakala ukuthi awushajiwe umbhede,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uthe kwaphela esinye isikhathi usashajwa kwazise usana lwalungeke lulaliswe kuwo ubanda. Uthe esibhedlela bafika ngo-6,kwathi uma bebonwa abahlengikazi nodokotela masinyane, bakhala ngokuthi kungani usana lulethwe sekuhambe isikhathi ngoba lusesesimeni esibucayi. “Wayeseqale ukudlikiza, into eyayikade ingamenzi ekuseni, njengoba mina ngangimhambise emtholampilo ngisola ukuthi unomkhuhlane,” usho kanje. Nebala uthe indodana yakhe kwayenela ekuseni ngakusasa, abahlengikazi baphinde baveza ukuthi lokhu kube wumphumela wokuthi usana lulethwe sekudlule isikhathi. Uthe ukhona umhlangano ababe nawo nezikhulu zasemtholampilo, ezazihlangula, zathi iphutha akulona elazo njengoba zona zayibiza ngesikhathi i-ambulensi ngezikhathi zasekuseni kodwa yona yafika ilanga seliyozilahla kunina. “Abesibhedlela nabo bazihlangulile, ngelithi indodana yami yafika ezandleni zabo isivele isisesimeni esibucayi kakhulu,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uthe emhlanganweni ababe nawo batshelwa ukuthi iyinhlekelele indaba yama-ambulensi esifundazweni. Wathi batshelwa ukuthi iTheku jikelele linangu-40, kodwa kuwona, kusebenza angu-26, wonke lawa amanye afile. “Mina ngifuna kube khona ozothathelwa izinyathelo kwabama-ambulensi. Nginomuzwa wokuthi bangenzele phansi ngokufika sekwedlule isikhathi baphinde benza nobudedengu bokungawuphathi umbhede wezingane,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uveze eyokuthi umhlengikazi awafonela abama-ambulensi wagcizelela ukuthi lo mbhede awuphathwe futhi ushajwe ngoba isiguli esiyiswa esibhedlela yingane ezalwe ngaphambi kwesikhathi. “Okwenza bafike emva kwesikhathi mina angikwazi futhi angikwazi nokwadala ukuthi bafike bengawuphethe kuthi noma sebewulandile bangawushaji,baze baphoqeleka ukuthi balindwe besawushajile,” usho kanje.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UGXEKA nabakuleli abahlomula ngemali yokuvikelwa kwabokufika ngesigameko sokushiswa komuzi wakhe uNgizwe Mchunu, othi ukhale izinyembezi ebona umuzi wakhe uwumlotha. UNgizwe okwenzeke lesi sigameko eseGoli, ngeSonto ekuseni, uthe ulivulile icala emaphoyiseni. Uthe njengoba akhe endaweni yasemakhaya eMbumbulu, unesiqiniseko sokuthi abekho abokufika abebengafinyelela kule ndawo benze umonakalo ofana nalona. UNgizwe ukhuluma ngalolu hlobo ngoba usekhaleni lemibhikisho yokulwa nabantu bokuhamba abaseNingizimu Afrika ngaphandle kwezimvume. Usale unje umuzi kaNgizwe ushiswa amadoda amathathu angaziwa afike emzini wakhe eMbumbulu, emfuna ngeSonto Ekhuluma neSolezwe, uthe umzabalazo wokulwa nabokufika abasezweni ngaphandle kwamaphepha ngeke baze bawuyeke futhi akanavalo. "Noma mina ngingenaso isiqiniseko kodwa imimoya ikhomba laba balapha kithi abathatha imali yokuvikela abokufika ukuthi yibona abenze lokhu. Konke ngikushiye emaphoyiseni ukuthi  aphenye. Abokufika ngihlala kude kakhulu mina ukuthi bebengeza lapha bafike benze lo monakalo kodwa engingakusho wukuthi ngibonga ukuthi izingane ziphephile nonkosikazi, okwamanje basendaweni engaziwa muntu. Mina ngiwumuntu onedlozi elinzima kakhulu, into enjena ibingeke ivele yenzeke nje emzini wobabamkhulu ngakho ngithi abenzi bokubi bazobanjwa," kusho uNgizwe. Uzakwabo abambisene naye kulo mkhankaso, uNkosikhona "Phakelumthakathi" Ndabandaba, uthe ngeke kubanqinde amandla ukushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe njengoba abakwenzayo kuwukulwa nabantu bangaphandle abakuleli abenza izinto ezingalungile. "Thina sifuna ukuqeda amaphara, siqede ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane ezincane. Ngesonto elidlule, sithole ingane yentombazane eneminyaka engu-13 inengane ihlala nendoda eneminyaka engu-48 yangaphandle. Izingane zethu seziphenduke amaphara ngenxa yezidakamizwa ezidayiswa yilaba bantu ngakho sifuna ukuqeda lokho, asicwasi," kusho yena. Uthe kusasa bazoya e-ICC embukisweni iToursim Indaba lapho kuzobe kunomengameli bomhlaba khona ukuze bahlale phansi nabo babatshele ukuthi abacwasi muntu kodwa yini abalwa nayo. Uveze ukuthi bahlele ukuhamba nawo amaphara bayowakhombisa omengameli abahlukene, ukuze babone ukuthi izidakamizwa zililimaze kanjani elakuleli. UShansela ehhovisi leSilo, Inkosi uMalusi Zondi, usigxeke kakhulu isigameko sokushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe wathi okwenzekile kuletha ukukhathazeka. "Sicela ukuthi abasemandleni baphenye ngalesi sigameko. Isigameko esifana nalesi siletha ukukhathazeka kakhulu. Nathi siyaxhumana naye uNgizwe ngokwenzekile futhi isimo sisiqaphe ngeso lokhozi futhi sizomeseka kuze kube sekugcineni. Sinxusa ukuthi kube noxolo, ukuthula, ukubumbana kusona sonke isizwe," kusho uZondi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe bayaphenya ngemuva kokuthungelwa kwezindlu ezintathu eMbumbulu. UNGIZWE Mchunu ufike waphelelwa amandla emzini wakhe oseMbumbulu oshisiwe ngeSonto

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIHLALO weDurban City, uFarook Kadodia, ephahlwe nguNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, umengameli weKZN Sports Confederation, uThami Mchunu, umqeqeshi uPitso Dladla, uMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, uMntomuhle Khawula, nabadlali emcimbini wokuhlonipha leli qembu eSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini UMPHATHISWA wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal, uMntomuhle Khawula, unxuse ukwesekana emaqenjini esifundazwe adlala kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ukuze impumelelo yeDurban City yokuzuza isicoco seNedbank Cup ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye akulesi sifundazwe. UKhawula ukusho lokhu ekhuluma nabezindaba emcimbini wokubungaza ukunqoba kweCity iNedbank Cup obuseSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini, ngeSonto. Lo mcimbi bewuthanyelwe yizikhulu zeCity, okubalwa kuzo usihlalo, uFarook Kadodia, abadlali nethimba labaqeqeshi, abaxhasi beCity, aboMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uThami Ntuli, izikhulu zeSafa KwaZulu-Natal nesifunda iTheku neKwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation. “Eminyakeni ewu-16 isifundazwe sakithi KwaZulu-Natal sagcina ukunqoba indebe, abafana bamaCitizens bakwenzile lokho, basiqeda isomiso sezindebe. Ngakho sibonga kakhulu kumqeqeshi, uPitso Dladla, usihlalo uKadodia (Farook), ithimba labaqeqeshi, nawo wonke umuntu oyingxenye yaleli qembu ofake isandla empumelelweni yalo. Okuqaphelekayo wukuthi yisizini yokuqala le iDurban City ingenile esigabeni esikhulu seBetway Premiership, kodwa isikwi-Top 8 futhi ayisaphumi, yaphinda yathatha indebe. Siyathokoza futhi ukuthi njengamanje kwi-Top 8 AmaZulu akhona, iGolden Arrows ibukeka izoba khona, neRichards Bay iyasondela,” kusho uKhawula. “Lokhu kusinika ithemba lokuthi kungenzeka sibe namaqembu amaningana kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo. Impumelelo yeDurban City kufanele ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye amaqembu akulesi sifundazwe engifisa ukuthi kube nokubambisana kuwona, yize edlala ngokuncintisana. Ukubambisana nokwesekana kwawo kungahamba ibanga ekubuyiseni isithunzi nempumelelo ebholeni laKwaZulu-Natal, eyikhaya lebhola. NeMilford FC noma ingakwazanga ukunqoba iligi (yeMotsepe Foundation Championship), nayo sinethemba lokuthi izophumelela kuma-Play-Offs, yandise isibalo samaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiPremiership, futhi sizoyeseka.” ICitizens ibe yiqembu lokuqala laseKZN elinqobe isicoco selokhu kwagcina iLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-2009 inqoba indebe ye-MTN8. Usihlalo weCitizens, uKadodia, uzwakalise ukuthobeka ngomcimbi abawenzelwe wuMnyango wezeMidlalo esifundazweni ukubabonga nokubahlonipha ngokunqoba kwabo iNedbank. “Ibhola laKwaZulu-Natal bekungafanele lilinde isikhathi eside kangaka ukuthola impumelelo. Futhi amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal akufanele adonse kanzima avike izembe kuwona wonke amasizini. Ibhola kufanele libe yimboni, lithuthukise abantu, lidale amathuba omsebenzi lithuthukise nezokuvakasha. Uma ibhola lisebenza, nomphakathi uyasebenza. Ligcina intsha imatasa, ihlengeke ezidakamizweni nasebugebengwini,” kusho uKadodia. Namuhla ngo-12.30 emini ezitaladini zaseThekwini, kuzoba nombhiyozo weCity nendebe yeNedbank Cup. Kuzosukwa eKing Dinuzulu Park, kubhekwe eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UKAMOGELO Sebelebele obe yiqhawe le-Orlando Pirates ngokuyilamulela emdlalweni wabakhaya neKaizer Chiefs kwiBetway Premiership UMDLALI we-Orlando Pirates osephenduke isithenjwa, uKamogelo Sebelebele, uveze ukuthi nakuba kubaphoxile ukuphazanyiswa yiKaizer Chiefs embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi sekufanele baphonse ithawula. IPirates isaqhwakele kwi-log yize ilahle amaphuzu amqoka ngokubambana neChiefs emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngempelasonto edlule, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Okusemqoka ukukuqaphela ngalo mphumela wukuthi iPirates ihleli ngesinqe esisodwa esicongweni ngoba iMamelodi Sundowns eyimise kabi, isele ngomdlalo. USebelebele owasayiniswa iPirates njengomdlali wasezimpondweni esuka kwi-TS Galaxy, usengomunye wababizwa kuqala uma kuboshelwa ukhonkolo wodonga lwasemuva esikimini sePirates. Nakuba ehlalisa ebhentshini abadlali abanamava kule ndawo okunguDeano van Rooyen noBandile Shandu kodwa kunzima ukuphikisa isinqumo somqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ngoSebelebele kwazise nguyena olamule kukubi emdlalweni weChiefs. USebelebele osebonakale emidlalweni engu-27 kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano ubengaqali ukulamulela iPirates kunzima kwazise nakwiMTN 8 wenza okufanayo bebhekene neSundowns kowandulela owamanqamu. Kule midlalo engu-27, uSebelebele useshaye amagoli amahlanu okungamathathu eligi namabili kwi-MTN8. Ngesikhathi lo mdlali ekhuluma nethimba labezindaba lePirates emuva komdlalo wabakhaya, akafihlanga ukuthi baphoxekile kodwa wafunga ukuthi akekho kubona ozogobisa ikhanda kule midlalo esele. “Ukudlala ngokulingana neChiefs kuyafana nokulahla amaphuzu kwazise sisembangweni wesicoco onzima neqembu elisijwayele,” kusho uSebelebele kwi-Orlando Pirates TV. “Kusobala ukuthi iChiefs ibikuhlelile ukuthi izosidlalisa kabi. Kubukeka sengathi kuyisizile lokhu ngoba nakhu yona ithole umphumela okubukeka sengathi ibiwufuna. “Ngiyavuma kuyasiphazamisa lokhu embangweni kodwa ngiyafunga ukuthi ngeke kusenze siphelelwe wukuzethemba kumbe kusifakele umqondo wokuphonsa ithawula ngawo. “Kuningi okusengenzeka kule sizini ngakho-ke okwethu wukuqinisa ekutheni kasisaqhuzuki kungafanele njengoba senzile kwiChiefs."

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI wePolokwane City, uPhuti Mohafe, uyayingabaza i-Orlando Pirates embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership. UMohafe ubekhuluma emuva kokuthi ezakhe zikhale ngaphansi ngo 2-1 kweZimnyama e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Amagoli ePirates ashaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng noPatrick Maswanganyi. EleRise and Shine libekwe enethini nguBonginkosi Dlamini. IPirates isesicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu angu-44 lapho ibambene khona neMamelodi Sundowns esele ngegoli kuleli qembu laseSoweto. Ukuhlala embangweni kwePirates kwenyuse ithemba kubalandeli bayo abakholwa wukuthi izoyiketula iSundowns esiwine iligi amahlandla ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. Nokho uMohafe uyihlabile indlela ezidlala ngayo eZimnyama, wathi kungenzeka ziphinde ziyikhombe iligi. "Angiyiboni iPirates iba ngompetha beligi yePremiership. Angibaboni bewina iligi uma bedlala ngendlela abadlale ngayo namuhla,"kusho uMohafe. "Anginaso isiqiniseko, mhlawumbe iqhinga lethu lisebenzile, mhlawumbe sibahlelele kahle. Bathwale kanzima kithina. Kodwa ngokwendlela abadlale ngayo namuhla, angibaboni beba ngompetha." UMohafe ukhuluma kanjena nje, iPirates ihlulwe yinqwaba yamagoli abengenza ihlale ngokunethezeka esicongweni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USDUMO Mtshali ozolingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni othi The Polygamist Image: Image:X/@tvmzansi ISITESHI esizimele iNetflix sesimemezele umdlalo wokuqala owuchungechunge othi The Polygamist, osuselwe encwadini kaSue Nyathi enesihloko esifanayo. Lo mdlalo oneziqephu ezingu-22, uqoshwe yinkampani esikhiqize imidlalo okukhona kuyo Uzalo nothi Amalanga Awafani, i-Stained Glass Productions. Kuwo kulingisa phambili abalingisi abanamava kuleli, uGugu Gumede noSdumo Mtshali. UGugu ekhasini lakhe kwi-Instagram uveze ukuthi ekugcineni ujabule ngokuba yingxenye yalo mdlalo. Yize engandanga ngamagama amaningi kodwa uveze ukuthi umdlalo lona abantu abazowubuka bengabi namkhawulo njengoba befuna ukubona isiphetho sawo. AbakwaNetflix baveze ukuthi ukhuluma ngowesifazane ozakhele igama ezinkundleni zokuxhumana osempini nowesifazane onguNdlunkulu emshadweni wakhe, njengoba uNdlunkulu ethola ukuthi umyeni wakhe unamanye amakhosikazi angaziwa. "UGugu uzobe elingisa indawo kaJoyce kanti uSdumo ulingisa indawo kaJonasi Gomora. Bobabili basemshadweni ongenazihibe kodwa kuhamba isikhathi kuvele ukuthi lona wesilisa ongusomabhizinisi odumile unamanye amakhosikazi awafihlile, nokuyinto engahlali kahle kunkosikazi wakhe omdala. Wenza konke ke ukuthi athole laba besifazane ukuze ababonise ukuthi ngempela ungubani," kusho iNetflix. Bathe lona wesilisa izinqumo zakhe izona eziqeda ngempilo yakhe ephezulu njengoba amakhosikazi nezanciza zimenza angazazi ukuthi yini okumele ayenze njengoba amanga akade ewaphila iminyaka ekugcineni esebanjiwe futhi bonke sebefuna ukuziphindiselela. "Siyajabula ukwethulela ababukeli bethu umdlalo ofana nalona esithemba ukuthi nabo bazowuthakasela njengathi uma siwamukela okokuqala. Silubheke ngabomvu usuku oluzoqala ngawo ukuvezwa kwalo mdlalo okunguJuni 12," kuphetha abakwaNetflix. Abanye abalingisi abazobonakala kulo mdlalo, kubalwa uKwanele Mthethwa, S’thandiwe Kgoroge, Kenneth Nkosi, Celeste Ntuli, Luyanda Zwane, Wonder Ndlovu, Noluthando Shabalala, Vuyo Biyela noLwazie Keith Tsebesha.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMSAKAZI we-East Coast Radio, uTee Xaba, obe ngomunye wabesikhungo semfundo ephakeme, iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, abathweswe iziqu okuqale kuleli sonto BAQHAKAZILE ekugqamiseni imfundo osaziwayo baKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba ngoMsombuluko, isikhungo iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal siqale imicimbi yokuthwesa izitshudeni iziqu. Umsakazi wesiteshi esizinze eThekwini, i-East Coast Radio ophinde wagqama ohlelweni lomndeni wakhe, i-Being A Xaba, uTee Xaba, nentokazi eyazakhela igama emdlalweni Isibaya, u-Amina Karen-Sue Jack, abasalanga ngaphandle. INTOKAZI eyazakhela igama ilingisa emdlalweni Isibaya, u-Amina Karen Sue Jack UTee uthole iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts in Drama, Performance and English Studies. Kwathi u-Amina watheswa iziqu zeBachelor of Social Science kanti ngo-2024, kusona lesi sikhungo wathola ezeHournes in Psychology. Ekhuluma ngokuthweswa kwakhe iziqu, uTee uthe kuze kwaba yizikhathi ezine eshiya ekuqhubekeni nezifundo zakhe njengoba ekugcineni eze wabuyela ngokuzimisela ngenjongo yokufuna ukuqeda. "Ngiyajabula ukuthi ngilana ngikhona namhlanje, ngemuva kwesikhathi eside ngizama ngishiya ukuqeda izifundo zami. Bekungelula ngempela kodwa namhlanje umuntu uphumelele. Bekumele ngizibe konke okwenzeka eduzane kwami ukuze ngibhekane nezifundo zami. Bekumele ngizibekele isikhathi ngiphinde ngihlale ngizikhumbuza ukuthi kungani ngaqala ukufunda ekuqaleni, lokhu bengikwenza ngezinsuku ezinzima kakhulu," kusho uTee. Uthe uyambonga kakhulu unina, uBonisiwe Khanyile, obehlala emkhuthaza ukuthi aqede izifundo zakhe. "Nawo wonke nje umndeni wami ubungesekile njengoba bengihlala ngiwutshela ngobunzima bokufunda engibhekene nakho. Bengazi ukuthi ekugcineni kumele ngizithole iziqu zami ngenxa yokuthi bengiyodliwa unembeza isikhathi eside ukuthi ngike ngakhetha ukungazitholi lezi ziqu. Ukholo lwami lungisizile ukuthi ngibe lana ngikhona namhlanje," kusho yena. U-Amina waveza ukuthi uyena owokuqala ekhaya kubo ukuthi athweswe iziqu. Naye uveze ukuthi kube uhambo obelungelula njengoba abebuye ayeke, nokuyinto angayikholwa ukuthi ugcine eqedile waze wathola iziqu zakhe.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abantu ababili okusolwa ukuthi yizigebengu ebezihlomile ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa eSydenham ngoLwesine ntambama. Amaphoyisa azibonele isigameko sokugetshengwa kuBurnwood Road lapho abasolwa abathathu, abebeshayela iKia sedan emhlophe, bebegebenga owesilisa impahla yakhe. Abasolwa asukume abona ukuthi kukhona amaphoyisa, bashaya bachitha ngemoto. Ngesikhathi abasolwa bebaleka, omoto yabo ishayisane netekisi base beyishiya. Babaleke ngezinyawo bedubula bebhekise emaphoyiseni, kwadutshulwana. Abasolwa ababili badutshulwe balimala kabi, oyedwa waboshwa. Uzobhekana necala lokubamba inkunzi ehlomile nelokuzama ukubulala emaphoyiseni. Alikho iphoyisa elilimale ngesikhathi sokudubulana.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMPHAKATHI waseMondlo ubuphume ngobuningi bawo uzozwa izinhlelo zokwabiwa kwemali onyakeni omusha IMEYA yaseBaqulusini, uMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi, ithe kuyabalimaza njengomkhandlu ukucekelwa phansi kwengqalasizinda njengoba kwenza basebenzise imali ezinhlelweni ebezingahlelelwe. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi kwethulwa uhlelo lwentuthuko edidiyelwe eMondlo esigcemeni sakwa-A ngempelasonto. UMkhwanazi uthe emasontweni edlule ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kuke kwasabalala izindaba zokuthi kukhona imali edliwe kumasipala nokungaziwa ukuthi ishonephi. AMALUNGU omphakathi enza izinto ezihlukene anikelelwe ngezinto ezizosiza ukuthuthukisa amabhizinisi nezobuciko eMondlo exhaswa uMasipala waseBaqulusini Uthe abantu abakhuluma lokhu yingoba abazazi izinselelo ababhekana nazo ngenxa yokuziphatha kwamanye amalungu omphakathi. "Ngifuna ukulucacisa lolu daba ngoba luvele lwagcwala ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ayikho imali edliwe budlabha noma edukile kodwa imali ngokwendlela esuke yabiwe ngayo isuke ibekwe ezindaweni zayo. Kodwa ukucekelwa phansi kwengqalasizinda yamanzi nogesi kwenza sithathe imali kwezinye izindawo ukuze kulungiswe izinto ezonakele. Ngeke silinde kuze kuqale omunye unyakamali ukuze silungise izinto ezingalungile," kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe emphakathini waseMondlo banezinkinga eziningi ezithinta ukuxhunywa kukagesi ngendlela engekho emthethweni nabazokulungisa maduzane. "Mphakathi sicela nithenge ugesi niphinde nikhokhele nezikweletu eninazo. Siyazi abaningi bayafuna ukukhokhela izikweletu zabo kodwa njengabaholi kumele sibheke ukuthi sinikhipha kanjani kulesi simo," kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe bakhethe ukungafiki beshwiba izandla emphakathini njengoba beshiyele osomabhizinisi imishini yokugunda utshani, eyokuthunga izimpahla neyokusiza amaciko asathuthuka emculweni.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs, uBruce Bvuma, onengcindezi yokulenza elakhe ijezi kuleli qembu laseNaturena Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX PHEZU kokuba unozinti weKaizer Chiefs, uBruce Bvuma, eseyoqeda iminyaka eyishumi edlalela leli qembu kodwa usabhekene nomqansa wokulenza elakhe ijezi eNaturena. UBvuma (30) waqala ukudlalela Amakhosi ngo-Ephreli 2017, eneminyaka engu-21 ebanga ijezi nonozinti abasezingeni eliphezulu okubalwa kubona u-Itumeleng Khune olenze elakhe ijezi iminyaka eminingi eNaturena. Nokho kuze kube manje usadlale imidlalo engu-90 kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano. Ngesikhathi iChiefs imemezela ukuthi uKhune ngeke esadlala, bekubhekwe ukuthi uBvuma oyena ozoqhubeka lapho agcine khona. Nokho ugcine esedliselwa ogageni ngabanye onozinti okunguBrandon Petersen noFiacre Ntwari owathengwa kwiTS Galaxy. Kwamangala abaningi ngesikhathi uBvuma esala ngaphandle esikimini seChiefs esadlala umdlalo wamanqamu weNedbank Cup ne-Orlando Pirates eThekwini nyakenye, ekubeni kukade kunguyena owayevimba njalo. Sekungumlando ukuthi indawo yakhe yathathwa nguPetersen, wasiza Amakhosi aqukula indebe. Njengoba uPetersen engadlali ngenxa yokugula ekuholele ekutheni ahlinzwe, uBvuma unikwe ithuba lokuzibonakalisa. Ukubuya kwakhe kuqondane nomdlalo wabakhaya neZimnyama, wangenelwa ngamagoli amathathu ezakhe zakhala ngaphansi ngo 3-0. Ngaphandle kokuthi uBvuma unethuba lokukhombisa abaqeqeshi baMakhosi ukuthi ijezi limfanele noma eseluleme uPetersen, unomthwalo wokujulukela inkontileka entsha. Inkontileka kaBvuma neChiefs izophela ngoJuni kodwa leli qembu linombandela wokuyivuselela ngonyaka. Abanye abadlali abaphelelwa yizinkontileka kwiChiefs nguPetersen, Dillan Solomons, Sibongiseni Mthethwa, Nkosingiphile Ngcobo, Thabo Cele, Pule Mmodi noTashreeq Morris. UBvuma ebhekene nobunzima bokulenza elakhe ijezi njengabanye onozinti abakhulele kwiChiefs abagcine bengamaqhawe eNaturena. Kubona kubalwa uKhune noBrian Baloyi owagcina esedlalela iMamelodi Sundowns. UKhune ucashunwe yi-Soccer Laduma ethi uBvuma kufanele ayozama kwelinye iqembu. "Kungaba kuhle ukumbona eya lapho ezodlala khona. Uyakhula, uma engakwenzi lokho...akadlali njalo. Kade elindile ukuthola ithuba. Yebo, lokho kwenzekile kodwa ngebhadi akalibambanga ngezandla zombili. Yingakho ehliselwe endaweni yesibili," kusho uKhune. Emidlalweni emithathu ebuyele aseyidlale kwiChiefs, uBvuma ungenelwe ngamagoli amane. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa ungomunye wabadlali okulindeleke basize iChiefs icoshe amaphuzu amathathu kwiMagesi FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-6 ntambama.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: EzikaSK zihlangene zanzela omunye wabo okuhle kodwa Ziqalile ukutheleka izipheko kwigidangoma likaMthandeni SK "Igcokama Elisha" Manqele njengoba lizosinelwa kubo eDubeni, eMelmoth ngoJuni 28. NgeSonto uMthandeni neqembu lakhe iSK Brothers yibona abavule inkundla ngokuphekisa uTekisi "Nkintsho" Ntetha ngezinkomo ezintathu, utshwala obebungangamanzi okuphala izikhumba nesamba semali esingadalulwanga. Ebebehamba noMthandeni basine bededelana ngokushaya indishi, okusho ukunikela ngemali ngokwamakholwa. Ngosuku lomgcagco kuzoqopheka umlando njengoba umdidiyeli wamabutho akwaMandlakazi, kwaNongoma, uPhakel'umthakathi Ndabandaba ezoba wumqhathi kumgangela wabaculi bakamaskandi abazobe beziphethe ziphelele. Lolu dwendwe luzobuye luhlanganise abaculi abayinkukhu nempaka, uMthandeni noKhuzani ngenxa yokuthi uTekisi uqale ukuvelela ngokugidela uKhuzani ngaphambi kokuhlubukela kweyaseMdletsheni. Bobabili bakuqinisekisile ukuthi bazobe bekhona kulolu dwendwe elinesasasa. UMthandeni SK ufike nenqwaba yotshwala ephekisa igidangoma lakhe uNkintsho Injabulo kuTekisi ebona izipheko ezifike nabeSK Brothers

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNkk Thuli Khumalo USHAYA amakhala umndeni wowesifazane okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa ngesihluku kanye nendodana yakhe eNgwelezane, eMpangeni. Kulesi sigameko esenzeke ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uNkk Thuli Khumalo (56) nengane yakhe yomfana uMbuso Khumalo (13). Kuthiwa izidumbu zabo zitholwe ekhaya, zinamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Ngokusho kwesihlobo esicele ukungadalulwa, umndeni kawuyizwa kahle eyokubulawa kwabo “yisigebengu”. Sitshele Isolezwe ukuthi esinye isihlobo esisondelene nomufi, sitshele umndeni ukuthi isigameko senzeke sikhona naso ekhaya. Kuthiwa sithe sona besicashile ngesikhathi isigebengu sigwaza sibulala owesifazane nendodana yakhe. “Okudidayo wukuthi esitatimendeni asibhalise emaphoyiseni, uguqukile kulokhu akusho emndenini, wathi ufike isigameko sesenzekile kodwa umbonile umsolwa kancane,” kusho isihlobo. Elanda ngalokhu okuthiwa isihlobo sikutshele amaphoyisa, umthombo uthe siwatshele ukuthi sifike ekhaya sibuya emsebenzini, saqaphela ukuthi akukhanyisiwe endlini kodwa kuvuliwe. “Uveze ukuthi uthe esengaphakathi wabona isithunzi sithi shazi, wazitshela ukuthi uMbuso. Uthe uhambe wayokhanyisa ngasekhishini, lapho abone khona ukuthi akuyena uMbuso kodwa isigebengu esiphethe ijazi lakhe ne-laptop, maqede, saphuma sabaleka,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi isihlobo sitshele amaphoyisa ukuthi siphumile sasijaha isigebengu, esivele seqa uthango, sawa, sashiya phansi i-laptop nejazi. “Uthe ngesikhathi esebuyela endlini, ilapho abone khona ukuthi uMbuso ulimele, wase etshela omakhelwane,” kusho umthombo. Umthombo uthe ngesikhathi kufika umndeni nomakhelwane endaweni yesigameko, lesi sihlobo besingakayikhulumi ekalona wesifazane. “Kubuze umndeni ukuthi uphi uThuli, kwayima kuqala ecingwa. Yiso sihlobo esijike samthola kuqala phansi kombhede, naye egwaziwe,” umthombo usho kanje. Uthe awekho amaconsi egazi abeconse aze ayofika ngaphansi kombhede. Uthe basola sona isihlobo lesi ngokufa kwalaba ababili ngenxa yokushintshashintsha inkulumo uma sichaza okwenzekile. Umthombo uveze ukuthi basola ukuthi lesi sihlobo sifike sagwaza lona wesifazane, sase sifihla isidumbu sakhe ngaphansi kombhede. “Sisola ukuthi uMbuso yena ubulawelwe ukuthi ubone okuthile, naye wasale esebulawa,” sisho kanje. Umthombo uqhube wathi okunye okwenza bashaye amakhala ukuthi bathole ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule, ukuthi lona wesifazane ubehlukunyezwa kuleli khaya. “Yena uMbuso uke wagijima waya emzini wesinye isihlobo, eyocela ukuthi sizolamulela unina ngoba uyashawa. Nebala waficwa eshaywa ngempela,” kusho umthombo. Uthe yena futhi uMbuso ubethi uma edlala nezinye izingane, akhiphe amazwi athi ziyajabula zona ngoba abazo omama abashaywa muntu. “Siwatshelile amaphoyisa konke lokhu nokuthi sifuna uphenyo lwawo luqale khona egcekeni ngoba aseneme ngezitatimende ezingafani,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uLt Col Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngoLwesine. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka," kusho uMagwaza. Uthe akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ITOYOTA Starlet ngesikhathi ihlolwa ukuphepha kwabagibeli uma iba sengozini I-AUTOMABILE ASSOCIATION (AA) isizwakalise ukuphoxeka ngemiphumela etholwe yiToyota Starlet kulandela ukubhacaza kwayo ihlolwa ukuphepha kwabagibeli uma iba sengozini ngabeGlobal New Car Assessment Programme (GNCAP). I-Starlet ihlolwe ngaphansi komkhankaso we-AA ne-GNCAP i-#SaferCarsForAfrica lapho kuvivinywa khona ukuphepha kwezimoto “ezishibhile” ezidayisa kuleli. IStarlet ithole iqanda ngenxa yokuhluleka kwayo ukuvikela abagibeli abadala uma iba sengozini. Nokho, uRiaan Esterhuysen, oyiSenior Manager Product PR and Corporate Communications kwaToyota South Africa Motors (TSAM), uthe imoto ehlolwe yi-AA indala futhi akuyona abayidayisayo njengamanje. “IToyota Starlet edayisa kuleli ithuthukisiwe kanzulu futhi ihambisana nayo yonke imigomo yezokuphepha yakuleli kanjalo neyakwaToyota emhlabeni jikelele,” kusho u-Esterhuysen. Kutholakale ukuthi i-Starlet iyahluleka ukuvikela abagibeli, ikakhulukazi uma ishayisa ohlangothini ngenxa yokungabi nezinto ezifana nama-airbag eceleni. I-AA ikuvezile ukuthi imoto ebiyihlola enama-airbag amabili, hhayi ayisithupha ethuthukiswe ngo-Septhemba. IStarlet isuselwe kwiSuzuki Baleno, nayo enama-airbag ngaphambili nasezinhlangothini. I-AA ithe izibalo zikhomba ukuthi bangaphezu kuka-20 000 abathenge iStarlet ngaphambi kokuthi ithuthukiswe ifakwe ama-airbag ayisithupha. “Abanikazi abaningi kungenzeka ukuthi abanalwazi ngokuthuthukiswa kwezokuphepha noma kunokungabaza ngokuphepha kwayo.” Ithe okunye okukhathazayo wukuthi abukho ubufakazi bokuthi nomzimba wayo uthuthukisiwe emuva kokwengezwa kwamanye ama-airbag. Ithembise ukuyihlola ethuthukisiwe ngokuhamba konyaka. Imiphumela yokuhlola ithole lokhu: Isikhulu sakwa-AA kuleli, uBobby Ramagwede, sithe iToyota Starlet ingenye yezimoto ezithandwayo futhi ukushaya kwayo udaka ihlolwa kubeka abanikazi nemindeni yabo engcupheni yokulimala uma iba sengozini. I-AA neGNCAP bathenga imoto kuleli bese beyiyisa e-Europe ukuze iyohlolwa. Imiphumela yakamuva eshicilelwe ithinta iChery Tiggo Pro ethole izinkanyezi ezimbili kwezinhlanu ngokuvikela abantu abadala uma isengozini ngenxa yokungabi nakho okokuphepha eceleni ekhanda kwabangaphambili nangemuva. Ngaphambi kwayo kwaba yiToyota Corolla Cross eyathola imiphumela efanayo ngenxa yakho belu ukungabi nakho okokuvikela abagibeli ekhanda eceleni. IMIPHUMELA yokuhlola ukuphepha kwezimoto ezidayisa kuleli, ezinye zazo ezingasatholakali

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kumenywa abantu ukuba baphawule ngezinguquko ezizokwenziwa INGCABHA isisemphakathini ukuthi uphawule ngomthetho ozovumela abantu bakuleli ukuthi bagcine omazisi babo kumaselula. Ngaphansi komthetho i-Identification Act ka-1997, bazokwazi nokugcina izitifiketi zokuzalwa, ezomshado kanjalo nolunye ulwazi olubalulekile lwaseMnyangweni wezaseKhaya. Izichibiyelo zalo mthetho zimenyezelwe wuNgqongqoshe wezaseKhaya, uDkt Leon Schreiber, onxuse umphakathi ukuthi uphawule ungakapheli uJuni kulo nyaka. "Ngalezi zichibiyelo sifuna ukuletha ubuchwepheshe besimanje ezintweni ezithinta omazisi kuleli. Omazisi abakhona ama-smart ID, bazoqhubeka basebenze kanye nalabo bobuchwepheshe. Ngaleyo ndlela sifuna kube lula kubantu ukuthi bagcine imininingwane yabo kanjalo neminye imiqingo  ebalulekile komakhalekhukhwini. Abazogcina omazisi kuphela, kodwa bazokwazi nokugcina izitifiketi zokuzalwa nezomshado," kusho uSchreiber. Uthe ngalokhu bafuna ukwenza izinguquko emnyangweni ngokuqinisa kwezobuchwepheshe. "Sifuna ukuvikela ulwazi lwabantu ngokuthi siqede inkohlakalo edla lubi emnyangweni, ukulwa nenkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho, ukuntshontshwa kolwazi lwabantu kanjalo nokuqinisa izinhlelo zethu. Sihlose ukuthi abantu bakwazi ukuthola izidingo behleli emakhaya," usho kanje. Uthe bafuna nokuphucula indlela okuqoqwa ngayo imininingwane yabantu emnyangweni. Uveze ukuthi bazoqinisa ezokuphepha ukuze imininingwanei yabantu ingafinyeleli ebantwini abangafanele. "Sisebenzisana neminyango ehlukene okubalwa nehhovisi likamengameli ukuqinisa ezobuchwepheshe kuhulumeni. Sifuna lonke ulwazi abantu baluthole kalula komakhalekhukhwini." Umphakathi unikwe kuze kube uJuni 6, 2026 ukuthi uphawule ngalezi zichibiyelo. Bangaqondisa ukuphawula kwabo ku:Chief Director: Legal Services kanti bangathumela ukuphawula kwabo ngokuzihambisela ngqo emnyangweni ekhelini elithi:10th Floor, Hallmark Building, 230 Johannes Ramokhoase Street, Pretoria, 0001. Bangathumela ngeposi ku:Private Bag X114, Pretoria, 0001. Bangaphinde bathumele nange-email ku:[email protected].

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema Image: Facebook/ DA KZN UMHOLI omusha we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema, uyihlomise wayibhekisa kowayengumengameli, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, neqembu lakhe iMKP. UNgema uthe ufuna ukuthi baqinise kakhulu umkhankaso wabo wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngakubo kaZuma, eNkandla. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi be-DA KwaZulu-Natal, ebingempelasonto. UNgema oyikhansela kuMasipala waseThekwini, wehlule ilungu lePhalamende, uMnuz Mzamo Billy, embangweni wokuhola i-DA KwaZulu-Natal. UNgema uthe amanzi avele asengenile endlini kuZuma njengoba sebenomholi obamele esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme esiseNkandla. "Sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi siyakhula eNkandla. Kade ngikhuluma nosihlalo we-DA eNkandla, ngamtshela ukuthi kufanele sibe nabantu abazongenela ukhetho lwamakhansela khona." UNgema uthe abayesabi nakancane iMKP eyafika kwezwakala okhethweni lukazwelonke lwango-2024. "Siyazi ukuthi kukhona iqembu elisha elifaka izikibha ezimhlophe, singangalo." UNgema uthe ayikho indawo abangeke bakhankase kuyo lapha KwaZulu-Natal. "Sizokhankasa kuzo zonke izindawo zaKwaZulu-Natal, sizokhankasa kubona bonke omasipala. Kulabo abahambe bethi siyinhlangano ebandlululayo, abaqhubeke nokusho njalo kodwa thina sizoqhubeka nokuhambisa izidingo kubantu. Abanye babethi i-DA ayisoze iphathe lapha KwaZulu-Natal. Buka namhlanje sinabaphathiswa kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal futhi siphethe uMasipala waseMngeni." UNgema uthe ufuna iqembu likhule kuzona zonke izindawo. Uthe bazoqhubeka nokukhuluma namakhosi nezinduna ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi iqembu liyakhula ezindaweni zasemakhaya. UNgema ukhulume ngobunzima kuhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal abayingxenye yawo kodwa wathi bazoqhubeka nokuyibamba ishisa kuhulumeni ababambisene kuwo ne-IFP, ANC neNFP. "Siyazi ukuthi kunezinkinga kuhulumeni wesifundazwe. Abasimele esiShayamthetho bayaqhubeka nokufuna izimpendulo kubaholi be-ANC. Ukuthi sibambisene ne-ANC akusho ukuthi sekufanele siyeke lokho esikholelwa kukhona." Abanye abaholi abaqokelwe ezikhundleni uNgqongqoshe wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson, oqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo, kwathi uMphathiswa wezeMsebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Martin Meyer, waqokelwa kwesePhini lomholi. Abaqokelwe kwesePhini likasihlalo yiPhini leMeya kuMasipala waseMngeni, uMnuz Sandile Mnikathi, ilungu lesiShayamthetho, uMnuz Sakhile Mngadi, nomxhumanisi we-DA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UKHETHUKUTHULA Ndlovu weKruger United (osebholeni) owathathwa exinwe uLihle Dlamini weMidlands Wanderers, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu osekusele kancane lidle isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship UMDLALI wasophondweni lwesokunxele kwiKruger United, uKhethukuthula “Jaguar” Ndlovu, ukholwa wukuthi sekusezandleni zabo ukufeza isifiso sikasihlalo waleli qembu sokulibona likhushulelwa esigabeni seBetway Premiership. IKruger ihlezi esicongweni se-log yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngamaphuzu awu-55 emuva kwemidlalo engu-28. Ivule igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili phakathi kwayo neMilford FC neHungry Lions abayilandela ngawu-47 endaweni yesibili neyesithathu. Idinga amaphuzu amathathu kuphela emidlalweni emithathu esele ukuze ibe ngompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship. Umdlalo wayo wasekhaya ezowudlala neBlack Leopards namuhla ngo-3 ntambama KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane, yiwona obukeka uzoba yingqophamlando kwiKruger ngokukhuphukela esigabeni sePremiership. Uma leli qembu laseBushbuckridge, okuyisizini yalo yesibili kwiMotsepe Championship, liphumelela ukukhuphukela kwiPremiership, lizoba ngelesibili lasesifundazweni iMpumalanga. Okwamanje lesi sifundazwe sishaya ngeTS Galaxy kuphela. UNdlovu, odlale amasizini amabili kwiRoyal AM, ngomunye wabadlali abanamava okudlala kwiPremiership iKruger eqinise ngabo isikwati sayo ngaphambi kokuqala kwale  sizini. Phakathi kwabo kubalwa uWandisile Letlabika, Morne Nel, Kagiso Malinga, Celimpilo “Zidane” Ngema, Sipho Sibiya ongukaputeni, Tercious Malepe, nonozinti uPhilasande Manqele obolekwe kwiRichards Bay FC. Ngewindi likaJanuwari, iphinde yaqinisa isikwati ngoNtsako “Neverdie” Makhubela noLindokuhle “Ma-11” Mtshali. “Sekuseduze phambili, futhi wonke umdlali okhona eqenjini uyakuqonda ukubaluleka kokuthi siwunqobe umdlalo esiyowudlala neBlack Leopards, yize sazi ukuthi akuzukuba ngumdlalo olula njengoba nayo ilwelwa ukusuka ezembeni. Kodwa esizibophezele ngakho wukuthi silwe njengamabhubesi, sikhiphe amandla okugcina sifeze isifiso sikasihlalo wethu (uBasil Khoza) sokubona iqembu likhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership. Sesilwe kakhulu ngakho asikwazi ukuyilahla ekugcineni sesisebenze kangaka. Sekusezandleni zethu manje ukuphetha imbenge,” kusho uNdlovu, odabuka eBathenjini, eMsinga. UNdlovu ungomunye wabadlali abasale dengwane ngesizini edlule ngenkathi iRoyal AM ixoshwa yiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngenxa yamacala ebibhekene nawo ngokukweleta umqoqi wentela, i-SARS. Ngaphandle kweKruger esizibeke ethubeni lokungena kwiPremiership, amaqembu asenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs yiMilford, Hungry Lions, Cape Town City neCasric Stars. Esishozini sezembe nakhona isabambene ngezihluthu phakathi kweLeopards, Midlands Wanderers, ne-The Bees. ILeopards esendaweni ka-15 kwi-log ingase ibe sengcupheni yokulandela abakhaya bayo baseLimpopo iBaroka FC asebevele begawulwe yizembe. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Milford FC v The Bees (Umhlathuze Sports Complex); Hungry Lions v Upington City (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Kruger United v Black Leopards (KaNyamazane Stadium); University of Pretoria v Lerumo Lions (Tuks Stadium) Venda FC v Leicesterford City (Thohoyandou Stadium); Cape Town City v Gomora United (Athlone Stadium)

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISIu-Andile Mxhakaza oseveze izindaba zokuthi ukusindiswa ngenye yezinto ezimsizile empilweni yakhe U-ANDILE Mxhakaza uthi ukukholwa kumsizile ekuthatheni izinqumo ezihlukene empilweni yakhe manje kunakudala. Uthe wakhetha ukusindiswa ngo-2019 nokuyinto emshintshe kakhulu, ngisho elingisa. Kulezi zinsuku u-Andile ubonakale elingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni othi Isithembu SikaMsongelwa. Kanti emasontweni amabili edlule umenyezelwe njengomunye wabalingisi abasha emdlalweni Isitha: The Enemy isizini yesine eqale ekuqaleni kwale nyanga. Kulo mdlalo ulingisa indawo kaMapholoba okungowesilisa ongumgulukudu wesigebengu. U-Andile uthe ukuthola indawo ayeyilingisa emdlalweni Ishaka-Ilembe nalena ayilingisa manje, kwakungelula kodwa ukuzila ukudla nokukhuleka kwamsiza kakhulu. "Ngaqeda ukuqopha Ishaka-Ilembe izinto zathula kakhulu ngemuva kwalokho, ngacishe ngalahlekelwa yithemba empilweni. Kodwa umndeni wami nokukholwa kwangisiza kakhulu ukuthi ngihlale nginethemba lokuthi izinto zizolunga ngelinye ilanga. Uma ngiya koqopha kwiShaka ngangiya sengikhulekile ukuze izinto zihambe kahle. Kuthe uma ngithola le ndawo ngase ngiyipakishile imithwalo yami ngiya kwelinye izwe kodwa sekusele usuku ngihambe ngafonelwa kwathiwa umsebenzi ngiwutholile, ngajabula kakhulu ngabona ukuthi ukholo lwami lungisebenzele," kusho u-Andile. Uthe indawo kaMapholoba, ibe nzima kakhulu kuye njengoba kumele akhulume ngezindlela ezihlukene nokuyinto engelula. "Abantu bazomthanda uMapholoba ngoba ungumuntu oyisigebengu esiphinde kube sengathi silungile uma sibona abantu abaningi, kodwa kulabo esibhekane nabo, kunzima kakhulu. Umdlalo lengithi mina ezinyangeni ezintathu ezizayo uzoba mkhulu kakhulu, futhi kuningi abantu abazokufunda kuwo ngenxa yezinto ezizokwenzeka ," kusho yena. Uthe kuningi okumehlele empilweni futhi ukuthatha isinqumo ngempilo yakhe kwenze washiya izinto ezindala. UMxhakaza uzakhele udumo ngokulingisa kwiTaxi Bosses, Housekeepers, Isibaya, The Righ, Gog' Helen nakwiZone 14.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: NGAPHAMBI kokuba ingqalabutho yomlingisi, uCynthia Shange, idlule emhlabeni yakuveza ngo-2024, ukuthi kwake kwambulwa kwembeswa kuyo ngenxa yesifo sikashukela kangangoba yaze yanqanyulwa izinzwane. UCynthia (76), oshonele kwesinye sezibhedlela zaseKZN, ngezintathakusa zangoMsombuluko, emuva kokugula, wazisholo yena ukuthi wasizwa uShembe lesi sifo sifuna ukumjuqa ngalowo nyaka. Umufi wadalula ukuthi uphethwe yisifo sikashukela ngesikhathi ehlonishwa ngendondo ye-Lifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards eThekwini, ngoJulayi 2024. Wathi lesi sifo saqala ukumxina ngo-2018, kangangoba wagcina esegqigqa esibhedlela futhi nodokotela baze bafuna nokumnqamula umlenze. "Bengizokwamukela lo mklomelo ngiqhutshwa ngenqola kodwa ngibonga umusa kaNkulunkulu," esho ngo-2024. Wathi waze wasizwa ukuqambela odokotela amanga ukuze anganqanyulwa umlenze. "Ngo-2018, ngesikhathi ngisuka eGoli ngiya eThekwini, ngaba nokugula okwangenza ngalaliswa esibhedlela izinyanga ezintathu. Kwakunzima ngiphakathi kokuphila nokufa. Ngibonga uShembe ngokusindisa impilo yami sengiphelelwe yithemba. Ngasenga ezimithiyo ngokubatshela ukuthi kunesivumelwano engisenzile sokuqopha ifilimu, esingangenza ngihlawuliswe u-R5 million uma ngisephula. Bafonela indodakazi yami ukuba izosayina amafomu ukuze nginikezwe ama-antibiotics." Esikhundleni sokunqanyulwa umlenze, uCynthia wathi wagcina enqanyulwe izinzwane onyaweni. UCynthia odabuka eLamontville, waba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama kuleli ukumela iNingizimu Afrika ku-Miss World eLondon, ngo-1972. Wathola le ngqayizivele yethuba emuva kokuhlabana ngesicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngenxa yokuthi ngezikhathi zobandlululo abantu abamnyama babengavunyelwe ukuqhudelana nezinye izinhlanga. Nakhona ku-Miss World waphuma endaweni yesihlanu, okwenza amantombazane amnyama aba nogqozi nofuqufuqu lokungenela imiqhudelwano yonobuhle kusukela ngo-1992. Akugcinanga lapho, uCynthia uqhubekile nokuvelela endimeni yezokungcebeleka njengoba waba wumlingisi oqavile efilimini yokuqala ende yesiZulu eyayithi uDeliwe, lapho uCynthia ayelingisa khona noSimon Mabhunu Sabela, Ndaba Mhlongo, Sydney Chama, Roland Mqwebu, Patience Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho, akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho, walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango, lapho ayelingisa khona indawo kaMaButhelezi unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu). Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement kuma-South African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakuma-Simon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema nabazukulu nesizukulwane. Ngokwesitatimende somndeni, imininingwane ngezinhlelo zomngcwabo isazomenyezelwa. U-CYNTHIA Shange ewina isicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngeminyaka yo-1970s UNDABA Mhlongo ephethe into enesithombe sikaCynthia Shange kuSivumelwano U-CYNTHIA Shange emele iNingizimu Afrika ngo-1972 U-CYNTHIA Shange elingisa noSindi Dlathu kuMuvhango U-CYNTHIA Shange mhlazane ehlonishwa ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement U-CYNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaloli abesetshenziswa ukweba uphethiloli Abasolwa abangu-11 abaneminyaka ephakathi kuka-27 no-46 baboshwe esikhungweni sikaphethiloli eMeyerton ngamalungu ophiko loKlebe lweTactical Operations Management Section ngeSonto ekuseni ngamacala okweba uphethiloli. Amalungu e-TOMS oKlebe athole umbiko lwezobunhloli mayelana nobugebengu obuzokwenzeka eMeyerton lapho okugcinwa khona uphethiloli. Ulwazi lulandeleke ngendlela futhi lendawo yaqashwa ngaphansi kweso elibukhali. Ngesikhathi kusagadiwe, kubonakale amaloli amabili ethangi engena kule ndawo okuthe uphenyo lokuqala lwaveza ukuthi kwenzeka into engafanele kuphinde kwaba nezinsolo zokuthi onogada abaqaphe le ndawo kungenzeka ukuthi baxhumane nabasolwa abayisishiyagalolunye ababoshiwe. Kuboshwe abasolwa abangu-11 ngetulo lokweba uphethiloli

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USIYA Kolisi ngesikhathi evalelisa kubalandeli beHollywoodbets Sharks emuva kokunqoba kwiZebre Parma UKAPUTENI wamaBhokobhoko, uSiyamthanda “Siya” Kolisi, uvalelise kubalandeli baseThekwini, abengaconsi phansi kubona ngama-try amabili ngesikhathi esiza iHollywoodbets Sharks ilobola iZebre Parma yase-Italy ngo 54-19 emdlalweni wokusonga isizini ye-United Rugby Championship (URC). Lo mdlalo obuhanjelwe yizinkumbi zabalandeli yize ubungasasho lutho ngaphandle kokuba ngowokugcina kaKolisi, ubungoMgqibelo ntambama eHollywoodbets King’s Park Stadium, eThekwini. UKolisi usenesikhathi akumemezela ukuthi uzolishiya leli qembu laseThekwini, abuyele kwiDHL Stormers okuzomsiza asondele emndenini wakhe oseKapa. UKolisi uvele waxolisa kubalandeli beSharks emuva komdlalo wokugcina wesizini nobekungowokugcina wakhe edlubhe umfaniswano weSharks ngaphambi kokuqala isizini entsha namaStormers ngoJulayi. Nakuba iSharks ishaye udaka kule sizini ikakhulukazi kwi-URC, abalandeli bayo kabazange bayilahle kwazise imidlalo yasekhaya ibihlale ihanjelwe yizinkumbi zabalandeli. Kungenxa yalolu thando lweqembu olukhonjiswe ngabalandeli beSharks uKolisi ophoqeke ukuba akuqhakambise ukuthi uyaxolisa ngokubashiya kepha uphoqwa yisimo. Ukuphoqeleka kwalo mdlali ukushiya kwiSharks kufakazelwa nayimibiko yokuthi imali azoyihola ngenyanga eKapa incane kakhulu uma uyiqhathanisa nabegoduka nayo ngesikhathi ekwelikaBhanana. “Iqiniso esingakwazi ukulibalekela singabadlali ngokuthi sibaphoxile abalandeli beSharks kule sizini,” kusho uKolisi. “Ngizizwa ngihloniphekile ngendlela engamukelwa ngayo eThekwini, ngesikhathi ngifika kodwa ngihamba nginesibhobo enhliziyweni yami. “Nakuba inhliziyo yami ibuhlungu ngokuhamba ngingashiyanga lutho kodwa ngiyohlale ngisikhumbula isikhathi engisichithe neSharks nabalandeli bayo bakuleli dolobha eselifana nekhaya kimina. “Ngiyabonga ngokungenza ngiziwe ngiyilungu lomndeni kodwa ngiyaxolisa ngokuthi kasizange sibanike abalandeli okubafanele ekubeni iqembu belibophele lonke uhlobo oluphambili lwabadlali ongalucabanga."

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UDECLAN Rice ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka kwi-Arsenal esethubeni lokuqeda ishobolo lamasizini awu-21 esicoco se-English Premier League YIZE besekubukeka i-Arsenal FC isiphunyukwe yisicoco se-English Premier League ibhinciselwe nxanye yizimbangi iManchester City, kodwa ukulahla amaphuzu kweCity ibambana ne-Everton ngeledlule kuphinde kwanika leli qembu laseLondon elinye ithuba. Njengoba womabili la maqembu ehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amabili, i-Arsenal iqhwakele ngawu-79, iCity isendaweni yesibili ngawu-77. Imidlalo emibili esele yiyona esizocacisa ukuthi isicoco siya eLondon noma eManchester. Kusukela iguqiswe yizimbangi, iMan City ngo 2-1 ngo-Ephreli 19, i-Arsenal ivuke yazithatha njengoba isiyinqobe yomithathu ilandelana imidlalo eyidlalile okubalwa noweWest Ham ewunqobe ngo 1-0 ngeSonto eledlule. Isalelwe yimidlalo emibili ezoyidlala neBurnley, edlalelwa ngumgadli weBafana Bafana uLyle Foster, neCrystal Palace. Izodlala neBurnley ngoMsombuluko ngo-9 ebusuku e-Emirates Stadium, eLondon. Isonge nePalace ngoMeyi 24 eSelhurst Park. ICity ezodlala owamanqamu weFA Cup namuhla ngo-4 ntambama eWembley Stadium, eLondon, isalelwe yimidlalo yePremier League ezoyidlala neBournemouth ne-Aston Villa. Izodlala neBournemouth ngoLwesibili ngo-8.30 ebusuku. Ukuhlala amaphuzu kwe-The Gunners emidlalweni emqoka kwenza kubhekwe ngabomvu ukuthi izokwazi yini ukuzibamba ziqine kule midlalo emibili esele igweme ukuphoxeka. Yize izobhekana neBurnley esivele igawulwe yizembe kodwa kungaba wukuzigwaza ngowayo ukuthatha kancane leli qembu okungangatshazwa ukuthi abadlali balo bazodlalela isithunzi nokuzidayisa emaqenjini ePremier League kule midlalo esele. Ngisho nomqeqeshi we-The Gunners, uMikel Arteta, uyavuma ukuthi ukushaywa kwezakhe yiMan City yikho kanye okubavuse emaqandeni. “Sisebenzise lokho kwehlulwa kwethu (yiMan City) njengesifundo nanjengesikhuthazi ekuqondeni umsebenzi esesiwenzile kuze kube yilesi sikhathi sesizini,” kuso u-Arteta, ecashunwa e-AFP. I-The Gunners osekube ngamasizini amathathu kusukela ngeka-2022/23 ilala isibili kwi-log yePremier League, ngaphansi kobuholi buka-Arteta inenselelo yokuqeda isomiso samasizini awu-21 sokungayinqobi iligi yePremier League. Yagcina ukuyinqoba ngesizini ka-2003/04. Imidlalo ye-English Premiership: Manchester United v Nottingham Forest Brentford FC v Crystal Palace; Everton v Sunderland; Leeds United v Brighton; Wolverhampton v Fulham Newcastle United v West Ham NgoMsombuluko - Ngo-9pm: NgoLwesibili - Ngo-8.30pm: Bournemouth v Manchester City Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-ABDESLAM Ouadoou ongumqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, uzothembela kubafana bakhe ukuthi bahlule iDurban City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, namuhla ukuze ezongena emlandweni Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, usethubeni lokungena emlandweni okhethekile kuleli qembu uma enqoba isicoco seBetway Premiership. IPirates izobhekana neDurban City emdlalweni owandulela owokugcina wePremiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. Owokusonga isizini izowudlala ne-Orbit College eMbombela Stadium, eMpumalanga, ngoMeyi 23. EZimnyama zidinga ukwehlula iCity ukuze zizochonywa uphaphe lwegwalagwala. Zagcina ngesizini ka-2011/2012 ukuba ngompetha bwePremiership beqeqeshwa ngu-Augusto Palacios wasePeru owanikwa umsebenzi sekuyophela isizini. Lesi sicoco zasisheba nendebe yeMTN8 neyeTelkom Knockout. IPirates yayikwenzile lokhu ngesizini ka-2010/2011 iqeqeshwa nguRuud Krol waseNetherlands. Lokhu kusho ukuthi nakulokhu zinethuba lokudla izindebe ezintathu ngesizini kwazise sezifake ekhabetheni indebe yeMTN8 neyeCarling Knockout. U-Ouaddou waseMorocco usethubeni lokuzifaka emlandweni wokuba ngumqeqeshi wesibili wasezwenikazi, i-Afrika (ngaphandle kowaseMzansi), ozowina isicoco seligi nePirates kusukela kwasungulwa iPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngo-1996. Uma engasiphakamisa, uzolandela ezinyathelweni zikaRoy Barreto waseZimbabwe owasiwina neZimnyama esuka kwiQwaqwa Stars ngesizini ka-2002/2003. Uzoba ngumqeqeshi wesihlanu emlandweni weZimnyama owine isicoco seligi okukhona kubona uPalacios, Krol, Barreto no-Gordon Igesund owasiwina ngesizini ka-2000/2001. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uzongena emlandweni wokuba ngumqeqeshi wesibili onqobe iligi kwiPirates ngesizini yakhe yokuqala okuyinto eyenziwa nguBarreto kuphela kusukela kwasungulwa iPSL. Abukho ubufakazi bokuthi u-Ouaddou uyawazi umlando angase angene kuwona uma abafana bakhe bengaqeda ngeCity namuhla kodwa uchithe isonto lonke egcizelela ubumqoka bokungabhiyozi umsebenzi ungakapheli. Iqiniso wukuthi kunemizuzu engu-90 okufanalele bayidlale e-Orlando ezobe ingcwele ichichima kwazise amathikithi adayiswe aphela. Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership Namuhla ngo-3 ntambama: AmaZulu v Kaizer Chiefs (Moses Mabhida Stadium); Chippa United v Golden Arrows (Nelson Mandela Bay Stadium); Orlando Pirates v Durban City (Orlando Amstel Arena); Polokwane City v Marumo Gallants (Old Peter Mokaba Stadium); Richards Bay v Sekhukhune United (Mhlathuze Sports Complex); Siwelele v Magesi FC (Dr Petrus Molemela Stadium); Stellenbosh FC v Orbit College (Danie Craven Stadium)

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UNOZINTI we-Orlando Pirates, uSipho Chaine, ngomunye wabadlali abamqoka njengoba isembangweni weligi yeBetway Premiership Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UKUHLALA esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership kwe-Orlando Pirates kukhomba ukushintsha kwezinto kule ligi esiphathwe yiMamelodi Sundowns iminyaka. IPirates ishaya amaphiko kwiPremiership lapho ibambene khona neSundowns ngamaphuzu angu-44 emidlalweni engu-19. Lokhu akusajwayelekile ebholeni laseMzansi kwazise iSundowns ijwayele ukuzidlela amahlanga, iwine iligi kusasele imidlalo eminingi kuphele isizini. AmaBrazilians asewine iligi amahlandla ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. Kungenzeka ukuthi ukumiswa kabi kwayo yiPirates kuwubeka engcupheni umbuso wayo ngeligi eyiwine ngaphansi kwabaqeqeshi abahlukene. Ngesizini edlule ka-2024/2025, iSundowns ibivule igebe lamaphuzu angu-15 phakathi kwayo nePirates emuva kwemidlalo engu-19 nakuba eZimnyama bezisele ngemidlalo emine. Ibinamaphuzu angu-51, iPirates inangu-36 emuva kwemidlalo engu-15. Sekungumlando ukuthi iPirates igcine ihlulekile ukuyifica iSundowns. Ngesizini ka-2023/2024, iSundowns yayiqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-53 emuva kwemidlalo engu-21. Emuva kwayo kwakuhlezi iStellenbosch FC ngawu-39 emuva kwemidlalo engu-22. Lokhu kwakusho ukuthi idinga amaphuzu angu-11 emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili ukuwina iligi. Nokho kule sizini itshe ligaya ngomunye umhlathi kwiSundowns njengoba isembangweni oshisa phansi nePirates. Umqeqeshi weZimnyama u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, uthe kuhle ebholeni laseMzansi ukuthi alikho iqembu elivule igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni se-log. "I-PSL iyiligi eqinile, ikakhulukazi kule sizini. Sikubonile lokho, wumjaho webanga elide. Emjahweni awuwehlisi umgqigqo wokuwina ngakho emidlalweni esisalele sizokwenza konke okusemandleni, sibone okwenzekayo," kusho u-Ouaddou. "Siyabona ukuthi lithakaselwa kakhulu ibhola. Kuhle lokho ebholeni nakubalandeli. Uma iqembu lihamba phambili ngamaphuzu angu-15 phakathi nesizini, yini engakwenza uthande ukubuka imidlalo? Ngicabanga ukuthi yilokhu okufunwa ngabalandeli. Ngamaqembu amabili adlala kahle alwayo. Lokhu kuhle ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika." NogLwesibili kungenzeka kulalwe iSundowns isivule igebe lamaphuzu amathathu njengoba izobhekana ne-Orbit Collenge e-Olympia Park, eRustenburg, ngo-7.30 ebusuku. IPirates izothola ithuba lokulinganisa uma isigijimisana neRichards Bay FC e-Orlando Amstel Arena ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Njengoba amaBrazilians eseyoqhubeka nemidlalo yeCaf Champions League, iPirates izothola ithuba lokuyikweletisa. Nakuba iPirates ihlezi esicongweni se-log kodwa ngesonto eledlule, umqeqeshi weLamontville Golden Arrows, uManqoba Mngithi uthe ubona iSundowns izophinda isidle isicoco seligi. Emasontweni adlule, lokhu kushiwo ngu-Eric Tinkler oqeqesha iSekhukhune United.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTOYA Delazy enomkhulu wakhe uMntwana waKwaPhindangene ngo-2019 KUSINDA kwehlela kumzukulu woMntwana waKwaPhindangene futhi ongumsunguli weNkatha Freedom Party, uNontokozo "Toya Delazy" Buthelezi, njengoba esecela inkongozelo kubantu bakuleli ukuze abuyele ekhaya. Kushaqeke abaningi ngesikhathi lo mculi wodumo lwengoma ethi Pump It Up ethi uswele imali yokuyokhangisa ngecwecwe lakhe elizayo kwiPodcast and Chill with MacG. "Ngimenywe kwiPodcast & Chill manje inkinga wukuthi ngiphesheya kwezilwandle futhi iKerosene imba eqolo ngenxa yempi (ngiya kanye onyakeni ekhaya) - ningakwazi ukungixhasa ngemali yebhanoyi?" Uthe ubezokwenza le ngxoxo ngosizo lwezinkundla zokuxhumana kodwa akufani nokuba se-studio. "Nikwenzile kuJacinta ukuxosha abadayisa emgwaqweni. Ngifuna ukuxosha abacindezeli kule ndima yethu. Benza izinto ezibulale amaciko amaningi avelele." Nakuba kunjalo i-EP iyaphuma ngoMeyi 20. "Ngizimele futhi ngitshala imali kimi ngqo. Ngihlala kude ngoba ngavalwa kodwa ngizophinde ngizame. NgiwuToya Delazy futhi ngake ngaba wumculi omkhulu e-Afrika. Manje ngiwumculi ongaqondakali e-Afrika." Yize uToya Delazy abelindele ukuthola uxhaso kodwa bavele bamtinyela, bethi akasebenzise imali yefa likamkhulu wakhe. Kwenzeka lokhu nje uToya ubesanda kukhala ngokuvalwa komculo wakhe emisakazweni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Le ntokazi yaseMahlabathini yathi sekuphele iminyaka engu-13 ihluleka ukwenza umculo wayo udlale emisakazweni. UToya Delazy wathi akahleli eLondon ngoba ethanda kodwa uphoqelekile ukuba azidingise. Wathi ukushiya iNingizimu Afrika kwakungesiyo intando yakhe kodwa kwaba yimpoqo ngenxa yokuthi uphila ngomculo." UToya Delazy wathi ukuba nyamanambana kuleli akuqalanga manje kodwa kuqale ngaphambi kuka-2017, okuwunyaka ahamba ngawo. Wathi ukucwaseka kwaqala mhla elaxaza inkampani ayeqopha kuyona maqede wazisungulela eyakhe. UToya Delazy wathi namanye amaciko awasafuni ukusebenzisana naye ezingomeni ngoba esaba ukuthelwa amachaphazelo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNTWANA uGcwalisile kaGideon Zulu-Kabanyane SEKUPHINDE kwehla omunye umshophi eNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukushona kochazwa njengenqolobane, uMntwana uGcwalisile kaGideon Zulu. UMntwana uGcwalisile ubengumbhali wezincwadi, abe nenhlangano ethuthukisa abesifazane, kanti futhi uke wasebenzela izinhlaka zikahulumeni ezihlukene. UMntwana uGcwalisile uyindodakazi yowayenguMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uMntwana uGideon. Okhulumela iSilo neNdlunkulu, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe bagqenywe engeqiwantwala ngokuguqa kukaMntwana uGcwalisile. "Uzokhumbula ukuthi uMntwana ubengumbhali wezincwadi njengoba eke wabhala incwadi nangoyise. Uke wabhala incwadi yamahubo, ebhalela izikole. Ubeyinqolobane uqobo lwayo njengoba ulwazi abeluthola kuyise abelugcina. Uma uzokhumbula kahle sebebancane kakhulu abaseNdlunkulu abadala abasadla anhlamvana. Kunzima uma sibabona behamba," kusho uMntwana UMntwana uThulani uthe kuyabakhathaza ukushona ngokulandelana kwabaseNdlunkulu. "Lolu daba lubanga amahloni. Uma ukhumbula kusuka ngomhla ka- 18 Ephreli kuhlezi kunomngcwabo eNdlunkulu. Ngaleyo mpelasonto kwakungcwatshwa oSuthu (uMntwana uGibizizwe), ngelandelayo kwakungcwatshwa kithi (eZibindini, uMntwana Gcinabani Thembisile Zulu). Kule mpelasonto bekungcwatshwa uMntwana uMuziwoxolo. "Sibona sengathi kunomshophi okuyinto ejwayelekile eNdlunkulu. Kuvamile ukuthi uma kwehla umshophi bese kwenzeka ngokulandelana. Sikhalela iSilo ukuthi ngesikhathi saso bese kuhamba abantu abadala." Indodana kaMntwana uGcwalisile, uLuyanda Kabanyane, ifake umyalelzo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho imemezele khona ukuguqa koMntwana. Icele ukuba banikwe ithuba lokuzila njengomndeni. Ibandla obekukhonza kulo uMntwana uGcwalisile, iMethodist Church of Sourthern Africa Paarl Valley Circuit, limchaze njengomuntu obezinikele futhi enothando. "Ubeyisibusiso ebandleni. Uzakhele igama ngokusebenzela uNkulunkulu. Sizohlezi siwakhumbula amagalelo akhe." UMntwana uGcwalisile uneziqu zobudokotela azithola eNyuvesi yaseToronto, eCanada. Ngo-2011 waklonyeliswa emcimbini wamaqhawe namaqhawekazi owawuhlelwe yiNedbank. Waklonyeliswa ngomsebenzi owenziwa yinhlangano ayisungula iQolothani Makhosikazi.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UHAMBE uphethe izipho ezihlukene umndeni kaNkk Thezani Mkhonza owaba unomehlo wokuqala eVryheid, ngoMgqibelo, obekwenziwe umcimbi wokumkhumbula, lapho iMeya yaseBaqulusini, uMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi, imbonge lona wesifazane ngokuzinikela ZIVEZE ukuthi wazikhuthaza ukuthi zihloniphe wonke umuntu emhlabeni ezihlangana naye izintombi ezaba nenhlanhla yokuqeqeshwa nguNkk Thezile Mkhonza, izolo okube nesikhumbuzo sakhe eCecil Emmet, eVryheid. UNkk Mkhonza ongasekho, waba owokuqala ukuba unomehlo ohlola izintombi kule ndawo. Isikhumbuzo sakhe besihanjelwe yizintombi aqala ukuzihlola, umndeni wakhe, amakhosi nabomndeni waseNdlunkulu kaZulu. BEZIPHUME ngobuningi bazo izintombi ngoMgqibelo, eVryheid, kukhunjula unomehlo wokuqala kuleli dolobha, uNkk Thezani Mkhonza UNksz Anami Zondo ongomunye wezintombi ebezikhona, uthe noma sebekhulile kodwa angeke aze akukhohlwe abakufundiswa yilona wesifazane besuka emakhaya ahlukene. "Noma sengiganile, ngahamba ngaya kude ngomsebenzi, ngeke ngikulibale umama uMkhonza ayesitshela khona, ikakhulukazi okuthinta inhlonipho, wayeyazisa inhlonipho. Ngijabule kakhulu ukuthi kwenziwe umcimbi ofana nalona," kusho uNksz Zondo. UNksz Busisiwe Manqele uthe okunye uNkk Mkhonza abatshela khona ukuthi bakhuthalele imfundo ukuze babe nezinto zabo bangathembeli kwabesilisa, uma sebeganile. "Akagcinanga ngokugcizelela inhlonipho, wathi asizame ukuzenzela okwethu sikhuthalele imfundo njengoba abantu besilisa engafuni sithembele kubo kakhulu. Wayesitshela ukuthi asikhuthaze nenye intsha ize ematshitshini ukuze izofundiswa ngokuziphatha, yazi ukuthi izohamba kanjani empilweni.
