Namanje noma engasekho, ngiyacela intsha ukuthi ihambe iyohlolwa ngoba ziningi izinto ezifundwa laphayana," kusho yena. UNkk Sibongile Nsibande othathe izintambo kuNkk Mkhonza, uthe ushona nje ngo-2020, kuningi la ayesehambe khona eshintsha indlela izintombi okumele zibukeke ngayo. Uthe imifaniswano egqokwa yizintombi manje ezindaweni ezihlukene yasungulwa yilona wesifazane, neyagcina isigcwele zonke izindawo. "Siyabonga kuNkk Sibonga Dlamini ngokuthi sifike nalo mbono, wasukumela phezulu wathi umcimbi walolu hlobo kumele ube khona, nakhu namhlanje sihlangene lapha. Ngiyacela kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand nomncane Abaqulusi ukuthi baqhubeke nokuseseka uma kukhona esikucelayo ukuyisa izintombi phambili," kusho yena. UMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi oyiMeya kuMasipala waseBaQulusini, uthe abakwenzayo bakwenzela ukuhlonipha amakhosi akhona. "Siyabonga emndenini wakwaMkhonza nezihlobo zabo ngokusiboleka umama wabo, njengoba ubenomndeni kodwa ubegcwala zonke izindawo lezi ukuze agcine isiko. Likhulu igalelo elibanjwa onomehlo ngakho kumele nathi sibeseke kukhona konke abakwenzayo," kuchaza yena. Kulo mcimbi bekukhona amakhosi, abantwana baseNdlunkulu kaZulu beholwa uMntwana uNkinobho neMeya yaseZululand, uMnuz Micheal Khumalo.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UTSHEGOFATSO Mabasa we-Orlando Pirates obolekiswe kwiStellenbosch FC kuze kuphele isizini I-ORLANDO Pirates izowugijima neStellenbosch FC "ibanjelwe" umdlalo weBetway Premiership wokunciphisa igebe lamaphuzu eliphakathi kwayoneMamelodi Sundowns esicongweni se-log kwazise izisindisile ebungozini bomgadli embolekise kwiStellenbosch, uTshegofatso Mabasa. Lo mdlalo obhekwe ngabomvu umphumela wakhona kubathandi bebhola laseMzansi, uzodlalwa namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa. IPirates esele ngomdlalo, ilandela emuva kwiSundowns ngamaphuzu amahlanu esicongweni se-log yePremiership njengoba isizini izosongwa ngasekupheleni kwenyanga. IBucs egcine ukuba senkundleni ngasekupheleni kwenyanga edlule emdlalweni ebambane kuwona neKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-1 e-FNB Stadium, izodinga amaqhinga okubuya namaphuzu amathathu kuleli qembu eliholwa nguGavin Hunt. UMabasa ophelelwa yinkontileka nePirates emasontweni ambalwa ezayo, ngeke adlale namuhla ngenxa yesivumelwano esiphakathi kweZimnyama neStellies esivimbela ukuthi abhekane nazo. Yize iPirates yayingakwazi okuzokwenzeka ngesikhathi ibeka lo mbandela ekubolekaneni kwayo neStellies kodwa isivuna izithelo njengoba isizobhekana naleli qembu laseKapa, engekho uMabasa osekhombisa ukubuyelwa yifomu yakhe. Kusukela uMabasa efikile kwiStellies, usephenduke omunye wabadlali bayo abamqoka kule sizini okubukeka sengathi zidonsa kanzima kuyona ezikaHunt. Lo mgadli iPirates ebolekise ngaye esesele ngamagoli ayisishiyagalombili ngaphambi kokufica irekhodi lomdlali oshaye amagoli amaningi eliphethwe nguBennedict Vilakazi, useyibhakuzise amahlandla amane inethi kwiStellies emidlalweni yeligi engu-11. Lokhu kuwubufakazi bokuthi iPirates iyona esethubeni lokuqoqa amaphuzu amqoka eKapa, kwazise isikhali seStellies esikhulu sizowubuka nabalandeli umdlalo. Ngesikhathi iStellies ibhekene neSundowns muva nje, uMabasa usuke ebhentshini waba yiqhawe lePirates engaqondile, eshaya phakathi iphenathi ephuca ompetha beligi amaphuzu amabili ngemizuzu yokugcina yomdlalo. “Kuyajabulisa ukuthola umdlali wohlobo lukaMabasa, yikhona nje ukuthi kunezikhathi lapho singeke sivumekele khona ukumsebenzisa ngisho ngabe simdinga kangakanani,” kwasho uHunt ngoJanuwari, uMabasa eqeda ukushaya igoli lakhe lokuqala kwiStellies.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: SBHEKWE ngabomvu isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo ngodaba lwePhala Phala noMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa KUNGASE kuvuke upelepele ogqokweni azithole ebhekene nohlelo lokukhishwa esikhundleni uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, njengoba iNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo izokhipha isinqumo ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Inkantolo izokhipha isinqumo esibhekwe ngabomvu namhlanje ngo-10 ekuseni. Inkantolo izonquma ukuthi kwakusemthethweni yini ukuthi iPhalamende lichithe umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo. Umbiko wawuthole ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuthathwa ngozwane kwenkece. Ukuchithwa kombiko kwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyuka esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-EFF ne-ATM babe sebefaka isicelo enkantolo bephonsela inselelo ukuchithwa kombiko. Bese kunesikhathi kulindwe isinqumo senkantolo njengoba icala laqulwa ngo-2024. I-EFF ike yaba nemibhikisho ehlukene ifuna ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo. Amalungu e-EFF azobe ebhikisha ngaphandle kwenkantolo namhlanje uma sekuphuma isinqumo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe uRamaphosa angase azithole esesobishini uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF. UNdlovu uthe uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF kuzoba nzima kuRamaphosa njengoba i-ANC ingasenazo izihlalo ezanele ePhalamende ezingenza ichithe noma yimiphi imizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. UNdlovu uthe kufanele uRamaphosa athandazele ukuthi amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni aphikisane nemizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. "Abantu bamaqembu abusa ngokubambisana yibona engibabheke kakhulu. Umbuzo uthi amaqembu angaphakathi kuhulumeni wokubambisana ngabe azozama yini ukumvikela noma azokwenza umsebenzi wawo ngobuqotho." UNdlovu uthe kuzophinde kuncike nasohlelweni oluzosetshenziswa uma kuba nesiphakamiso sokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. "Uma kuvotwa ngokuyimfihlo uRamaphosa angajikelwa ngisho nangamalungu e-ANC angahambisani naye. Uma kuvotwa ngokuvulelekile uzosinda." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Tambo, uthe basibheke ngabomvu isinqumo senkantolo. "Bese kuphele izinsuku ezingu-521 silinde isinqumo senkantolo. Yi-EFF kuphela ebilokhu imile, ifuna ukuthi uRamaphosa aphendule. Sibe nemibhikisho eminingi saphinde sabhalela nenhloko yamajaji (Jaji Mandisa Maya) sifuna izimpendulo ngalolu daba. Ukubambezeleka kwesinqumo kwenza ukuthi abantu bengazithembi izinhlaka zomthetho," kusho uTambo. Izinhlaka eziningi ezaphenya ngalesi sigameko okubalwa kuzo ihhovisi lomvikeli womphakathi, uphiko oluqapha ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa i-Ipid, iBhange loMbuso neSA Revenue Services zamkhipha phambili uRamaphosa. Lezi zinhlaka zalahla ngecala amaphoyisa ayegada uRamaphosa asolwa ngokuthi ashaya abasolwa aphinde asebenzisa izinsiza zoMbuso eyofuna abasolwa eNamibia. Umholi we-ATM ePhalamende, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, ukhale ngokuthi izinhlaka zoMbuso zivikela uRamaphosa. "Lapha sibhekene nomuntu ovikelwa yizinhlaka zoMbuso ezihlukene. Abantu into okufanele bayazi wukuthi akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho. Naye umengameli kufanele abhekane nengalo yomthetho." Okhulumela iHhovisi likaMengameli, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, unxuse ukuba abantu balinde isinqumo senkantolo. "Kunzima ukukhuluma manje ngoba inkantolo ayikasikhiphi isinqumo. Kunzima ukuthi sengingasho ukuthi kuzokwenzekani uma isinqumo senkantolo sisho lokhu. Okungcono asilinde ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Iyaqhubeka imizamo kuhulumeni yokulwa nomdlavuza. KUNENGEBHE ezikhulwini zoMnyango wezeMpilo kuleli ngokuthi umdlavuza ungase udlebeleke ubulale inqwaba yabantu uze udlule neHIV/AIDS. Izikhulu seziyisukumele eyokusheshe kuhlonzwe umdlavuza ukuze ungagcini usubulala abantu abaningi kuleli.. Lokhu kushiwo nguNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo kuleli, uDkt Aaron Motsoaledi izolo ethula isabelomali sika-R64.8 billion, ePhalamende. Ukhale ngomdlavuza womlomo wesibeletho athe ulele endaweni yesibili ngokubulala abesifazane kuleli. "Umdlavuza webele yiwona osabulala kakhulu abesifazane kuleli. Umdlavuza womlomo wesibeletho ulele endaweni yesibili ngokubhuqa abesifazane kanti yingakho siyisukumela eyokuvikela abesifazane kulo mdlavuza. Izingane zamantombazane ezineminyaka engu-9 kuya ku-15, zivikelwa ngokuthi zithole umgomo iHPV ezikoleni. Abesifazane abaneminyaka engu-35 kuya ku-45 kumele bahlolele njalo lo mdlavuza ukuze bakwazi ukusheshe bahlonzwe," usho kanje. Uthe sebeze nobuchwepheshe besimanje ukuze bavikele abesifazane kulo mdlavuza. "Abantu abaningi besifazane besibenza i-Pap smear ukubahlola lo mdlavuza kanti manje sesizobahlola sisebenzisa ubuchwepheshe besimanje bolibofuzo. Sithole ukuthi u-65% wabesifazane okutholakale ukuthi banalo mdlavuza, basuke behaqwe nayiHIV," kusho uMotsoaledi. Uveze nokuthi ngenyanga ezayo bazokwethula ngokusemthethweni umgomo wokuvikela abangakahaqwa yiHIV, iLenacapavir. "Umengameli wezwe uzokwethula lo mgomo ngoJuni 5, ngenyanga ezayo. Inhloso wukulwa nokusabalala kweHIV ngokuvikela abangakahaqeki. Abaseqhulwini ekutholeni lo mgomo kubalwa abesifazane abakhulelwe, abancelisayo, abaqwayizi, amadoda alala namanye, abazijova ngezidakamizwa kanjalo nentsha," usho kanje. Uthe basaqinisile nasempini yokulwa nokusabalala kwesifo sofuba esijuqa abantu abaningi kuleli. "Ngonyaka sifuna ukuhlola abantu abangu-5 million ukuthi abanayo yini iTB ngoba asifuni isabalale ngoba iyabulala kakhulu. Ngisanda kuthola imishini okwazi ukwehla wenyuka nayo yokwenza i-X Ray, ongakwazi ukuhlola isifo sofuba kubantu noma bekuphi kuphume imiphumela manje." Uthe imali abayithola kuMgcinimafa yokuphucula isimo kwezempilo, seyenze izinto eziningi okubalwa ukuqasha odokotela nabanye abasebenzi bezempilo. "Siqashe odokotela abangu-933 kwabangu-1 200 esasithe sizobaqasha. Sithenge imibhede eyevile ku-25 000 ezibhedlela. Sithenge ne-linen ebalelwa ku-73 000, nomatrasi ababalelwa ku-88 000 ezibhedlela zakuleli," usho kanje. Ukhale ngokuthi ukuncishiswa kwesabelomali kuyawushaya umkhakha wezempilo kuleli.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNKSZ Nobukhosi Zulu odukile UZWA ubuhlungu obuphindiwe owesifazane wasePanikeni, eMariannhill, eThekwini, njengoba sekuyophela unyaka ebambe ngamazinyo abazukulu abathathu bendodakazi engekatholakali namanje nokusolwa ukuthi yenzakaliswa umastende (69) oyisangoma ngoJuni nyakenye. Kulesi sigameko okusolakala ukuthi senzeka ngasekuqaleni kukaJuni nyakenye, kwanyamalala ngendlela engaqondakali uNksz Nobukhosi Zulu (34) nendodakazi eyayinezinyanga ezingu-18. Ngokuthola komndeni, bagcina ukubonwa behamba nomastende, betshethe izikhwama, besuka emqashweni oseSunshine khona eMariannhill. Unina kaNksz Zulu, uNksz Thandazile Ngcobo (52), utshele Isolezwe ukuthi yena wathintwa yisoka lendodakazi, limbuza ukuthi ukhona yini ekhaya njengoba sekwenzeke okungajwayelekile, ukuthi bangabikhona emqashweni isikhathi eside. Uthe emva kokulandula, isoka labuyela emqashweni ukuyobuzisisa kahle ukuthi wanyamalala washonaphi nokuyilapho khona bathola ukuthi mhla begcina ukubonwa, babehamba nomastende. “Iziqashi zaseluleka ngokuthi asihlale silinde ukuphela kukaJuni, sibone ukuthi ababuyi yini ngoba ujwayele ukuzothatha imali ye-rent njengoba ayengumuntu ohlala eMgungundlovu. Yaphela inyanga, lutho ukuqhamuka,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo. Uthe yilapho abathola khona inombolo kamastende, bamfonela bambuza ukuthi uphi iNksz Zulu nengane, wabaphika wathi akabazi. Uthe babe sebenikela emaphoyiseni ukuyobika isehlakalo, kwavulwa idokodo lokulahleka komuntu. “Sathi sisabheke uphenyo lwamaphoyisa, kwavumbuka olunye ulwazi lokuthi ubonakale efika eNdwedwe nengane encane, wathi uma ebuzwa, wathi umzukulu wakhe,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo. Uthe lezo zindaba zashaqisa ngisho nendodakazi yakhe umastende njengoba yaphumela obala yathi unina akanamzukulu. Uthe yabe isicela abaseNdwedwe ukuba bathumele isithombe sengane efike nonina maqede wayibiza ngomzukulu. “Yilapho okwathi uma kuthunyelwa khona isithombe, kwatholakala ukuthi umzukulu wami onezinyanga ezingu-18. Kwathi uma amaphoyisa eya emzini wakhe oseMgungundlovu, nebala amfica umzukulu wami ephila,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo, othe indodakazi yakhe yayingabona nangokhalo. Uthe ngisho esebuzwa umastende ukuthi uphi uNksz Zulu, wamphika wathi akamazi. Kuthiwa ngesikhathi ebuzwa ukuthi kwenzeke kanjani ukuthi ingane yakhe itholwe kuye uma engamazi, wangundaza. Kuvela ukuthi zabe sezimkhalela lapho, yize umnyakazo ngecala ungakaze ucaciswe emndenini kamgilwa. “Kube yimuva nje, lapho ngithintwe khona umphenyi omusha, ongitshele ukuthi leli cala lizongena maduze enkantolo, angibeke phansi umoya,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo. Uthe kuze kube yimanje ubuthongo akabazi kwazise ngeke alikhombe ithuna lendodakazi yakhe, athe uzwa egazini ukuthi yabulawa. “Ngisola ukuthi wayibulala ingane yami, wenza ngayo imithi njengoba kuthiwa uyisangoma. Ngisho nezihlobo zakhe zamchaza njengowesifazane ongalungile,” usho kanje. Uthe akufisayo ubulungiswa, kujeziswe lona wesifazane ngesenzo sakhe, bese egonyuluka ukuthi indodakazi yakhe wayigqiba kuphi. Ubike olunye usizi, wathi izingane ezintathu kwezine zikamgilwa akanamandla okuzikhulisa, ucela usizo. “Endala (15) ihlala kubo kayise, lezi ezinye ezintathu okukhona kuzo eneminyaka emibili, eyisithupha kanjalo neyishumi, zihlala nami. Zingabazukulu bami, akukho lapho ngingaziyisa khona kodwa ngiyasizwa. Ngelinye ilanga sike silale singadlile, kungekho engizokupheka,” usho kanje. Uthe lokhu kuyazikhahlameza izingane naye ngokunjalo njengoba esengumuntu wamaphilisi, kwazise waqalwa ukugula emva kokunyamalala kwendodakazi ngendlela engaqondakali. Uthe kubazukulu kukhona ongenaso isitifiketi sokuzalwa, wathi ababili basanda kuba nazo, osekusilele ukuthi enze imizamo yokubabhalisela isibonelelo sabantwana sikahulumeni. “Noma iluphi usizo ngingalujabulela. Ngihluphekile, enyameni nasemphefumulweni ngiguliswa ukuthi indokakazi yami yanyamalala ngendlela engaqondakali kahle, ngapha nginokhwantalala lokuthi kunabazukulu okufanele ngibakhulise,” usho kanje. UNKSZ Nobukhosi Zulu odukile

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates u-Abdeslam Ouaddou ovume eyokunukelwa yisicoco seligi emakhaleni NAKUBA ekuvuma ukuthi sesimnukela emakhaleni isicoco seligi umqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, kodwa ushumayela ivangeli lokungayiqali imibhiyozo kuze kube sekusemthethweni ukuthi bangompetha. IPirates esele ngomdlalo kwiMamelodi Sundowns (eqhwakele), inqobe ngo 3-0 wamagoli kaPatrick “Tito” Maswanganyi, Kamogelo Sebelebele no-Oswin Appollis kwiMagesi FC koweBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo ebusuku ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Le wini isondeze iPirates kwiSundowns esicongweni se-log njengoba isimbalwa imidlalo esele ukuba kuphele isizini ka-2025-2026. IPirates neSundowns abaqala ngokuqala kwayo isizini ukubanga isicoco seligi bangase baqede belingana uma beyinqoba yonke imidlalo yabo esele kodwa iPirates inethuba lokuba ngompetha kwazise ivunwa yizibalo zamagoli. ISundowns iyayisonga isizini yayo kusasa ne-TS Galaxy eMbombela Stadium, kodwa iPirates izobe isasalelwe ngowasekhaya neDurban City ngempelsonto ezayo nowokugcina ekuhambeni ne-Orbit College FC ngoMeyi 23. “Siyakhuleka kuMdali ukuthi sisike iphethini eqenjini lethu leDDC (DStv Diski Challenge) sisidle nathi lesi sicoco ngoba iminyaka engu-14 yisikhathi eside ukuthi abalandeli bePirates bangabuka abamanye amaqembu bebaklolodela ngokuhlabana kwamaqembu abo,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Sekuseduze kodwa umsebenzi kawukaqedwa ngakho-ke kusemqoka ukuyimisa okwamanje imibhiyozo kuze kube semthethweni ukuthi singompetha. “Okumnandi kakhulu ngalokhu okwenzekayo ngukuthi iPirates iphethwe ngabantu okubafanele ukuthi balandelwe yimpumelelo emihle kumasizini onke njengamanye amaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu. “Abadlali abasemabhukwini ePirates kule sizini bayamangalisa ngoba isimo abakusona nethuba lomlando abami phambi kwalo bakukhombisa ngabakwenza enkundleni ukuthi bayakuqonda. “Siyanuka emakhaleni isicoco kodwa wonke amandla esinawo kufanele siwafake emidlalweni emibili esisalele. “Kumqoka ukuya kule midlalo esele ngomqondo ohluzekile kwazise sibhekene kuyona namaqembu alwela indawo kwi-Top 8 nasesigabeni esikhulu sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika ngokwahlukana,” kusho u-Ouaddou.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, owathathwa exhawulana nowe-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ubona kuyifanele i-Orlando Pirates ukuthola umvuzo ngenxa yokuphikelela kwayo embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership iminyaka ilandelana. IPirates esiqede endaweni yesibili ngemuva kweMamelodi Sundowns amasizini amathathu elandelana kusukela ngeka-2022/2023, idinga amaphuzu amathathu kwiDurban City e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, ukuze izowina iligi eyayigcina ngesizini ka-2011/2012. ISundowns iwine isicoco seligi amasizini ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. “Yebo, kusengenzeka noma yini kodwa e-Orlando akubuyi lubuyayo. Kwesinye isikhathi kufanele sincome lapho okufanele sincome khona. Abantu uma beya laphaya e-Orlando bathola amagoli amahlanu, abanye ayisithupha, nathi sithole amathathu,” kusho uZwane sakuncokola. “Bakwelinye izinga (iPirates) uma bedlalela kuleya nkundla. Uma ubheka kula masizini amathathu edlule bebelokhu bengqongqoza, beqeda endaweni yesibili kwi-log. "Esikubona manje kwi-PSL kuyafana nesikubona e-England. Mina qobo lwami angiyilandeli i-Arsenal kodwa engingakutshela khona njengomqeqeshi wukuthi ngenxa yokuzinikela nokushabasheka kwe-Arsenal kuyifanele ukuwina iligi. "Kodwa njengomqeqeshi oqeqesha lapha kwi-PSL, angikwazi ukusho ukuthi ubani nobani kufanele awine ngoba ngingumqeshi nami olwela ukuzuza okuthile neqembu engiliqeqeshayo.” AmaZulu azotholana phezulu neKaizer Chiefs kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Usuthu ngokwezibalo ngeke lusakwazi ukugudluza iChiefs endaweni yesithathu eyisango lokungena kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Selulwela ukungagudluki endaweni yesine. “Nakuba sigcine ngisakwazanga ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu kodwa uma ubheka umsebenzi esiwenzile njengeqembu laMaZulu, simangaze abaningi ngalesi sikwati esisihlanganisile ngabadlali iningi labo ebelingenawo amava okudlala kwiPremiership, abanye babo abebedlala ezigabeni zama-amesha.  Anginandaba ukuthi ubani uthini, ngingabafela laba bafana ngenxa yomsebenzi abawenzile kule sizini. Okusemqoka manje wukulwela ukugcina indawo yethu yesine kwi-log okungumgomo ebesivele sizibekele wona njengeqembu isizini iqala,” kuqhuba uZwane ophonsele inselelo abadlali bakhe ngomdlalo abazowudlala neChiefs. “Kuzofanele bakhiphe amangwevu, bakhombise ukuthi bazimisele ukunqoba ngoba imidlalo yalolu hlobo yiyona eyakha abadlali, ibaqinise ukhakhayi. Sizobe sidlalela ekhaya, osekunesikhathi sagcina ukuhlulwa sidlala khona.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ABADLALI beDurban City bejabulela igoli elibanqobise umdlalo wamanqamu weNedbank Cup begqisa iTS galaxy ngo 2-1. IDURBAN City iqophe umlando ngokuba yiqembu lokuqala laKwaZulu-Natal emlandweni ukuzuza indebe yeNedbank Cup iguqisa i-TS Galaxy emdlalweni wamanqamu eNedbank ngoMgqibelo kusihlwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Amagoli aqinisekise ukuphela kweshobolo  nesomiso sezindebe seminyaka ewu-16 KwaZulu-Natal avalelwe phakathi uMfanafuthi Mkhize noJean Lwamba. ULwamba ongumgadli odabuka eDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC), ushaye elokunqoba ngomzuzu ka-72 elungisa iphutha lakhe, kwazise iGalaxy ibithole igoli ngaye ngesikhathi umkhonto ugwaza ekhaya esiwombeni sokuqala. ICity ayiqedanga nje kuphela ishobolo isomiso sezindebe eKZN eyagcina ngeLamontville Golden Arrows ngesizini ka-2009/10 inqoba i-MTN8, kodwa iqede ishobolo leminyaka ewu-54 lesi sifundazwe sibhekwe yisambane kulo mqhudelwano womkhumulajezi. Kusukela ngesizini ka-1971 lo  mqhudelwano usaziwa ngeLife Challenge,  amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal abelokhu ehluleka ukuwunqoba. Emaqenjini aseKZN aseke afinyelela kowamanqamu phambilini kubalwa AmaZulu FC, African Wanderers, Manning Rangers, nayo iCity eyaguqa kowamanqamu ngesizini ka-2017/18 isabizwa ngeMarizburg United. ICity, okuyisizini yayo yokuqala le ikhushulelwe esigabeni seBetway Premiership, beyize kulo mdlalo wamanqamu inenhloso yokuziqophela owayo umlando ngokuwina indebe yayo yokuqala kusukela yasungulwa. Ngakolunye uhlangothi iGalaxy beyize kulo mdlalo izimisele ngokusinqoba okwesibili lesi sicoco kwazise yasinqoba ngesizini ka-2018/19 ishaya iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0. ICitizens iqeqeshwa uPitso Dladla osabambile noziqophele owakhe umlando ngokunqoba indebe yakhe yokuqala esigabeni sePremiership.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: AMANXUSA omcimbi Ingoma kaZwelonke, uBahubhe noKhuzani Mpungose bephahle uXolani Mcinelka esithangamini sabezindaba ngesikhathi kumenyezelwa izinhlelo zomcimbi walo nyaka ozoba ngenyanga ezayo KULINDELEKE ukuthi kuguge imbadada kugqebhuke umhlaba ngoJuni 27, ePeople's Park, eThekwini, njengoba abahleli bomcimbi wengoma owaziwa ngokuthi Ingoma kaZwelonke, ngoLwesihlanu, bememezele izinhlelo zomcimbi walo nyaka. Lo mcimbi ozobe uhlanganisa iminyaka emihlanu waba khona, uXolani Mcineka ongomunye wabahleli bawo, uveze ukuthi abaziqhenya ngakho ukuthi wenze izinto ezinkulu emagoseni. Uthe namhlanje kukhona imicimbi ehlukene ngenxa yokuthi bakhetha ukusungula umcimbi ofana nalona. UMcineka uveze ukuthi abagcinanga lapho kodwa benza isiqiniseko sokuthi amagosa ayahomula uma kukhona imicimbi ayihambelayo ngenxa yawo njalo umsebenzi abawenzayo. “Usuku olukhulu lolu njengoba ingoma kukhona into eyenzayo kubantu ngokwehlukana kwabo. Abanye bahlengezela izinyembezi, kuvuke imizwa ehlukene. Ngakho umcimbi lona umuntu afunda okuhlukene kuwo unyaka nonyaka. Nakulo nyaka sizomemezela ukuthi lo mcimbi uzoba khona futhi kuzobe kunandisa amaqembu angu-60. Ngeke sikwazi ukufaka amanye amaqembu ngaphezu kwalawa. Wonke amaqembu esike saba nawo kule minyaka ayazimisela kakhulu futhi kuba nzima ukuthi ukhiphe amanye ufake amanye kodwa kuningi esikubhekayo okusha nokuhehayo esithuthukisa ngakho lo mcimbi, bese sibafaka emaqenjini azonandisa,” kusho uMcineka. Ubuciko nokunandisa ngezinto ezihlukene engomeni uthe yizona zinto abazifunayo ukuze kube mnandi engomeni. “Siyabonga kubantu basoLundi naseNkandla abaletha amakhono asishiya sibambe ongezansi ngonyaka odlule. Kwavela ukuthi impi akuyona nje eyokubulala kuphela kodwa ikhona nasengomeni, nokuyinto ezokwenzeka kulo nyaka. Impi kulo nyaka angikuveze ukuthi iphakathi kweziFunda iKing Cetshwayo neZululand,” kusho uMcineka. Umculi kamaskandi uKhuzani oyinxusa kulo mcimbi uthe kusukela kulo mcimbi uqala kuze kube manje babonga ukubekezelelana okuba khona phakathi kwabahleli namagoso, wathi umdlalo oba khona kulo mcimbi uyabajabulisa futhi banxusa abantu ukuthi baphume ngobuningi babo ngosuku lomcimbi. UBahubhe ongumculi kamaskandi naye oyinxusa lalo mcimbi, uveze ukuthi yena uselinde usuku lomcimbi njengoba konke sekukhulunyiwe ozakwabo.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI weMamelodi Sundowns, uSiyabonga Mabena, ngomunye wabathwele leli qembu kwiDStv Diski Challenge Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IMAMELODI Sundowns iqhubekile nokukhombisa ukuthi yilona iqembu okungathenjelwa kulona ekuphazamiseni i-Orlando Pirates eshosholozayo emjahweni weligi yeDStv Diski Challenge. ISundowns icoshe amaphuzu amathathu kwiSiwelele FC emdlalweni obuse-UJ Soweto Campus izolo, ewunqobe ngo 2-1. Lo mphumela uqinisekise ukuthi iSundowns isahleli endaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-36 emuva kwemidlalo engu-17. IPirates, exebule iSekhukhune United ngo 2-1, izihola phambili ngamaphuzu angu-43 emuva kwemidlalo engu-17. Ukuvula kwayo igebe lamaphuzu ayisikhombbisa esicongweni se-log akubuzwa ukuthi kuyibeka ebuhleni njengoba sekuqale umzuliswano wesibili wesizini yeDiski. Nokho, iSundowns isalokhu iqhubekile nokuhlala eduze, igade ukuqhuzuka kweZimnyama ezisemkhankasweni wokuwina iligi okokuqala emlandweni weDiski eyasungulwa ngo-2014. Nakuba iSundowns ibukeka izoyifaka ingcindezi iPirates kodwa kunzima ukuziba iStellenbosch esiyiwine kabili iligi yeDiski. Leli qembu, eliphekwa ngu-Evangelos Vellios, linyukele endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-34 ngemuva kokwehlula iMagesi ngo 4-1 e-Idas Valley, eStellenbosch, ngoMgqibelo. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukwenyuka kweStellies, esele ngamaphuzu amabili kwiSundowns, kuzoyinika ithemba lokuthi isengafika esicongweni uma kuqhuzuka iPirates ejwayele ukwehluleka ekugcineni. Womabili amaqembu alandela iPirates anaso isipiliyoni sokuwina iligi kodwa eZimnyama zishaya ngomqeqeshi, uRoscoe Krieling, owayiphakamisa indebe kwiSuperSport United eyiphini likaThabo Septhemba. Okudingwa yiPirates wukuqhubeka nokuqoqa amaphuzu ukuze ingaphindwa okujwayelekile, okuwukulahla iligi emidlalweni yokugcina yesizini. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeDStv Diski Challenge: Kaizer Chiefs 0-0 TS Galaxy; Orlando Pirates 2-1 Sekhukhune United; Stellenbosch FC 4-1 Magesi; Richards Bay FC 3-4 Golden Arrows; Chippa United 0-2 Durban City; Siwelele FC 1-2 Mamelodi Sundowns; Marumo Gallants 0-1 AmaZulu; Polokwane City 0-0 Orbit College.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-iCaur V27 okubhekwe ukuthi ifike eNingizimu Afrika ekupheleni konyaka noma ekuqaleni kuka-2027 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu KUYOPHELA le nyanga esevuliwe amagaraji enkampani entsha yaseChina engenisa kuleli i-iCAUR ezozethula ngezimoto ezimbili. I-iCAUR yinkampani engaphansi kweChery eyakha ama-SUV ahamba ngogesi. Kukhona nangama-Range Extended Electric Vehicle (REEV) okusho ukuthi ane-generator kaphethroli eshaja ibhethri. I-iCaur izoqala ngokudayisa i-V23 ezobe isilandelwa ngenye i-0T3. Embukisweni iBeijing International Auto Show ikhombise nge-SUV entsha esawumcabango okwamanje i-ROBOX. Ibukeka iyisiqwalantaba njengoba ifakwe amathayi asogwadule. Nokho imininingwane ephelele ngayo ayikho njengoba kusewumfanekiso. Enye iSUV abayethulile yi-V27 eshayelwa ngakwesokudla. Lokhu kusho ukuthi isizosabalala nakwamanye amazwe okubalwa kuwo iNingizimu Afrika ngasekupheleni kuka-2026 okanye ekuqaleni kuka-2027. Ngaphakathi i-iCaur V27 inkulu futhi intofontofo Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Sithole ingqayizivele yethuba lokuyizwa amandla sisuka eWuhu, sanqamula endaweni yezivakashi iGao Chun Old Street sashosholoza njalo phezu kwebhuloho iShijiu Lake Bridge elinganiselwa ku-12km ehlanganisa iLishiu neGaochun. Ngaphandle ibukeka sa-SUV koke wayibona njengoba kungathi yiLand Rover Defender, kwezinye izindawo ungathi ithathe kwiToyota Land Cruiser Prado. Ikhanyisa ngamalambu angama-LED, inamarimu angu-21 inch bese ishiya igabade ngo-224mm. Kuningi ongakwenza kuyo ngaphandle ukuze yehluke njengokuyifaka ama-roof rails, isitebhisi sokuya okhakhayini, izindawo zokulayisha emaceleni, i-towbar, uyakwazi nokuyiphakamisa ufake amasondo asobhuqwini nokunye. Uma ungena ngaphakathi ukuba wu-5m kwayo yilapho okubona khona ukubaluleka kwakho ngoba ivulekile. Inezihlalo zesikhumba futhi ngemuva angiboni kungaba khona ongakhala ngesikhala ngoba iwudedangendlale. Empeleni bengizitshela ukuthi ilayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa. Ngaphambili in-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu kodwa ngikuthandile ukuthi bafake namabhathini okuhlela amazinga okushisa ngezansi ukuze kube lula. Ukuba negiya eceleni kwesiteringi kuvule isikhala sezindawo ezimbili zokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo. Zikhona ezokushaja ngentambo ezimbili ngezansi bese kuba nezinye futhi ngemuva. Okhakhayini ebesihamba ngayo ibine-panaromic sunroof phakathi nendawo ehlukaniswe yisipikha sePioneer. I-iCaur V27 idonsa ngawo wonje amasondo ngezinjini zikagesi ezimbili. Injini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo isebenza ukushaja ibhethri ayiwafaki nhlobo amandla emasondweni. Lokhu kwenzelwa ukuqeda uvalo ukwazi ukuhamba ibanga elide kwazise ibhethri ingu-34.31kWh abathi uma ulishaje lagcwala ungahamba amakhilomitha alinganiselwa ku-150 ngogesi wodwa. Uma ithangi likaphethroli elingu-60 litre ligcwele bathi ingahamba amakhilomitha alinganiselwa ku-1000. Uma uthanda uyakwazi ukufaka ama-roof rails kwi-iCaur V27 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Amandla e-V27 Reev angu-335kW ne-torque engu-505Nm. Ihamba njengemoto kagesi ngenxa yokuthula kwayo futhi uma unyathela iyashesha nokuphendula ngamandla. Ngiyizwe intofontofo nasemgwaqeni angazi noma bekwenziwa yimigwaqo emihle yalapho besikhona engingabonanga ngisho nomgodi owodwa kuyo. Ibithule ngaphakathi, kubonakala ukuthi yimoto yokuzikhipha nomndeni nishaywe wumoya. Ingahamba nasobhuqwini ngenxa yokuphakama nokudonsa kwayo ngawo wonke amasondo kodwa akusona isiqwalantaba njengoba ingenayo i-diff lock no-4L. Lapho ngiqale ukuyizwa iduma khona yingesikhathi ipakile kuxhunywe umshini wokwenza ikhofi ngoba uyakwazi ukuyisebenzisa njenge-generator. Sihambe amakhilomitha angu-88 yaveza ukuthi idla 8.3l./100km. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana isiqalile ukususa ukukhuluma, silinde ukubona kuyoba njani uma sekuqinisekiswe nentengo yayo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo ngababili ababulawa eNgwelezane, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo zokuthi owesifazane waseSigisi, eNgwelezane, osanda kubulawa nendodana ngesihluku babulawa ngesinqindi. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umndeni wabafi uthole ubuhlalu okuthiwa babuhlobise isinqindi emva kwefriji ngempelasonto, njengoba bebefihlwa ngoMgqibelo. UNkk Thuli Khumalo nendodana yakhe, uMbuso Khumalo, kuthiwa bagwazwa bafa "yisigebengu" esahlasela ekhaya labo ngoLwesine olwedlule. Ngokusho komthombo, kuvele ngesikhathi kulungiselelwa umngcwabo ukuthi ummese, okuthiwa uNkk Khumalo wayesina ngawo ngesikhathi egcagca nyakenye awubonwa. “Izihlobo kuthiwa zigcine ziligqekeza ibhokisi lomshado likaNkk Khumalo, kulandela ukuthi isihlobo esisondelene nabafi, sale saphetha ukuthi livulwe,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zigcine ziphoqa ukuthi ligqekezwe nokuyilapho okubonakale khona ukuthi  ummese awukho. “Kuthiwa isihlobo kuthe uma sesibuzwa ukuthi uphi ummese, sathi siyabona ukuthi uthathwe yisigebengu,” kusho umthombo. Udalule nokuthi ngesikhathi kupeqululwa endlini, kube sekutholakala ubuhlalu obabuhlobise wona ummese, bulahlwe emva kwefriji. Ngesonto eledlule Isolezwe libike udaba ngokuthi izihlobo zabafi zishaya amakhala "ngesigebengu" okuthiwa sagasela kulo muzi, senzakalisa abafi. Zazikhala ngokuthi isihlobo ebesihlala nabafi sikhuluma izinto ezingafani ngesigameko. Ngakolunye uhlangothi kuthiwa lesi sihlobo satshela umndeni ukuthi isigebengu sigasele naso sikhona. Nokho kuthiwa emaphoyiseni sathi safika umonakalo usuvele wenzekile, isigebengu saphuma siqhasha, sesibona sona. Izihlobo ziphinde zaveza ukuthi okunye okwenza zishaye amakhala wukuthi kukhona izinsolo zokuhlukumeza amanye amalungu omndeni abazi ngazo, kodwa uNkk Khumalo ebengakaze abhoboke ngazo. Isihlobo sabafi, Isolezwe elalikhulume naso ngeledlule, sithe sesicela ukungaphawuli ngoba bayesaba. “Umndeni ubufuna lolu lwazi lube yimfihlo. Asazi ukuthi luphume kanjani,” kusho isihlobo. Owomndeni uqhube wathi okwenza umndeni ube namanzi emadolweni wukuthi akukaboshwa muntu namanje. “Kungangcono uma (umsolwa) esebanjiwe, esengaphakathi,” usho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLt Col Paul Magwaza, ngesikhathi eqinisekisa isigameko wathi amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngo-Ephreli 16. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka kuwo," kusho uMagwaza. Akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: AYANDA amaciko aseka umkhankaso wokuxosha abantu bangaphandle abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Kwaqala umlingisi wodumo kuMkhokha The Curse, uDeli Malinga, obengapheli kumamashi eMarch and March, ikakhulukazi eThekwini. Lo mkhankaso, owasungulwa wuJacinta Ngobese owayengumsakazi weVuma FM neGagasi FM, ube sewujoyinwa wumlingisi weShaka Ilembe uNkosikhona "Phakel'umthakathi" Ndabandaba nowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM, uNgizwe Mchunu. Umculi wamapiano uMbongeni "Oscar Mbo" Ndlovu uthe iNingizimu Afrika eyabantu abadabuka kuleli. "Kwanele. Uma abantu bangaphandle befuna ukuba kuleli, abalandele imigudu efanele. Njengomuntu ohambela kakhulu amazwe angaphandle, ubunzima esihlangabezana nabo uma sifaka isicelo sokwamukelwa abuchazeki." Uthe amanye amazwe abeke imigoqwana eyenza kubenzima ukungena kuwona. "Kungani thina singakwenzi lokho? Okunye abantu abangakwazi wukuthi kuthatha amahora angu-7 kuya kwawu-8 ukungena eLagos, eNigeria (noma ngaphezulu uma unganabo obhululu abangakusiza ukuthi ungene khona) ngenxa yemithetho yeVisa yakhona. "Uma ungene ngendlela engafanele, bakubuyisela ezweni lakho ngokuphazima kweso. Asikho isizathu sokuthi iNingizimu Afrika imumathe inqwaba yabantu. Hhayi ngeke!" Nomculi we-Afro jazz uSimphiwe Dana, uthe uyahambisana impela nomkhankaso woNgizwe kodwa wakhala ngokucwaswa kwabantu abathandana nabanobulili obufana nobabo. Usomahlaya waseMpangeni, uCeleste Ntuli, uqale waxolisa ngenkulumo ayisho ngo-2022. Uthe wayengeqondile ukuthi uzwelana nabantu bokufika abangenamvume yokuba kuleli kodwa wayekhuluma ngokunye. Uthe ayekukhuluma kwenye iPodcast akuhlangene nomkhankaso woJacinta. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, umholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe angancamela ukungavotelwa wumuntu uma evotelwa abantu abazonda abantu bakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika. UMalema ubekhuluma emcimbini weCollen Mashawana Foundation eGoli. Abantu bamgxeke kakhulu uMalema ngale nkulumo, bathi ucabangelela isisu sakhe hhayi abantu bakuleli.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMETHULI wezinhlelo uNimrod Nkosi usebonge ukwesekwa kusabalala ingxoxo ayenayo nozakwabo ekhala ngokungasebenzi USEPHUMELE obala wabonga ukuxhaswa abantu bezwelana naye ngemuva kokusabalala kwenkulumo-ngxoxo ayenayo nomunye uzakwabo umlingisi obuye abe ngumethuli wezinhlelo uNimrod Nkosi. UNimrod kule nkulumo ubezwakala ekhala futhi ecela umsebenzi nokuyinto eyashiya abantu bakuleli bekhungathekile ngendima yezokungcebeleka. Wayeveza ubunzima obukule ndima yize eneminyaka engaphezu kuka-20 egxile kuyo. Kule ngxoxo wayethi uvula isifuba komunye umuntu wesilisa ukuze kube khona omlalelayo njengoba ekulesi simo esinzima sokungasebenzi. “Ngizinikele ngakho konke enginakho kule ndima, kodwa manje ngibona futhi konke kungilahlekela ngenxa yokungatholi amathuba omsebenzi. Ngibona ukuthi ake ngikhulume nomunye umuntu ngoba sengithule isikhathi eside, sekwanele,” kusho uNimrod. Muva nje uveze ukuthi ubonile abantu bekhathazeka sekusabalale le nkulumo kodwa angakusho wukuthi ngokwempilo uyaphila. “Ngiyabonga kubona bonke abantu abangithintile emva kokuba kusabalale le nkulumo ngenxa yokukhathazeka kwabo, bakhombisa ukungeseka. Ngithanda ukuniqinisekisa ukuthi mina nomndeni senza kahle kakhulu. Ngikhethe ukuthi ngalolu daba ngingabheki okubi kuphela. Abanye abantu bakhulume abakuthandayo, kodwa ngabheka okuhle ngalesi simo. Ngibonga nalabo abavikele isithunzi sami kuzona zonke izinkulumo ebezivela,” kusho yena. Uthe ukubona abantu bememeza bethi akathole umsebenzi njengoba esezikhalele kusho lukhulu kuye futhi uyathemba ukuthi maduzane abantu bazombona elapho bemfisela ukuthi abe khona. Lo mlingisi kulezi zinsuku ubonakala elingisa emdlalweni iLaw, Love & Betrayal nalapho alingisa khona indawo ephambili. Ukuphumela obala kwabalingisi, abaculi namanye amaciko kuleli bekhala ngezinkinga sekuyinto ejwayelekile njengoba ngisho uRami Chuene, emesekile uNimrod wathi lokhu akwenzayo kuyindlela engcono kunokuthi afele ngaphakathi njengoba besemkhakheni onzima.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IZINKAKHA zomculo we-jazz zizoshiyelana inkundla emcimbini wokuqongelela imali yokuxhasa isikole iSacred Heart Secondary School ozoba semagcekeni alesi sikole Osindisweni, eVerulam ngoMeyi 2 kusukela ngo-3 ntambama. Kubaculi abazobe besina bededelana kubalwa uSelaelo Selota wodumo lwengoma ethi Thrrr Phaaa! nezihlabani zomculo esezingodokotela ngenxa yemfundo uXolisa Dlamini, Mash Mashiloane noNatalie Rungan. Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi, u-Atlas Duma, uthe enye inhlosongqangi ngawo wukugubha i-International Jazz Day. "Ochungechungeni lwemigubho ye-jazz yaminyaka yonke, kulo nyaka iSagiya Foundation iqoqe izinkakha zalo mculo ukuba zigubhe lolu suku ngokunikela ingxenye yenzuzo ezokwenziwa kuleli dili lomculo eSacred Heart Secondary." U-Atlas uthe ukubophela odokotela kwezomculo kusho ukukhuphuka kwezinga lalo mgidi okwenza ube sezingeni lomhlaba njengoba ugqugquzelwa yi-UNESCO ne-Herbie Hancock Institute of Jazz yaseLondon. "Sizokhumbula ukuthi i-Inaugural KZN International Jazz Festival yaba nesasasa elikhulu ngo-2023 lapho yayilethe izihlabani zaphesheya kwezilwandle okubalwa kuzo uRichard Bona (USA) noYayoi Ikawa (Japan)." U-Atlas uthe ezinye izihlabani eziyizifundiswa emculweni we-jazz ezizobe zinandisa kulo mcimbi ngoMthobisi Mthalane ofundisa umculo eSacred Heart nodume ngenoni elith Usizi Lomuntu Omnyama, Vincent Mtetwa odume ngengoma ethi Judgement Day naye oyisifundiswa se-jazz esacijwa eTechnikon Natal nase-UKZN futhi wafundisa khona iminyakana ngaphambi kokuwelela phesheya kwezilwandle. "Kuzobe kukhona noSifiso Khanyile waseMgungundlovu  kodwa osezinze eGoli. Uzobe ededela amanoni e-albhamu yakhe entsha." Intokazi esanda kuphothula izifundo ze-jazz e-UKZN, uThembalethu Bhengu, ithe kuyigugu kuyo ukushiyelana inkundla enkulu kangaka nabaculi ebahlonipha kakhulu futhi abanye babo ebebengothisha bayo bomculo eNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal. Amathikithi aseyatholakala ePick n Pay nakwa-Boxer ngo-R200 kuya ku-R1 000 kanti abangena nama-coolerbox kufanale bengeze u-R150.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ABEFUNDISI nezikhulu ebezihambele inkonzo yaseMshwathi BADELE amakhaza bayodumisa uNkulunkulu enkonzweni yokubonga abahlali baseMshwathi ku-ward  2 ngoLwesine lomama bomthandazo. UKhansela SK Nxumalo, ebambisene ne-ward committee ku-ward 2 eholwa uGogo uMaNdaba bahlele indumezulu yenkonzo yokubonga. Le nkonzo bekungeyokubonga ubuhle bukaNkulunkulu ngokuvikela umphakathi waseNew Hanover osanda kuhlaselwa yizikhukhula ezadlula nemiphefumulo yabantu abathathu ngoNovemba nyakenye. Lokhu kuvele ngesikhathi uNxumalo ethula inhloso yosuku. Enkulumweni yakhe yokwamukela izihambeli zenkonzo, uNxumalo uthe sekukuningi okwehlele umphakathi waseMshwathi okungajwayelekile nokubuhlungu, okubalwa kukho ukushona kwabantu ngokuvamile. “Kepha ngenxa yokuthi sinezinto esimbonile uNkulunkulu esivikela kuzo, simelwe ukubonga. Isibhicongo sikaNovemba sasingaqeda ngamakhaya amaningi kakhulu kodwa abaningi bethu basinda, simelwe ukubonga.” UNxumalo uqhube ngokuthi athi: “ngisho sesibuya ePhasikeni, uye wathembeka uNkulunkulu wayivikela indawo yakithi yangahlaselwa yizingozi zePhasika.” Isikhulumi esiqavile sosuku kwaba bekungoDkt Angie Ntuli-Zuma onguMengameli weKwaZulu-Natal Women Leadership Forum. UDkt Ntuli-Zuma ugxile kakhulu ekuphakamiseni abantu besifazane ebuholini, wagcizelela ukubaluleka kwenkonzo yokubonga obekuyiyona ingqikithi yosuku. Ekugcineni abefundisi baye bakhulekela izihlava ezihlasele indawo yaseMshwathi, baphinde bakhulekela nobuholi bewadi nokhetho olunokuthula lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo ngoNovemba YINGXENYE yabazalwane ebebehambele inkonzo yaseMshwathi INGXENYE yekhwaya ebinandisa kule nkonzo

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KUZOQOPHEKA umlando  emcimbini walo nyaka wedili lomculo wokholo iMayine Gospel Experience njengoba izithameli zizodumisa zifake ama-earphone ezindlebeni. Le ndumezulu ebizwa nge-Silent Worship Experience: A Night of Song and Worship izoba se-DCC Jesus Dome eThekwini ngoMeyi 22. Kubaculi abazobe besina bededelana kubalwa u-Oncemoresix, Khaya Mthethwa, Ncebakazi Msomi, Ntokozo Mbambo, Lusanda Beja noMpumi Mtsweni. UKwezi Ndlovu-Mbambo, osethimbeni labahleli balo mcimbi, uveze ukuthi bahlele into engakaze ibonakale njengoba abazobe bekhona bonke bezonikwa ama-earphone ukuze ulalele lonke uhlelo lomcimbi nokuyindlela abafuna umuntu asondelane ngayo noThixo njengoba kuzobe kugcwele umculo nomkhuleko. "Sihlele ukuthi umcimbi siwenze ngendlela engakaze ibonakale kuleli. Abantu abazoba khona sifuna basondelane noNkulunkulu ngokubanika isikhathi somuntu ngamunye. Izingoma zonke nezintshumaelko abantu bazozizwa ngalokhu abazobe bekufake emadlebeni nokuyinto esifuna umuntu ngamunye asondelane nomdali wakhe," kusho uKwezi. Uthe abaculi abazobe bekhona bonke ngeke bagcine nje ngokucula kuphela kodwa bazophinde bashumayele. Amathikithi okuthamela lo mcimbi aseyatholakala eWebtickets nasePick n Pay ngoR250. I-DCC Jesus Dome ku-39 Garth Road eMayville, eThekwini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IBANDLA i-Morning Star Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE NGOKUJWAYELEKILE amabandla aseZayoni ahlangana uma kunemincintiswano yomculo, nezinkonzo zemishado okusuke kumenywane kuzona ngenhloso yokuqhoshelana ngokuthi wubani onikele kakhulu, nokuthi yiliphi ibandla elihlanzekile nelicula kangcono kunelinye. Kepha kwenzeke okwehlukile nokungajwayelekile kwi-Zion Worship Experience, umbuthano obuseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo - obekuhloswe ngawo ukwakha ubumbano emabandleni ehlukene aseZayoni nokudumisa uNkulunkulu ndawonye. Lo mbuthano, obuqala ukwenziwa kulo nyaka - ubuhlelwe ngokubambisana amabandla amahlanu aseZayoni angamanye anedumela kakhulu okuyi-CCAC Ministries, Throne of Grace, River of Mercy Ministries, Enyonini Amaphiko Ayisithupha ne-Burning Fire of God. IBANDLA i-River of Mercy Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Isasasa nokuthakaselwa kwalo mbuthano kufakazelwe wukugcwala phama kwezihambeli ebeziwuthamele ebeziphuma ezindaweni ezihlukene, nakwezinye izifundazwe imbala. Umcimbi uvulwe ngomculo webandla i-Morning Star Ministries, ebelingekho ohlwini lwalawa amahlanu, kodwa okuvele ukuthi lizicelele ukweseka lo mcimbi ngokunandisa kuwona, futhi lanikela ngoR25 000 wokuthenga amathikithi awu-100 ukusiza ukuxhaseka komcimbi. IBANDLA i-eNyonini Amaphiko Ayisithupha linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Emva kwayo kuqhubeke uhlelo lo mcimbi lokunandisa kwala mabandla amahlanu abehlele lo mcimbi, engena ephuma esteji ejabulisa abantu ngomculo onomyalezo wethemba, futhi oveza noqhakambisa ubukhona bukaNkulunkulu; kwagwatshwa, kwakuhle kwanjeyana. IBANDLA i-CCAC Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Omunye wabahleli balo mcimbi, uMnuz Mhlengi Ntshapha weRiver of Mercy Ministries, uthe bekuhlale kubakhathaza ukuthi ayikho imibuthano lapho amaZayoni ehlangana khona nje kungonakele lutho - ukuzodumisa uNkulunkulu nokukhulisana kubhekwe phambili. “Yingakho sibone kusemqoka ukuthi sihlangane kanjena ukuthi ngenhloso yokwakha ubunye, futhi siqinise ubudlelwano emabandleni ehlukene aseZayoni - ukusiza ukubulala ubutha, ukubukelana phansi nokuqhoshelana okuphakathi kwethu,” kusho uNtshapha. IBANDLA i-Throne of Grace linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Umholi webandla i-CCAC Ministries, u-Archbishop Mlamuli Zondo yena uthe bafisa ukuthi lokhu abakwenzile manje kukhuthaze amanye amabandla aseZayoni ukweseka nokulandela umbono wabo ukusiza ukuthi kukhule amaZayoni futhi kwande ukubumbana kuwona. UNtshapha uthe manje sebebheke ukuthi bakhele kulokhu abakwenzile ukusiza ukuthi i-Zion Worship Experience ingabi ngeyamabandla athile kuphela, kepha ikhule ize igcine yenziwa ezindaweni ezinkulu njengako-ICC, eThekwini - bese inabela nakwezinye izifundazwe. IBANDLA i-Burning Fire of God linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger Untied, uCelimpilo Ngema, obambe iqhaza elikhulu empulelweni yaleli qembu eselingompethea beMotsepe Foundation Championship UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger United, uCelimpilo “Zidane” Ngema, utusa ukuzikhandla nokusebenza ngokubambisana njengekhubalo lokunqoba isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship kwaleli qembu elizogijima kwiBetway Premiership ngesizini ezayo. Yize kusasele imidlalo emibili kusongwe isizini ka-2025/26 yeChampionship, iKruger isivele iyiwinile iligi yalesi sigaba. Iqede ukuqagela ngombango weligi ibhaxabula iBlack Leopards ngo 3-1 ngoMgqibelo KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. UNgema (28) waseThubalethu, eMelmoth, ngomunye wabadlali ababambe iqhaza elikhulu empumelelweni yeKruger ayijoyine esuka kuMaZulu ekuqaleni kwesizini. “Ukuzikhandla kwethu nokusebenza ngokubambisana njengabadlali beqembu kugcine kuthela izithelo. Ngakho sonke sithokozile ngokuthi sigcine sikwazile ukufeza umgomo wethu ebesizibekele wona kule sizini obekuyikho ukulwela ukuwina iligi,” kusho uNgema. Lo mdlali oyinjini yasesiswini, ohlukane naMaZulu esedlale amasizini amabili kuwona ubalwa nabadlali abadlale kwiPremiership okubalwa kubona uTercious Malepe, Morne Nel, Wandisile Letlabika, Sipho Sibiya noNtsako Makhubela. “Ukukhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership kweqembu kusho lukhulu kimina ngoba kunginika elinye ithuba engilithatha njengethuba lesibili lokuthi ngibuyele ekudlaleni esigabeni seBetway okuyisigaba esifiswa yiwo wonke umdlali odlala ibhola elikhokhelayo. Ngizimisele ukulibamba ngazo zombili leli thuba, ngiqhubeke nokuzimisela,"kusho uNgema. IKruger ivule igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili phakathi kwayo neMilford FC esendaweni yesibili ngawu-50. Izodlala neGomora United eMalamulele Stadium, eMalamulele, ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama. Emdlalweni wokugcina izodlala ne-The Bees ekhaya. “Nakuba sesazi ukuthi singompetha beligi kodwa sisazoqhubeka sidlale ngokuzimisela nakule midlalo emibili esisalele, siziqophele owethu umlando ngokuqeda isizini ngamaphuzu amaningi.” usho kanje uNgema. Ngesizini edlule iDurban City inqobe iligi yeMotsepe Championship ngamaphuzu awu-58, kanti iKruger isethubeni lokwedlula irekhodi lamaphuzu awu-62 leThanda Royal Zulu eyanqoba ngawo isicoco seChampionship ngesizini ka-2016/17.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YINGXENYE yosomahlaya bakuleli abadlana imilala kwi-13th Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eThe Lyric Theatre eGold Reef City  ngo-8 ebusuku NAMHLANJE kuzolalwa sekwaziwa ukuthi yibaphi osomahlaya abayizintandokazi kuleli njengoba kumenyezelwa abanqobe kwi-13th Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eThe Lyric Theatre eGold Reef City eGauteng ngo-8 ebusuku. Uhlelo lwalo mcimbi, oteketiswa nge-It's a Family, luzobe luphethwe ngumndeni wakwaGoliath, okungoJason Goliath, Donovan Goliath, Nicholus Goliath noKate Goliath. Kosomahlaya abazobe behlekisa bededelana ngoTumi Morake, Lindy Johnson, Khanyisile Ngwenya, Mbali Gudazi, Summary noConrad Koch ozobe ehambisana noChester Missing. Usomahlaya waseMpangeni uCeleste uqokwe emunxeni weHeadliner of the Year Award lapho eqokwe khona noDillan Oliphant, Kagiso KG Mokgadi, Mpho Popps noSkhumba Hlophe. Uphinde waqhathwa noSifiso Nene, Mpho Popps, Kagiso KG Mokgadi noDillan Oliphant emunxeni weComedian of the Year Award. Igama likaCeleste libuye latonyulwa kwiBest Comedy Festival or Show Award njengoba engene ngomcimbi wakhe iCeleste Ntuli and The Big Dudes. Eminye imicimbi eqokiwe ngowe-Armchair Comedy, Bioscope Sundays, Ground Culture Comedy neJive Funny Championship. KwiBest Solo Show Award kuqokwe uChester Missing, Dillan Oliphant, Khanyisa Bunu, Prins noSifiso Nene. KwiJoe Mafela Award kutholene phezulu uMashabela, Siya Seya, Skhumba Hlophe, Summary noTT Phasha ekubeni kwiBeyond the Mic Award kubhaxulana oKagiso Lediga, Lazola Gola, Trevor Gumbi noTumi Morake. Umunxa okushube kakhulu kuwo oweThe Legacy Award lapho kubambene khona uDavid Kau, Kagiso Lediga, Loyiso Gola, Skhumba Hlophe noTrevor Gumbi. Abaqokwe kwiComedic Content Award kududulana uChester Missing, Dillan Oliphant, Kagiso KG Mokgadi, Tsitsi Chiumya noVafa Naraghi kanti koweBreakthrough Act of the Year Award kuboshelwe uChuma Bentele, Dakes, Linde Sibanda, Mbali Gudazi noPanch Gasela.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: NGESIKHATHI amehlo amaningi ebheke ukubona ukuthi ubani ozodla umhlanganiso emjahweni iComrades Marathon ezogijinywa isuka eThekwini iya eMgungundlovu ngenyanga ezayo, abanye bazojatshuliswa ukuzithela phezu kobuso ababujwayele. IComrades yanonyaka, okuzoba ngeka-99, izoba mhla ka-14 Juni. Emjahweni wokugcina owawunyuka ngo-2024, kwabesifazane kwanqoba uGerda Steyn okungangatshazwa ukuthi uyintandokazi nakulokhu. Kwabesilisa intambo yashaywa wuPiet Wiersma emuva kokuthi owayebhekiwe uTete Dijana abanjwa ngamajaqamba. Baningi abagijimi ababheke ukuphosela uGerda noPiet inselelo kulokhu. Kwabesilisa uTete nakanjani uzobe ekhona kanjalo nomgijimi wamabanga amade ophethe amarekhodi amaningi, u-Aleksandr Sorokin, waseLithuania useqinisekisile ukuthi uzogijima iComrades okokuqala. Nokho amanye amehlo azobe efuna ukubona ukuthi yibaphi abantu abaziwayo abazobe begijima. Umculi uMandisi Dyantyis ungomunye wabasohlwini lwabazobe begijima iComrades yanonyaka ebe engaqali. Muva nje uqede i-Two Oceans Marathon engu-56km ngesikhathi esinu-04:49:21. Omunye umculi osebalwa nezingqwele njengoba ene-green number (etholwa ngabaqede imijaho engu-10 kuya phezulu njengoba yena eseqede ka-13), uKabelo Mabalane wodumo lwe-TKZee, uyavela kwabangenele. Le nsizwa eseyashintsha impilo yayo yabuye yamukela nobizo lokuba uMfundisi. Muva nje ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ubesematheni ebonakala enandisa esiteji abantu bencoma ukungarobhi kwakhe abalandeli ngenxa yokucula enganyakazisi umlomo kuphela. Omunye osendimeni yomculo novivela umjaho wakhe wokuqala nguSabelo Ngema oyilungu leqembu i-Afro Soul. Uhlale enekela abalandeli bakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi uthando lokugijima lwasukaphi futhi ukuzilolonga kuhamba kanjani. Uzakwabo agijima naye uDJ Nzwiri oklwebha amapuleti futhi obuye alunguze njengomlingisi kuZalo nakuMalanga Awafani yena uphoqeleke ukuhoxa ngenxa yokulimala. Ulimale esezibekisele indawo ngomjaho iCosmos 3-in-1 eyayiseSecunda ngoMashi. Usomabhizinisi odume nangokushaya isibhakela owake wangena eringini nomrepha uBig Zulu, ubhalisiwe kwabangenele lo mjaho ozoba ngu-85.777km. Emuva kokushaya uBig Zulu ulandele ngomlingisi wodumo lweSkeem Saam u-Pholoso Mohlala wabe esephosela inselelo uNaak Musiq. Ngempelasonto uqede iDurban International Marathon ebisuka eProspecton yaphelela ePeople’s Park eMoses Mabhida Stadium ngo-4:11. Kuyona iDurban International Marathon bekugijima nomsakazi weGagasi FM ongumfowabo kaZakes Bantwini, uHeazy Madida. Uyisebenzise ukuvivela iComrades yakhe yokuqala. Uzobe esemgwaqeni nozakwabo kwezokusakaza uClement Manyathela we-702 odume ngokupheka ngemibuzo osopolitiki. Kuzobe kungokwesibili uClement egijima njengoba ngo-2024 aqeda ngo-09:59:40. Osopolitiki ababhalisile nguSihle Zikalala oyiPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezemiSebenzi yoMphakathi. UZikalala uziqeqesha ngokuzikhandla njengoba esanda kuqeda neTwo Oceans eKapa. Ngempelasonto ugijime u-10km wabe eseseka abanye abagijimi kwiDurban International. Ngo-2024 wagcina enyulile esebhalisile. Bakhona nabanye osopolitiki abazobe bengaqali ukugijima iComrades okungoMakashule Gana weqembu iRISE Mzansi noDavid Masondo oyiPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezeziMali. USabelo Ngema nozakwabo agijima nabo uMorgan Shandu (kwesokunxele) noDJ Nzwiri (kwesokudla)

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Uthishanhloko waseSizanani Primary School eDube, eSoweto, uGugu Mdlalose ozimisele kakhulu ekufundiseni izingane ngokutshala imifino njengoba simbona lapha nezingane zesikole. Image: Dumisani Sibeko KUHLATSHWE ikhwelo lokuthi kubikwe izehlakalo zokuhlukunyezwa kwezingane emakhaya kanjalo nasezikoleni njengoba kwanda ukukhulelwa kwazo zisencane. Leli khwelo lenziwe yizinhlaka ezehlukene izolo, ngesikhathi kwethulwa umkhankaso wokuvikelwa kwezingane enkundleni yemidlalo iMangosuthu eDumbe, enyakatho yaKwaZulu-Natal. UNksz Neliswa Cekiso ongumqondisi wophiko lokuvikelwa kwezingane eMnyangweni wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uthe izibalo ziveza ukuthi angaphezu kuka-3 000 amacala okuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kusuka ekoteni yokuqala kuya kweyesithathu onyakenimali u-2025/2026. "Sikhathazekile ngokudlwengulwa kwezingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16 ezigilwa abantu abadala. Sikhathazeke kakhulu nangezingane ezilalana zodwa, ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16. Yingakho kubalulekile ukuthi sibambisane ekulweni nalesi sihlava," usho kanje ekhuluma neNewzroom Afrika izolo, kwethulwa lo mkhankaso. Uthe bakhathazekile ngokukhulelwa kwezingane zisencane kuleli kanjalo nasesifundeni iZululand. Ngokwezibalo zeNational Child Protection Register, zekota yokuqala yonyakamali u-2025/2026 kuya kweyesithathu, angu-8 984 amacala abikwa okuhlukunyezwa kwezingame. UNksz Cekiso uthe banezinhlelo zokufundisa abazali ukuze baqaphe ngelokhozi izingane zabo. "Abanye abazali abakwazi ukusheshe babone uma izingane zabo zihlukunyeziwe. Yingakho sinezinhlelo zokubacija ukuze bakwazi ukusheshe babheke le nkinga." Izibalo zoMnyango wezobuLungiswa ziveze ukuthi andile amacala okudlwengulwa kwezingane esuka ku-127 aya ku-199 onyakenimali u-2025/2026. UNksz Cekiso ukhale nangotshwala athe bunomthelela ekutheni kuhlukunyezwe izingane. "Abahlukunyezwayo ababike enambeni yeChildline ethi-116 (mahhala). Uma kukhona ohlukunyezwayo ekhaya okungaba umama kungabikwa enombolweni yokulwa nesihlava sokuhlukunyezwa esikhungweni i-GBV, ethi: 0800 428 428. Ababikayo bazolulekwa ngokumele bakwenze baphinde badluliselwe ezinhlakeni ezifanele ukuze basizakale." Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi othisha, othishanhloko, abahlengikazi, osonhlalakahle, odokotela kanjalo nanoma imuphi umuntu osebenza ngezingane, bayalelwa ukuthi babike uma kunengane engaphansi kuka-16 ekhulelwe. Laba bayalelwa ukuthi babike emaphoyiseni ukuze kuphenywe, kuboshwe labo abakhulelisa lezi zingane.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: KWA-TOYOTA badayise amaCorolla Cross, akhiwa eThekwini, angu-1 144 ngo-Ephreli BAYACHICHIMA yinjabulo abasembonini yezimoto kulandela ukunyuka kwesibalo sezintsha ezidayiswe ngo-Ephreli uma kuqhathaniswa nenyanga efanayo ngonyaka odlule. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe yi-naamsa, zibe ngu-47 979 izimoto ezintsha ezithengiwe. Lesi yisibalo esikhulu sango-Ephreli kusuka ngo-2013. Sinyuke ngo-5 512 uma kuqhathaniswa no-42 467 owadayiswa ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. Ngesikhathi isibalo sezimoto ezidayise kuleli sinyukile, esezidayiswe ngaphandle sehle ngo-4.0% zaba ngu-30 939 zisuka ku-32 229 ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. I-naamsa ithe izibalo zango-Ephreli zikhombisa umfutho oqale ezinyangeni ezedlule nokuba ngcono kwezimo zokuthenga kodwa konke lokhu sekubhekene nezingqinamba zokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, ukwehla kwamandla emali okulindelekile kanjalo nokubuyekezwa kwenzalo yemalimboleko. Isazi sezomnotho kwaWesBank, uThanda Sithole, sithe imiphumela yango-Ephreli iyagqugquzela. “Lokhu kunyuka kwezibalo bekusabalele ngoba kwenzeke ezimotweni ezincane, amaveni nezokuthutha impahla kanjalo namaloli amakhulu,” kusho uSithole. USihlalo wenhlangano yamagaraji adayisa izimoto iNational Automobile Dealers’ Association (NADA), uBrandonn Cohen, ujabulele izibalo wathi bekuyinyanga ebigcwele amaholidi nezinxushunxushu zase-Middle East. “Bekukholakala ukuthi konke lokhu kanjalo nokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli kuzokwehlisa umdlandla wabantu emakethe. Akwenzekanga. Izimoto ezincane zibe ngu-34 414 nokuwukunyuka ngo-14.3% uma kuqhathaniswa nesikhathi esifanayo ngonyaka odlule ngesikhathi ama-light commercial vehicle enyuke ngo-9.7% kuno-Ephreli 2025. Kuyajabulisa nokuthi kunyukile nakumaloli aphakathi namakhulu njengoba aphakathi anyuke ngo-10.5% kwathi amaloli namabhasi anyuka ngo-9.9%” Izinkampani ezingu-15 ezidayise kakhulu izimoto ezintsha ngo-Ephreli. Kwesokunxele ngezidayiswe kuleli kutii kwesokudla kube ngezidayise ngaphandle

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABADLALI beKaizer Chiefs nabe-Orlando Pirates bephakanyelwa yimimoya ngesikhathi kuqhubeka umdlalo wabakhaya ngeSonto e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec Orlando Pirates (0) 1 KUFANE nokuthi iKaizer Chiefs ifaka usawoti esilondeni se-Orlando Pirates kulandela ukuyiphazamisa ngomphumela ka 1-1 weBetway Premiership ovune iMamelodi Sundowns embangweni wesicoco seligi. IChiefs ivule inkundla ngegoli likaPule Mmodi esiwombeni sesibili kodwa walinganisa eduze uKamogelo Sebelebele emdlalweni obungeSonto ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Ngaphandle kokulimala kukaTshepang Moremi akukho okutheni okwenzeke esiwombeni sokuqala salo mdlalo oqale ulindelwe ngabomvu. IPirates iyona ebifika kaningi kuvalwe amehlo ezintini zeChiefs kodwa kunqabe uBrandon Petersen obala ukhasha esiwombeni sokuqala nakwesesibili. UMoremi, okungangatshazwa ukuthi uzohamba noHugo Broos (obekhona enkundleni) kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, akazange asiqede isiwombe sokuqala ngenxa yokulimala indawo yakhe yathathwa nguPatrick Maswanganyi. Ngaphandle kokubona uMoremi ethinteka kufanele ukuba uBroos ubuqaphelile ubuqhawe bukaPetersen, owakhinyabezwa wukugula ngaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya wangasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari, endleleni yakhe eyayibheke kwiBafana. Emuva komdlalo uPetersen utshele abakwaSuperSport ukuthi yize eyicabanga indaba yeBafana neNdebe yoMhlaba kodwa okusemqoka kuyena wukusiza iChiefs. “Ngifikelwa ngumunyu ukuthi ngiqokwe njengomdlali ovelele namuhla ngoba ngiphuma ebunzimeni kulezi zinyanga ezedlule,” kusho uPetersen. “Ngijabule ngendlela engidlale ngayo kodwa okumnandi nakakhulu wukusiza iChiefs. OkweBafana kuzozenzekela uma ngiqhubeka nokwenza kahle kwiChiefs.” Igoli leChiefs likaMmodi lakhiwe nguWandile Duba kwathi elePirates likaSebelebele lakhiwa nguDeon Hotto. Ukudlala ngokulingana kwePirates kukhulula iSundowns esele ngomdlalo owodwa kuleli qembu laseSoweto.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: NKOSINATHI Emmanuel Mzobe USEZE wonda nasemzimbeni owesifazane waseMthebeni, eNdwedwe, kulandela ukuphela kwezinyanga kwanyamalala indodana yakhe eyayisebenza njengonogada enkampanini yezimoto ezithwala imali. Ngokusho kukaNkk Joyce Mhlongo, indodana yakhe, uMnuz Nkosinathi Emmanuel Mzobe (36) yalahleka ngoDisemba 24 nyakenye. Elandisa ngesehlo uthe kwakungemuva kukaKhisimusi, ethola ucingo kowesifazane angamazi, owazethula njengesinqandamathe sikaMzobe, wathi umphathele umyalezo wokuthi ulahlekile. “Wangitshela ukuthi ufonelwe abangani bakhe (uMzobe), bemazisa ukuthi umjondolo wakhe osezakhiweni zase-Uganda eSiphingo, sekuphele izinsuku uvaliwe. Uthe owesifazane wamtshela ukuthi abangani bamtshela ukuthi bona bamgcine ngoDisemba 24, 2025, kade behleli naye khona e-Uganda,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uqhube wathi waya khona ngakusasa, bahamba nowesifazane bayobika ngomuntu odukile emaphoyiseni aseSiphingo agcina ebadlulisela kwawaseMlaza, nokuyilapho bagcina bebika khona ngempumelelo. Uveze ukuthi abangani, athe wawanikwa amagama abo, abakaze bamthinte ukuze baziveze emndenini ukuthi babazana noMzobe. “Ngikhathazwa nawukuthi kungani bengezanga bazochaza ukuthi waphelelaphi njengoba kuyibo ababegcine ukubonakala naye,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngendlela amaphoyisa asingethe ngayo udaba, ethi wagcina kunezinhlelo zokuthi amaphoyisa azohloma imibuzo isinqandamathe kanjalo nabo abangani, okwagcina kungenzekanga. Uphinde wakhala ngokungalukhombisi uzwelo ephoyiseni elajutshwa ukuthi liphenye udaba. “Sagcina sesingasaboni ngaso linye, selingisola ngokuthi ngilifundisa umsebenzi walo uma nginemibuzo ngophenyo. Lokhu kwangizwisa ubuhlungu ngoba alibukhombisanga ubuntu, futhi alizange libe nesihe kimina ngingowesifazane ophithanelwe yikhanda ngokulahlekelwa yindodana ngendlela engaqondakali,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe nangesikhathi sekushintshe uhlelo lokuthi ngeke abahlanu besaphoswa imibuzo, yena akaze aziswe ngalolo guquko. Uthe bekusinda kwehlela nangesikhathi kufanele kuyiwe emakhazeni kahulumeni ezindaweni ezehlukene, ukuyocinga ukuthi isidumbu sikaMzobe asikho yini kulezo ezisuke zilethiwe kuthiwa ezabangaziwal. Ubuye wathi umphenyi ubevele angabi khona, akhale ngokuba matasatasa ngamanye amacala abalulekile, yena agcine ezihambela yedwa. “Abasemakhazeni bebeze bangitshele ukuthi akuvumelekile ukuthi ngize ngedwa, kufanele ngiphelezelwe umseshi. Ngangisemakhazeni asePhoenix ngesikhathi umseshi efonelwa osebenza khona, wamtshela ukuthi umatasa yena,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi okunye  akuthola wukuthi emsebenzini wayegcine ngoDisemba 23, kanti ngakusasa wavuka waya emagaraji adayisa izimoto, ngenhloso yokuthenga eyodwa, ayezoza ngayo ekhaya. “Umzala wakhe okwathi uma esethola ukuthi ulahlekile, naye wathuka wacishe woma ethi ubenaye kanye nesinqandamathe sakhe ngesikhathi eyobheka imoto ayezoyithenga,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi sekugqekezwa emjondolo wendodana yakhe, akukho okusolisa ukuthi yahlaselwa phakathi, izimpahla zayo eziningi zazikhona futhi zihleli kahle. “Ngisho nomfaniswano wakhe womsebenzi wawukhona,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe iselula yayilokhu ivalekile uma bezama ukuyifonela kodwa abakuqaphelayo wukuthi akhona amalungu omndeni athunyelwa imiyalezo engaqondakali emva kukaKhisimusi. “Sisola ukuthi kwakungabantu abase beyithathile iselula yakhe,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo, othe lonke lolu lwazi waludlulisela emaphoyiseni kodwa akukho akwenza ngalo. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi kukhona okubi okwehlela indodana yakhe kwazise yayingesiye umuntu ovele asuke anyamalale nje. “Ukunyamalala kwakhe kunesandla somuntu. Ngangifisa ukuthi amaphoyisa abathathe laba abahlanu ayobaphosa imibuzo, mhlawumbe ukhona umkhondo ongavela. Ngiphatheke kabi ngokungalutholi usizo ngokunyamalala kwengane yami. Bengimkhulu ngomzimba, sengize ngancipha ngaba mncane,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Unxuse noma ubani ongaba nolwazi abikele amaphoyisa aseduze ngoba unesifiso sokuthola ithambo lendodana yakhe ukuze azidelise. Uthe indodana inendodakazi (14) abaqale bayifihlela ukuthi uyise udukile, nokho bagcina beyitshela, bebona kuhamba isikhathi bengawutholi umkhondo.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IQHAWE le-Orlando Pirates, uRelebohile Mofokeng, lijabula nozakwabo emuva kokushaya elinye lamagoli amathathu ngesikhathi bexebula iTS Galaxy emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, izolo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-ORLANDO Pirates yesule izinyembeni umqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ibhubhudla iTS Galaxy emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto. Amagoli eZimnyama ashaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng (amathathu), Tshepang Moremi, Kamohelo Sebelebele noMlungisi Mbunjana okube wumkhonto ogwaze ekhaya. Ngalokhu, iPirates yehlise iMamelodi Sundowns ezicongweni se-log yePremiership, yavula igebe lephuzu. Ukunqoba kwePirates nokushaya kwayo amagoli ayisithupha kuyinselelo kumaBrazilians abedlala oweCaf Champions League. ISundowns sekufanele ikhokhe isikweletu ngokuqoqa amaphuzu, enyuse nesibalo samagoli. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukuwina ngale ndlela kweZimnyama kwesula izinyembezi u-Ouaddou ubekhihla esikaNandi ngokuyeka amathuba kwabadlali bakhe kwazise kungenzeka kugcine sekubalwa amagoli ekugcineni. "Lena yimpendulo ebheke kubantu abangabaza ukuzinikela kwabadlali. Ngihlala ngisho ukuthi akekho eqenjini lami ongena enkundleni efuna ukuhlulwa noma adlale ngokulingana. Sithumela umyalezo oshubile wokuthi akukapheli ngathi futhi sizolwa kuze kube sekugcineni," kusho u-Ouaddou emuva komdlalo. Kulo mdlalo, iPirates ihlasele zibekwa, yathola igoli ngomzuzu wesine ngesikhathi u-Oupa Motaung weGalaxy edlalisa kabi uMoremi ngaphandle kwebhokisi eseyobhekana nonozinti, wathola ikhadi elibomvu. I-free kick edaleke lapho uyibeke phakathi uMofokeng. Emuva kwalokho, iPirates ibisiphungwa ngezithebe. Sekusele imizuzu emine kuyiwe ekhefini, uMoremi ushaye phakathi ibhola ebelisuka kwikhona kaDeon Hotto. Leli goli lelanywe wumkhonto ogwaze ekhaya kaMbunjana obethi uphasela unozinti wakhe. Esiwombeni sesibili, iPirates iqhubeke lapho ibigcine khona, uMofokeng eshaya igoli lesibili emuva kwemizuzu eyisishiyagalombili. Ngomzuzu ka-64, uSebelebele uqobele phakathi elesihlanu, lalandelwa ngelikaMofokeng emuva kwemizuzu emine.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa athole iziza zokukhiqiza izidakamizwa Abasolwa abayishumi nanye kulindeleke ukuba bavele okokuqala eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseSwartruggens, namhlanje. Laba babhekene namacala ahlobene nokukhiqiza izidakamizwa, ukutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu ngokungemthetho, ukutholakala nempahla eyingozi kanye nokwephula uMthetho wokufika kwabantu bokufika. Lokhu kulandela umkhankaso wezobunhloli owenziwe yiNhloko yeCrime Intelligence, ihhovisi lenhloko uezobugebengu obuhleliwe, kanye neDirectorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI) South African Narcotics Enforcement Bureau (SANEB)  kanye nabanye ababambiqhaza okuholele ekuboshweni kwabasolwa abayishumi nanye (11) abaxhumene necala lokukhiqiza izidakamizwa ngoMeyi 13. Lo msebenzi uholele ekutholakaleni kwesikhungo esikhulu sokukhiqiza izidakamizwa esingekho emthethweni okukholakala ukuthi siyabandakanyeka ekukhiqizeni i-methamphetamine.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UBONGANI Fassie usengene emculweni wegqom' INDODANA yesihlabani yomculo we-Afro pop, uBrenda "Mabrrr" Fassie, singene emculweni wokujuxuza wesimanje obizwa ngokuthi igqom'. UBongani Fassie uzokhipha icwecwe elisihloko sithi Skomline ngoMeyi 8. Uthe ngale EP uhlose ukuvezela umphakathi ukuthi usezelwe kabusha futhi usezilungisile izindlela zakhe ebezingaqondile. UBongani uthe kumsizile ukushaywa wumoya kule ndima ngoba kumnikeze ithuba lokuyolanda amandla, umfutho nokuzivuselela. "Lo msebenzi uyimi, sengibuye ngokugcwele ekubeni yimi ngaphandle kokwesaba, izihibe nemvume yamuntu. Akusiyo nje i-EP kodwa umlayezo." Uthe okumenze wakhuza ibuya ngomculo owasungulwa kwelikaMthaniya yingoba efuna ukwethulela isigqoko iKwaZulu-Natal. Uthe noma kunjalo akakhohliwe neze ukuthi ungumnsinsi wokuzimilela elokishini lakwaLanga, eWestern Cape. UBongani uthe wenze le ngoma ethi Skomline ngenhloso yokubungaza abantu balapho edabuka khona. Ngaphandle kwegqom' ubuye wahlanganisa nohlobo lomculo wamapiano, Afro tech, barcadi, hip-hop neR&B. Lo mculi waqala ukuzakhela kakhulu udumo esavela kuma-video kanina esemncane. Esekhulakhulile uBongani wabe esecula i-Afro pop nendodana kaChicco Twala, uLongwe besazibiza ngeNew Age. Waphinda wabuya esenza i-hip hop sebezibiza ngeJozi. Emuva kwalokho wabe esevela ngezindaba ezimbi emaphephandabeni nasezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ethinteka ekubeni umlutha wezidakamizwa.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umlingisi uSimphiwe Ngema ozobonakala kweminye imidlalo emincane kuMzansi Magic kusuka ngenyanga ezayo ABOMZANSI Magic, sebeveze ukuthi ayikho enye indlela obekumele baqhubeke ngayo ukuxhasa amaciko, ngaphandle kokuthi benze imidlalo emincane ezokhonjiswa kulesi siteshi. Bakusho lokhu bethula imidlalo eyishumi, ezoqala ngenyanga ezayo ukukhonjiswa kulesi siteshi, njengoba kusanda kuphela imidlalo emikhulu emibili. UShirley Adonisi, uthe ngale midlalo baqinisekisile ukuthi iqoshwa yizinkampani zentsha futhi kuyo kulingisa intsha esizakhele igama ekulingiseni nenye esanda kufika. Yonke le midlalo uthe izokhonjiswa amasonto ayishumi, kusuka ngoMeyi 11 kuze kube uJulayi. "Sethula le midlalo ngenjabulo enkulu njengoba njengesiteshi sisanda kwethula izinhlelo ezimbili, abantu abakhombisa ukuzijabulela okuwuhlelo oluthi, The Makhene’s noluthi Mgidi Moms. Kusanda kubuya nomdlalo abantu abawujabulela othi, Isithembu SikaMsongelwa esingangabazi ukuthi isizini yesibili nayo izokwenza kahle njengeyokuqala. Siyabonga kuzona zonke izinkampani ezibambisene nathi kuze kube manje njengoba imidlalo sesiyethula. Asingabazi ukuthi ikusasa lazo liyakhanya kulo mkhakha, ngelinye ilanga siyozibona sezisenzela imidlalo emikhulu," kusho uShirley. Uthe imidlalo emifishane njengalena, babonile ukuthi abantu abaningi abangababukeli babo bayayithakasela yingakho bekhethe ukugxila kuyona okwamanje. Uthe bangasho ukuthi sekuyinto abazogxila kuyo isikhathi eside. "Imidlalo emide inawo umthelela wokuthi ababukeli bagcine bengasayithandi kahle, ngakho ukwenza lena emincane esheshe ifike esixazululweni, kuyinto esithe uma sibuka sabona ukuthi iyasisebenzela," kusho yena. Kule midlalo kukhona othi Love At Second Sight, kuwo okulingisa phambili u-Amanda Seome, Nduduzo Zuma, Aluve Mjali noNimrod Nkosi. Omunye umdlalo, uthi Kuningi, kuwo kulingisa phambili uSamkelo Ndlovu, Kay Sibiya, Simphiwe Ngema, Andy Mnguni noRatanang Mogotsi. Eminye ezokhonjiswa kubalwa ethi Amanzi Endlini, Ke Nyala Jwang? Lobola lama 2000, Mamfundisi Bae neminye.  Izinkampani eziqophe le midlalo kubalwa kuzona iNgomoya Films, Weldun Media, Pula Bakgaga, Behind the Best neMthakathi Entertainment.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UNALEDI Aphiwe osexolisile ngakukhuluma kuwina iLadysmith Black Mambazo emcimbini wamaMetro FM Awards INTOKAZI yaseNanda, uNaledi Aphiwe igcine ixolisile ngeyakusho ngenkathi iqembu lesicathamiya elidume umhlaba wonke, iLadysmith Black Mambazo, linqoba izindondo ezintathu emcimbini obungeledlule amaMetro FM Music Awards. IMambazo yanqoba izindondo uNaledi Aphiwe ayezibheke ngabomvu kulo mcimbi okwafakazelwa yindlela ayenxenxa ngayo abantu ukuba bamvotele. Engasatholi neyodwa indondo waveza ukuthi akakuzwa kahle ukuwina kweMambazo, wabuza ukuthi ivotelwe obani njengoba abayiculelayo bengamakhehla nje. IqQEMBU iLadysmith Black Mambazo Image: Rajesh Jantilal "Siyababongela omkhulu Mambazo kusho ukuthi ogogo bebevota ethuneni. Yini yona leyo iLadysmith," washo kanje uNaledi. UNaledi wagxekwa abaningi ngokukhuluma ngale ndlela, kwathiwa udelela lezi zingqalabutho esezenze omkhulu umsebenzi ngokuphakamisa ifulegi lakuleli emazweni omhlaba. Ngempelasonto, emcimbini obuseMpumalanga, uNaledi uthe kwesinye isikhathi uyazibona naye ukuthi uke akhulume angacabangi nokuyinto ayixoliselayo. "Ezinye izinto ngike ngizenze ngokucasuka ngikhulume noma yikanjani ngingalicabangeli ikusasa. Ngiyazi engakusho kwakungamele ngikukhulume. Ngalokho ngiyaxolisa kakhulu kubantu abadala ngendlela engikhulume ngayo. Kwesinye isikhathi kubuhlungu kakhulu ukuthi into oyisebenzele kanzima ugcine ungayitholi, nami bengikuleso simo. Ngiyaxolisa kobaba nomkhulu beBlack Mambazo, ngiyathemba ukuthi bazongixolela nabo ngiyalucela uxhaso lwabo," kusho uNaledi. Uthe abanye abamgxekayo ngalokhu abalandeli bentokazi eyaphuma isibili ohlelweni iBig Brother Mzansi, uThandeka Tshabalala, nangazisoli ngokubagcona njengoba ajabula le ntokazi ingayitholi imali engu-R2 million kuphela uhlelo. Uthe uyalucela uxhaso kubalandeli abathanda umculo wakhe, nabanye abangabalandeli baleli qembu, okungenzeka ukuthi bese bengamthandi. Maduze nje uthe kukhona ingoma abayiphekayo nomculi osanda kufika kule ndima uSpikili, nabazomemezela izinhlelo zayo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. UNaledi noZee Nxumalo yibona baculi okwakhalwa kakhulu ngokungawini kwabo kulo mcimbi njengoba babeqokwe eminxeni eminingi, kodwa bahamba beshwiba izandla.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: MK Party/ Facebook AQASHWE ngelokhozi yizinhlaka zokuphepha nezinhloli amamashi athe chithi saka okuzwakalisa ukungenami ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze kungagcini sekuqubuka udlame kuphinde nezibhelu ezenzeka ngo-2021. Lokhu kuvezwe okhulumela uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa izolo, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, esithangamini nabezindaba eKapa. Uthe uRamaphosa uthola ukwelulekwa cishe njalo ngabezokuphepha ngalawa mamashi. "Aqashwe ngelokhozi ukuthi kungagcini sekuphinda isehlakalo sangoJulayi 2021, lapho kwacekelwa khona impahla kwatatshwa nempahla ezitolo. Kujutshwe abezomthetho ukuthi baqaphe okwenzekayo. Kuqiniswe uphiko lwamaphoyisa aqapha izibhelu kanjalo nezobunhloli kuleli selokhu kwenzeka izibhelu zango-2021 ," kusho uMagwenya. Kwadaleka umonakalo omkhulu emnothweni wezwe kwashona nenqwaba yabantu ngezibhelu zango-2021, ikakhulu KwaZulu-Natal naseGauteng. Muva nje andile amamashi aholwa izishoshovu zomphakathi ezingeneme njengoba izolo eThekwini bekukhona ukhukhulelangoqo wemashi eye nasePhoyinti, okungesinye sesizinda okugcwele kuso abantu bokufika kuleli dolobha. UMagwenya uphinde wachitha eyokuthi abantu bakuleli, banenzondo nabantu bokufika kuleli. "UMengameli ube nezingxoxo nomengameli waseMozambique uMnuz Daniel Chapo, wamqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bakuleli banemfudumalo futhi ababazondi abantu bakwamanye amazwe. Into okumele ixoxwe ngukuthi kungani abantu bakwamanye amazwe bashiye emazweni abo baye kwamanye amazwe. Le ngxoxo kumele kube eyabo bonke abantu base-Afrika," usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi abantu bakuleli banezikhalazo ngobugebengu, obunye obenziwa abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Uthe abantu bakuleli banelungelo lokumasha okuyinto eseMthethwenisisekelo wezwe. "UMengameli unxuse abantu bakwamanye amazwe abakuleli ukuthi bahloniphe imithetho yezwe. Nathi siyawuhlonipha umthetho ngakho nabo kumele benze okufanayo." UMagwenya ubuye waveza ukuthi uRamaphosa akanankinga nokuhlangana nowayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma. Kunokukhuluma okusabalele bokuthi uRamaphosa angase ahlangane noZuma, osehola iqembu iMKP. "UZuma noRamaphosa abazona izitha. Banemibono ehlukile yezepolitiki, kodwa abazona izitha. Bayahlangana, bebehlangene muva nje eSwatini, lapho bajabulelana kwaba kuhle," kusho uMagwenya. Uthe uma behlangana kuzobe kungekhona ukuthi kuhlangana izitha. "UZuma wayengumengameli wezwe. Angahlangana noma yinini noRamaphosa ngoba unalo ilungelo lokwenza lokhu. URamaphosa uyahlangana nabanye ababengomengameli okubalwa uMnuz Thabo Mbeki. Bayahlangana emihlanganweni ye-ANC, baxoxe." Uphawule nangohambo lukaRamaphosa, lwaseZimbabwe muva nje. "URamaphosa uye eZimbabwe ngoba emenywe nguMengameli wakhona. Wayengazi ukuthi ethimbeni labantu abafica eZimbabwe, kunomlisa ofunwa abomthetho kuleli. Akamazi lo mlisa futhi useyalele abezomthetho ukuthi baqhubeke nomsebenzi wabo ngaphandle kokwesaba. Akukho okungale ayekuyele eZimbabwe," usho kanje.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Kia Tasman entsha ishiya abantu abaningi behlukene phakathi ngendlela ebukeka ngayo BASUKELE isidleke sezinyosi kwaKia South Africa ngokwethula iveni labo lokuqala ngqa, iTasman, ababheke ukuzuza lukhulu ngalo. Umphumela kuyoba wukuthi zibatinyele okanye bafinyelele ekhekheni kube wuju lodwa. Izinyosi kulokhu yizingqungqulu ezikhonya emkhakheni wamaveni angama-double cab okuyi-Ford Ranger, Toyota Hilux, Isuzu D-Max, VW Amarok, GWM P-Series, Nissan Navara ne-Foton Tunland. Ngeke ubasole ngokuzama ukufika ojwini kwazise iconsisa amathe le makethe njengoba nyakenye kudayiswe ama-double cab angaphezu kuka-63 000. Uqala nje unyaka u-2026, evile ku-10 000 asefinyelele emakhasimendeni. Uma betinyeleka bazobe belandela ezinyathelweni zeMercedes-Benz ngeveni labo iX-Class eyayisuselwe kwiNissan Navara eyabhacaza baze bayihoxisa. Nokho iTasman ayifani neX-Class ngoba yona ayisuselwe ndawo, kunalokho kwaKia bayakhe kusuka phansi kuya phezulu. Ivele okokuqala emehlweni abantu ngo-2024 kwasuka okukhulu ukukhuluma ngendlela ebukeka ngayo. Namanje lokho kukhuluma akukapheli kusashiya abantu bengundaza ngezizathu ezingefani. Ngingomunye obeshaya amakhala kodwa emuva kokuyizwa ngezami izandla izinsukwana eWestern Cape ngesikhathi yethulwa, ngigcine sengingenankinga ngayo. Nabanye kungenzeka bajike umqondo uma sebeyijwayela. Ukuba le moto ingumuntu mhlawumbe beyizophiwa igama lokuthi uBuhlebuyeza. Ibukeka njengemoto encane okanye iSUV ngaphakathi iKia Tasman Okwamanje ezweni kukhona angu-150 futhi esinye isitokwe samaTasman angu-300 sisendleleni. Lokhu kukhombisa ngokusobala ukuzimisela kwabo ngokunyusa isibalo sezimoto abazidayisayo nonyaka, ngokusho kwesikhulu sakwa-Kia South Africa, uPaul Turnbull. Nyakenye badayise izimoto ezingu-18 843 nokuyisibalo esinyuke sisuka ku-14 103 ngo-2024. Ngo-2026, uTurnbull uthe bafuna ukudayisa ezingu-23 000 kuya phezulu. Ngale kweTasman, kunezinye izimoto ezintsha sha eziyisihlanu ezizayo nonyaka nezimbili ezinamagama asevele ekhona kuleli. Uma sibuyela kwiTasman, ngaphambili igolozile, iyagqama uma ithushuka. Iyagqama njengoba ubude bungu-5.410 mm kuthi ububanzi bube ngu- 1.930 mm. Ama-LED headlights ahlanganiswe nama-daytime running lights bawanameke ezinhlangothini bese ezansi kuba nama-fog lights. Ngikubone kuwabeka engcupheni yokulimala, ikakhulukazi uma usugudla ehlathini elithothene. Uma uyibuka ohlangothini kuvela amarimu angu-17 inch afakwe emasondweni angama-all terrain newindi langemuva elidimile. Kugqama amafenda aqumbile anombala omnyama okuthi uma uthanda uthole afana nombala ofana nomzimba wemoto. Esikhenkeni kunokokusivikela ukuthi singaklwebheki uma ulayishe impahla. Ngikuthandile ukuthi isivalo sesikhenke asisindi uma usivula noma usivala. Kuningi okunye ongakwengeza ngokuthanda kwakho njenge-bull bar, styling bar, i-roller shutter esikhenkeni kanjalo ne-towbar. I-towbar le ungakwazi ukudonsa ngayo isisindo esingu-3 500kg. ITasman ifika ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyi-LX edonsa ngamasondo amabili, SX ne-X-Pro ezidonsa ngawo wonke. “Wu-last number” iX-Pro ebesihamba ngayo. Ngaphakathi ungafunga ukuthi yi-SUV. Inezihlalo zesikhumba, ezangaphambili okwazi ukuzifudumeza uphinde uzibandise. Okunye okokushisisa yisiteringi. Iphinde ibe ne-touchscreen infotainment system engu-12.3 inch ehlangene ne-digital instrument cluster. Phakathi nendawo kuwona la ma-screen kunesinye esincane esikukhombisa amazinga okushisa nokuthi umoya uphuma kuphi. Besingabonakali kahle ngasohlangothini lomshayeli kudingeka ngitshekise ikhanda ukulunguza. Kwi-infotainment udlala umculo ngezipikha ezikhala kamnandi ze-Harman Kardon, ikukhombisa lonke ingaphandle njengoba inamakhamera zinhlangothi zombili ngaphambili nangemuva, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo nokunye. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi kunamabhathini asheshe akufikise kofuna ukukwenza ungathinti kwi-touchscreen ize ingcole. Ngibala inkinobho yokunyusa umsindo, ezokushintsha amazinga okushisa nokunye. Kunezimbobo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB ngaphambili, eyokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo nezinye ezimbili zokushaja ngemuva. Ngemuva isikhala sabagibeli ngisibone sikahle, kuphela ezinyaweni sincanyana. ITasman ifika nenjini eyodwa engu-2.2 litre kadizili ekhona nakwezinye izimoto zakwa-Kia njengeSorento. Inamandla angu-154kW ne-torque engu-440Nm bese kuthi u-gearbox ube yi-8 speed automatic. Indlela isisuse eWaterfront yaze yayophelela eLambert’s Bay, bude buduze nasezweni elingumakhelwane iNamibia. Sigudle etiyeleni, sangena obhuqwini, saphinde sabuyela etiyeleni. Ngisanda kuyisusa ngiyizwe sengathi inokuthanda ukushintshashintsha amagiya kodwa sagcina sijwayelene. Ngemuva ifika nokokuvikela isikhenke iKia Tasman Amandla abezwakala enele uma isukuma futhi iyicela indlela uma ngifuna ukudlula ezinye izimoto namaloli ahudula izinqola ezilayishe impahla. Inama-drive modes amane okungu-Eco, Normal, Sport no-Tow. Ngaphakathi ithule futhi uma umgwaqo uqala ukuba mubi bekuzwakala kodwa hhayi ngendlela ekhalisayo. Ngeke nokho uyibeke ezingeni leRanger. Ngichazwe yindlela ebambelela ngayo okusizwa kakhulu wukuthi idonsa ngawo wonke amasondo amandlla iwafake lapho edingeka khona. Uma uthanda uyayishintsha idonse ngamabili bese kuthi uma ususobhuqwini uyifake ku-4H okanye u-4Low. Ngike ngayishiya ku-4 Auto obhuqwini ngayibona ilubamba kodwa ngiyizwa ne-traction control ingenelela ukungigcina endleleni. Obhuqwini ibingakhalisi nhlobo ingazweli kakhulu futhi ilinyusa nejubane ngale kokukuthusa ngokuthi ingakuphosa esikhotheni. Akukho lapho sixakeke khona kwadingeka ukuthi sisebenzise i-diff lock kwazise asiziqwalanga izintaba. Angiboni ukuthi ibizoshaya phansi ngoba igabade ilishiye ngo-252mm. Ikwazi nokuzihambela yona uma uyifaka kuX-Trek ongawufanisa ne-cruise control yasobhuqwini. Siphinde sayihloma esihlabathini, okuyindawo ekwazi ukuhamba kuyo ngale kokuxakeka. Esiteringini kunamabhathini okukutshela ukuthi uhamba endaweni enjani njengasesihlabathini, ematsheni nasodakeni Yona ibe isizilungisa ngendlela efanele njengokuthi ithi ukulibamba igiya esihlabathini. KwaKia bathi ngo-100km iphuza amalitha angu-7.8 litres ethangini elingu-80 litres. Ngilunguze ngayibona idla 8.9l/100km. Ngokwami iTasman yiveni elisezingeni nelingase licoshacoshe emakhasimendeni.
