Izinyanga ezizayo yizona ezizosidweba sicace isithombe sokuthi abashayeli baseNingizimu Afrika bahamba nayo noma bazoqhubeka nokubambelela ezintandokazini zabo iRanger, Hilux okulindeleke entsha maduze neD-Max ethuthukisiwe ezokwethulwa noma yinini. Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4x2 LX                        R 679,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD SX                      R 879,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD X-PRO               R 999 995 Zifika ne-service plan yeminyaka eyisithupha noma u-90 000km, Roadside assistance weminyaka emihlanu engakalelwe banga ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu nayo engakalelwe banga.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ James 'God'olulala amankankane' Mthembu owadutshulwa nyakenye UTHOLA izinsongo zokubulawa umndeni wenyanga eyayidumile KwaMhlabuyalingana, uMnuz James "God'olulala amankankane" Mthembu (61), kulandela ukubulawa komunye wabasolwa ngokuyisoconga ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko, okuthiwa senzeke eThengani, khona eManguzi, owesilisa obegqekezelwa ngenhloso yokuthi aphucwe imoto, udubule kwafa "isigebengu", uMnuz Sifiso "Coach" Malwane. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa, uMalwane, ubengungqondongqondo emacaleni obugebengu bokwebiwa kwezimoto endaweni, bese zeqiswa umngcele, zibhekiswe eMozambique. Kuthiwa ubulawa nje, amaphoyisa abemfunela icala lokubulawa kukaGod'olulala amankankane, owadutshulwa ngoyaba lwezinhlambu ekhaya lakhe ePhelandaba, eManguzi ngasekupheleni kuka-Okthoba nyakenye. UMalwane kuthiwa ubefunelwa necala lokudutshulwa, kubulawe uMnuz Juda Mthethwa ngoFebhuwari 2023. Umthombo ocele ukuthi ungadalulwa uthe umndeni kaGodo usuqalile ukuthola izinsongo ngoba usolwa ngokuthi ubhiyozela ukubulawa kukaMalwane. “Kuthiwa njengoba bejabula nje, nabo basazobulawa,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi okwenzekayo, ukuthi kubulawe abathintekayo ekubulaweni kukaGodo, yinto umndeni obuyilindele vele njengoba ubunayo inkolelo yokuthi umufi uzozilwela nalabo abamsoconga. Ithintwa indodana kaGodo, uMnuz Mandla Mthethwa, yale yaphetha ukuphawula, yathi lolu daba lubucayi, akukho umndeni ongakuphawula. Isolezwe lihlulekile ukuthola ukuphawula komndeni kaJuda njengoba isihlobo, sithe kulukhuni ukuthi bangaphawula ngesehlakalo, kwathi ucingo lukankosikazi kamufi, lwakhala lwangaphendulwa. Osekomitini, elilwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni, uMnuz Joseph Ngubane, uthe nakuba ebulewe ungqondongqondo kodwa kusekhona ukukhathazeka emphakathini ngoba basekhona abanye abasele. Uthe bajatshuliswa wukuthi umgilwa odubule umufi ukwazile ukuzivikela, ehlaselwa. “Neyakhe impilo ibisengcupheni, nabo bebedubula bebhekise kuye,” kusho uNgubane. Uthe ithimba eliyisipesheli elasungulwa ukuze libhekane nalolu hlobo lobugebengu, lisawubambe kahle. “Kuke kuthule, ngoba izigebengu ziyalalisa, kodwa bese kubuye kubhoka ke futhi,” usho kanje, enezela ngokuthi njengoba kwenzeke isigameko nje, ikhona imoto eyiveni ethathwe kuzosa kube yizolo eBhambanana. Unxuse umphakathi ukuthi uqhubeke ubambisane namaphoyisa ekulweni nalobu bugebengu, waphinde wawuxwayisa ngokuthi uqaphele ngoba izigebengu zalolu hlobo ziyingozi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda uthe umufi ungomunye wezelamani zakwaMalwane ezaziwayo, ezisohlwini lwabasolwa abafunwa amaphoyisa ngamacala okubulala kanjalo nawobugebengu obusemngceleni. “Phakathi kwalawo macala, kukhona nelokubulala uMnuz Juda Mthethwa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe umufi udutshulwe wafa ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi eThengani, eManguzi, ngeSonto. Uthe uMalwane nomunye abehamba naye bagqekeze umuzi, bephethe izibhamu, bafuna ngodli izikhiye zemoto kumnikazi womuzi. “Umgilwa usheshe wathatha isibhamu sakhe, wadubula ebhekise kubasolwa, abaphunyule babaleka. Umufi ubaleka nje, udubulekile,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe amaphoyisa alwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni azwe ukuthi kunesidumbu esingcwatshwe ngendlela engafanele eMgodiwemvubu ngeSonto. “Amaphoyisa athole ukuthi leso sidumbu ngesikaMalwane obedutshulwe esikhathini esingengakanani ngosuku olufanayo. Kuvele ukuthi singcwatshwe ngokuyimfihlo wumfowabo, uMnuz Musa Malwane, naye ofunelwa uxhaxha lwamacala okubulala nawobugebengu obusemngceleni,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uqinisekise ukuthi lezi zelamani zifunelwa necala lokubulawa kwenyanga edumile eManguzi, uJames ‘God'olulala amankankane’ Mthembu. Uthe isidumbu sikamufi sigcine simbiwa ngokulandela uhlelo olufanele, kanti uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. Uthe nokucingwa kusaMusa nakho kusaqhubeka, wanxusa abangaba nolwazi ngokuthi uphi, bathinte amaphoyisa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube Image: Itumeleng English / Independent Newspapers BASAZOTHWALA kanzima abafundi nothisha ezikoleni zakuleli, ngemuva kokuba uMnyango kaMgcinimafa ukhala ngokuthi ngeke ukwazi ukuxhasa zonke izinhlelo zoMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo. Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, ngesikhathi enomhlangano nekomiti lasePhalamende. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, lo mnyango ubhekene nezinselelo zemali ikakhulu KwaZulu-Natal, njengoba ungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi ezinye zezidingo okubalwa imali yezikole eyaziwa ngama-Norms and Standards. Nyakenye uhluleke ngisho ukuthenga izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni, wathenga kuphela i-stationery. UNksz Gwarube uthe isimo sisazoba nzima emnyangweni. "Umnyango kaMgcinimafa uthe ngeke ukwazi ukuxhasa ezinye izinhlelo. Usiyalele ukuthi sibheke lapho singathatha khona imali ezinhlelweni zomnyango, ukuze sikwazi ukuxhasa ezinye izinhlelo. Lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthi singakwazi ukufeza zonke izidingo." usho kanje. Uveze lokhu nje, maduzane kulindeleke ukuthi ethule isabelomali salo nyaka somnyango. Kulo mhlangano kuvele nendaba yokuthi kunabafundi abangobokufika kuleli abasezikoleni. UNksz Gwarube uthe uMthethosiskelo wezwe ucacile ukuthi akumele kukhishwe inyumbazane abafundi abangenazo izimfanelo zokuba kuleli. "Bakhona nabafundi bakuleli, abasezikoleni kodwa abangenazo izitifiketi zokuzalwa. Asikwazi ukubancisha imfundo ngoba bengenazo izitifiketi zokuzalwa. Asikwazi ukuphambana nokushiwo uMthethosisekelo olawula izwe." UMqondisi jikelele emnyangweni, uMnuz Mathanzima Mweli, uthe awukho umgomo wokuthi abafundi kumele bafundisane encwadini eyodwa wathi lokhu kwenzeka ngenxa yokushoda kwazo. "Baningi abafundi abasebenzisa incwadi eyodwa ekubeni ngabe akumele kube kanjalo. Lokhu kwande kakhulu emabangeni angaphansi kuka-matric. Awukho umgomo othi abafundi kumele basebenzise incwadi eyodwa," usho kanje. Kuphinde kwavela nendaba yezinselelo ohlelweni lokudla ezikoleni ikakhulu esifundazweni. Okuvezwe yizikhulu zomnyango ngukuthi kulesi sifundazwe, kwengezwe abafundi abevile ku-200 000 ekutheni bahlomule kulolu hlelo, ekubeni imali ingazange yengezwe ukuze badle. Lokhu kusho ukuthi sandile isibalo sabafundi asebedla ekubeni imali ingazange yengezwe. UNksz Gwarube ubuye waveza ukuthi njengoba uGrade R usuyimpoqo, bayazama ukutshala imali ukuze ungabikhona umthelela ongemuhle.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weNFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes UMHOLI we-NFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, ushiye angalazi kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, amsola ngokuvikela abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UBarnes ubize uMalema ngohlanya oluhambe luvikela abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi amukela amalungu ajoyine iqembu esifundeni uThukela. UMalema usanda kukhwela adilike ebantwini abahola imibhikisho elwa nabokufika ethe chithi saka ezweni. Imibhikisho iqale esifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal, yabe isidlulela e-Eastern Cape. Ngeledlule le mibhikisho ingenise esifundazweni iGauteng edolobheni eliyisizinda somnotho wakuleli, iGoli, kanye nasenhloko dolobha yezwe iPitoli. UMalema uthe le mibhikisho yenzeka ezifundazweni lapho abantu abamnyama babebulalana bodwa ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma esidlweni sakusihlwa ebesihlelwe inhlangano engenzi nzuzo iCollen Mashawana Foundation. UMalema uthe abahola imibhikisho abazi lutho bazi ukuphuza intelezi nempesu. UMalema uthe akanendaba noma bengangayivotela i-EFF labantu abaqhuba le mibhikisho. "Anginendaba namavoti abo, iMKP ingawathatha uma iwafuna amavoti abo. Angifuni mina ukuvotelwa abantu abafuna ukuthi ngizonde abantu balapha e-Afrika." UBarnes unxuse abantu ukuthi bengamnaki uMalema. UBarnes uthe naye uyahambisana nomkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Lo ogula ngekhanda othi badla intelezi nempesu, uma bekwenza ngakubo, abahambe ngakubo ke. Thina la KwaZulu sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. La kwelikaMthaniya sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. Uma uyiSulumane buyela ngakini emaSulumaneni amanye eSomalia. Uma ungowaseNigeria hamba ngakini eNigeria. Uma ungowaseZimbabwe hamba ngakini eZimbabwe. Anisenamahloni yini ukuthi selokhu kwathi nhlo iNingizimu Afrika iyahlupheka ngenxa yenu? Sesikhathele." UBarnes uthe nabo beyiNFP bazowujoyina umkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika wanxusa abaholi imibhikisho, uNgizwe Mchunu noNkosikhona "Phakel'uthakathi" Ndabandaba ukuba babameme emkhankasweni. UBarnes ukhuluma kanjena ngoMalema nje lamaqembu ahlela ukubambisana neMKP KwaZulu-Natal ekuketuleni uhulumeni wesifundazwe. I-MKP ihola umkhankaso wokugudluza uhulumeni wokubambisana oholwa i-IFP, iNFP ingababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. Uma lingagcina liphumelela itulo leMKP lokuchitha uhulumeni wesifundazwe kungasho ukuthi izobambisana namaqembu anemibono eyehlukile odabeni lwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Itumeleng English LIYALA ukugoba uphondo iqembu iMKP, ehlabela phambili necala lokukhalaza ngemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024, emva kokuhlangana nezikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli, i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC). Ubuholi beMKP buhlangane nezikhulu zale khomishini ngoMsombuluko eNkandla, lapho bekubhungwa ngezinto ezehlukene ezithinta ukhetho. Lo mhlangano ubuholwa umengameli weMKP uMnuz Jacob Zuma, noSihlalo we-IEC uMnuz Mosotho Moepya. Okhulumela iMKP uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, uthe kulo mhlangano kuxoxwe ngezinto ezehlukene ezithinta ukhetho wathi zombili izinhlangothi zavumelana ukuthi ziphinde zibambe ezinye izingxoxo ngomuso. "Asijiki ekutheni siyaqhubeka necala esalifaka elithinta ukubanjwa inkunzi okhethweni lwango-2024. Okuseqhulwini esikhalaza ngakho ukwebiwa nokukhwatshaniswa kwamavoti, okwenziwa yi-IEC," usho kanje. Uthe bakwenza lokhu ukuvikela abantu bakuleli wathi bafuna izinhlaka ezigqugquzela intando yeningi ukuthi zenze izinto ngokuvuleleka. UMoepya uthe ezinye izinto abazange bafinyelele esivumelwaneni emhlanganweni wathi basazobamba eminye imihlangano neMKP ukuze baqhubeke nezingxoxo. "Asivumelananga ngezinto ezithile, kakade intando yeningi injalo. Sizobuye sihlangane sixoxe ngezinye izinto ezisalile kulo mhlangano," usho kanje. Uthe njengoba bebehlangene neMKP, bebesaqhuba umkhankaso wabo wokuhlangana nezinhlaka ezehlukene njengoba kuza ukhetho. "Sivulelane izifuba kulo mhlangano, sathola ngezikhalazo zeMKP, nathi saphinde saveza ezethu. Emkhakheni esikuwona, ngeke sihlale sivumelana kanti lokhu kuqinisa intanto yeningi," kusho uMoepya. Uthe bayaqhubeka nemihlangano nezinhlaka ezehlukene njengoba kuza lolu khetho. "Sahlangana neSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini, uNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Thami Ntuli, amaqembu ahlukene okuyi-IFP, EFF, NFP, ANC kanti sisazohlangana nezinye izinhlaka okubalwa nabamahlelo ahlukene ezenkolo. Kule mihlangano sibhunga nangombiko oveza ukuthi abantu baseKZN, abasayingeni eyokuvota." Uthe bazimisele ukuthi ukhetho lwangoNovemba 4 nonyaka lube ngolukhululekile kanjalo nokuthula. Kwenzeka lokhu nje uZuma wathi ufuna kuhlehliswe ngenxa yezikhalazo abasenazo. Wathi akusizi ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile ngoba lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi," kwasho uZuma.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUMINZE isangoma ebesiyogeza abantu emfuleni waseNanda, enyakatho yeTheku KUMINZE isangoma, okuthiwa besiyohlambulula abantu edamini laseNanda, endaweni yaseSikebheni, eMzinyathi, ngoMsombuluko. Ngokusho komthombo, umufi ongowesifazane, ubehamba nabanye abantu abambalwa beyogezwa. “Uminze engakabagezi. Bekusewuye kuphela obesangene emanzini,” kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi isigameko senzeke kusakhanya, nokho umufi abakwazanga ukumhlenga ebebekhona. “Asazi ukuthi bebesukaphi, kodwa akubona abendawo,” kusho umthombo. Ikhansela lendawo, uMnuz Falakhe Gcabashe, lithintwa yiSolezwe, lithe lisanda kuzwa ngodaba, lathi alikakabi nolwazi olugcwele. “Engikutholile wukuthi umufi nalabo abehamba nabo ababona abantu bendawo. Asikabi nalo ulwazi lokuthi bebesuka kuphi nendawo. Okusho ukuthi bebezokwenza lokho ebebezokwenza bese behamba,” kusho uGcabashe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aseNanda avule idokodo lokufa komuntu ukuze liphenywe kulandela ukuminza komuntu edamini laseNanda ngoMsombuluko. “Kusolwa ukuthi owesifazane ubegeza abantu edamini eliseSikebheni ngesikhathi eminza,” kusho uSgt Ngcobo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuthunjwe osanda kuthola ekaRAF Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal ahlenge owesifazane owayethunjwe kanye nabanye abayisikhombisa ekhaya labo eChappies Section, eMandeville, eSundumbili, ngamadoda angaziwa ezintatha zangoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Izisulu eziyisikhombisa kubikwa ukuthi zidedelwe KwaDabeka ngemuva kwesikhashana, nokho owesifazane, osanda kuthola imali yakhe ye-Road Accident Fund (RAF), uyiswe endaweni engaziwa. Ithimba leProvincial Tracking Team lisebenze ngokuzikhandla lathola imoto eyodwa kwezimbili ezasetshenziswa ngesikhathi kuthunjwa, abopha abasolwa abathathu. Uphenyo luholele amaphoyisa ePhoenix lapho isisulu, esiseminyakeni yo-30 ubudala, sitholakale singenamyocu. Amaphoyisa anxusa abahlomuli be-RAF ukuthi bangazidaluli izinkokhelo zabo noma baziqhayise ngale mali. Abasolwa bazamile ukukhipha imali kaningi kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya, kodwa bakwazile ukuthenga ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R30 000. Abasolwa ababoshiwe bazovela enkantolo maduze. Kusathungathwa abanye abasolwa.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUMISWE uSihlalo we-IFP Youth Brigade (IFPYB) KwaZulu-Natal, ozwakala engxoxweni eqoshiwe ephehla udlame, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UMaphisa umiswe nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala kule nkulumo lithi ngeke lisifake isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. UMaphisa uyilungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal futhi uke waba imeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusini, ekubeni uNksz Ndlovu, yena usebenza kumasipala ophethwe yi-IFP. Isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu sithathwe emhlanganweni oyisipesheli wesigungu esiphezulu kwi-IFP obizwe emva kokusabalala kwayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe isigungu esiphezulu sithathe isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu emva kokuba uMaphisa evumile ukuthi nguyena okhuluma kule ngxoxo eqoshiwe. UHlengwa uthe uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bazoqondiswa ubugwegwe. "UMaphisa umiswe kuzo zonke izikhundla okubalwa kuzo ukuba uSihlalo we-IFPYB KwaZulu-Natal nokuba ilungu loMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP. Uzomiswa esikhundleni kuze kube udaba lwakhe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke. UNksz Ndlovu umisiwe kuzo zonke izinto ezithinta iqembu, akavumelekile ukuba abe yingxenye yezinto ezithinta iqembu kuze kuba kuphuma isinqumo ohlelweni lwakhe lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke." UHlengwa uthe isigungu esiphezulu sizoqhubeka nokuphenya lolu daba, bese sethula umbiko ogcwele emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke. "I-IFP ixwayisa abaholi bayo, amalungu nezinhlaka zeqembu ukuba bagweme ukwenza izinkulumo ezidala ezibudedengu, ezifaka iqembu ehlazweni nezidala uqhekeko eqenjini. Ubuholi be-IFP buzokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iyalandelwa yonke imigomo yeqembu." UMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bangene obishini emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe lapho kuzwakala khona bekhuluma ngezimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP. Kule nkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ekhalaza kuMaphisa ukuthi abantu abasohlangothini lwabo bayavinjwa uma kunemihlangano yokugcoba amaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi uNksz Ndlovu nabanye abasohlangothini lwabo akufanele bavume ukudlala abantu abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uzwakala ethi abasohlangothini lwabo kufanele bashaye abasohlangothini oluphikisayo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko okuvinjwa kuyo abasohlangothini abahambisana nalo. Uma iqhubeka inkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ethi kade ayenikwa izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ambize ngalo baba, nokukholakala ukuthi ubesho izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi yena ngeke azigqoke izikibha ezinobuso "balo baba". Amalungu e-IFP asanda kuvunyelwa ukuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini, bekuvumeleke izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IMGIXABEZE ngodilikajele iNkantolo yesiFunda saseScottburgh, owesilisa oneminyaka engu-43, olahlwe yicala lokudlwengula owesifazane (20) waseDududu, eMzinto. Lokhu kuvezwe yiNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA), ngesikhathi isishayela ihlombe isigwebo esehliswe yinkantolo kolahlwe yicala. Ngokusho koyikhulumelayo, uNkk Natasha Ramkisson-Kara, inkantolo iphinde yanquma ukuthi angaphinde avunyelwe ukuba nesibhamu. Uthe iphinde yakhipha umyalelo wokuthi igama lakhe lifakwe ohlwini lukazwelonke lwabantu abahlukumeza ngokocansi. UNkk Ramkisson-Kara uthe bayasemukela isigwebo esikhishwe yinkantolo kulona olahlwe yicala. “Ukunqanda udlame lobulili kusalokhu kuhleli eqhulwini ophikweni lweNPA. Izigwebo ezifuze lesi siyazamukela kwazise zithumela umyalezo kulabo abasuke besacabanga ukwenza ubugebengu obufanayo,” kusho uNkk Ramkisson-Kara. Elandisa ngesigameko uthe senzeka ngoDisemba 24, 2022 endaweni yaseDududu. Uveze ukuthi umdlwenguli nomgilwa babazana njengoba umdlwenguli wayeke wasebenza endaweni, ewumuntu owaziwayo umndeni kamgilwa. “Ngobusuku bangoDisemba 24, 2022, umgilwa kuthiwa wayelele nengane yakhe encane kubo. Kuthiwa wezwa kukhona umuntu owayengqongqoza ewindini,” kusho uNkk Ramkisson-Kara. Uthe njengoba ugesi wawuhambile endaweni, umgilwa wasebenzisa ithoshi leselula yakhe ukuyobheka. UNkk Ramkisson-Kara uthe yilapho umgilwa ambona khona umdlwenguli, emi ngaphandle kwewindi. “Kuthiwa wavele wamkhomba ngesibhamu, wamyalela ukuthi amvulele angene ngaphakathi, nokuthiwa umgilwa wakwenza ngempela ngenxa yokwesabela impilo yakhe,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi esengaphakathi, lona wesilisa wabe esemdlwengula umgilwa, emkhombe ngesibhamu. Uthe waphinde wamdlwengula futhi ezintatha zangoKhisimusi. Uveze ukuthi ngaphambi kokuba akhale amaphepha, wamsabisa ngokuthi uzombulala nengane yakhe uma kuke kwaba khona umuntu amtshela ngesigameko. “Nokho emva kokuhamba kwakhe, umgilwa wavele wafonela unina noninakhulu. Isigameko sabe sesibikwa emaphoyiseni, wathola usizo lwezempilo esibhedlela esiseduze, umdlwenguli waboshwa ngokuhamba kosuku olufanayo,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala, uMshushisi woMbuso uThanusha Govender ubehola ubufakazi bukamgilwa, obukanina kanjalo noninakhulu. Nodokotela owaxilonga umgilwa naye ubethulie obakhe ubufakazi. Ngesikhathi uGovender ecindezela eyokuthi umdlwenguli anikwe isigwebo esiqinile ugqamise eyokuthi izigameko zokudlwengulwa kwabantu kule ndawo zithe chithi saka. Wachaza isigameko njengesinokuhlukumeza amalungelo omzimba womuntu okufaka phakathi ukumehlisa isithunzi. Uphinde wethula phambi kwenkantolo isitatimende esibhalwe umgilwa, ngaphansi kweso likaNkk Nokukhanya Mkhize, oyiCourt Preparation Officer, lapho echaza kabanzi ukuthi yamhlukumeza kangakanani indaba yokunukubezwa. Kusona umgilwa uveze ukuthi ulahlekelwe ukubethemba abantu besilisa kanjalo nasebudlelwaneni emva kwesigameko, wathi emva kokwenzeka kwaso, impilo yakhe yavele yashintsha unomphela.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs osefomini enhle othishwa ngumqeqeshi waleli qembu ngokufanele ukubizwa eqenjini lesizwe eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, uphumele obala ngokuchoma uphaphe lwegwalagwala unozinti wakhe, uBrandon Petersen, akholwa wukuthi kumfanele ukungena endizeni yeqembu lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, ebheke koweNdebe yoMhlaba ngenyanga ezayo. UKaze ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba uPetersen ephinde washaya into ecokeme ezintini, wagcina oqokwe njengomdlali ovelele iChiefs iguqisa AmaZulu ngo 1-0 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. UPetersen (31) osefomini enhle kule sizini, akangenelwanga yigoli emidlalweni ewu-18 kwengu-35 kuyo yonke imiqhudelwano kule sizini. Yize uKaze eqale ngokukucacisa ukuthi akafuni ukugxambukela ekuqokeni abadlali komqeqeshi weBafana, uHugo Broos, kodwa uthe ukholwa wukuthi uPetersen kumfanele ukubizwa eqenjini lesizwe ngenxa yefomu yakhe enhle kule sizini. “Angifuni ukuphawula ngokuthi yibaphi abadlali okufanele babizwe nabangafanele babizwe ngoba sizokwazi maduze ngabazobizwa futhi umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana uyakwazi akudingayo eqenjini lakhe,” kusho uKaze, oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. Maduze kulindeleke uBroos amemezele isikwati sokugcina okuyisona azogadla ngaso kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19 e-USA, Canada naseMexico. “Nathi sidinga ukumnika ithuba lokukhetha abadlali abafunayo ngendlela engafihliwe. Ngifisa ukubona uBrandon Petersen eya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba kumfanele ngenxa yokwenza kahle kwakhe futhi ulokhu eqhubeka nokuba sefomini eyodwa isizini yonke,” kuqhuba uKaze. Ebuzwa ukuthi yini eshintshile ngalo nozinti kule sizini, uthe ukudlala kwakhe njalo kumsize kakhulu kule sizini. Uphinde wancoma indlela yokuziphatha kwalo nozinti ngisho nangaphandle kwenkundla ngaphambi kokuba ngumdlali ozinikelayo enkundleni. “Ngingasho ngithi yilokho okushintshile kuyena (ukudlala njalo) kule sizini ngoba akadlalanga imidlalo eminingi ngesizini edlule. Udlalile kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup (ngesizini edlule), kule sizini udlale imidlalo eminingi futhi ungumdlali osebenza ngokuzikhandla, oziqeqesha zonke izinsuku ngomoya ofanayo nomfutho ofanayo futhi ngiyathanda ukusho kubadlali ukuthi izinto ezinhle zenzeka kubantu abenza kahle. Ngijabule ngokwenzeka kuyena futhi kumfanele konke lokhu okwenzekayo kuyena," kusho uKaze. Amakhosi asezibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo, azosonga isizini ngokudlala neChippa United ngoMgqibelo, ngo-3 ntambama eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seKaizer Chiefs, u-Aden McCarthy, esibheke iwini kwiSiwelele FC UMPHUMELA weSiwelele FC wakamuva ibhekene ne-Orlando Pirates kwiBetway Premiership kufanele usebenze njengesixwayiso kwiKaizer Chiefs ngobunzima ezobhekana nabo emdlalweni weBetway Premiership namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eFree State Stadium, eBloemfontein. Lesi yisexwayiso sesitobha seChiefs, u-Aden McCarthy, ebesikhuluma ngobumqoka bokuqoqa amaphuzu kwiSiwelele ngesikhathi silumana indlebe nethimba lezindaba leChiefs. Amakhosi azobhekana neSiwelele eshayela phezulu kulandela ukuphazamisa kwawo iPirates embangweni wesicoco seligi oshubile neMamelodi Sundowns. IChiefs ayisazi isibhaxu emidlalweni eyisikhombisa yakamuva. Iwine eyisihlanu, yadlala ngokulingana kwemibili. NgokukaMcCarthy, iSiwelele izoba yingozi kubona uma bezoyiyela ngobuso njengoba isanda kuphazamisa iPirates. Leli qembu eliphekwa nguLehlohonolo Seema, lafika e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto lenza okungajwayelekile ngesikhathi libuya nephuzu ngegoli elashaywa ngumdlali wakudala wePirates, uVincent Pule. “Ubufakazi bokuthi unzima kangakanani umdlalo esiya kuwona bulele kumphumela otholwe yiSiwelele ngesikhathi ibhekene nePirates muva nje,” kusho uMcCarthy. “Ngiwumqemane njengoba ngidlalile kowabakhaya kodwa ngaphambi kwawo kukhona ebengingakuzwa kahle okusondelene nokudonseka komsipha. “Engingakusho wukuthi bengingalimele kepha bengiphunyuzwa ukugwema ukuthi kuze konakale kuye phambili. “Ngizijabulela mina kakhulu ngoba ukudlala eBloemfontein kimina kusho lukhulu kwazise kulapho ubaba wami (uFabian McCarthy) aqala khona. Siya kulo mdlalo ngokuzethemba kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi kufanele siyiyele ngobuso (iSiwelele). “Banenqwaba yabadlali beqophelo eliphezulu nokufanele sibaqaphe ngeso lokhozi. Akusekuningi esikuyela emidlalweni ngaphandle kwamaphuzu agcwele kwazise nesizini isiyela emaphethelweni." IChiefs ehlulwe wukungena kwi-MTN8 amasizini amabili elandelana, ibukeka isendleleni ebheke kwiCaf Confederation Cup amasizini amabili elandelana. Isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu angu-47 emidlalweni engu-25. Imiswe kabi ngaMaZulu asendaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-42 emidlalweni engu-26. Amakhosi adinga ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu ukuze ezobuyela kwiConfederation Cup. Emabhukwini eSiwelele kukhona abadlali ababolekiswe yiChiefs okunguSamkelo Zwane noHappy Mashiane abalizwa ngendaba ijezi kuleli qembu.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IJaecoo J5 hybrid okulindeleke ukuthi ifike eNingizimu Afrika ngoJulayi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu INKAMPANI eneminyaka emithathu ikhona, i-Omoda & Jaecoo, isizibekele umgomo wokuthi kuphele u-2027 ibe isidayisa izimoto ezingaphezu kwesigidi ngonyaka. Kule minyaka emithathu eyedlule, i-Omoda & Jaecoo isikwazile ukudayisa izimoto ezingu-1 million emhlabeni jikelele kodwa manje isifuna kungayithathi iminyaka. ENingizimu Afrika iJaecoo izibule nge-J7 eyi-SUV kwathi i-Omoda yona yazethula nge-C5. Isikhulu sakwa-Omoda & Jaecoo International, uShawn Xu, sikhuluma kwiChery International Business Summit, eWuhu, eChina kuleli sonto, sithe kule minyaka emithathu edlule sebekwazile ukuvula amagaraji angu-1 364 emazweni angu-69. UXu the bazimisele ngokuqhubeka nokudlondlobala, yingakho beziphosela inselelo yokudayisa izimoto ezingu-1 million ngonyaka. Eminyakeni emithathu ezayo i-Omoda & Jaecoo izokwethula izimoto ezintsha ezingu-13 emhlabeni jikelele, ngokusho kwesikhulu sakwaChery International, uZhang Guibing. I-Omoda & Jaecoo ingenye yezinkampani ezingaphansi kweChery. ENingizimu Afrika kulindeleke ukuthi umndeni wamaJaecoo wande nge-J5 hybrid, okanye i-SHS ngokolimi abalusebenzisayo. I-J5 ekhona emakethe yakuleli njengamanje ayiwona unhliziyombili njengoba ihamba kuphela ngenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo enamandla angu-115kW. KwaJaecoo bazishaya isifuba ngokonga kwe-J5 SHS kuphethroli kulandela ukuthi izintatheli zasemazweni ayisishiyagalolunye zincintisane ngokuthi wubani ozokonga kakhulu kuphethroli eChina. EzaseNingizimu Afrika zilale isithathu zihamba 625km iveza ukuthi idla 3.7l/100km. Kwabaphumelele ibidla 3.4l/100km. IJaecoo J8 plug-in hybrid yiSUV elayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa okusabhekwa ukuthi ingeza yini eNingizimu Afrika Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Le moto kulindeleke ukuthi itheleke kuleli ngoJulayi. Kubo kwayo bathi kuphethroli idla amalitha angu-5.3 ngo-100km. Phakathi kwezinto enazo kubalwa i-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu ngaphakathi, inqwaba yezinsiza zomshayeli nezokuphepha, izihlalo zesikhumba nokunye. Imininingwane ephelele ngayo nentengo sizobika uma isifika. Enye engase itheleke yi-J8 SHS plug-in hybrid. Iyi-SUV enkulu alayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa abahlala ezihlalweni eziyisikhumba. Esomshayeli isihlalo ngisizwe sintofontofo futhi besingiwotawota. Ngemuva nokho besithanda ukuqina mbijana. Kulesi sikhashana engizithole ngikuyo ibizwakala intofontofo kakhulu. Ine-sunroof, i-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu, ama-airbag angu-10 nezinsiza zomshayeli. Inenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo esebenza nezikagesi ezintathu njengoba amandla ziwafaka kuwo wonke amasondo. Amandla lawa angu-395kW ne-torque engu-650Nm. Bathi uma ithangi likaphethroli elingu-70 litres nebhethri elingu-34.46kWh ligcwele ungahamba 1 400km.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ZIPHEKWE ngebhodwe elincane izikhulu zoMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo ePhalamende ngamalungu efuna ukwazi ngezinhlelo zokubhekana nenkinga yabafundi bakwamanye amazwe, nabakuleli abangenabo omazisi. Lokhu kulandela umbiko othulelwe la malungu, oveza ukuthi bangu-610 322 abafundi abasezikoleni zakuleli, abangenabo omazisi. Kulesi sibalo, abangu-362 571 abakuleli kuthi abangu-247 755 abokufika. Uphenyo ngabafundi abangenabo omazisi lwenziwe ngumkhandlu okubhungwa kuwona izindaba zothisha, i-Education Labour Relations Council (ELRC). USihlalo wekomiti lemfundo eyisiSekelo ePhalamende, uNksz Joy Maimela, ufune ukwazi ukuthi ikuphi okwenziwayo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abafundi bakuleli bathola omazisi? Ubuze nokuthi kusizani ukufundisa abafundi abangokufika kuleli, abagcina bengakwazi ukuveza izitifiketi zabo abazitholile ngenxa yokuthi abanabo omazisi? "Iluphi uhlelo uMnyango onalo ukuze abafundi bakuleli, bagcine bethole omazisi? Kumele kube nokusebenzisana phakathi koMnyango wezaseKhaya, ukuze laba bafundi bathole omazisi," usho kanje. Namanye amalungu asho ngazwi linye ukuthi laba bafundi bagcina bengasakwazi ukuthola izibonelelo zikahulumeni ngoba bengenabo omazisi. UMnuz Siphetho Mkhize weqembu iMKP, ukhale ngokuthi siphezulu kakhulu isibalo sabafundi abangenabo omazisi. "UMnyango wezaseKhaya kumele ungenelele enkingeni yabafundi abangenabo omazisi. Sifuna ukwazi izinhlelo zoMnyango mayelana nokuxazulula inkinga yabafundi abangenabo omazisi." UNksz Lerato Ngobeni we-ActionSA ubabaze ibhadi wathi lolu daba kumele lusukunyelwe ngokushesha. "Idingeka ilungiswe eyalaba bafundi abangenabo omazisi. Akukwazi ukuthula kube sengathi akwenzekanga lutho. UMnyango kumele usebenzisane noMnyango wezaseKhaya ukuze laba bafundi bathole omazisi." Umbiko uveze ukuthi iGauteng yisona sifundazwe esinabafundi abaningi abangenabo omazisi. Bangu-228 000 kulesiya sifundazwe. Abangu-102 100 abakuleli kanti abakwamanye amazwe bangu-125 900. KwaZulu-Natal bangu-109 000 abafundi abangenabo omazisi. Abangu-86 4780 abakuleli kanti abangu-23 300 abokufika. UMqondisi Jikelele eMnyangweni, uMnuz Mathanzima Mweli, uthe kunethimba elizosebenza noMnyango wezaseKhaya odabeni oluthinta abafundi abangenamazisi. "Ngiyajabula ukuthi kuzobizwa umhlangano ohlanganisa le minyango yomibili ukuze kubhungwe ngezinhlelo zokubhekana nenkinga yalaba bafundi," usho kanje. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kunamamashi asabalele ezweni lonke okuchitha abantu bakwamanye amazwe abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNksz Maimela uthe njengoba kunamamashi abantu bakuleli abakhalaza ngabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho, lezi zibalo zizobasiza ekutheni bakwazi ukuphendula ukuthi bangaki abafundi abasezikoleni. AboMnyango weMfundo bakuveza ukuthi abakwazi ukuxosha noma ukungabafundisi abafundi abakuleli ngokungemthetho ngoba umthetho kawuvumi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uyavela owesilisa okhulelise ingane 11 Owesilisa okusolwa ukuthi ukhulelise intombazane eneminyaka engu-11 ubudala kulindeleke ukuthi avele eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis ngoMsombuluko. Umsolwa, 32, uboshwe ngoLwesihlanu, ngomhlaka-15 Meyi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa eWestern Cape, uCaptain Frederick van Wyk, uthe kunencwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa komsolwa. "Leli hhovisi lingakuqinisekisa ukuthi owesilisa, 32, uboshwe ngoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi, ngencwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa. Uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis ngoMsombuluko, 18 Meyi," kusho uvan Wyk. Lokhu kuza ngemuva kokuthi izakhamuzi zase-Atlantis zizwakalise ukucasuka ngemuva kokuvela kokuthi intombazane eneminyaka engu-11 ubudala yabeletha esikhathini esingangesonto esidlule, okusolwa ukuthi kungenxa yokuhlukunyezwa ngokocansi okubandakanya umuntu owaziwayo emndenini. Umama wengane uboshiwe wavela eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis. INational Prosecuting Authority (NPA) ikuqinisekisile ukuvela kwakhe enkantolo. Okhulumela iNPA, u-Eric Ntabazalila, ukuqinisekisile ukubonakala kwakhe. "Yebo, singakuqinisekisa ukuthi umama wengane eneminyaka engu-11 ubudala uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis ngecala lokwehluleka ukubika ikhomishini yecala locansi," kusho uNtabazalila. Icala elibhekene nonina lihlehliselwe uLwesibili, Meyi 19.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park Usomabhizinisi uTariq Downes, oyiNhloko yezoBunhloli ophikweni lwamaPhoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) uMajor-General Feroz Khan, kanye neNhloko yesiFundazwe saseGauteng yeDirectorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI), uMajor-General Ebrahim Ahmed Kadwa, bavele okokuqala phambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park  ngoMsombuluko bebhekene namacala amabili okuphula umthetho owengamele ukuphathwa komcebo wezimbiwa kanye nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Banikezwe ibheyili ka-R20 000 umuntu ngamunye ngaphansi kwemibandela yokuthi bangaphazamisi uphenyo noma baxhumane nofakazi. Kudingeka futhi ukuthi banikeze anaseshi izincwadi zabo zezokuvakash kungakashayi umhlaka-12 Meyi. Laba bobathathu kumele bazise umseshi kungakapheli amahora angama-72 uma behlose ukuhamba. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-14 Julayi ukuze kuzoqhutshekwa nophenyo. UMbuso awuzange uphikisane nokunikezwa kwebheyili. UKhan uboshwe ngeSonto kulandela ukugasela kwamaphoyisa efulethini lakhe eHoughton. La macala asukela esehlakalweni sangomhla zi-5 kuNhlaba wezi-2021, lapho uDownes kusolwa ukuthi watholakala negolide elingu-75.9 grams, lenani elilinganiselwa ku-R62 836, esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo International. Ngesikhathi ephonswa imibuzo, kuthiwa wathi uliphethe ngenxa yomsebenzi awenzayo womshoshaphansi oxhumene nezikhulu eziphezulu zakwa-SAPS. Uphenyo lwaveza ukuthi akukho msebenzi womshoshaphansi ogunyaziwe ohilela izimbiwa eziyigugu owawukhona ngaleso sikhathi. Umbuso uphinde uthi uKhan noKadwa bayalele amaphoyisa ukuthi adedele iDownes yize zingekho izincwadi ezisekela lo msebenzi. Ekhuluma ngaphandle kwenkantolo, u-Athlenda Mathe, okhulumela i-SAPS uthe kuyadumaza ukuba nezikhulu eziphezulu enkantolo. Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMntwana uMuziwoxolo Zulu ISEMANZINI iNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukushona koMntwana uMuziwoxolo Graduate Zulu obesebenza nophiko obelugada iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubeyiphoyisa futhi wayesophikweni olwalugada iSilo uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushone ngempelasonto. "Ifu elimnyama seliphinde lehla futhi eNdlunkulu kaZulu. UMntwana udlule ngokukhulu ukuzuma ngoMeyi 1. Udlula nje eneminyaka engu-49. Egameni leSilo Samabandla, iNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke sidlulisa ukulila bakwethu. Siyakhala, sikhalela iNgonyama ngoba lo ohambile ungomunye wabanawayo. Sikhalela isizwe, sikhalela abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubezinikele kakhulu emsebenzini wakhe. "Usebenze kakhulu nophiko obelugada iSilo uZwelithini kaBhekuzulu kanti nakuyo iNgonyama esesihlalweni usebenzile." UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushona nje iNdlukulu kaZulu ibisazikhotha amanxeba kulandela ukushona kwabaNtwana ngokulandelana. Ngenyanga eyedlule kushone abaNtwana ababili. Kuqale kwaguqa uMntwana owayekhongela iMbube ekhweni layo kwaMyeni, uGibizizwe Zulu, kwase kulandela uMntwana uGcinabani Thembisile "Sister Eunice" Zulu. UMntwana uThulani uthe kuyakhathaza ukudlula ngokulandelana kwabaNtwana baseNdlunkulu. "Sinobumbuzo ongephendulwe muntu ke nokho ezinhliziyweni zethu ukuthi awu kwenzekeni eNdlunkulu? Kwanomkhonto olokhu ugwaza uphindelela. Sicela imithandazo nina beSilo. Akukho esingakwenza, sibhekisa kuye umdali. Nilale ngenxa nina beNdlovu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo uzongcwatshwa ngoMgqibelo, KwaNongoma. "UMntwana uzobekwa lapha eMakhosini, eMahhasini, emva kwenkonzo ezokuba lapha ezinkundleni zezemidlalo esigodlweni KwaKhethomthandayo ngehora lesishiyagalolunye ekuseni."

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kwengezwe amanye amacala kuFannie Nkosi Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers USergeant Fannie Nkosi kulindeleke ukuthi avele ngaphambi kwenkantolo yeMantshi yaseThohoyandou ngoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Kusolwa ukuthi ngomhlaka-10 Novemba kunomsolwa owaboshwa ngokutholakala nensangu, izibhamu ezingekho emthethweni kanye neziqhumane. Uphenyo lukhomba ukuthi u-Sgt Nkosi wafika walanda idokodo lecala lokuqala enza sengathi uthunywe indlunkulu yamaphoyisa. Emuva kwezinyanga ezimbalwa kuthiwa waphindela eThohoyandou, wazichaza njengoColonel osuka ehhovisi elikhulu wakhipha insangu eyayishaqwe lapho okugcinwa khona ubufakazi emaphoyiseni. Yize ubufakazi wabubhuka kwelomkhulu, ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kwatholakala ukuthi kunesikhwama esishodayo sensangu. Kwavulwa icala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, okhononde ngokungesekwa kweqembu lakhe UKUBAMBELELA komqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, kwinkolelo yokuthi kukhona abahamba leli qembu laseChloorkop ngemuva ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuthi kalengezi ngenkanyezi yesibili ejezini layo ngeCaf Champions League, kubukeka kungase kumdalele amazinyo abushelelezi kwezinye izingxenye zabalandeli beDowns. Lona ngumuzwa oqapheleke kulandela inkulumo kaCardoso nabezindaba kulandela ukunqoba kweSundowns ngo 7-4 kwiSiwelele FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo, eLucas Moripe Stadium, ePitoli. Esikhundleni sokujabulela ukuthi iqembu lakhe lizigcine lisesicongweni kwi-log ngaphambi komdlalo wokugcina wesizini ne-TS Galaxy, uCardoso ugxile ekusoleni abathile ngokuputshuzela i-AS FAR yaseMorocco i-video yomdlalo weSundowns weligi neKaizer Chiefs. ISundowns izothi ingaqeda imidlalo yeligi (kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit), iqale amalungiselelo omlenze wokuqala womdlalo wamanqamu weChampions League ne-AS FAR ngeSonto ngo-4 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. “Kunzima ukuba yiSundowns ngoba kuhlale kunenzondo ekulandelayo ekubeni konke okwenziwa yileli qembu kuqhakambisa iNingizimu Afrika,” kusho uCardoso. “Siyayijabulela iwini kodwa amagoli esiwavumele ukuthi angene ngakithi ayibohlisile injabulo (yewini). “Kusekhona umdlalo (ngoLwesibili) njengoba ngempelasonto sidlala omunye wemqoka kunayo yonke kithina. “Kukhona konke lokhu kasizwa sengathi sikuthola konke ukwesekwa okusifanele. Izitha zethu kwiChampions League (i-AS FAR) zine-video egcwele ngezindlela zethu zokudlala eyathunyelwa kuzona ngumuntu othile ngesikhathi sibhekene neKaizer (Chiefs). “Kulungile kodwa sizoqhubeka kunzima kunjalo,” kusho uCardoso. Akaqali uCardoso ukukhala ngokuputshuzelwa kwezitha ulwazi olubucayi kwazise ngoFebhuwari nonyaka, kwaze kwamiswa emsebenzini ilunga lebhentshi leSundowns (uMario Masha) ngoba lisolwa ngokudlulisela ulwazi oluqukethe izinhlelo zikaCardoso kuRulani Mokwena owayesaqeqesha i-MC Alger yase-Algeria eyayizodlala neSundowns. Kuqaphelekile ukuthi emuva kwale nkulumo kaCardoso abalandeli baqhubekile nokuyimunyunga ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kucaca ukuthi bayavumelana ngokuthi lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal wenzisa okomuntu osevele unalo ihawu uma izinto zingahambi kahle kwiligi nakwiChampions League. Bebeshiyelana inkundla abalandeli bebhola ngesikhathi bekhuluma ngoCardoso emakhasini abo ka-X. “Kunzima ukuqonda noma uCardoso ukhuluma iqiniso noma uzama ukudida i-AS FAR ingqondo kodwa kuyaqapheleka ukuthi iqembu lakhe liyoniwa njalo ngaphambi kwemidlalo emqoka,” ku-@Musendzi ku-X.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu UKUTHULA emoyeni nokuphila impilo engenamsindo kubukeka kusazoqhubeka kube ngabakhwekazi empilweni yowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM uNgizwe ‘Sinqe Semfene’ Mchunu, obhekene notalatiya lwezinkinga okubonakala zingamnike thuba lokuphefumula. Lokhu kungenxa yokwanda kwezinkinga ezibhekene noMchunu njengoba kumanje nje kusabatshazwa isihluku esenzeke kushiswa umuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu, ogwini oluseNingizmu yeTheku ngeSonto - wasala uwumlotha, kusha yonke into. Evikini elilodwa kwenzeka konke lokho, inhlangano engenzi nzuzo i-Ahmed Kathrada Foundation nayo isizwakalise ilaka layo, yagxeka uNgizwe ngenkulumo ayenze kwesinye seziqephu zohlelo lwakhe olusesitshini sikaMacG kwiYouTube oluthi Bhinca Nation. Le nhlangano ikhale ngokuthi enye yezinkulumo zikaNgizwe nasuke ebameme ohlelweni lwakhe iwukucwasa ngokwebala futhi yagxeka kakhulu ukuvama kwabo ukusebenzisa igama eliwukucwasa amaNdiya ngokwebala elithi “amakula”. I-Ahmed Kathrada ixwayise nangokuthi iyabona umthelela omubi odalwa yizinkulumo zikaMchunu ezinokucwasa ngokwebala, ekhale ngokuthi kuphehla nokubhebhethekisa izenzo zodlame emphakathini, kangangokuthi uma kunganqandwa kungagcina kudala ukuthi lesi simo singalawuleki. OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu Kuleso siqephu uNgizwe waphawula wathi: “Uyabona nje amaChina anomqondo ofanayo nowamak**la. AmaNdiya asehlale kuleli zwe iminyaka engaphezu kuka-150, ehlukumeza abantu bakithi ezimbonini nasezinkampanini ezahlukene ahola kuzona.” Owayeyisihambeli sakhe ngalelo langa, uNota Baloyi, yena waphendula wathi: “Uqinisile, futhi amaNdiya ayenalo ithuba lokuthi aphindele ezweni lawo, kwakumele akwenze lokho kusukela ngabo-1924 kuya ku-1931.” Khona lapho futhi, kuleli sonto iNkantolo ePhakeme yasePitoli ivale uNgizwe ukuthi aqhubeke akhulume izinkulumo ezihlambalazayo ngomholi we-Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), uMnuz Julius Malema - obemvulele icala lokuhlambalaza nelokumcekela phansi isithunzi. Lokhu kusukela ekutheni uMchunu ubesolwa ngokuthi wathi ekhuluma kwesinye sezithangami zabezindaba, waveza izinsolo zokuthi uMalema wathola imalii ewu-R60 million kubantu bokufika baseNigeria abashushumbisa izidakamizwa kuleli zwe. Wadalula nokuthi uMalema angenza noma yini ukusiza ukuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho ngoba kukhona abamfumbathisa khona. Isinqumo ngaleli cala kube wukuthi uNgizwe angaphinde akhulume noma abhale, aze ashicilele noma yini engaba yinkulumo ewukuhlambalaza ngoMalema. Ube eseyalelwa nokuthi akhokhe zonke izindleko zabameli bakaMalema kuleli cala, futhi wabekelwa nomnqamlajuqu wokuvela eNkantolo ngoLwesibili oluzayo ukuzoveza ukuthi kungani kumele kuqhutshekwe ngalezi zinqumo ezikhishwe kuleli cala. Kuphinde kwazamazama izinkundla zokuxhumana ngoLwesithathu ntambama ngenkathi intandokazi yomculi kamaskandi uKhuzani ‘Indlamlenze’ Mpungose, ebhala ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook ukuthi ufuna ukuthi kungaphinde kukhulunywe lutho ngegama lakhe kulolu hlelo lukaNgizwe iBhinca Nation. Indlamlenze ithe isikhathele wukuthi kulokhu kuhlanjalazwa igama lalo kulolu hlelo, yase yesabisa ngokuthi uma ekucelayo kungenzeki, izoluvala thaqa lolu hlelo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo ku-Albert Mazibuko enkonzweni yomngcwabo wakhe eMtshezi High, ngoMgqibelo ekuseni UZOGCINWA ngencwadi nangeqophamlando, umlando wengwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, eshone emasontweni amabili adlule, emuva kokugula isikhashana. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela eThekwini, lapho ehlinzwe khona. Udlule emhlabeni esethathe umhlalaphansi ekunandiseni neqembu, ubeseba khona kuphela uma lizilolonga. NgoMgqibelo ekuseni, ufihlelwe emathuneni asekhaya eMtshezi, kwase kuqhubeka inkonzo enkundleni yemidlalo eMtshezi High. Lokhu kuye ngokwesifiso sakhe nokuthi endaweni kungcwatshwa engakashayi u-11 ekuseni, ngokusho kwemenenja yeMambazo, uXolani Majozi. UMajozi uthe uMazibuko bazomkhumbula ngokukhipha incwadi ekhuluma ngomlando wakhe. “Kuningi esikuqophile esaphila, kuzokwazi ukuthi kube nomthelela omuhle ekuhlanganiseni iqophamlando esizolenza,” kusho uMajozi. Ubonge nohulumeni wesifundazwe nokazwelonke ngokufaka isandla ezindlekweni zomngcwabo. “Uma umngcwabo kungowomndeni nomakhelwane, kuye kungabi nzima ukuwuthwala kodwa uma sekuzofika abantu abaningi, ngoba abantu abebesemngcwabeni bebalelwa ku-2 000, kuye kube nengcindezi emndenini ngezindleko. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal oholwa ubaba u(Thami) Ntuli ukwazile ukuthi usondele ubheke ukuthi umndeni yikuphi la odinga ngakhona, wase uyalekelela. NoMnyango kazwelonke wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko usondelile wanikela ukuze umcimbi ube sezingeni. Senelisekile ngokwesekwa kuhulumeni nasemphakathini,” kusho uMajozi. Enkonzweni bekukhona uNtuli, iPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezemiSebenzi yoMphakathi neNgqalasizinda uMnuz Sihle Zikalala, uMqondisi Jikelele woMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNkk Stella Khumalo, iMeya kaMasipala Inkosi Langalibalele, uMnuz Mduduzi Myeza, owayenguNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, uMnuz Zizi Kodwa nabanye. Umndeni ududuzwe ngomculo yiMambazo eyacela ukuthi uMazibuko angafihlwa ingakabuyi e-United States of America (USA), lapho eyayinomjikelezo khona, iqembu laseSwatini iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors, Abanqobi, Thee Legacy nabanye. Izikhulumi bezibabaza inhlonipho nokuzithoba kukaMazibuko oshiye emhlabeni umkakhe uBongiwe Mazibuko, izingane nabazukulu.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UCELESTE Ntuli ukhale wemuka nendondo kwi-13th Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eLyric Theatre, eGold Reef City eGoli ngoMgqibelo USOMAHLAYA waseMpangeni, uCeleste Ntuli, ukhale wemuka nendondo kuma-2026 Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eLyric Theatre, eGold Reef City, eGoli, ngoMgqibelo. UCeleste, owazakhela udumo enguSiphokazi kwiSibaya, uhlule uDillan Oliphant, Kagiso KG Mokgadi, Mpho Popps noSkhumba Hlophe. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa akalibonanga elidlalayo kwi-Comedian of the Year. Kulo munxa uqunjwe phansi enoKagiso KG Mokgadi, Mpho Popps nomkhaya wakhe uSifiso Nene babhonywe wuDillan Oliphant. Nomcimbi kaCeleste iCeleste Ntuli and The Big Dudes ukhale ngaphansi okweNtshebe yaKwaMashu emkhakheni weBest Comedy Festival or Show Award. Umklomelo uhambe neGround Culture Comedy ehlule ne-Armchair Comedy, Bioscope Sundays Comedy Festival neJive Funny Championship. ULinda Sibanda ukhale wemuka nesicoco kwiBreakthrough Act of the Year, uSiya Seya uthathe umklomelo weJoe Mafela Award, uConrad Koch noChester Missing bahlabane kwi-Innovative Comedy Performance Award, uKagiso Lediga uwine indondo yeBeyond the Mic Award ngokuba yizwi likaRafiki omncane kwiThe Lion King, uYaaseen Barnes udlule ngehubo kwiBest Friend of Comedy Award, uDavid Kau uthole indondo yeThe Legacy, uVafa Naraghi umuke nesicoco seComedic Content Award, uDillan Oliphant uphinde wahamba nendondo yeBest Solo Award ngeMansekind. Uhlelo lwalo mcimbi, oteketiswa nge-It's a Family, beluphethwe ngumndeni wakwaGoliath, okungoJason Goliath, Donovan Goliath, Nicholus Goliath noKate Goliath. Kosomahlaya ebebehlekisa kubalwa uTumi Morake, Lindy Johnson, Khanyisile Ngwenya, Mbali Gudazi, Summary noConrad Koch ozobe ehambisana noChester Missing. Oyisikhulu sabaxhasi balo mqhudelwano wezindondo uKayla Hendricks, uthe akuwona nje umcimbi lo kodwa umkhankaso wokwakha le ndima yamahlaya. Uthe lo mcimbi oyinkundla yokufukula osomahlaya ukuze bagcine sebesezingeni elicokeme. UKayla uthe bayaziqhenya ngokubungaza osomahlaya ngendlela ebafanele.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNONKULULEKO Mlaba oyingxenye yamaProteas esifazane eya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 e-England naseWales, ngenyanga ezayo UKUKHULA okukhonjiswe ngamaProteas esifazane emidlalweni yakamuva ewuchungechunge ne-India kwenza umqeqeshi, uMandla Mashimbyi, aye kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 ngethemba lokuthi lo nyaka kungaba yiwona leli qembu lesizwe eliqeda ngawo ibhadi lokuphunyukwa yisicoco salo mqhudelwano. UMashimbyi ukusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba kulandela ukumenyezelwa kwesikwati samaProteas esifazane esiya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 eqala ngoJuni 12 kuze kube nguJulayi 5, e-England naseWales. Leli qembu lesizwe okusale kancane ukuthi lidle umhlanganiso emiqhudelwaneni yakamuva ye-ICC (International Cricket Council) kwiT20, liboshelwe ku-Pool 1. Lizoqala eyoMhlaba ngokubhekana ne-Australia ngoJuni 13 eManchester, kulandele iPakistan, India, Netherlands neBangladesh. Kababaningi abadlali okuthusile ukufakwa kwabo kuleli qembu ngaphandle kukaShabmin Ismail owagcina ukubonakala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 yango-2023. Ukaputeni, uLaura Wolvaardt osefomini enhle kulezi zinsuku, uzoqhubeka nokuhola leli qembu kanti nabadlali okubalwa kubona noNonkululeko Mlaba, Ayabonga Khakha noTumi Sekhukhune babiziwe. “Wonke amaqembu esizwe uma eya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba asuke enethemba lokubuyela ekhaya nesicoco ngakho-ke nakithina kawukho umehluko,” kusho uMashimbyi ethimbeni labezindaba leCricket South Africa (CSA). “Umphumela esiwothole kwi-India (ompetha bomhlaba) muva nje, kufanele usenze sikukholwe ukuthi singabuya naso isicoco e-England naseWales." Sesisonke isikwati samaProteas seNdebe yoMhlaba simi kanje; Laura Wolvaardt (ukaputeni, Fidelity Titans), Tazmin Brits (DP World Lions), Nadine de Klerk (World Sports Betting Western Province), Annerie Dercksen (Garden Route Badgers), Shabnim Ismail (DP World Lions), Sinalo Jafta (DP World Lions), Marizanne Kapp (World Sports Betting Western Province), Ayabonga Khaka (DP World Lions), Sune Luus (Fidelity Titans), Karabo Meso (DP World Lions), Nonkululeko Mlaba (Hollywoodbets Dolphins), Kayla Reyneke (World Sports Betting Western Province), Tumi Sekhukhune (DP World Lions), Chloé Tryon (DP World Lions) noDane van Niekerk (World Sports Betting Western Province).

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa usethobela umthetho ngodaba lwePhala Phala UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa, usedalule ukuthi uyasemukela futhi uyasihlonipha isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo enqume ukuthi iPhalamende alilusingathanga ngendlela efanele udaba lwePhala Phala. Ekhulunyelwa wumkhulumeli wakhe uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, uRamaphosa uthe umile ekutheni akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho, nokuthi lezi zinsolo ezibhekiswe kuyena kumele zilandelelwe ngokomthetho, ngokungachemi futhi kungancikwa ohlangothini oluthile. “UMengameli usesibonile isinqumo esithathwe yiNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo kuleli cala ebelidluliselwe phambilini ngabe-Economic Freedom Fighters, besebenzisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89. Ngakho uMengameli uyasihlonipha isinqumo futhi uyazibophezela ukuthi uzolandela konke okushiwo wumthetho wezwe,” kusho uMagwenya. Eqhuba, uthe uRamaphosa uzibophezele ungokukhipha usizo olungase ludingeke kuyena ukuze lolu daba lusingatheke ngendlela efanele futhi ezogculisa abathintekayo kulona. “URamaphosa umile ekutheni akekho umuntu onamandla ngaphezu komthetho, nokuthi zonke izinsolo ezibhekiswe kuye kumele ukuthi zilandelelwe ngokungachemi,” usho kanje. Izolo iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo inqume ukuthi iPhalamende laphula umthetho ngenkathi livota ngo-2022, liphikisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89 - okwakubikwe ngawo izinsolo zokwephula umthetho ezibhekiswe kuRamaphosa - okwavela wukuthi kwatholakala izishaqane zemali  epulazini lakhe ePhala Phala, eLimpopo, ngo-2020. INkantolo ithole ukuthi leso sinqumo sePhalamende sasingafanele, futhi asihambisani nhlobo nomthetho, yase inquma ukuthi lowo mbiko wangaleso sikhathi uhoxiswe, bese kuvulwa ithuba lokuthi udaba lulandelelwe futhi luphenywe kabusha. Leli cala belidliuliselwe eNkantolo yi-EFF ne-African Transformation Movement, bekhala ngokuthi iKomiti lePhalamende lasheshe lanquma ngalolu daba kungakabi yisikhathi esifanele. Ngakho lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo sisho ukuthi manje kuzodingeka ukuthi iKomiti lePhalamende liphinde licubungule kabusha bese linquma ukuthi isisombululo kuzofinyelelwa kanjani kusona. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe bayasamukela isinqumo athi bathemba ukuthi sizosiza ukuthi kwenzeke ubulungiswa kuvele obala ugcobho ngodaba lukaMengameli. “Kufanele abantu bazi ukuthi kwenzekani ePhala Phala ukuze bazinqumele sebenolwazi oluphelele ukuthi ngokhetho oluzayo bavotela isigebengu noma cha,” kusho uMalema. USihlalo we-ActionSA kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dewan de Swardt, naye ufanise lesi sinqumo nophawu lokunqoba kubantu baseNingizimu Afrika. “Lokhu kuqondane kahle kakhulu njengoba kuzothi uma lolu daba seluphinda ludingidwa ePhalamende kube sekuwukuthi akuseyona i-ANC eqhoqhobele amandla yodwa, obekungenza kube lula ukuthi ivikele umholi wayo,” kusho u-de Swardt.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISI uKagiso Modupe osephumele obala ngokuphela isigubhukane komdlalo iPimville ngenxa yokungaholelwa kwabalingisi UKHOMBA ozakwabo asebenza nabo kuqopshwa umdlalo iPimville, umlingisi uKagiso Medupe, othi wakhishwa kwasetshenziswa inkampani yakhe kuphela ukuqopha lo mdlalo. Isolezwe libike ngezinkinga ezikhungethe lo mdlalo kusuka ekupheleni kukaMashi nalapho abalingisi bengaholanga. Kuthe ngenyanga edlule babeka phansi amathuluzi ngemuva kokungayitholi imali yabo, nokudale ukuthi kuphele iziqephu ebeziqoshiwe, kwama ukukhonjiswa komdlalo kwiSABC2, ngesonto eledlule. UKagiso uthe akafuni kusolwe yena ngalesi sigameko njengoba engekho ethimbeni lophrojusa abakhulu kodwa yena ungumqondisi nje kuphela womdlalo. "Mina njengomphathi wenkampani iBakwena Productions Media House savumelana noBrenda Mukwevho okuwona lo mkhakha wokulingisa ukuthi sizosebenzisana ukwenza lolu hlobo lomdlalo, njengoba kunguyena umsunguli wawo. Kodwa ngesikhathi sekusayinwe izinkontileka sesiqala ukusebenza kwaba khona izinto ezingahambi ngendlela okwathi uma ngiziveza kwathiwa angingangeni ngigamanxe, angibhekane nomsebenzi wami njengoba ngingeyena uphrojusa kodwa ngingumphathi wabaqondisi," kusho uKagiso. Uthe yena ubengangeni kwezemali kulo mdlalo, okuthinta amaholo, ukuqasha noma ukuxosha abasebenzi nabalingisi. "Kusuka uqala umdlalo, kuze kube manje angikaze ngithinte into ehlangene nemali, nokuthi isebenza kanjani kulo mdlalo. Mina okwami kwakuwukuthi ngikhiqize umdlalo osezingeni eliphezulu abantu abazowujabulela, emalini bengingazi lutho, kungakho ngikhethe ukuthi ngiphendule ngalezi zinsolo, esezibhekiswe kimina," kuchaza yena. Ngokusho kwakhe kuyamkhathaza ukuthi abalingisi, abasebenzi nawo wonke umuntu osebenza kulo mdlalo akaholile. Uthe uke wakhuluma nozakwabo abangaphezu kwakhe, abamtshele ukuthi akabheke umsebenzi wakhe. "Kulapho ngithathe isinqumo sokuthi ngixhumane neSABC nezinye izikhulu ezifanele ngoba ngase ngibona ukuthi isimo siya ngokuba sibi kakhulu. Ukungaholelwa kwabasebenzi abazinikele emsebenzini wabo ngakusukumela ngaze ngaxoxa nomunye wophrojusa ukuthi asitholele usizo ukuze kuqhubeke umsebenzi kodwa kwaba nhlanga zimuka nomoya," kuchaza yena. Uthe yize ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abantu besola yena, kodwa akungasolwa yena ngokudliwa kwemali njengoba naye engaholile njengawo wonke umsebenzi. Uthe okumenze waphumela obala ngalesi simo wukuthi kusolwa yena ekubeni engenalo icala ngokuqhubekayo. Akufunayo yena uthe wukuthi kukhokhelwe wonke umuntu ngomsebenzi awenzile futhi uzobeseka baze bathole imali yabo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UTony Liu oyisikhulu esiphezulu sakwaChery South Africa Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu ISIKHULU sakwaChery South Africa, uTony Liu, sithi banezinhlelo ezinkulu zokufukula imboni yezezimoto eNingizimu Afrika njengoba ngoJuni bezothatha ngokusemthethweni ifemu obekungeyakwaNissan, eseRosslyn, ePitoli. Le nkampani ithenge ifemu kulandela isimemezelo seNissan emhlabeni jikelele sokuthi izama ukunciphisa izindleko ngokuchitha ezinye zezinto zayo okuhlanganisa nezindawo zokukhiqiza. ULiu, obesingathe isidlo sasebusuku nabezindaba eWuhu, eChina, kuleli sonto lapho bekuneChery International Business Summit, uthe bazoba yinkampani ezobamba elikhulu iqhaza eNingizimu Afrika ngenxa yefemu yabo entsha. “Ekupheleni kukaJuni sizomemezela ukuthi yimalini esizoyitshala siphinde siveze nezinhlelo zethu. Asidayisi izimoto ezimbalwa kuphela kodwa ikusasa lethu libeka phambili abantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Sizofaka esikhulu isandla ekufukuleni umphakathi. Nami ngizoba yisakhamuzi saseNingizimu Afrika njengani,” kusho uLiu. Uqhube wathi kuningi iNingizimu Afrika neChina abangakwenza ngokubambisana. “Kuningi futhi esingakwenza kule mboni yezezimoto, hhayi kuphela kwaChery kodwa ngisho imboni yonke. Ngikhuluma ngezimoto ezingama-new energy vehicle nokuhlinzekwa kwamaphathi yizinkampani zendawo.” Uthe bake bahlangana noMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa nePhini lakhe uPaul Mashatile bakhombisa okukhulu ukujabula ngokutshala kwabo imali. Kulo mbuthano bebesingathe abamele uhulumeni bevela eMnyangweni wezoHwebo, iziMboni nokuNcintisana, inhlangano yezinkampani ezikhiqiza izimoto i-Naamsa, Automobile Association, WesBank nabanye. Uthe bazokwakha ama-SUV futhi bazoshiya nomunye ulayini wokuthi bakhiqize iveni. E-Australia kusanda kwethulwa iveni iChery KP31 elindeleke ukuthi iqale ukudayisa kuleli ngasekupheleni konyaka noma ekuqaleni kozayo. Yize engafunanga ukudalula okuningi ngesikhathi ebuzwa yileli pephandaba kodwa iJetour ikuqinisekisile esitatimendeni ukuthi nayo izokhiqiza kule femu. Isikhulu sakwa-Jetour International, nayo engaphansi kweChery, u-Ke Chuandeng, simemezele ukuthi bazokhiqiza iT1 neT2 kusuka ngo-2027. ULiu uthe abafuni ukuzikhukhumeza ngabakwenzayo kunalokho ‘sizohlala sizithobile sifunde nasezinkampanini ezifana neToyota’. IToyota isineminyaka ikhiqiza ezinye zezimoto zayo njengeHilux eProspecton, eThekwini.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBONGEZIWE Mabandla echaza ngengoma yakhe ethi Walila nendlalela i-albhamu yakhe nohambo lwamadolobha ahlukene UMZWILILI owaziwa ngokugqamisa umculo wesintu, uBongeziwe Mabandla, useveze ukuthi uhlela ukuhambela amadolobha ahlukene ukuhlangana nabalandeli bakhe njengoba ekhuza ibuya emculweni. Uthe lokhu kuhambisana nokuthi kusasa uzokhipha ingoma ethi Walila, nengenye yezikhona kwi-albhamu yakhe entsha ezophuma ngenyanga ezayo. Nge-albhamu yakhe ithi Ndingubani, uBongeziwe uthe uhlela ukuyethula kubalandeli bakhe kule nyanga nangezayo ezindaweni ezahlukene. Ekhuluma ngokubuya kwakhe emculweni, uveze ukuthi le ngoma iza nezinguquko eziningi emculweni wakhe njengoba unesigqi esisha. "Umculo wami abantu bayawazi futhi nakulokhu akukho okutheni okushintshile, kungaba nje ezingomeni ezimbalwa kodwa ngibuye ngesigqi abasaziyo futhi abasithandayo. Ingoma lena engiyibhale nginomqondo wokuthi kukhona udaba engiluxoxayo ngayo, ibheka indlela yokuziphindiselela nezinye izinto ehambisana nazo okwenzeka kithi singabantu. Ibheka indlela ubulungiswa obenzeka ngayo noma obugcina bufikile ngayo uma kukade wabulinda," kusho uBongeziwe. Uthe uke azithole ehleka yedwa uma ecabanga ukuthi le ngoma yamfikela kanjani. "Ngangidlala isigingci sami ngafikelwa imibono eminingi ngaleso sikhathi, omunye yawo wawungakho ukuziphindiselela. Ngafikelwa umuzwa wokuthi ngesinye isikhathi sike senze izinto singazi ukuthi ekugcineni lezo zinto - ngesinye isikhathi - ziyabuya kithi sesikhohliwe. Bengifuna ukuthola indlela elula yokuveza lo mbono ebenginawo kungakho ngiqhamuke nesihloko sale ngoma esithi umuntu uyakhala kodwa ukhala izinyembezi ezincane," kusho uBongeziwe. Uthe okunye akade ekucabanga ebhala le ngoma ukuthi iningi labantu like labhekana nesimo la lihlangabezana nokungabutholi ubulungiswa ngakho le ngoma ibheka lowo muzwa.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: AMABHOKOBHOKO abaneminyaka engaphansi kwengu-20 kulandela ukudla kwabo isicoco se-U/20 Rugby Championship ngempelasonto eGqeberha Image: SAJUNIORRUGBY/X UKUDLA isicoco se-U/20 Rugby Championship kwamaBaby Boks ngempelasonto, kufanele ukuba kuphelezelwe ngumyalezo okhumbuza leli qembu lesizwe ngobuningi bamabhawodi okusafanele liwaqinise ngaphambi kokuqala imicabango yokuvikela isicoco seNdebe yoMhlaba. Lokhu kuphume emlonyeni womqeqeshi waleli qembu, uKevin Foote, kulandela ukubambana kwalo ngo 29-29 nezimbangi iNew Zealand, emdlalweni obuqinisekisa isicoco seRugby Championship emdlalweni obuseGqeberha, ngempelasonto edlule. INingizimu Afrika ifike kulo mdlalo ivele idinga iphuzu ukuze yethweswe umqhele we-U/20 Rugby Championship okokuqala ngqa emlandweni. Isifundo uFoote athe uphume naso kulo mqhudelwano ukuthi iqembu lakhe kalikho esimweni abecabanga ukuthi likusona kwazise kukhona lapho okusafanele alungise khona. “Bekufanele siwunqobe kalula umdlalo weNew Zealand kodwa senza amaphutha amaningi nokuyiwona angikhumbuze ngobuningi bezinto okusafanele sizibophisise ngaphambi kokuqala ukuvikela isicoco seyoMhlaba,” kusho uFoote. “Bekuvele kusezinhlelweni zethu ukuwina iChampionship kulo nyaka kodwa esikubheke kakhulu ngukuvikela isicoco sethu soMhlaba nengingangabazi ukuthi kuzoba nzima. “Kusicacele ngendlela esinqobe ngayo iChampionship ukuthi kunamabhawodi amaningi okufanele siwaqinise ngaphambi kokuqala kweNdebe yoMhlaba." INingizimu Afrika iqale umqhudelwano ivele ithwelwe ngeqoma kodwa umdlalo wokugcina ulikhumbuzile leli qembu lesizwe ukuthi kalikafiki kuleli qophela elizitshela ukuthi selikulona. INew Zealand ebambe iqembu lakuleli ngo 29-29 ngoMgqibelo, iqale lo mqhudelwano inganikwe lutho nokufakazelwe ngeminye yemiphumela yayo njengokukhala ngaphansi kwi-Argentina. AmaBhokobhoko amancane wona aqale umqhudelwano evele ethishwe ukuba awudle kwazise abesefomini enhle ukuwedlula wonke amazwe kanti imidlalo ibisekhaya kuwona. INdebe yoMhlaba ka-U/20 izodlalelwa khona eGqeberha, kusukela ngoJulayi 1.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNksz Zinhle Simphiwe Mchunu KUVUKE umunyu emndenini wowesifazane okuthiwa wabulawa yisoka, lamgqiba ngepotimende ngoNovemba nyakenye, ngesikhathi iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal yedlulisela iziqu zakhe emndenini emcimbini wokwethweswa kweziqu wezitshudeni obungoLwesihlanu, eThekwini. Isidumbu sikaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu (23) waseRoosboom, eMnambithi, owayenza unyaka wokugcina ezifundweni zobuthishela kule nyuvesi, satholwa sigqitshwe ngepotimende ethuneni  eduze kweflethi elalihlala isoka lakhe kwa-C, eMlaza, ngoDisemba 20, 2025. Ngesikhathi kutholwa isidumbu kwase kuphele inyanga edukile, njengoba kuthiwa wagcina ukubonwa ephila ngoNovemba 23, 2025. IKHADI elinomyalezo kanjalo nezimbali iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal ebilibhalele unina kamufi, kwanikwa umndeni ngosuku lweminyezane Udadewabo, uNksz Nolwazi Mchunu, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi siqale phansi sabhibha isilonda sokubulawa ngesihluku kukamufi. “Ngizwe usizi ngesikhathi kubizwa isitshudeni ebesiphambi kwegama lakhe ohlwini lwezitshudeni ebezithweswa iziqu, sasukuma, sayithweswa iziqu zaso. Kwathi uma sekubizwa elakhe, kwangasukuma muntu, kwaze kwazosukuma esinye ezimenyezwe emva kwakhe,” kusho uNksz Mchunu. Uthe yilapho ubuye khona ngamandla umuzwa wokuthi konje udadewabo akasekho emhlabeni futhi wabashiya ngendlela enesihluku. Uthe emva komcimbi, babizelwe eceleni bamukeliswa iziqu zikamufi, kanjalo nezimbali nekhadi ebelinomyalezo inyuvesi ebiwubhalele unina, inyuvesi imduduza isibili. Uthe unina kamufi akakwazanga uphumelela kulo mcimbi njengoba ewumuntu osebenzela kude. Uthe kubafikele emcabangweni yabo ukuthi ngabe ujabule into engachazeki umufi ukube lesi sikhathi sifike esadla anhlamvana. Uthe wayengumuntu ophokophelele phambili futhi enethemba lokuthi nakanjani ikusasa lakhe lizoqhakaza njengoba enza izifundo esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme. “Ngabe ubesezokhuluma eyokuthi ufuna umsebenzi ngoba iziqu zakhe usezitholile,” usho kanje. Uthe ubungakabi khona umnyakazo otheni ngecala njengoba namanje lingakaqali ukuqulwa. Uthe lisalokhu lihlehliswa eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseMlaza, kanti umsolwa, uMnuz Themba Xaba (24), usalokhu etoke ejele ngengoba engadedelwanga ngebheyili. Ngesikhathi kwenzeka isigameko, kuthiwa umufi - owayeseqedile ukubhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka wokugcina enyuvesi - wahamba endaweni ehlala abafundi ePinetown, ewumuntu oyovakashela isoka lakhe eMlaza. Kusolakala ukuthi baba nengxabano, umsolwa wambulala, wase emgqiba ngepotimende. Kuthiwa esembulele, wazenza umuntu ocela ukufuniswa yena, ebhala nasezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi isinqandamathe sakhe sidukile, siphume sahamba ebusuku emva kwengxabano. Umndeni waba nemibuzo ngesikhathi usufika eflethini likamsolwa, ubuza ukuthi uma ezihambele, uhambe kanjani ebusuku washiya iselula nesikhwama semali, esasizomsiza akwazi ukukhokha imali yokugibela yala ayeya khona? Emva kokungagculiseki komndeni ngophenyo lwamaphoyisa olwamthatha umsolwa, wayophonswa ngemibuzo, maqede wadedelwa, kuthiwa akukho okuphathekayo okukhomba ukuthi uyathinteka, umndeni waziqashela umphenyi ozimele, owavundulula ukuthi empeleni umsolwa unesandla. Phakathi kolwazi olwatholwa umphenyi ozimele, olokuthi ngezinsuku okwanyamalala ngazo umufi, umsolwa wake waboleka amathuluzi okumba umgodi kumasitende wakhe, wathi kukhona afuna ukukwenza. Kwathi uma sekuphenywa eduze kweflethi, kwatholakala ithuna elingashoni lapho umsolwa ayegqibe khona umufi ngepotimende, kwabe zimkhalela kanjalo. ABOMNDENI kaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu waseMnambithi obulawe ngonyaka edlule bemukela iziqu zakhe e-UKZN ngoLwesihlanu

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Umengameli Cyril Ramaphosa noNgqongqoshe wezokuVakasha uPatricia De Lille ngokusuku lokuqala le-Africa's Travel Indaba, e-ICC eThekwini UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa wethule inkulumo yosuku embukisweni we-Africa’s Travel Indaba 2026, e-Inkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre, eThekwini, ngoLwesibili ekuseni. URamaphosa ugqamise ukuthi imboni yezokuvakasha ayigxilile ekuthuthukiseni umnotho nje kuphela, wayichaza “njengendlela ephilayo ebonisa lokho esiyikho njengabantu.” Uphawule ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika yamukele izivakashi zamazwe ngamazwe eziyizigidi eziyi-10.5 onyakeni odlule, futhi ingxenye yekota yabantu abafikayo bevela esifundeni se-SADC - okukhombisa ukuthi "ama-Afrika akhetha i-Afrika." Uphinde wagcizelela umsebenzi omele iNingizimu Afrika namazwe angomakhelwane wokugqamisa i-SADC Tourism UNIVISA ukuze kube lula ukuhamba amazwe alesi sifunda ngaphandle kokubhajwa emingceleni. "Sisebenzela ukuthi sivule imingcele yethu ibe sendaweni eyodwa futhi sithuthukise izindlela ezibheke emingceleni ezibonisa ukunotha kwesifunda sethu. Uma abantu base-Afrika behamba phakathi kwe-Afrika, siqinisa umnotho wethu, sijulise ubudlelwano bethu bamasiko futhi sakhe izwekazi elididiyelwe. Ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka, enkulumweni yami yeSimo Sezwe, ngenza ikhwelo embonini yethu yezokuvakasha, kwiziphathimandla kanye nemiphakathi. Ngithe: "Manje kufanele sikhuthaze izinto ezikhangayo ezihlukile zamasiko, ezomlando nezemvelo ezikhombisa ubunjalo bezwe." Ngemuva kokwethula inkulumo yakhe, uRamaphosa uhole inqubo yokusayinwa kwesifungo sezokuvakasha. Lesi sifungo siqinisekisa ukuzibophezela okuhlanganyelwe ekukhuliseni umnotho wezokuvakasha e-Afrika, ukuxoxa izindaba zase-Afrika nokusebenzisana ukwakha i-Afrika engcono nomhlaba ongcono ngokuvakasha, ukubambisana, kanye nokwabelana inzizo yentuthuko.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Armand Hough / Independent Newspapers NJENGOBA selumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho oluzayo lohulumeni basekhaya kuleli, iKhomishini yezoKhetho isigqugquzele abavoti ukuthi bazibheke lapho bebhalise khona. Ikhomishini ithe lokhu kuzosiza ekutheni umvoti uzozazi lapho ezobe ekhona ngosuku lokhetho okunguNovemba 4, 2026. Izitshudeni ezihlala kude namakhaya, ezizobe zisezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ngosuku lokhetho, ziyalelwe ukuthi zibhalise lapho zizobe zikhona ukuze zikwazi ukuvota. UMnuz Sy Mamabolo, isikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini, uthe njengoba selumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho, bahlabela phambili namalungiselelo alolu suku olukhulu. Uthe bazimisele ukubamba ukhetho olungenazihibe futhi lingaphazamiseki. "Kubalulekile ukuthi abantu bazazi ukuthi bazobe bekuphi ngosuku lokhetho. Umuntu uvota lapho ebhalise khona kuphela ngakho kumele bazi ukuthi ngosuku lokhetho bazobe bekuphi." Ikhomishini izovula ithuba ngoJuni 20 no-21, ukuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Kuhlelwe nokuthi elinye ithuba liphinde livulwe ngo-Agasti. Njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ememezele usuku lokhetho, osekusele ngukuthi uNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, afake lolu suku ngokusemthethweni emqulwini kahulumeni, i-Government Gazette. Ngelanga ayofaka lolu suku ngaphansi kwalo mqulu, lokho kuyosho ukuvalwa kosomqulu wokhetho, i-voters roll. Ukuvalwa kwalo mqulu kuyosho ukuthi akekho umuntu ozobe esakwazi ukubhalisela ukuvota. Okunye okuzokwenzeka ngukuthi iKhomishini, izodedela uhlu lwezinsuku lapho kuzolethwa uhlu lwabantu amaqembu azofolosa ngabo, kuphinde kulethwe nemali yokungenela ukhetho. Uma weqiwe ilezi zinsuku, lokho kuyosho ukuthi ngeke lelo qembu likwazi ukungenela ukhetho. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, uHlabisa unxuse amaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi agqugquzele ukuthula njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni. Amaqembu ahlukene akwamukele ukumenyezelwa kosuku lokhetho ukuze ahlabele phambili nezinhlelo zokhetho. Iqembu iMKP isakhala ngokuthi kumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho ekubeni isanezikhalazo ngokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Leli qembu likhala ngokubanjwa inkunzi yikhomishini njengoba kwake kwaba nesikhathi lapho ibhodi lemiphumela yokhetho, lalingasebenzi cishe okwaba amahora acela kwamathathu ngawo u-2024. Lolu daba lweMKP nekhomishini luzongena enkantolo ngenyanga ezayo. UHlabisa uthe unethemba lokuthi uMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo noweMfundo ePhakeme, bazokwenza izinhlelo zokuthi kungaphazamiseki ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo ngesonto lokhetho yingakho kusheshe kwamenyezelwa usuku. URamaphosa unxuse amakhansela afuna ukubuyiselwa ezikhundleni emuva kokhetho, ukuthi azibambe ziqine aphinde aveze amava awo emphakathini.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthi ukuboshelwa kwakhe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu kumenza abe sezingeni lezingqalabutho ze-ANC ezaboshelwa amacala ezepolitiki abala kuzo owayengumengameli wokuqala ngaphansi koMbuso wentando yeningi, uMnuz Nelson Mandela, owayengumholi we-ANC, uMnuz Oliver Tambo, kanye nowayengunobhala jikele we-ANC, uMnuz Walter Sisulu. UMalema uthe uma kuwukuthi ugcinwa ngempela ephoqiwe ukuthi akayodonsa isigwebo ejele kuyomele aboshwe ejele elisesiqhingini okwakugcinwe kulo uMandela nezinye izishoshovu, iRobben Island. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma emcimbini wethimba lentsha ye-EFF elijutshwe ukuba liqhube umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UMalema wagwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Usiphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe. Uthe ngeke ehle esikhundleni ngoba elahlwe icala lezepolitiki. "Ngiboshelwe icala lezepolitiki. Ngiboshelwe into engayenza eqenjini lezepolitiki. Uma befuna ukungibopha kufanele bavule iRobbeni Island. Ngeke ngiyogqunywa nezigebengu ejele. Angisona isigebengu. Mina ngisezingeni loMandela, Sisulu noTambo. Angiyena utsotsi. Mina abangibambanga ngintshontsha, angibulalanga muntu. Ngenza into ephathelene nepolitiki emcimbini weqembu lezepolitiki. Manje bafuna ukungibophela lokho." UMalema uthe labo abafuna aboshwe bafuna ukumvala umlomo. "Abafuni ukuthi ngiqhubeke nokukhuluma iqiniso ngoba abezwani neqiniso." UMalema uthe uzoqhubeka nokulwa noma angaboshwa. Unxuse intsha ukuba iphume ngezinkani iyobhalisela ukuvota njengoba kuzokuba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba. Kuzokuba nempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota ngenyanga ezayo. Intsha yakuleli ayimandla ekuvoteni. UMalema uthe ukuvota kwentsha okhethweni oluzayo kungenza ukuthi amaqembu amadala angaliboni elidlalayo. "Uma kuwukuthi uyaqaphela kahle i-ANC, DA ne-IFP abayingeni eyokunxenxa abantu ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota. Ingoba bafuna kungabi noshintsho ohlwini lwabantu ababhalisele ukuvota." UMalema uthe intsha kufanele isukumele izinkinga ezibhekene nemiphakathi yayo. "Akufanele nigcine kuphela ngokuba izishoshovu ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme kuphela. Kufanele nisukumele izinkinga ezikhungethe imiphakathi yangakini ngoba uma niyocasha ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nizozifica zinilindile lezi zinkinga emakhaya uma seniqedile ukufunda."

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI omusha weStellenbosch, u-Olisa Ndah Image: Isithombe:STELLENBOSCH FC UMQEQESHI weStellenbosch FC uGavin Hunt ugxibhe iPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngokungsukumi ngendlela efanayo uma amaqembu ayo eyidinga ikakhulukazi ngasekubhalisweni kwabadlali abasha. UHunt ukusho lokhu kwiSuperSport ngesikhathi ebuzwa ngomdlali wakhe omusha u-Olisa Ndah osanda kubajoyina esuka kwi-Orlando Pirates. Lo mqeqeshi oseke wasebenza kwiChiefs phambilini ubekhuluma ngaphambi komdlalo weBetway Premiership nawo Amakhosi ngoLwesibili ebusuku e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. “Kunezinto esengafunda ukungazixaki ngazo ngoba i-PSL kayisukumi ngendlela efanayo uma amaqembu angaphansi kwayo eyidinga ukuze asheshe abhalise abadlali abasha. Kumaqembu athile izinto zenzeka kalula kodwa kwamanye kuthatha isikhathi ekubeni kusobala ukuthi kasikho isidingo,” kusho uHunt ngaphandle kokuqagula amagama. Kusukela ngoDisemba, iStellies iqinise isikwati sayo ngabadlali abanamava okubalwa kubona uMosa Lebusa obedlalela iMamelodi Sundowns, Wayde Jooste owachithwa ngaMaZulu ekupheleni kwesizini edlule noTshegofatso Mabasa obeyibamba kwiPirates. Laba badlali uHunt uthembele kubona ukuthi basize ezakhe zisuke ngasemsileni we-log njengoba sezigxile kwiPremiership kulandela ukukhishwa kwiCaf Confederation Cup.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IMEYA kaMasipala waseMfolozi, uMnuz Xolani Bhengu (ophakathi), uKhansela uNhlakanipho Conco nemenenja kamasipala, uMnuz Fred Mazibuko Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu AZOPHELA amahlathi okucasha kwesaKwaMthethwa ngaphansi kukaMasipala uMfolozi, njengoba sekuphothulwa ukwakhiwa kwesiteshi samaphoyisa kule ndawo. Lokhu kuvezwe yimeya yalo masipala, uMnuz Xolani Bhengu, esithangamini nabezindaba eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu. Uthe ubugebengu obudlange kakhulu kule ndawo wukwebiwa nokudunwa kwezimoto. UBhengu uthe njengamanje banesiteshi esisodwa esiKwaMbonambi. “Leso siteshi besikwazi ukuthi sisize kwesaKwaMthethwa, KwaSokhulu naKwabuyazi. Lokho bekwenza ukuthi uma kunokuganga okwenzeka kwesaKwaMthethwa uthole ukuthi bayaphuza ukuphendula ngenxa yokuthi indawo yaseMfolozi ivuleke kakhulu. Uma sesizoba neziteshi zamaphoyisa ezimbili kusho ukuthi sebezokwazi ukulwa nezigebengu, kube khona nokwesaba futhi uma bebona abomthetho bebaningi bazokwazi ukuthi badlalele kude,” kusho uBhengu. Uthe lesi siteshi esakhiwe ngokubambisana phakathi kukahulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal nokazwelonke, sesiphelile ukwakhiwa, kuphela sekuqedelwa ukufakwa ugesi. “Alukho usuku olubekiwe okwamanje (ukuthi sizovulwa nini) kodwa ngiyathembisa uuthi ngeke ushaye uJulayi lungaphumanga ngoba ngokwesakhiwo sesiphelile. Sesilinde ukuthi izigilamkhuba uma zisaqhubeka zitokele phakathi,” kuchaza uBhengu. Uthe ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi akafuni sakhiwe bese siba yisakhiwo esingasebenzi, uhulumeni wathembisa ukuthi izinsiza zizoba khona kanjalo nabasebenzi. “Sakubeka ukuthi asifisi ukuthi sikhandwe bese siphenduka isakhiwo nje. Ngenza isibonelo ngesiteshi samaphoyisa saseMambuka esisaziyo sonke esakhandwa uhulumeni ubambisene noTransnet, esasebenza isikhashana ngoba zingekho izinsiza zokusebenza. Sigcine sicekelwa phansi singasasebenzi.”

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNOBHALA jikelele weNatu, uMnuz Mathenjwa Mabija I-NATU isizwakalise ukukhathazeka ngokusonga izandla koMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal ekubeni kuqhubeka ukungabi bikho kozinzo esikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary eChesterville, eThekwini. Lokhu kuza emva kokuvalwa kwesango lesikole ngengidi engaziwa, maqede kwabhalwa imiyalezo eyehlukene ezingqwembeni ezinanyathiselwe esangweni ngoLwesithathu. UNobhala jikelele weNatu, uMnuz Mathemba Mabija, ubehambele lesi sikole ngoLwesine, ukuyohlola isimo. Uthe ufike wathola ukuthi isimo asigwinyisi mathe futhi konke okulokhu kwenzeka kunomthelela omubi kubafundi kanjalo nakothisha. Uthe ngokubuka kwabo, umnyango uluyekelele ngamabomu udaba lwalesi sikole. “Kuthikamezeke ukufunda othisha abangu-22 beyeka ukufundisa. Ziphelile manje izinyanga ezintathu uMnyango ungenzi lutho ngalolo daba,” kusho uMabija. Uthe kufanele ngabe uMnyango wenza into eyodwa, ungenelele ngokubuyisa labo othisha noma uqashe ngokugcwele laba abayitoho, abafika bezolekelela idlanzana elingatelekanga ukuthi kuqhubeke ukufundisa. Ugcizelele eyokuthi ukulaxaza kothisha ukufundisa kwakungayamene nodaba lokufakwa kwamakhamera kodwa kwakudlalwa nje ipolitiki. Uphathe eyokumiswa kukathishomkhulu obekhona uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese ngaphandle kwesizathu esiphathekayo. “Njengoba bethule, bamatasa babheka amacala abazombeka wona njengoba leya ncwadi eyayimmisa yayingasibaluli isizathu sokuthi umiselwani. Kusobala icala abazombheca ngalo uMnyango usalicinga,” kusho uMabija. Uthe akekho uthisha ongadinwa eyokufakwa kwamakhamera esikoleni ekubeni isizathu sokuthi kwenzelwa ezokuphepha sacaciswa. Uthe kuyabakhathaza ukuthikamezeka kokufunda ngoba sekusondele izivivinyo zaphakathi nonyaka. Ube eseveza ukuthi emva kokuxoxisana nothisha abebesesikoleni bakuvezile ukuthi ukungabi bikho kozinzo sekuholele ekutheni iningi libe nokhwantalala. “Kukhona uthisha ositshele ukuthi uke wathatha ikhefu lokugula lesonto lonke. Uthe bekuqala ukuthi angabi bikho isikhathi eside kanje esikoleni selokhu afika kulesi sikole,” usho kanje. Ubuye waveza nokuthi uyishayele ucingo inhloko yoMnyango, uMnuz Nkosinathi Ngcobo, efuna ukwazi ukuthi uMnyango ukephi nezinhlelo zokulungisa isimo. “Uthe udaba lulungiswa ezingeni lesifunda. Ngithe uma ngimbuza ukuthi isifunda sesimlethele ziphi ezakamuva maqondana nokungenelela kwaso, wangena ezintangeni. Kuvele kwangicacela ukuthi abenzi lutho ngalolu daba,” kusho uMabija. Izinxushunxushu ziqale ngasekupheleni kukaJanuwari nonyaka othisha abangu-22 benyunyana iSadtu belaxaza ukufundisa, bethi bafuna kukhishwe amakhamera emakilasini. Kwasuka esinamathambo, abazali beshaya phansi ngonyawo, bethi amakhamera awayi ndawo ngoba lesi sikole sinenkinga yokugqekezwa, kwebiwe impahla efana nezitulo emakilasini. Abazali bagcina bezitholela othisha abayitoho, kulabo abasanda kuthola iziqu zobuthisha eNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, ukuthi baqhubeke nokufundisa. Kwabe sekumiswa uNgobese izinyanga ezintathu ngelithi kukhona ukungaziphathi kahle akwenza okungahlobene nodaba kwamakhamera. Abazali baze bafika eNkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu, beyolwa olwamakhamera njengoba uMnyango wase ukhiphe umyalelo wokuthi awakhishwe. Inkantolo yafike yavuna abazali ngelithi awangakhishwa. UNobhala jikelele weSadtu esifundazweni, uNksz Nomarashiya Caluza, ethintwa ukuba aphawule, akatholakalanga, ucingo lukhale, lwaze lwathula. Kuthintwa okhulumela uMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni uMnuz Mlungisi Mtshali uthe akekho esifundazweni ngakho akanalo ulwazi olugcwele ngokwakamumva eMkhumbane. Nokho uthe uvumile ukuthi uMnyango uyazi ngesimo esiqhubekayo. “Iyasikhathaza kakhulu siwuMnyango ngoba ilimaza imfundo yezingane,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: AMANQINA ezinye zezinkomo zikaMnuz Mthobisi Cele okuthiwa zebiwe, zabulawa emadlelweni BAFUNA amaphoyisa abhukule ekuphenyeni izigameko zokwebiwa kwemfuyo abantu baseMawuleni, ePort Shepstone, abakhala ngokuthi sebephelile amasela. Esigamekweni sakamumva, okuthiwa senzeke ngoLwesihlanu, owesilisa wendawo onguMnuz Mthobisi Cele, webelwe izinkomo eziyisikhombisa. Elandisa ngesehlakalo asifanise nesimngcwabe ephila, uthe umelusi wakhe uqaphele ngezikhathi zantambama, izinkomo sezibuya emadlelweni ukuthi eziyisikhombisa azibonwa. Uthe kuyinqubo yendawo ukuthi abelusi noma imindeni iyazivulela izinkomo ezibayeni, zizihambele ziye emadlelweni, baze bazibone ntambama uma sezibuya khona. Uthe ngesikhathi zidla emadlelweni akekho osuke ehleli nazo eziqaphile. “Kuthe uma kuyobhekwa emadlelweni, kwaficwa ngamanqina azo kanjalo nemiswani, okunye kungekho, kwacaca ukuthi zebiwe yilabo abazibulala khona lapho, maqede balayishe inyama yazo, bese bekhala amaphepha,” kusho uCele. Uthe uvukele emaphoyiseni ekuseni ngoMgqibelo, ukuyovula icala, nokuyilapho ezithele khona phezu kolwazi lokuthi ngayizolo, amaphoyisa athole imoto eyiveni, i-NP200, ebiphantshelwe yisondo esigodini saseMntentweni, bude buduze nedolobha i-Port Shepstone. “Athe le moto ayithole ingenamuntu phakathi, isele dengwane. Athi uma eyibheka ngemumva, athola kukhona inqwaba yenyama nezinhloko. Athi uma eyongikhombisa, nebala ngathola ukuthi yizo izinkomo zami lezi engithi zidukile,” usho kanje. Uthe amaphoyisa aqhubeke amtshela ukuthi athe uma ephenya ngale moto etholakele, kwavela ukuthi yayibikwe ukuthi yebiwe esiteshini samaphoyisa i-Durban Central nyakenye. "Ngiphatheke kabi ngokuthi sintshontshelwe imfuyo ngale ndlela.
