Sifisa amaphoyisa enze kangcono ngamacala okwebiwa kwemfuyo ngoba siyawabika ngethemba lokuthi kukhona abazoboshwa kodwa uphenyo lwakhona luphelele emoyeni,” kusho uCele. Uthe njengoba yena elahlekelwe yimfuyo, ungowesibili emndenini ukulahlekelwa esikhathini esiyizinyanga ezimbalwa. “Umalume wami ubulawelwe ezine ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule. Nezakhe zabulawa ngendlela efanayo emadlelweni. Yena-ke akazange athole namkhondo. Naye wabika emaphoyiseni kodwa icala laphelela emoyeni,” kubeka uCele. Uthe uma ekhumbula kahle, lesi yisigameko sesithathu esikhathini esingangezinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili. “Zibulawelwa endaweni eyodwa, nokwenza sicabange ukuthi amasela asicekela phansi abantu ababodwa,” kusho uCele, othe indlela okwenzeka ngayo babuye babe nakho ukusola ukuthi amasela kungenzeka kube abantu bendawo abasebenzisana nabokuhamba. Uthe lokhu bakusho ngoba abanazo izimpendulo zokuthi umuntu wokuhamba angaluthathaphi ulwazi lokuthi amadlelo endawo angakuphi. Unxuse amaphoyisa ukuthi alusukumele lolu daba ngoba nakuba omunye umuntu engayibuka incane into yokwebiwa kwemfuyo kodwa isuke iwudume lwengozi kubanikazi. Wenze umfanekiso ngaye, wathi lezi zinkomo ezebiwe zingabiza u-R120 000 uma zidayiswa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uCaptain Ntathu Ndlovu, uthe amaphoyisa aseMehlomnyama aphenya icala lokwebiwa kwemfuyo kulandela ukuthi kwebiwe izinkomo eziyisikhombisa eMawuleni. “Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa nomphakathi luholele eNdundumeni lapho okutholakale khona ukuthi izinkomo zihlinziwe, kwasala izimpondo namanqina kuphela,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu, othe akukabi bikho muntu oseboshiwe.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YIZE amaMetro FM Music Awards abese-ICC Arena eThekwini ngoMgqibelo owedlule kodwa nanamhlanje asesematheni. Kunamaciko ahlulwe maqede adubela kwamanye anqobile. Omunye wawo, umculi we-Afro pop uNaledi Aphiwe, obhodlele kwiLadysmith Black Mambazo emuva kokuhlulwa kwiBest African Pop. Ubhuqe aMambazo ngokuthi uyawahalalisela ngokuvotelwa yizalukazi esezalala emathuneni maqede wabuza ukuthi ayini aMambazo. Ugxekwe kakhulu uNaledi ngokudelela izingwazi ezinezindondo zamaGrammy ezinhlanu futhi eziwuzungezile umhlaba. Yize kunjalo, uNhlamulo "Nota" Baloyi, onamagalelo namava emculweni wakuleli, uthe uyazwelana noNaledi Aphiwe ngoba usebenze ngokuzikhandla, ekhankasa ezindaweni eziningi kodwa wagcina engalibonanga elidlalayo. Nomculi wamapiano ne-3 Step, uZee Nxumalo, ukhale kakhulu ngokuhlulwa eminxeni eyisikhombisa. Ekhuluma kwiPodcast and Chill with MacG, uZee uthe uphethwe yikhanda ngenxa yokuhlulwa kuma-awards. Abantu bazwelane noZee bethi bekumfanele ukumuka nendondo yeBest Artist of the Year, okuwunklomelo othathwe uzakwabo uCiza. Umculi wamapiano futhi obengumsakazi weKaya FM ne-YFM, uSol Phenduka, uthe bekungafanele kuwine uCiza ngenxa yokuthi ubedume ngengoma eyodwa ethi Isaka. NoMacGyver "MacG" Mukwevho unuke uCiza ngokuthi uyithengile le ndondo esizwa nguyise uThembinkosi Nciza wodumo lweTS Records eyayinoZahara. USol uthe ama-awards asaphelelwa yisithunzi nokwethembeka ngenxa yokuthi amaciko okusuke kufanele ukuthi aqokwe, awaqokwa kodwa kuqokwa asuke ebhacazile ngalowo nyaka. Uthe amaMetro abehlonishwa futhi kumnandi ukuqokwa kuwo kodwa manje asehlelwe yisasasa ngenxa yokuhlulwa ukuqoka ngendlela. UNota uthe izindondo zithengiwe. "Uyangiqonda? La ma-awards ayathengwa. URiky Rick wanitshela ngalokho bantwana." KumaMetro FM Music Awards ango-2017 umrepha ongasekho uRiky Rick, emukela indondo yakhe, waveza ukuthi kuyagwazwa emisakazweni yingakho kudlalwa izingoma ezibhedayo. Wathi umculo omnandi ukwi-internet ngenxa yokuthi kunabantu ababamba amaciko ngophondo emisakazweni. "U-90% womculo owuzwa emisakazweni wumbhedo." Ngebhadi inkulumo yakhe yanqanyulwa esaqhubeka. Ekhuluma kwiMusic Pulse Podcast, uNota uthe ukuthengwa kwezindondo kuyamthunuka ngoba iMabala Noise yangcwaba umrepha ayemphethe uKwesta kumaMetro ngoba yasebenzisa imali eyayiyithole eMnyangweni wezaManzi ngo-2017. Uthe ingoma kaKwesta ethi Ngud yahlulwa ekaNasty C ethi Hell Naw. UNota uthe ingoma kaKwesta yayishisa izikhotha ngapha nangapha futhi idlalwa nasezinkundleni zemidlalo. Uzakwabo uSifiso "Mafitsotso" Ndlovu uthe okulimaze amaciko amaningi wukuthi akusenziwa njengakuqala lapho abalandeli babevota ngempela hhayi ngomlomo. Uthe kumqoka ukuthi amaciko ahlanganise abantu bese ekhipha ngisho u-R20 000, anikeze abantu ukuba bawavotele ngaphambi kokunxenxa izihlobo nabalandeli ukuba bavote. Eqhuba uMafitsotso uthe iyona ndlela le yokunqoba ama-awards. Uthe akekho umuntu othenga izindondo kodwa kusuke kukhuluma ivoti. Uthe kunamaciko obekungafanele aqokwe eminxeni ethize ngenxa yokuthi abengafanele. Uze wenza isibonelo ngomculi owine kwiBest Styled Artist. Nakuba kunjalo wabuye wazisola ngale nkulumo emuva kokugxekwa. Usomahlaya uMpho Pops uthe Zee ubulawe abalandeli ebebemvotela. Uthe kunabanye ebebemeseka ngezinhliziyo kodwa bengamvoteli ngoba bezitshela ukuthi bakhona abazomvotela. "Ngisho eyintandokazi yami, angizovota ngoba ngithemba ukuthi abanye bazomvotela. Sonke isikhathi sihlale sizitshela ukuthi umculi othize uzowina ngenxa yokuthandwa kodwa kuvele kungenzeki," kusho uMpho kwiPeople Need Comedy. ULondie London wodumo kwiReal Housewives of Durban uthe uZee walinyazwa wukuqokwa eminxeni eminingi ngoba amavoti akhe acazeka. "Ukube wayeqokwe eminxeni emithathu kwakungenzeka awine," kusho uLondie London kwiRead The Room Podcast. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kokhulumela iSABC, uMmoni Ngubane, ayiphumelelanga kwaze kwashaya isikhathi sokushicilela.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umholi we-ActionSA uMnuz Herman Mashaba KUHLUKANE imibono ngesiphakamiso seqembu i-ActionSA ePhalamende, sokunciphisa isibalo songqongqoshe kwiKhabhinethi, ngokuqeda ngezikhundla zamaphini ongqongqoshe. Leli qembu lifuna iPhalamende linikwe amandla okuthathela izinyathelo ongqongqoshe ababhacazayo uma kungukuthi umengameli wezwe uhudula izinyawo. Muva nje iPhalamende libhunge lesi siphakamiso ngaphansi koMthethosivivinywa i-Twenty-third Constitutional Amendment Bill, ehlose ukubuyekeza uMthethosisekelo wezwe. UMnuz Athol Trollip we-ActionSA, uthe asikho isidingo samaphini ongqongqoshe ngoba bafana nabantu abangenzi lutho. Uthe bamosha imali yabakhokhi bentela wathi lokhu kumosha u-R1.5 billion, ngonyaka. "Kumele sizibuze ukuthi yini umsebenzi wamaphini ongqongqoshe? Uma ongqongqoshe bengekho abakwazi ukubamba izintambo emnyangweni," usho kanje. Okunye okuhloswe nguMthethosivivinywa, wukuchitha ngevoti kongqongqoshe ababhacazayo kuphinde kuhlolwe kabanzi ongqongqoshe ngaphambi kokuqokelwa ezikhundleni. UTrollip ukhale ngobukhulu beKhabhinethi ngabantu abangu-76, ongqongqoshe abangu-33 namaphini abo angu-43. "Amaphini ongqongqoshe bafana nabantu abafudumeza izihlalo. Abanamsebenzi walutho. Umengameli unikwe amandla okususa ongqongqoshe kodwa uma engakwenzi lokhu kumele iPhalamende lingenelele." U-Advocate Glynnis Breytenbach we-DA, uthe kunemigomo abayesekayo eMthethwenisivivinywa. "Eminye yemigomo iyasikhathaza. Ukunika iPhalamende amandla kuzoshintsha ukudla epuletini." UMnuz Oscar Mathafa we-ANC, uchithe eyokuthi awanamsebenzi walutho amaphini ongqongqoshe. "Lo Mthethosivivinywa kukhona lapho ungena ugamanxa khona ezintweni ezithinta ukuqokwa kongqongqoshe. Amandla okuqoka ongqongqoshe namaphini abo akumengameli wezwe," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzwanele Manyi we-MKP, uthe uyahambisana neyesiphakamiso sokuchitha ngevoti lokungabuthembi ubuholi bongqongqoshe. "Akekho ungqongqoshe okumele kuthiwe akathintwa uma umengameli engamthatheli izinyathelo. Awabekhona amaphini ongqongqoshe athamele nemihlangano yeKhabhinethi ukuze kube nozinzo eminyangweni." UNksz Mathibe Mohlala we-EFF, uthe bayayeseka eyokuqedwa kweyamaphini ongqongqoshe. "Asikho isidingo sabo ngoba kuqokwe ibamba likangqongqoshe emuva kokumiswa kukangqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa ekubeni likhona iphini likangqongqoshe. Asihambisani neyokuchithwa ngevoti kongqongqoshe." IPatriotic Alliance ne-UDM ayihambisani nalo Mthethosivivinywa.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: URELEBOHILE Mofokeng we-Orlando Pirates ezama ukudlula nebhola kuThabo Nodada weDurban City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, uyikhombe eMbombela Stadium imibhiyozo kulandela ukubajwa kwezakhe yiDurban City emdlalweni obekufanele bawunqobe ukuze bezoqukula isicoco seBetway Premiership phambi kwezinkumbi zabalandeli e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ngoMgqibelo ntambama. IPirates iphume nephuzu emdlalweni ophele ngo 0-0 obekubhekwe ukuthi izoqoqa kuwona amathathu, ilingane neMamelodi Sundowns esesicongweni se-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-68. EZimnyama zisendaweni yesibili ngawu-66. Emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini, zizobhekana ne-Orbit College, evika izembe, eMbombela Stadium, eMpumalanga, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. Lo mdlalo usushintshe kwaba yiwona ophethe injabulo nezinyembezi zabalandeli bePirates abagcina ukubona iqembu labo liqukula isicoco seligi ngo-2012. Umdlalo ne-Orbit bekubhekwe ukuthi uzoba ngowokuyojabula nokunika abanye abadlali ithuba lokuzibonakalisa. Emuva komdlalo, u-Ouaddou, uthe uyakholwa ukuthi nakanjani bazowuqedela eMbombela umsebenzi ngempelasonto ezayo. "Ekuqaleni kwesizini ngasho ukuthi umbango weligi uzoqhubeka kuze kube wusuku lokugcina. Angikhathazekile kodwa ngijabhile ngoba asiwinanga. Kodwa masiyeni emdlalweni wokugcina siyoqukula indebe. Sekuphele iminyaka eminingi iPirates ingayiwini iligi futhi lokho kubonakele ngamatata enkundleni. Kubafana bami ngifuna ukuthi hambani niyothatha isicoco ngempelasonto ezayo,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSupersport. Enkundleni, iPirates ifake ingcindezi kusukela ekuqaleni komdlalo kodwa ukuqina kodonga lwasemuva lweCity lwenze abagadli beZimnyama bathwala kanzima.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe I-CAPE Town City ezibeke ethubeni elihle lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokushaya iBaroka FC ngo 1-0 emdlalweni weMotsepe Foundation Championship e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, izolo ntambama I-CAPE Town City izibeke ethubeni elihle lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokushaya iBaroka FC emdlalweni weMotsepe Foundation Championship obudlalelwa e-Athlone Stadium eKapa, izolo ntambama. Igoli likaGabriel Amato elingene ngesiwombe sokuqala ngomzuzu ka-22 yilona eliqinisekise amaphuzu amathathu amqoka kuleli qembu laseKapa elisemshikashikeni wokuzabalazela ukubuyela esigabeni seBetway Premiership. Njengoba iKruger United isilinde isilinde umdlalo wayo wokugcina wokusonga isizini ngeSonto elizayo, ukugcotshwa ngokusemthethweni njengompetha beMotsepe Championship, umbango usuphakathi kweCity, Milford FC, Hungry Lions neCasric Stars, ukulwela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. Womathathu la maqembu asembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs abuye namaphuzu aphelele, njengoba iMilford ishaye i-University of Pretoria ngo 2-0 eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichard Bay, ngenkathi iHungry Lions inenebula iHighbury FC ngo 4-0 eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberh. Kwathi iCasric yabhaxabula i-Upington City ngo 2-0 eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington. Amaqembu amabili azoqeda endaweni yesibili neyesithathu azodlala neliqede endaweni ka-15 kwi-lo yePremiership. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, ilandelwa yiCity endaweni yesithathu neyesine ngamaphuzu awu-51 ngokulinganayo ngokwehlukana, kube yiCasric kweyesihlanu ngawu-49 Lokhu kusho ukuthi imidlalo yangeSonto elizayo, ngekawafawafa kula maqembu alwela ukuya kumaPlay-Offs. I-The Citizens eqeqeshwa uJan Vreman negqishe ngeningi labadlali abanamava okudlala kwiPremiership, izosonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neLeicesterford City ngeSonto, eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto. IMilford eqeqeshwa uXanti Pupuma isonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neHungry Lions, eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs, e-Upington, iCasric isonge neGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Kanti iKruger eshaye iGomora ngo 1-0 izolo, izosonga ngomdlalo wasekhaya ne-The Bees FC KaNyamazane Stadium, nokuyilapho ezobe isinikwa khona indebe yayo yeMotsepe Championship. Kanti ngakolunye uhlangothi, isifundazwe iLimpopo sikhungethwe yifu elimnyama njengoba womabili amaqembu amabili akulesi sifundazwe egawulwe yizembe, okuyiBaroka FC neBlack Leopards. Phezu kokunqoba kweLeopards ngo 2-1 ishaya iVenda FC izolo, eThohoyandou Stadium kodwa lokho akuyisizanga ngenxa yesibalo samaphuzu. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: The Bees 1-1 Leicesterford City; Black Leopards 2-1 Venda FC; Cape Town City 1-0 Baroka; Upington City 0-2 Casric Stars; Highbury 0-4 Hungry Lions; Milford FC 2-0 Univ. of Pretoria; Gomora 0-1 Kruger United; Midlands Wanderers 1-1 Lerumo Lions

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuphele 'ukuphapha' kuboshwa abebedlala ngezulu lezandla Amaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) abophe amadoda amabili ayamaniswa nezibhamu abonakale kwi-video esakazwa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho abesifazane bebonakala bedlala budedengu bephethe izibhamu. Emuva kokusabalala kwe-video, abeSAPS Gauteng Crime Intelligence baqale umkhankaso wokuthungatha abasolwa okuwaholele eTembisa, eGauteng, lapho abasolwa betholakale khona baboshwa. Izibhamu ezibonakale kuvidiyo zithathwe ngamaphoyisa kanti uphenyo lokuqala luveza ukuthi lezi zibhamu azinalayisensi. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso abasolwa baphinde batholakala nemoto ebiduniwe. I-Gauteng Crime Intelligence iyaqhubeka nokuphenya ngabasolwa. Laba balisa ababili abaneminyaka engu-21 no-34 baboshelwe ukwephula umthetho iFirearms Control Act, ukutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nezinhlamvu kanye nokuba nemoto eduniwe. Amantombazane abonakala kule video agcine atholakele ngemuva kokuthi umkhondo wabasolwa ukhombe amaphoyisa lapho ahlala e-Ebony Park, eMidrand. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa ebuza ngawo kuvele ukuthi abonwe namadoda aseNingizimu Afrika eshayela imoto emhlophe yohlobo lwe-VW Polo. Imoto ibe isivinjwa eduze kwaseKaalfontein, abesifazane ababili abebefunwa batholakale emotweni base beyiswa eTembisa South SAPS. Amaphoyisa aphinde axwayise amalungu omphakathi ngokuphatha budedengu kanye nokukhonjiswa kwezibhamu, ngoba lokho kubeka izimpilo zabantu engozini futhi kuyicala elinzima. Abasolwa kulindeleke bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseTembisa ngesonto elizayo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUKHISHWE isexwayiso komasipala abahluleka ukukhokhela amabhodi ahlinzeka ngamanzi kuleli ukuthi abantu bangagcina sebethola amanzi angekho ezingeni, ngenxa yokukhula kwesikweletu. Lesi sexwayiso sikhishwe nguNgqongqoshe wezaManzi nokuHanjiswa kweNdle, uNksz Pemmy Majodina, ngesikhathi ethula isabelomali sika-R22 billion sonyakamali u-2026/2027 ePhalamende. Uthe sinyukile isikweletu somasipala abakweleta amabhodi amanzi saya ku-R27 billion. "Isikweletu sinyuke saya ku-R27 billion, sisuka ku-R25 billion. Ukungakhokhi kwalabo masipala kungenza ukuthi abantu bagcine sebethola amanzi angekho ezingeni elifanele." Uthe amanzi ayilungelo labantu ngakho abakwazi ukuwavala komasipala abakweletayo. "Zikhona izinto ezingenziwa komasipala abakweleta amabhodi ahlinzeka ngamanzi, okubalwa nokuwavala. Manje asikwazi ukuvalela abantu amanzi ngoba ayilungelo labo." Uthe zikhona izinhlelo ezenziwayo okubalwa nokuthi babanjelwe ingxenye yesabelomali omasipala abahluleka ukukhokha. "Kumanje bangu-62 omasipala ababanjelwa ingxenye yesabelomali ukuze kukhokhelwe amabhodi amanzi. Zikhona nezingxoxo ezibekhona ebezihlanganisa oNdunankulu bezifundazwe, izimeya kanjalo nomnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, ngodaba lwezikweletu zomasipala." Uthe kunemiphakathi esabhekene nezinselelo zokuthola amanzi ekubeni ingqalasizinda yamanzi ikhona. "Abantu abawatholi amanzi, amanye ayavuza amosheke. Lezi ngezinye zezinkinga esizilungisayo." Uthe bayalwa nenkohlakalo ethinta ukusatshalaliswa kwamanzi kuleli. "Kunenkinga yama-mafia enza ubugebengu nenkohlakalo ngokuthi acekele phansi ingqalasizinda yamanzi kuleli. Lezi ngezinye zezingqinamba ezenza amanzi angafinyeleli kubantu. Kunezinhlelo ezifaka izinhlaka ezehlukene okunguhulumeni, umkhakha ozimele, uphiko oluphenya amacala i-Special Investigating Unit, nezinye ukulwa nale nkinga." Uthe kunengqalazinda yamanzi esiphothuliwe enye isalungiswa ezindaweni ezehlukene kuleli. Ubale IMaphumulo Bulk Scheme KwaZulu-Natal, Giyani Water Project, Babanana Bulk Scheme, Moretele Bulk Scheme nezinye izindawo athe ingqalasizinda yamanzi isiphothuliwe. "Siyazi kunezindawo ezibalelwa ku-2 600 ezihlala abantu ezingenawo nhlobo amanzi kuleli. Kulezi zindawo sinezinhlelo zokulanda amanzi ngaphansi komhlaba nezinye izinhlelo ukuze bathole amanzi." Ezinye zalezi zindawo uthe ziseKZN wathi bakha ama-borehole angu-28, e-Eastern Cape bakha angu-14 kanjalo nakwezinye izindawo. Uveze ukuthi i-United Nations, iqoke elakuleli neFrance ukuthi ilungiselele ukubambisana kwesikasihlalo ngezithinta ukutshalwa kwemali kwingqalasizinda yamanzi engqungqutheleni ezoba ngoDisemba nonyaka. Ingqungquthela izobanjwa ngokubambisana i-United Arab Emirates neSenegal.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, wethule inkampani yonogada iSkebhe National  Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu SELIZOGAYA ngomunye umhlathi enhlanganweni iSkebhe njengoba sekunophiko lonogada. Lokhu kuvele emcimbini wokwethulwa kwenkampani yonogada, Iskebhe National Protection Services, eZero Lounge eNquthu, ngoLwesihlanu. ISkebhe inhlangano eyayisungulelwe ukuqapha ukwebiwa kwezinkomo ezindaweni zaKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba seyilwa nayo yonke inhlobo yobugebengu nakwezinye izifundazwe zakuleli. Ekhuluma kulo mcimbi uMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, uthe inhlosongqangi ngokuqhamuka nale nkampani akukhona ukukhanda imali kodwa ukuqinisa izindlela zokulwa nobugebengu. Uthe abahlosile ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kwezinye izinkampani zonogada kodwa ukusebenzisana nazo ukunqanda ubugebengu obubhokile kuleli. UManyathi uthe banxuswe ngamalungu eSkebhe ukuba kusungulwe inkampani yonogada. Uthe ngeke onogada babo basebenze eNquthu kuphela kodwa bazosabalala wonke amadolobha nezifundazwe zakuleli. "Uma onogada bethu befuneka eThekwini, bazokuya kuleyo nkampani abadingeka kuyo." Uthe izandla bazivule kunoma wubani ofuna ukusebenzisana nabo, okungaba abanikazi bamapulazi nabamabhizinisi anhlobonhlobo. IPhini likaMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Zakhele Mncube, lithe nakuba bezobabhekelela nabantu abangamalungu eSkebhe njengoba besasebenza ngokuvolontiya kodwa bazobe beqasha onogada abaqeqeshelwe lo msebenzi ngoba bazobe belandela imithetho, imigomo nemibandela ebekwe uhulumeni. NoManyathi uthe bazosebenzisa uhlelo lwentando yeningi uma sebeqasha ngoba abafuni ukwenzelela ngokuqasha izihlobo nabangani babaholi beSkebhe. Uthe bazobheka onogada abanezicucu zalo msebenzi futhi abagunyaziwe ukuwenza. Eqhuba uManyathi uthe ngeke baze bazihluphe ngonogada ocwile etshwaleni, ongathembekile nobhema esidlangalaleni ngoba uzobalimazela igama labo. Uthe enye inhloso ngale nkampani ukuvulela intsha ebhuquza emakhaya nezitifiketi zobu-security amathuba emisebenzi. UManyathi uthe bazoba namahhovisi eNquthu naseGoli bese bedlulela nakwezinye izifundazwe. Uthe le nkampani iyinkomba yokuthi umsebenzi weSkebhe awufi, kunalokho uyadlondlobala. Lo mcimbi bewuhanjelwe ngabebemele ubukhosi bendawo noMasipala waseNquthu namalungu omphakathi. UMNUZ Sibangani Manyathi ephahlwe yingxenye yonogoda abangaphansi kweSkebhe National Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, ethula inkampani yonogada iSkebhe National Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu ngoLwesihlanu UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, wethule inkampani yonogada, Iskebhe National Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu, ngoLwesihlanu

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: U-DJ Oskido ozohlonishwa nguMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa KUZOHLONISHWA amaciko ahlukene okubalwa nababhali bezincwadi nguMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, emcimbini wama-National Orders. Kulo mcimbi kusuke kubungazwa izingwazi ezahlukene zakuleli nezakwamanye amazwe, esezalala kanjalo nezisadla anhlamvana ngemisebenzi emihle eziyenzayo emikhakheni ehlukene. Emcimbini wakusasa kuzohlonishwa amaciko okubalwa uqolothakamango ka-DJ, u-Oscar "Oskido" Mdlongwa, ngeqhaza lakhe ekufukuleni amaciko asafufusa endimeni yomculo. Ayaziwa amagalelo ka-Oskido emculweni we-kwaito kanti uphinde abe ngusomabhizinisi kanjalo nomsakazi. Omunye wabazohlonishwa yisihlabani somculi we-jazz, u-Jonathan Kenneth Butler odabuka eKapa. Ayaziwa amava kaButler emculweni we-jazz kuleli nasemhlabeni jikelele. Kuzophinde kuhlonishwe noqweqwe lombhali wezincwadi, uSolwazi Deuteronomy Bhekinkosi Zeblon Zulu, odume ngelika-DBZ Ntuli. UNtuli ubhale inqwaba yezincwadi ezifundwa nasezikoleni kuleli. Omunye wemisebenzi yakhe emenze wahlonishwa incwadi ayihumusha kaNelson Mandela, esihloko sithi Uhambo Olude Oluya eNkululekweni (Long Walk to Freedom). UNtuli uphinde abe ngomunye wabasunguli benhlangano yababhali eyaziwa ngokuthi Usiba Writers' Guild. INKAKHA ye-jazz uJonathan Butler Image: Shelley Kjonstad Kwezemidlalo kuzohlonishwa nomqeqeshi wamaBhokobhoko uRassie Erasmus, ngokuhola leli qembu ekutheni liwine indebe yomhlaba ebholeni lombhoxo. URamaphosa uzophinde ahloniphe noSolwazi Khabajane (Khabi) Vivian Mngoma ongasekho, ngeqhaza lakhe ekusunguleni umnyango wezomculo enyuvesi yaseZululand, oNgoye ngo-1975. UMngoma uhlonishwa nangeqhaza lakhe emculweni. Kuzohlonishwa nesishoshovu samalungelo abaphila nokukhubazeka u-Andiswa Gebashe, owaziwa ngokutolikela abangezwa uma kukhuluma uRamaphosa. Bonke laba bazohlonishwa nge-Order of Ikhamanga ngemisebenzi yabo kwezobuciko, umculo, ezemidlalo kanjalo nezokucoshelwa kwezindaba. UShansela wamaNational Orders, onguMqondisi jikelele ehhovisi likamengameli, uNksz Phindile Baleni, uthe inhloso yalo mcimbi ukuhlonipha abantu abenze imisebenzi encomekayo kuleli, abagqugquzela intando yeningi nabaphinde bafukule abantu bakuleli. Uthe kuhlonishwa abantu abahlukene ngezindondo okungeye-Ikhamanga, Baobab, Mapungubwe, neka-OR Tambo. Abanye abazohlonishwa ngendondo iMapungubwe oSolwazi Salim Abdool Karim waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, obambe iqhaza empini yokutholakala kwekhambi lokulapha ingculazi. UKarim wayesethimbeni elalijutshwe nguNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo kuleli, ukululeka izwe ngesikhathi kuhlasele umbulalazwe wegciwane iCovid-19. Kuzohlonishwa noSolwazi Tulio de Oliveira, ngocwaningo alwenza ethola olunye uhlobo lwegciwane lwe-Covid-19, olwalwaziwa nge-Omicron. Lolu cwaningo lwasiza ekuvikeleni abantu ukuthi bangasuleleki ngalolu hlobo lwegciwane. UNksz Baleni uhalalisele bonke abazohlonishwa wanxusa ukuthi baqhubeke nemisebenzi emihle abayenzayo ezweni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: Leon Lestrade / Independent Media UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ngeke baseseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa. UHlabisa uwachaze njengosomathuba amaqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeNewzroom Afrika. Amaqembu iMKP ne-ATM afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa La maqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa emva kokuba iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ichithe isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. UHlabisa uthe asikho isidingo sokuthi kulalelwe isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, wathi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo. "Emva kwesinqumo senkantolo sakhipha isitatimende. Sikholwa wukuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho njengoba naye uRamaphosa eshilo ukuthi asihloniphe isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele lenze lokho okushiwo yisinqumo senkantolo. Akukuhle ukuba usomathuba. Asikho isidingo sesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Kunesinqumo senkantolo esishoyo ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo okufanele lulandelwe. Thina njenge-IFP asibona abantu abathanda ukubukwa. Siyavumelana ngokuthi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo." USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, ubengakasiphenduli isicelo se-MKP nese-ATM. Phezu kwesicelo se-MKP ne-ATM kuphinde kube nesicelo se-EFF efuna ukuthi iPhalamende lisungule ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe uRamaphosa uzolahlekelwa okuningi uma ekhishwa esikhundleni ngohlelo abaluhlongozayo. "Uma ukhishwa ngalolu hlelo ulahlekelwa imihlomulo etholwa ababengomengameli. Lapha sibala impesheni, izimoto kanye nabasebenzi onikezwa bona uma usuthatha umhlalaphansi." UMalema uthe bazolwa nemizamo kaRamaphosa yokubambezela uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. Kuvela ukuthi uRamaphosa angase aye enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo umbiko wekomiti elalijutshwe yiPhalamende ukuba liphenye lolu daba. "Noma angaya enkantolo sizoya nathi enkantolo. Sizothi lolu daba luyaphuthuma, alulalelwe ngokushesha. Uma ecabanga ukuthi uzosibambezela, uqambe eshilo. Sizofaka isicelo sokuthi udaba lulalelwe ngokushesha. Uzobizwa ukuba azoziphendulela." Ukuze uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngalolu hlelo kufanele isiphakamiso sivotelwe u-66% wamalungu ePhalamende. UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMalema uthe abanandaba noma singachithwa ekugcineni isiphakamiso sokuthi uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngoba bazobe sebemhlambalaze bamqeda ngesikhathi evele phambi kwekomiti elizobe liqhuba uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. "Asinandaba nokuthi uyakhishwa yini esikhundleni. Indaba yokuvota isekugcineni. Kuyothi kufikwa lapho uRamaphosa uyobe esehlambalazeke waphela. Kuningi okuzovela. Sizombiza ezoziphendulela sibize nabasebenzi basepulazini. Kuningi okuzovela. Abasebenzi bazositshela iqiniso. Ngiyazi ukuthi kwakungekhona okokuqala bentshontsha imali lapha. Maningi amagama abantu abazovela. Uzombuleka izinqe."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UTOBZA Tee okhiphe ingoma entsha ethi Mshana ka-Aunt AKAZIMISELE ngokuyeka ukuphatha izinhlelo zemicimbi uTobza Tee osengene wagamanxa emculweni. UThobekile Njapha, odume ngelikaTobza Tee (31), uqale ukugqama ngokuba nomfutho esiteji uma ephethe uhlelo emicimbini yobumnandi. Muva nje, le ntokazi yaKwaMakhutha eThekwini, ikhiphe ingoma yayo entsha ethi Mshana Ka-Aunt ngaphansi kwenkampani iSphithiphithi Vibes. Iyichaze ngokuthi isuselwe ezintweni ezenzeka elokishini nokuyingakho kuzoba lula ukuthi abantu bayithande ngoba ikhuluma ngabakwaziyo. "Ikhuluma ngesimo sempilo esihlale sisibona kodwa sixoxwa ngendlela emnandi futhi ehehayo. Bengifuna ukukhuluma ngento eyiqiniso kodwa ezokwenza abantu badanse futhi bamamatheke," kusho uTobza Tee ocula i-house ne-Afro Pop. Uthe ingoma yendlalela i-EP yakhe entsha azoyikhipha ngoJulayi. Kuyona uthe ziningi izindaba azixoxayo futhi ishaya ngesigqi esisheshayo. Uqhube wathi yize esengene wagamanxa emculweni kodwa uzimisele ngokuqhubeka nokuphatha izinhlelo zemicimbi. Uthe ukwenza yomibili le misebenzi kudinga uthando nokuhlonipha akwenzayo. "Ngiyawuthanda ngenhliziyo yami yonke umculo futhi nokuphatha uhlelo kuyinto enginikeza umfutho. Ngenza isiqiniseko sokuthi kokubili ngikunaka ngendlela efanele." Uthe abantu abalindele umculo omusha kuye, uzosebenza nabantu abahlukene futhi basazombona emicimbini eminingi azonandisa kuyo. Uveze ukuthi yize eba nomfutho uma esesiteji kodwa ngasese uzothile futhi uthanda ukuzithulela.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMLINGISI uRenatefetswe “Rena” Ramosala ubhoboke ngokukhuleliswa yisihlobo kungavunyelwene UMLINGISI, odlale kuZalo nakwiSbongile & Dlaminis, ubhoboke ngokudlwengulwa aze akhulelwe okwenziwa yisihlobo sakhe esahamba uMkhosi woMhlanga. URanatefetswe "Rena" Ramosala (41), onguNkk Zondo kuZalo, uthe wayeseneminyaka engu-16 ngesikhathi ehlelwa yilo mshophi. Uthe kubo baze bathola ngoba esekhulelwe ukuthi isihlobo sakhe besilala naye. "Leso sigameko sangishiya ngikhulelwe ngisemncane, ngingenalo ulwazi noma ukuqonda okwanele ngesimo engangikuso. Ngangingakwazi ukutshela abazali bami ngoba umnukubezi wayethe uzongibulala. Ngaze ngakwazi ukubhoboka esehambile ekhaya, kusho ukuthi wayebona ukuthi ngikhulelwe ngoba ngangigula, ngingakwazi ukutshela abazali bami. Emuva kokuzwa ukuthi ngikhulelwe, abazali bami bathatha izinyathelo zokungivikela, bangiyisa kodokotela, kosonhlalakahle nasezikhungweni zomthetho." URena uthe nakuba icala lavulwa kodwa laphelela emoyeni ngenxa yokuthi amaphoyisa alisukumela sekuphele iminyaka emibili ebelethile. "Abomthetho bahamba bayobopha umsolwa kodwa baze babuya ingane isineminyaka emibili, bethi beze ngecala lokunukubezwa kwami. Umama wabaxosha ngoba ethi leli cala lenzeka ingane ingakazalwa, manje izohlukumezeka uma sekugqigqwa enkantolo," uyilanda kanje indaba yosizi lwakhe. "Lokho kwaholela ekutheni ngiqhubeke nempilo ngibhekene nobunzima. Ngicindezelekile futhi ngihlukumezekile ngokwengqondo." URena uthe akugcinanga ngalesi sehlakalo kodwa wagcina esedlwengulwa nangabanye abantu besilisa ababenza sengathi bazwelana naye kanti bafuna ukumgila. "Phezu kwalokho, angizange ngivumele ubuhlungu bempilo bunginqinde ekufezeni amaphupho ami. Yize kwakunzima kodwa ngagcina ngisiphothulile isikole futhi ngenza izifundo ezingama-short courses. Ngakhula ngaba umuntu ozimisele ukuvulela abanye indlela, ikakhulukazi abesifazane abake bahlukumezeka." URena uthe uqale ukukhuluma ngalesi sigameko esasakaza esiteshini esi-online iPhly Radio lapho ayesakaza khona uhlelo lwantambama nolwangezimpelasonto. Uthe ukunqanda lesi sihlava emphakathini, usungule inhlangano engenzi nzuzo ebizwa ngoMzokhanyayo Development Community Upliftment Plan, lapho begxila khona ekuqwashiseni umphakathi ngezinkinga ezifana nodlame lobulili, ukunukubezwa ngokocansi, ukuziphatha kwabesifazane nokukhulelwa kwabantu abasha. Ngaphandle kwalokho, uthe uziphilisa ngebhizinisi alisungulile i-Ezemvelo Ea Batho, athe kulona benza imikhiqizo yokunakekela izinwele nomzimba ebizwa nge-Ea Batho Hair Food, Ea Batho Virgin Hair Growth Oil, Ea Batho Root Revival Hair Spray, Ea Batho Carrot Body Oil, Ea Batho Glow Serum, Ea Batho Inner Thighs Cream ne-Ea Batho Glow Body Lotion Cream. Uthe usebenzisa ukunukubezwa kwakhe ukuqwashisa nokukhuthaza abantu besifazane.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: INISSAN Navara isizolandwa eThailand njengoba kuqedwa ukwakhiwa kwayo kuleli ngoJuni ISIKHULU sezokuxhumana kwaNissan Africa, uRamy Mohareb, sigcizelele ukuthi le nkampani ayiyindawo kuleli kulandela ukudayisa ifemu yayo esePitoli esithengwe yiChery South Africa. INissan isikhiqize eNingizimu Afrika eminyaka kule femu yayo eseRosslyn. Yilapho kwakhiwa khona iveni iNavara. Phambilini kwakwakhiwa i-NP200 kanti eminyakeni edlule kuke kwakhiwa ne-1400. UMohareb uthe bazogcina ukukhiqiza iNavara ekupheleni kukaJuni. “Uma ukhumbula kahle sasine-NP200 futhi kwakuzoba nemoto ezongena esikhaleni sayo kodwa yahoxiswa. Izinhlelo zethu sasizakhele phezu kwale moto kodwa ngenxa yepolitiki yamazwe omhlaba nempi yeRussia ne-Ukraine sayimisa leyo moto. Kusuka lapho besizama ukuthola enye ezoba yiveni elincane, lokho akwenzekanga nokuyingakho kwathathwa isinqumo sokuthi siyeke. Sathatha isinqumo sokuthi singavele sidayise ifemu kodwa senze isiqiniseko sokuthi sidlulisela nabasebenzi abaningi bethu,” kusho uRamy. IJetour isikuqinisekisile ukuthi izokhiqiza ama-SUV iT1 ne-T2 kule femu. IChery izomemezela emcimbini ohlelelwe uJuni ukuthi izotshala malini futhi izokwakha ziphi izimoto. Isikhulu sayo, uTony Liu, sisanda kutshela leli phephandaba ukuthi bazoshiya nolayini wokwakha iveni. ABADLALI be-rugby uJordan Hendrikse no-Aphelele Fassi bajoyine umndeni wakwaNissan beqokwa njengamanxusa azotetemuka ngamaNavara PRO-4X UMohareb uthe bavule ithuba kubasabenzi lokuthi abafuna ukushiya bahambe nemihlomulo. Uthe bazoqhubeka nokudayisa iNavara uma sekuphele ukuyikhiqiza kuleli njengoba bezobe sebeyilanda eThailand. Akafunanga ukuveza ukuthi lokhu kuzoyithinta kanjani intengo ngaphandle kokuthi kungenzeka kube khona ukuyibuyekeza abakwenzayo. Lesi sikhulu sikuqinisekisile ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika yimakethe ebalulekile kwaNissan. “Sinomlando weminyaka elinganiselwa ku-65. Sisazoqhubeka nokuba nempumelelo eminyakeni ezayo. INavara izohlala iyimoto ephambili kithina eNingizimu Afrika.” Uthe bazoqhubeka nokwethula izimoto ezintsha futhi banamagaraji amaningi. Ezinye zezimoto abazozethula kulo nyaka yi-SUV encane iTekton ezongena ngaphezu kweMagnite. Izoba yimbangi yeHyundai Creta neKia Seltos. Uthe futhi kulo nyakamali wabo oqale ngoMashi kuya kuMashi ngonyaka ozayo bahlela ukwethula iPatrol entsha. Uqhube wathi bazothuthukisa nezinye izimoto abazidayisayo njengamanje. Ebuzwa ukuthi bake bakucabanga yini ukubuyisa inkampani yabo i-Infiniti eyayidayisa kuleli eminyakeni edlule, uthe akafuni ukuphawula okwamanje ngaphandle kokuthi babheka izimoto eziningi. URamy ubekhuluma naleli phephandaba ngesikhathi eseMhlanga ngoMsombuluko lapho bebethula khona abadlali bamaSharks njengamanxusa abo. Uthe lokho kuwubufakazi bokuthi abayi ndawo. Baqoke u-Aphelele Fassi noJordan Hendrikse abazotetemuka ngamaNavara Pro 4X. U-Aphelele, odlalela naMaBhokobhoko, uthe le moto izokwenza kube lula uma ehamba ngisho nasobhuqwini. “Ngiyaliqala iveni kodwa lapha empilweni kuthiwa yonke into inesiqalo. Ngiyajabula futhi ngiyabonga ukuthi bangiqoke njengenxusa labo.” Lo mdlali odabuka eQonce, e-Eastern Cape, uthe izomsiza uma eya emakhaya ngoba imigwaqo ayimihle. “Iyadingeka imoto enjena. Ngiyakhumbula kushadelwa umngani wami ngase ngiyabhajwa. Izinto ezifana nalezo ngeke zenzeke uma uhamba ngesilwane esinje,” kusho u-Aphelele.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALA ngokwenzelwa phansi amaphoyisa umndeni wowesilisa okuthiwa wagwazwa wafa kunetiye (umsebenzi wesintu) kamakhelwane eKoki, eMzimkhulu, ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeka emini kwabha phambi kwawo wonke umuntu, kwabulawa ngesihluku uMnuz Ziphilele Mtambo (42). Ngokusho kukamfowabo kamufi, uMnuz Nyameko Mtambo, kwakungu-Ephreli 25, 2025, kwenzeka umshophi. Uthe isigameko senzeka egcekeni lalapho okwakwenziwe khona umsebenzi, okuyikwamakhelwane wakwamufi kanjalo nowabasolwa. Uthe isigameko senzeka lapho okwakuhleli khona wonke umuntu, okukhona kubo nezihlobo zakhe umufi kanjalo nabanye omakhelwane. “Kuthiwa ingxabano yaqala ngenxa yotshwala. Umufi wayefuna ukuphuziswa utshwala, abasolwa bengafuni aphuze. Kuthiwa baqala basukuma bamshaya, bemhlanganyela. Kwathi kusabukwa lokho, oyedwa wabo wakhipha uhalakasha lommese, wamgwaza ephindelela,” kusho uMtambo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zikamufi ezazikhona endaweni yesigameko, zamphuthumisa esibhedlela, nokho kwamenela ngezikhathi zasebusuku, emva kokulaliswa amahora ambalwa. Uthe amaphoyisa abizwa endaweni yesehlo, afika umufi esephuthunyiswe esibhedlela, abuza imibuzo ngokwenzekile kumnikazi womuzi, kwavulwa icala, wathi abasolwa banele babona ukuthi umufi uselimele kanzima, babaleka endaweni. “Kwaphela izinsuku ezimbalwa bengekho endaweni kodwa babuye babuya. Sathi singcwaba base bebuyile, abangaboshwa,” kusho uMtambo. Uqhube wathi babelokhu belindele ukuthi bazoboshwa kodwa kwangenzeka lokho. “Okusiphatha kabi ukuthi sekuze kwaphela cishe unyaka bezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, sabantu abangaze benze lutho. Thina ngapha salahlekelwa othandiweyo ngenxa yabo,” kusho uMtambo. Uthe okubaphatha kabi ukuthi bayazizwa izinkulumo abasolwa abazikhuluma emphakathini, lapho beqhosha ngokuthi akukho mnyakazo ozoke wenzeke ngecala ngoba bona bawakhokhela imali amaphoyisa. Uthe abazi ukuthi le nkulumo iyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa uma bebuka okwenzeka ecaleni, limi ndawonye, basola sengathi iyiqiniso. “Esikukhalelayo ubulungiswa. Sesifisa ukuthi kungenelele noMkhwanazi (uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa eKZN, uLt-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi) ngoba usizo asilutholanga emaphoyiseni ebesiwathembile,” usho kanje. Amaphoyisa athe ayiveli imininingwane eqondene nalolu daba ngokwenombolo yecala Isolezwe ebeliyinikwe umndeni.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: U-JURENZO Julius weHollywoodbets Sharks eshaya enye yama-try akhe amathathu emdlalweni we-United Rugby Championship (URC) UKUBHUBHUDLA kweHollywoodbets Sharks ngo 46-7 iBenetton yase-Italy emdlalweni owandulela owokugcina we-United Rugby Championship (URC) kuchazwe njengeholo labalandeli abawe bevuka naleli qembu laseThekwini, kule sizini, baphinda bathola nesithombe sokuthi liqhakaze kangakanani ikusasa lalo kumasizini ezayo. Lokhu kushiwo yinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiSharks u-JP Pietersen kulandela ingcwenga yomdlalo yize ubungasasho lutho. Kulo mdlalo kugqame abadlali abancane njengoJurenzo Julius. ISharks ishaye ama-try ayisishiyagalombili kulo mdlalo obashiye bechwaza abalandeli abebephume ngezinkani ngoMgqibelo ntambama, eHollywoodbets King’s Park Stadium, eThekwini. UPietersen othathe umsebenzi maphakathi nezizini kuJohn Plumtree, uzamile ukuyibuyisela emgqeni inqola kodwa kusemqoka nokukhumbula ukuthi kunesikhathi lapho eke waphoqeleka khona ukudlala ngaphandle kwabadlali abangu-22 abebelimele. UJulius owaqokwa kowe-Junior Springbok Player of The Year ngesizini edlule ushayele iSharks ama-try amathathu. Ubegqamile kulo mdlalo noZekhethelo Siyaya oneminyaka engu-18 osuswe kwi-fullback wafakwa kwi-flyhalf nakhona wafika wagqama. “Umuntu oqalayo ukusibona sidlala angazitshela ukuthi sisembangwnei wesicoco kanti lutho, sibe nomdlalo omuhle kwisizini ebinezingqinamba eizningi,” kusho uPietersen ethimbeni labezindaba leSharks. “Okwehla kahle nakakhulu ukuthi sibaholele abalandeli bethu abahlale benathi noma sekusobala ukuthi kasenzi ngendlela efanele ukwesekwa yibona. “Ngiyafisa ukuthi baqhubeke nokwenza lokhu kodwa nginethemba lokhuthi abakubone kulo mdlalo kubakhuthazile ngokungazuzwa yiqembu kumasizini ezayo. “Badlale kahle abafana abancane abaningi. Ngifisa ukuthi lokhu kungagcini ngokukhuthaza bona (abadlali) kepha kuvukuze okuthile kubalandeli ngoba bebona ukuthi liqhakaze kangakanani ikusasa leSharks ngokwabadlali abancane esinabo emabhukwini,” kusho uPietersen. Amanye ama-try eSharks shaywe nguSiya Kolisi, Andre Esterhuizen, Edwill van der Merwe noLitelihe Bester.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, akakungabazi ukuthi iqembu lakhe lizoba ngompetha beBetway Premiership UMPHUMELA ophambene nobulindeleke kwi-Orlando Pirates, eyeke ithuba lokudla isicoco seBetway Premiership ngokucazelana ngamaphuzu neDurban City, uwubufakazi obuqanda ikhanda bokuthi unesisindo esingakanani emahlombe abadlali umthwalo wokuqeda indlala yeminyaka engu-14 leli qembu laseSoweto, lingasazi isicoco seligi. Lawa ngamazwi omqeqeshi wePirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, kulandela ukucazelana ngamaphuzu ngo 0-0 neDurban City ngoMgqibelo, e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto. IBucs ifike kulo mdlalo owandulela owokugcina wesizini idinga amaphuzu amathathu ukuze izoqhwakela esicongweni se-log kwazise ivunwa yizibalo zamagoli uma uyiqhathanisa neMamelodi Sundowns eqhwakele kodwa esiyidlale yonke eyayo. Lo mphumela uphoqa iPirates ukuba ingabuyi nokunye ngaphadle kwewini emdlalweni wayo wokusonga isizini ne-Orbit College FC ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Omunye umphumela ngaphandle kwewini kwi-Orbit, ungasho ukuqhubeka kwendlala yesicoco seligi yeminyaka engu-14 kwiPirates, iSundowns iqukule isicoco seligi okwesishiyagalolunye kulandelana. Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba abenesithangami nabo emuva komdlalo, u-Ouaddou uqinise idolo abalandeli bePirates ngokuthi iphupho labo kalifile kepha lihlehlile. “Bekusohlelweni ukuqedela umsebenzi phambi kwabalandeli bethu kodwa kwangenzeka okuyinto okufanele siyamukele,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Ngabe ngikhuluma iphutha uma ngikufihla ukuphhoxeka kwami kodwa futhi kungiqinisa idolo ukuthi sinethuba lokuwuqedela ekuhambeni umsebenzi. “Okwenzeke kithina kufana nokuhlehla komcimbi. Akuwona umdlalo okulula ukuba yingxenye yawo ngisho ngabe ungumqeqeshi yingakho ngingakwazi ukugxeka abadlali bami. “Iminyaka engu-14 ngaphandle kwesicoco seligi iyasinda emahlombe. “Konke ebesikucele kubadlali bakwenze ngendlela ngakho-ke umyalezo engingawuthumela kubalandeli ukuthi iphupho kalifile futhi nakanjani sizokwenza okufanele emdlalweni wokugcina." Lo mqeqeshi osethubeni lokudla izicoco ezintathu ngesizini yakhe yokuqala kwiPirates, uvale isithangami ngokuqhakambisa ubumqoka bokuqonda ukukhula kweligi yaseMzansi njengoba kuzoze kucace ngosuku lokugcina ukuthi iyakuphi. “Kuhle ngoba sengikusho kaningi phambilini ukuthi isizini ingase icace ngosuku lokugcina okuwubufakazi bokukhula ngesivinini kweligi yaseNingizimu Afrika. “Kumasizini adlule bekucaca kusasele inqwaba yemidlalo ukuthi siya kuphi isicoco ngakho-ke okwenzeke (kule sizini), kufanele kushayelwe ihlombe ngoba kukhombisa ukukhula kwamaqembu esigaba esikhulu sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika,” kusho u-Ouaddou.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City, uPitso Dladla, nowe-TS Galaxy, uBernard Parker, okuyibona abazobe behola la maqembu kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup kusihlwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane NGAPHANDLE kokuthi ukufinyelela kweDurban City kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup yinto ebingacatshangwa yiningi lezingqapheli nabathandi bebhola jikelele baseNingizimu Afrika njengoba kuyisizini yayo yokuqala esigabeni seBetway Premiership, kungase kube yingqophamlando nakumqeqeshi wayo imbala, uPitso Dladla. UDladla (47), ongumqeqeshi osabambile kwiCity, uzohlala ebhentshini njengenhloko yabaqeqeshi njengoba bezobhekana ne-TS Galaxy kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup namuhla ngo-6 ntambama, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Lo mqeqeshi ubanjiswe izintambo zokuqeqesha ekuqaleni kukaFebhuwari ngemuva kokuxoshwa kukaSinethemba Badela. Usethubeni lokuba ngumqeqeshi waKwaZulu-Natal ozoqeda isomiso seminyaka engu-16 sezindebe emaqenjini akulesi sifundazwe. Usethubeni futhi lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waleli qembu laseThekwini ozonqoba indebe kwiPremiership. “Asizikhathazi ngemidlalo yethu emithathu esingenzanga kahle kuyona ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo wamanqamu esizowudlala ne-TS Galaxy. Umdlalo womkhumulajezi wehlukile kunomdlalo weligi, ngakho umdlalo wamanqamu esiya kuwo sizowuthatha ngendlela ehlukile,” kusho uDladla. Emidlalweni emine yePremiership ngaphambi kowamanqamu wePremiership, iCitizens ihlulwe yiMamelodi Sundowns, Lamontville Golden Arrows neMagesi FC, ngaphambi kokudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 ne-Orbit College. “Ukufinyelela kwethu lapho esikhona manje (kowamanqamu) akukhona okwami kuphela, kodwa kungenxa yokubambisana ethimbeni lethu labaqeqeshi engibala kulo u-Ashraf Hendricks noRowen Fernandez. Kithi lo mdlalo wamanqamu mukhulu kuneqembu ngoba asimele iDurban City nje kuphele kodwa simele idolobha iTheku nesifundazwe sonke iKwaZulu-Natal. Ukwesekwa esikuthola eMnyangweni wezeMidlalo esifundazweni oholwa uMntomuhle Khawula, kuyisikhuthazi esikhulu kithina njengoba ethembise ukukhipha  amabhasi azothwala abalandeli abazoseseka benze inkundla iPeter Mokaba ifane nenkundla yethu yasekhaya iChatsworth Stadium.” UMDLALI wasezinhlangothini, uSamkelo Maseko, ngomunye wabazothwala amathemba aleli qembu uma selibhekene neTS Galaxy emdlalweni wamanqamu weTS Galaxy ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, namuhla. UDladla odabuka eHambanathi, oThongathi, ungomunye wabaqeqeshi asebeqeqeshe kuzo zonke izigaba zebhola eNingizimu kusukela kwezama-amesha kuze kufinyelele kwesikhokhelayo sePremier Soccer League (PSL). Ngesizini ka-2016/17 wayeqeqesha noRonnie Gabriel uThongathi FC  ludla isicoco sikazwelonke seSafa ABC Motsepe League, lwakhushulelwa kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Ngemuva kwamasizini amane eqeqesha esigabeni seMotsepe Championship, ngesizini ka-2021/22 wanqoba isicoco seligi neRichards Bay FC esebenza naye uGabriel. Ngesizini edlule ubesethimbeni labaqeqeshi leCitizens ngesikhathi inqoba isicoco seMotsepe Championship eyiphini likaSimo Dladla. Nakuba eseyibamba-mqeqeshi kuleli qembu kodwa uliqonda kangcono kwazise usehlale kulona amasizini amathathu. Lokhu kumbeka ethubeni elihle lokulinqobela isicoco, aziqophele umlando wokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waKwaZulu-Natal ozonqoba iNedbank Cup okuyindebe engakaze itholwe yiqembu lakulesi sifundazwe kusukela ngo-1971 umqhudelwano usabizwa nge-Life Challenge Cup. ICity efudukele eThekwini ngesizini edlule ka-2024/25, seyike yafinyelela kowamanqamu eNedbank ngesizini ka-2017/18, isaziwa ngeMaritzburg United, yaguqiswa kowamanqamu ngo 1-0 yiFree State Stars. IGalaxy nethuba lomunye umlando IGalaxy yaKwaNdebele, eMpumalanga, yaqopha umlando ngesizini ka-2018/19 iba yiqembu lokuqala elalidlala esigabeni seNational First Division (esiyiMotsepe Championship) eliqukule indebe yeNedbank ngokuguqisa iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu. Isethubeni lomunye umlando kowanamuhla wamanqamu. Leli qembu liya kowamanqamu liholwa wuBernard Parker njengebamba lomqeqeshi, kulandela ukukhonjwa indlela kuka-Adnan Beganovic onganqobanga nowokubika umdlalo kwengu-11 yakamuva. Nokho, njengoba kuyinto eyaziwayo ukuthi umdlalo womkhumulajezi nowamanqamu uvamise ukuyintshinga ngewindi ifomu yeligi, kungemangaze ukuvuka inja ebomvu kwaleli qembu. UParker, owazakhela igama esengumgadli ovutha uphondo kwiChiefs eminyakeni embalwa edlule, naye usethubeni lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngesicoco sakhe sokuqala njengomqeqeshi uma kwenzeka i-The Rockets iphakamisa iNedbank. Ukubeke ngokucacile ukuthi akayifakile emqondweni wakhe eyokuqashwa ngokugcwele kodwa ugxile emsebenzini asanikwe wona njengamanje wokuhola iqembu. “Angikakucabangi lokho. Okwami wukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngenza lo msebenzi engisanikwe wona ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngiwenza kangcono nangokusemandleni ukufaka umoya wokulwela impumelelo kubadlali. Kungenzeka noma yini kowamanqamu,” kusho uParker owanqoba iNedbank Cup esagijima kwiChiefs. “Njengomqeqeshi osemncane, ngiyafunda usuku nosuku. Luselude uhambo engisazoluhamba kule ndima yokuqeqesha. Ngakho asikho isidingo sokuxhamazela, okumqoka nje wukusebenzisa ithuba enginikwe lona.” Isithombe ISIKHWISHIKHWISHI se-TS Galaxy, uSeluleko Mahlambi

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UTEBOHO Mokoena okhonjwe nguTeko Modise njengokhiye weBafana Bafana kwiNdebe yoMhlaba OMUNYE wabadlali ababethwele amathemba eBafana Bafana kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa yango-2010 eMzansi, uTeko Modise, ukhombe ifomu kaTeboho Mokoena weMamelodi Sundowns njengokhiye waleli qembu lesizwe wokugwema ukubalwa namazwe aphume ekuseni ekubeni umqhudelwano unamazwe angu-48. IBafana ifakwe ku-Group A walo mqhudelwano osekusele amasonto ambalwa ukuthi uqale eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). Ngaphandle kobunzima beqoqo, iBafana iyona evula umqhudelwano ngokubhekana nosokhaya iMexico ngoJuni 11 e-Azteca Stadium, eMexico City. Emuva kwalokho, izobhekana neSouth Korea, ivale iqoqo neCzech Republic. Njengoba iNdebe yoMhlaba inamaqembu angu-48 okokuqala emlandweni, kusho ukuthi kwandiswe ngamazwe angu-16 esibalweni esejwayelekile. Lokhu kuzitolika ngokuthi azokuba ngu-12 amaqoqo esewonke, bese kuthi amazwe amabili aqede phezulu kuwona (amaqoqo) adlulele kwi-last 32. Kuzophinde kugcwaliswe ngamanye amazwe ayisishiyagalombili azoqeda esendaweni yesithathu ngezibalo ezingcono. UModise, obekhuluma ohlelweni lwakwaSuperSport lokukhangisa ngeNdebe yoMhlaba ngoLwesibili, ubegxilile ekutheni iBafana inethuba njengoba kuzodlula amazwe amathathu eqoqweni. “Kangingabazi ukuthi iBafana izodlulela kwi-last 32 kodwa konke kulele ekutheni singakuvumeli ukuthi umqhudelwano usijike endleleni esifuna ukudlala ngayo,” kusho uModise. “Uma sizovumelana ngokuthi konke sizokwenza ngendlela esiyijwayele kuyofana nokuthi siyavumelana ukuthi uMokoena nguyena ukhiye. “UMokoena nguyena injini yeBafana kulo mqhudelwano kwazise lo msebenzi uwenza ngempumelelo kwiSundowns emidlalweni emqoka nesezingeni lomhlaba neBafana. “Ukhiye weBafana ulele kuMokoena ngoba ukuba semdlalweni kwakhe kuvusa abadlali abafana no-Oswin (Appollis) noLyle (Foster) ukuthi bakwazi ukusebenzisa ijubane labo. “Unamaphasi amahle kanti sonke siyazi ukuthi ithuba lokushayela ipali akaliyeki. Sengiyibuke kaningi iBafana neSundowns ngokwahlukana, yingakho ngiphuma noMokoena njengokhiye wethu wokusidlulisa kuleli qoqo. “Anzima amaqembu esiqhathwe nawo kodwa lokhu ngeke kuwenze ukuthi asizele ngobuso ngoba abadlali abahlanganisa naye uMokoena, bangabanye babahlonishwayo emhlabeni ngamagalelo abo."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KWESOKUNXELE, nguMnuz Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala obewukhumbintethe namaphoyisa asolwa nawo ecaleni lethenda yezigidi zamaradi ayeyithole kwiSAPS. Kuvela ukuthi uMatlala angase alivume leli cala awumshungu kulo noMkhuzi wamaPhoyisa onikwe ikhefu, uGeneral Fannie Masemola ANGASE alivume icala usomabhizinisi, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala, oboshwe kanye noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa omisiwe, uGeneral Fannie Masemola. UMbuso uveze ukuthi kunezingxoxo eziqhubekayo ezingaholela ekutheni uMatlala avume icala elithinta ithenda yezigidi zamarandi eyanikwa inkampani yakhe. UMatlala, Masemola namanye amaphoyisa angu-12 athinteka ekukhishweni kwethenda ka-R360 million, bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, izolo. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uJune 26, ukuze kuqedelwe uphenyo. Abameli bakaMatlala bacele inkantolo ukuba ikhiphe umyalelo wokuthi uMatlala aqhubeke nokugcinwa ejele elisePitoli, iKgosi Mampuru II, esikhundleni sokubuyiselwa ejele eliKwaZulu-Natal, iBongweni. Abameli bakaMatlala bathe ukugcinwa kwakhe eKgosi Mampuru II kuzokwenza ukuthi kube lula ukuthi balungiselele icala ngenxa yokuthi ijele liseduze nalapho kuqulwa khona icala. Umshushisi, u-Advocate Santhos Manilall, uthe abaphikisani nesicelo sabameli bakaMatlala. UManilall uthe ukugcinwa kukaMatlala eKgosi Mampuru II kuzokwenza ukuthi kube lula ukuqhubeka nezingxoxo. "Izingxoxo sezifinyelele kwesinye isigaba, kungenzeka siqale izingxoxo zokuthi uMatlala avume icala. Kungaba kuhle kakhulu uma engaqhubeka atoke eKgosi Mampuru." Okhulumela inhlangano yezokushushisa, iNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA), uMnuz Kaizer Kganyago, uthe kunobufakazi obusha ababutholile ngalolu daba. "Sifuna ukuqinisekisa lobu bufakazi obusha esibutholile. Sifuna ukubheka kahle izitatimende zokusebenza kwezimali." UMatlala uphinde abhekane noxhaxha lwamacala okukhona kuwo nawokuzama ukubulala. Igama likaMatlala livela ezinsolweni ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. Bekumatasa ezinkantolo izolo, amacala athinta abantu amagama abo avela phambi kweKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga. Usomatekisi odumile, uMnuz Joe "Ferrari" Sibanyoni, uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga, izolo. USibanyoni uboshelwe icala lokufuna ngodli imali kusomabhizinisi. Ekhuluma nabezindaba, uSibanyoni uthe umsulwa. "Ngiyinceku kaNkulunkulu mina." USibanyoni uthe uzoshumayela ivangeli ejele njengoba eboshiwe. Uboshwe kanye noMnuz Mvimbi Masilela noMnuz Philemon Msiza. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uLwesihlanu. Imenenja kaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, nesikhulu sophiko lwamaphoyisa omkhandlu esimisiwe, uMnuz Julius Mkhwanazi, bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg. ULerutla noMkhwanazi babhekene namacala enkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uJuni 9. Umholi weqembu iNational Coloured Congress, uMnuz Fadiel Adams, ubevele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown. U-Adams ubhekene necala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Izolo uqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, icala lahlehliselwa uLwesihlanu.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULIi wowokholo uThinah Zungu nonina uLindiwe MaMbonambi Zungu NJENGOBA ngeSonto kugujwa uSuku loMama, osaziwayo abahlukene bafisele onina nenzalabantu usuku oluhle. Labo saziwayo ngumlingisi woZalo, uNothando Ngcobo odlala indawo kaHlelo, umculi wowokholo uThinah Zungu, yimbongi uSbo Da Poet nomsakazi weGagasi FM uDJ Happy Gal. Nothando Ngcobo ozalwa wuPrincess “MaPri” Ngcobo Ngikufisela usuku oluhle lomama, ma (Princess “MaPri” Ngcobo). Ngiyabonga ngokuba wumama omangalisayo. Akekho omunye umzali ongcono ebengingamcela kuNkulunkulu. Ulokhu uyidwala kimi nasezinganeni zakwethu futhi wasibumba saba munye njengomndeni. Siyabonga kakhulu ngothando lwakho nobumnene bakho. Sengathi uNkulunkulu angaqhubeka akubusise nemisebenzi yakho. Ngiyakuthanda mama. UMLINGISI uNothando Ngcobo nonina uPrincess "MaPri" Ngcobo Thinah Zungu ozalwa wuLindiwe MaMbonambi Zungu Ngifisela omama uSuku loMama oluhle. Sibonga izimfundiso zabo ngoba ziyavela manje. Sibonga ukusithwala izinyanga eziyisishiyagalolunye. Ubona isizwe sisikhulu kangaka nje omama abenza isiqiniseko sokuthi bayayikhathula indima yokusikhulisa. Ngibafisela usuku oluhle, uNkulunkulu ababusise. Siyabathanda kakhulu sengathi uNkulunkulu angabagcina ebaphe eminye iminyaka bebone yonke impumelelo yethu besaphila. Yilokho engikufisayo. IMBONGI uSbo Da Poet nonina uNonhlah Mbutho Sibonelo “Sbo Da Poet” Mbutho nomyalezo kuNonhlanhla Mbutho Ngiyohlezi ngimbonga umama ngokusikhulisa kahle wasifundisa inhlonipho nokwesaba uNkulunkulu. Konke engikuzamayo ngizama ukujabulisa yena. Ngemuva ngokushona kukababa sisebancane, wasifukamela lo mama nezingane zasekhaya. Wasiphilisa impilo emnandi esipha uthando sonke. Namhlanje noma siphumela ebantwini siphuma nezimfundiso nothando. Omama ngempela bayinjini yekhaya, basinika imfudumalo nesibindi sokuphuma siyobhekana nomhlaba. Usuku okuhle komama bonke, inzalabantu. Izikhukhukazi zezwe. UDJ Happy Gal nonina uBusisiwe MaXulu Ndlovu Happiness “DJ Happy Gal” Ndlovu nomyalezo kanina uBusisiwe MaXulu Ndlovu Ngifisela bonke omama usuku oluhle nomama wami ongizalayo. Ngibonga izimfundiso zakho esezingenze ngaba wumuntu engiwuye namhlanje. Ngibonga ukuba ugogo oqotho nonothando ezinganeni zami. UNkulunkulu angigcinele wena. Ube nosuku lomama oluhle.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kubikwa ukuthi zimkhalele ephuma kwikhomishini kaMadlanga uBrown Mogotsi. Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers Kubikwa ukuthi zimkhalele ephuma kwikhomishini uBrown Mogotsi ngoLwesihlanu ntambama. Kuthiwa uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseGoli ngoMsombuluko. UMogotsi uboshwe yithimba lamaphoyisa eSAPS ngesikhathi eshayela esuka ePitoli elibangise eGoli - cishe imizuzu engu-45 ephumile kwikhomishini, nalapho echithe cishe amahora amane ephekwa ngemibuzo. Ngesikhathi ethula ubufakazi, uMogotsi ubelokhu ephindelela ukuthi ubengafuni “ukuzifaka icala” ngesikhathi ecindezelwa ngumholi wobufakazi kanye namakhomishana ngezinto eziningi ezibalulekile. Amaphoyisa akuqinisekisile ukuthi kukhishwe incwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa kwakhe i-J50 ngokuphula umthetho. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa, leli cala lisukela ecaleni lokuzama ukubulala uMogotsi eVosloorus ngoNovemba nyakenye. Abaphenyi bathi isigameko sokudubula sahlelelwa ngamabomu ukuze kwakhiwe isithombe sokuthi uMogotsi wayekhonjwe indlela.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-DJ Whitesoul osezakhele udumo ngokudijeya ebe egijima UHLANGANISE uthando lomculo nokugijima uDJ Whitesoul osezakhele igama ngokudansisa abagijimi naye ebe ededela ijubane nabo. UWhitesoul ogama lakhe langempela nguThabo Mkhize (28), useteketiswa ngelika-Running DJ ngenxa yokwenza okungajwayelekile okuwukudijeya ebe egijima. "Ukuthanda abantu nokubagqugquzela ngomculo yikho okungibeke lapha. NjengoDJ ngithe angihluke ngikwenze ngigijima," kusho uWhitesoul. Lo DJ odabuka KwaMakhutha, eThekwini, uthe lesi kube yisinqumo asithathe emuva kokuhlaba ikhefu emculweni eminyakeni edlule. "Umculo ngiwuqale ngikhula ngidijeya ngisebenzisa i-laptop. Kuqhubekile ngokuhamba kweminyaka ngagcina sengidlale emicimbini kaDogg DBN, iWine Wednesday, ngivulela o-DJ abakhulu. Kuthe uma kufa ikhompyutha yami ngavele ngaphela uthando," kusho uWhitesoul. Uthe ngesikhathi somvalelandlini ngenxa yokubheduka kwegciwane iCovid-19, kukhona uDJ waphesheya ambona edijeya ebe ehamba. Yingaleso sikhathi futhi naye lapho aqala khona ukugijima. "Ngazibuza ukuthi ngingenza kanjani ukuthi abantu balalele ama-mix ami. Ngonyaka odlule sengifuna ukubuya emculweni, ngakhumbula ukuthi nginombono okungekho muntu owenzayo e-Afrika, ngaqala kanjalo." Muva nje, uqede ukugijima u-10km kwiDurban International Marathon. Unokubonakala uma kunamaqembu aziqeqeshayo egijima nawo ebe edlala. "Umbuzo engihlale ngiwuthola wukuthi ayisindi yini le nto? U-20kg uyini uma ngingakwazi ukugqugquzela ngomculo umuntu osuke ebhekene nobunzima bokugijima esecabanga nokuphosa ithawula?" UWhitesoul ophinde abe nebhizinisi lokugaya izikhangiso nokumaketha, i-Advanced Prints, uthe ngenxa yokugijima useshintshe impilo njengoba engaselona uvanzi njengakuqala.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni UMA kubalwa izintokazi ezifike kwezwakala emculweni nyakenye, alisali ngaphandle igama lentokazi yaseMlaza, eningizimu yeTheku - uDe Rose ongelinye lamaciko afike kwezwakala, egila izimanga ngengoma ethi Lutho ekwi-albhmau kaDJ Jaivane ethi Onkgopotse. Ngale kwe-Lutho edayise ama-stream angaphezu kwa-50 million, uDe Rose ungenise futhi ngengoma yakhe noSfarzo ethi Hello, nayo eyenze kahle idayisa i-platinum eliphindwe kabili, futhi wenza kahle nange-albhamu yakhe yokuqala ephume ngoNovemba nyakenye ethi 925. Elandisa ngokumsize ukufeza konke lokhu esikhathini esifishaane esemculweni futhi eyiciko lesifazane, uthe usizwe wukuthi uziveze ngendlela ehlukile kunamanye amaciko njengoba yena ecula ngesigqi esiyinhlanganisela yeRn’B ne-Hip-Hop, okwenza ukuthi ehluke kwabanye. “Lokho kwenza ukuthi ngizwakale ngendlela eyehlukile kokujwayelekile, kangangokuthi baningi abantu abavame ukungibuza ukuthi ngake ngaba wumrepha yini, okukhomba ukuthi indlela engicula ngayo ayifani nhlobo nabajwayele ukukulalela emculweni,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni Eqhuba, uDe Rose uthe okunye akuqikelelayo wukuthi noma ngabe ucula ingoma enomyalezo ongaqondene nye ngqo, kepha kumele umyalezo wayo uqine futhi ube nesisindo - okuthola indawo ekhethekile endlebeni nasemqondweni womlaleli. “Kufana nakule ngoma ethi Lutho, equkethe umyalezo ongangithinti kangako, kepha ngoba ngangazi ukuthi kukhona umuntu ozomthinta - ngavumela ukuthi ngibe sesimweni salowo myalezo ewuqukethe ukuze ngizokwenza ubulungiswa kuyona,” kulanda yena. Uthe uzimisele ukuqhubeka akhele kulokhu asekuzuzile manje ngomculo wakhe ukusiza ukucaba indlela yokufeza okunye okukhulu, nokuzomsiza ukukhula nokuchuma endimeni. UDe Rose igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuThandeka Cele, kanti kumanje usematheni ngengoma yakhe entsha eshaya ngesigqi seHip-Hop ethi Easy, apike kuyona oBlue Pappi noLowfeye. Usesebenze nenqwaba yamaciko okubalwa kuwona oFrank Mabeat, uTycoon, uBabalwa M, uSino Msolo, uKelvin Momo, uNomfundo Moh, uTyler ICU, iMurumba Pitch, uSoa Mattrix, uCnethemba Gonelo, uStixx, uSam Deep no-Omit ST ukukha nje phezulu.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa ashaqe impahla ongumbombayi eGoli I-SAPS e-Gauteng ishaqe izimpahla zomgunyathi ezibiza cishe u-R23m ngesikhathi somkhankaso wezinhlaka eziningi ohlose ukuqeda izimpahla eziwumkokotelo kanye nezingekho emthethweni endaweni edolobheni laseGoli ngoLwesihlanu. Lo mkhankaso ubudidiyelwe uphiko oluphenya izimpahla zomgunyathi lwaseGauteng ngokwesekwa ngamaphoyisa asemngceleni, Public Order Policing (POP), uphiko lwezobugebengu bezohwebo, abavikeli bemikhiqizo kanye nophiko lwezentela lwaseNingizimu Afrika (i-SARS). Impahla eshaqwe amaphoyisa enkabeni yedolobha eGoli Amathimba abomthetho abehamba ehlola amabhizinisi asenkabeni yedolobha ukuthi ayayithobela yini imithetho. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso kuhanjelwe izitolo ezingu-23 zaseshwa nokuholele ekutheni kuthathwe izimpahla nezicathulo zomgunyathi ezingu-27 058. Impahla ezishaqiwr zenani elilinganiselwa ku-R23m. Ama-ejensi okuqinisekisa ukuthotshelwa komthetho azoqhubeka nokuqinisa imisebenzi yokuthobela kanye nokuphoqelela ukuthotshelwa kwemithetho kulo lonke elaseGauteng ukuze kuliwe nezenzo zobugebengu ezihlobene nezimpahla zomgunyathi nezingekho emthethweni. Amateki kanokusho awasalanga

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe INSEPHE yaseNingizimu Afrika ka-400m, uZakithi Nene, owenze ezibukwayo eqopha irekhodi elisha lika-400m emjahweni wase-Italy, iPegaso Meeting, ngempelasonto INSEPHE ka-400m yaseNingizimu Afrika, uZakithi Nene, yenze ezibukwayo iqopha irekhodi elisha lika-400m kwabesilisa emjahweni i-Pegaso Meeting, eStadio Luigi Ridolfi, eFlorence, e-Italy, ngempelasonto. Uqophe isikhathi esiwu-44.44 seconds, eshiya uLapo Bianciardi wase-Italy, olale isibili ngesikhathi esiwu-46.01. UNene (28) odabuka eMnambithi, ukhipha unyawo kulo mjaho wase-Italy nje, akukapholi maseko ebambe iqhaza empumelelweni yeqembu laseNingizimu Afrika lika-4x400 le-relay elibuye nendondo yesiliva kowe-World Athletics Relays, eGaborone, eBotswana, ngoMeyi 3. “I-Italy inendawo ekhethekile enhliziyweni yami. Ngaqala khona lapha e-Italy ukugijima kwiDiamond League ngo-2021, eFlorence. Ngiyayijabulela imijaho yase-Italy ngenxa yomoya nokwesekwa okuqhamuka ezibukelini zakhona. Ngizizwa ngisefomini eyisimanga kusukela ngaqala ukugijima. Ngifuna ukuqhubeka ngigijime ngenze isikhathi esingaphakathi kuka-45 seconds ukuze ngikwazi ukuqhudelana nabagijimi abasezingeni eliphezulu emhlabeni,” kusho uNene, ecashunwa yi-WorldAthletics.com UNene ovutha engabaselwe kusukela kuqala u-2026, ngo-Ephreli udle umhlanganiso ku-400m emjahweni iKip Keino Classic, eNairobi, eKenya, ngesikhathi esiwu-44.50. Kanti nyakenye uqophe isikhathi sakhe (PB) esiwu-43.76 ethatha indawo yesihlanu kowe-World Athletics Ultimate Championships, eTokyo, eJapan. Ungomunye wezibabuli zabagijimi iNingizimu Afrika ezothembela kubona ekwenzeni kahle komunye umqhudelwano we-World Athletics Ultimate Championships, ozobanjelwa eBudapest, eHungary, ngoSepthemba. Khonamanjalo: Umjaho i-Absa Run Your City 10km uhlehlisiwe ngenxa yesimo sezulu esingesihle esifundazweni iWestern Cape. Lo mjaho womlenze wesibili webanga lika-10km obekulindeleke ubanjelwe eKapa, izolo ekuseni, ngoLwesihlanu kuthathwe isinqumo sokuthi uhlehliswe ngenxa yokuthi izangoma zezulu, bese ziqinisekise ukuthi idolobha iKapa nezindawo eziningi ezingaphansi kwesifundazwe iWestern Cape, zizohlaselwa ngumoya onamandla ngeSonto (izolo) ozolandelwa ngumsinga obandayo ngeSonto (namuhla). Umlenze wokuqala we-Absa Run ubanjelwe eGqeberha ngoMashi, wanqotshwa u-Adriaan Wildschutt, kwabesifazane kwaphuma phambili uBrenda Jepchirchir waseKenya.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IZULU Messengers izobe icula bukhoma kwiSicathamiya Concert ePlayhouse, ngoMeyi 30 BAFUNA ukuthi umculo wesicathamiya uvuleleke kubantu abaningi abahleli bekhonsathi ebizwa ngeSicathamiya Concert ezoba sePlayhouse, eThekwini, ngoMeyi 30. Lo mcimbi sekungokwesibili ukhona njengoba nangonyaka odlule waba ngenyanga efanayo. Umholi weqembu iZulu Messengers, uSikhumbuzo "Mavulakuvaliwe" Mhlongo, uthe bayiqala ngonyaka odlule ikhonsathi ngenhloso yokushintsha indlela isicathamiya esibukwa ngayo. "Sasifuna ukuthi isicathamiya sivele ukuthi naso singadlalwa njengeminye imiculo ngoba sidhlale siba khona ngokuqhudelana. Ngomcimbi wokuqala sasifuna ukubona ukuthi kungenzeka yini, ngenhlanhla waphumelela. IPlayhouse yabe isizibophezela ukuthi awubuye ngoba abantu bayawuthanda," kusho uMavulakuvaliwe. Uthe ucothoza - obuye waziwe ngokuthi yingomabusuku - usudume ngokuthi udlalwa ebusuku futhi nakhona amaqembu asuke encintisana, wathi yingakho umcimbi uqala ngo-2 emini ukushintsha lokho futhi uhehe nabantu abaningi. "Njengemizamo yokuheha igenge encane, imidlalo yethu sithanda ukuthi ingagcini ngokuthi ibe sebusuku kuphela kodwa nasemini ukuze izoba khona futhi iyithande. Ukhona nje omunye esiwuhlela eGlebe maduze ngoba senzela khona ukuthi igenge encane iyibone iqhubeke nayo ngoba ebusuku ayisitholi isikhathi sokuba khona. Sizama ukushintsha wona njalo umqondo wokuthi kumele kuhlanganwe ebusuku kuphela." Uthe ekhonsathini yasePlayhouse bashintshe izinto ngokuhlanganisa amaqembu amadala namasha. Phakathi kwakhona kubalwa iPomeroy Golden Stars, Zulu Messengers, Royal Messengers, Inkululeko, Kalabhayi Boy, oBen 10, Mlazi Temendous namanye. Uthe umcimbi awuwuphazamisi umncintiswano wesicathamiya wasePlayhouse wangoSepthemba. "Amathikithi asekhona futhi atholakala ngo-R100. Ungalithola ngisho emaqenjini azobe edlala futhi kuyokusiza lokho ngoba cishe ngoMsombuluko azobe esenyuka eba ngu-R150," kusho uMavulakuvaliwe. Amathikithi adayisa naseWebticket.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KULINDELWE izinkumbi zabathandi bobumnandi emcimbini wokwamukelwa kolale isithathu kwiMzansi Big Brother Season 6, uLindokuhle "Bravo B" Nsele. Le nsizwa yaseHlalankosi izobungazwa emcimbini iNongoma Big Night Music Festival eMcebo kaZulu Lodge KwaNongoma namhlanje. Kulo mcimbi kuzobe kunandisa uShenge WaseHlalankosi, Thokozani Langa, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Jumbo, Qwabe Twins, Mayoghurt, Gatsheni, uMzukulu, Ama-NND International, Mdumazi, Jaiva Zimnike, Njabulo Langa, Stabhilithi, Navigator, Mjolisi, Mashelela, Imfezemnyama, Mdabu Ngqulunga, Inkosi Yamagcokama, Mashampula, Cmbero, Mashwabana, Luve Dubezane, Magoqa Womdanso nabanye. Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi, uBingelela "Bings" Mpanza, uthe bazohlonipha uBravo B ngenxa yokuqhakambisa isifunda saseZululand, ikakhulukazi uNongoma. Uthe nakuba uBravo B engawudlanga umhlanganiso kulo mqhudelwano kodwa ukulala isithathu kwasho lukhulu emphakathini wangakubo. UBingelela uthe bafuna ukumamukela ngezandla ezifudumele nangenhlokomo ukuze abone ukuthi kubo useyiqhawe. Uthe nakuba  bemfihlele induku emqubeni ngesipho kodwa unxusa abafuna ukumgixabeza ngezipho ukuba baziphathe ngalolu suku. Ubuye waveza ukuthi kulo mcimbi kuzobuye kuqwashiswe umphakathi ngokuhlukunyezwa kwabantu ngokobulili. UBingelela uthe amathikithi asatholakala ezitolo zakwaShoprite, Pick n Pay, Spar, Ticket Pro, Computicket naseWebTickets ngo-R100. Amanye azobe etholakala esangweni ngo-R150. Ubonge kakhulu abaxhasi balo mcimbi okukhona kubo neminyango kahulumeni.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT INTOKAZI eyathweswa isicoco sika-Miss DUT wango-2016, uDkt Lungile Ngcobo,  isiphonsele inselelo onobuhle abasebasha nabeza emva kwayo ukuba bangathembeli ebuhleni kuphela ukuze bafike empumelelwei, kepha bakhuthale baqinise kakhulu olwazini lwemfundo. UDkt Ngcobo usho njalo emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management emcimbini wokwethweswa iziqu izitshudeni zemikhakha ehlukene eDurban University of Technology (DUT), obukuleli sonto eMgungundlovu, KwaZulu-Natal. Lo zime kumanje ufundisa khona e-DUT lapho eqeqesha abafundi kwezezimali nezamabhizinisi ophikweni lwayo oluseMidlands. Uthe ubheke ukuqhubeka azihlomise ngolwazi lwezemfundo ukuze akhuthaze abanye onobuhle ebe ezisiza naye ngalolo lwazi empilweni yakhe. “Ukuthola lezi ziqu zobudokotela kungaphezu kokuphumelela ngemfundo kimina. Ngikufanisa nokufeza isithembiso seminyaka engasenza kimina uqobo ngo-2016 ngenkathi ngithola iziqu zami zokuqala ze-Diploma in Management, lapho engazitshela khona ukuthi akusekho lutho okungase kuphazamise uhambo lwami lwezemfundo,” kusho uDkt Ngcobo. INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT Lesi singqazu siqale ukufunda e-DUT ngo-2012 emkhakheni we-National Diploma in Management, okuthe ngo-2017 saqhubekela kwi-Bachelor of Technology in Management, kwase kuthi ngo-2021 senza iMaster of Management Sciences in Administration and Information Management. “Emva kokuphothula iMaster’s yami ngo-2023, ngashiya konke engangikwenza eNorth West ngaleso sikhathi, ngabuyela eMgungundlovu ngiyofunda, okwaba yisinqumo esingelula neze ngoba ngashiya phansi umsebenzi wami owawungiphethe kahle ngenzela ukufeza iphupho lami lokufunda ngigogode,” sisho kanje. Elandisa ngocwaningo lwezifundo zakhe, uDkt Ngcobo uthe ubegxile kakhulu ekubhekeni ukuthi ukunikezela ngolwazi oluseqophelweni eliphezulu kwabezikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kungazisiza kanjani futhi kangakanani izitshudeni ukuze zicijeke emqondweni futhi zikwazi ukuthatha izinqumo eziphusile ngempilo yazo. UDkt Ngcobo ubonge kakhulu abeHlomisa Skills Academy ngethuba abamnike lona lomfundaze omsize ukuphothula izifundo zakhe zobudokotela.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Armand Hough / Independent Newspapers IKHATHAZEKILE iKhomishini yezoKhetho, ngosopolitiki abatshala ungabazane emphakathini bafafaze amanga ngemiphumela yokhetho kuleli. IKhomishini ithe abenza lokhu bafaka abantu ingebhe ngokhetho oluzayo ngoNovemba 4, 2026. Okhulumela iKhomishini, uNkk Kate Bapela, uchithe izinsolo zomholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema, zokuthi iKhomishini yaphuca leli qembu amavoti okhethweni lwango-2024, yawapha i-ANC. Ubephendula izinsolo zikaMalema azenze ekhuluma kwenye yama-podcast, lapho ethe amavoti asesikhungweni avota kusona okuyisikole iMponegele Primary ePolokwane, ashintshwa anikwa i-ANC. "Siyakuchitha okushiwo uMalema njengoba imiphumela eyayiphanyekwe kulesi sikhungo, ihambisana ncamashi naleyo esesikhungweni semiphumela. Lezi zinsolo zizokwehlisa ithemba emphakathini ngokhetho. Ziletha nongabazane kubantu ngemiphumela yokhetho. Azilona iqiniso lezi zinsolo," usho kanje. UNkk Bapela uthe imiphumela yokhetho ibalwa esikhungweni kukhona abamele amaqembu. "Kusuke kukhona nezingqapheli kanjalo nabamele amaqembu uma kubalwa imiphumela esikhungweni. Le miphumela isayinwa nabasuke bemele amaqembu." Uthe izikhulu zeKhomishini zizohlangana nabaholi be-EFF ngoLwesine. "Yilapho laba baholi silindele ukuthi baveze izikhalazo zabo. Lo mhlangano ucelwe yi-EFF kanti siqhubeka lapho sigcine khona njengoba sihlangana nezinhlaka ezehlukene ngezithinta amalungiselelo okhetho," kuqhuba uNkk Bapela. Uthe bahlale beyivulile iminyango emaqenjini ezepolitiki njengoba kunanekomiti elinawo wonke amaqembu lapho kubhungwa khona ngezinto ezishisa ibunzi ngezokhetho. Uveze ukuthi abafuni abantu ukuthi balahlekelwe ukwethemba iKhomishini. Akuyena kuphela uMalema okhala ngokubanjwa inkunzi okhethweni, kodwa neqembu iMKP likhala esifanayo. Umholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, usanda kuphakamisa ukuthi luhlehle ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ekhala ngokuthi ayikaxazululwa eyemiphumela yango-2024. IMKP neKhomishini baya enkantolo ngenyanga ezayo lapho kuzokakanywa lesi sikhalazo seMKP ngokhetho lwango-2024.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Melikhaya Ngcongo IBONA ukufunda kwezimeya kungaba yikhambi elingaqeda idimoni lokungalandelwa kwemigomo komasipala baKwaZulu-Natal iMeya kaMasipala waseRichmond esanda kuthweswa iziqu zemfundo ephakeme, uMnuz Melikhaya Ngcongo. UNgcongo uthe ukuncipha kwezimeya ezingaziboni izimpukane kuzokwenza ukuthi banciphe nomasipala abathola imibiko enogcobho. Ukusho lokhu engxoxweni abe nayo neSolezwe. UNgcongo usanda kuthweswa iziqu iPost Graduate Diploma in Public Management eNyuvesi yasePitoli. Umasipala awuphethe wenza kahle kakhulu ekuphathweni kwemali njengoba uyingxenye yomasipala abane baKwaZulu-Natal abathole imibiko engenagcobho ngonyaka odlule. Bekungunyaka wesibili umasipala uthola umbiko ongenawo ugcobho, kanti lona ngunyaka wesithathu uNgcongo esesihlalweni. UNgcongo uthe kuba lula ukuthi izikhulu zizenzele umathanda uma imeya ingayazi imithetho eyengamele ukusetshenziswa kwemali. "Uma uyimeya uwena ongusihlalo wekomiti lezezimali kumasipala. Uma imeya ingaziboni izimpukane kuzokonakala. Izikhulu zizozenzela umathanda. Ngeke sifunde sonke siyizimeya, kodwa labo ithuba elisavuma kubona kufanele baye kofunda. Uma uwumholi kufanele uwazi umsebenzi wezikhulu zomasipala kanye nemithetho ethinta ukuphathwa kwemikhandlu. Ugcina uvuma noma izikhulu sezenza izinto ezingalungile uma ungayazi imithetho." UNgcongo uthe izimeya kufanele ziqinisekise ukulandelwa kwemithetho uma zifuna ukuthola imibiko engenagcobho. "Ngeke uwuthole umbiko ongenagcobho uma ungathembekile. Kufanele uqashe abantu abawaziyo umsebenzi. Omasipala abaningi bathola imibiko enogcobho ngenxa yokuthi abayilandeli imigomo uma besebenzisa imali. Inkinga enkulu ilapha ophikweni okukhishwa kulo amathenda." UNgcongo uthe usaphokophele ukuthola ezinye iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "Uma uwumholi kubalulekile ukuthi uzithuthukise ngolwazi. Ngesikhathi ngiqokelwa ukuphatha umasipala ngo-2023 ngabona ukuthi kuningi engingakwazi mayelana nokuphathwa komasipala kanye nokusetshenziswa kwemali yomphakathi." UNgcongo uthe uyaqhubeka nezifundo zakhe njengoba manje esenza iMasters. Ebuzwa ukuthi ngabe ufisa ukufinyelela eziqwini zobudokotela yini uthe uzofinyelela uma iNkosi ivuma. UNgcongo uthe bekungelula ukuqhuba iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "NgesiZulu nje ngingathi ibingitibulisa, namanje ngisaqhubeka nokutibula ngoba ngisaqhubeka nokufunda. Akulula ukucaza isikhathi sakho njengoba bengifunda ngisebenza. Ukuzimisela kwami yikhona okwenze ukuthi ngigcine ngiphumelela."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: AKAXHAMAZELI uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, odabeni lwezinsolo ezibhekene noNgqongqoshe wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi kuleli, uNksz Sisisi Tolashe. UNksz Tolashe usolwa ngokudukisa iPhalamende odabeni lomnikelo wezimoto ezimbili ezanikelelwa uphiko lwabesifazane lwe-ANC, angumengameli walo. Kuthiwa lezi zimoto ezazinikelelwe lolu phiko, wazinika izingane zakhe. Kuthiwa akazange ayiveze indaba yazo ebuzwa ePhalamende. Izolo emhlanganweni wasePhalamende, uthe akazange ayiveze indaba yazo ngoba zazinikelelwe i-ANC Womens League. "Kunezinsolo zokuthi ngadukisa iPhalamende, okungelona iqiniso." Okhulumela uRamaphosa, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo eKapa, uthe umengameli uwutholile umbiko ngoNksz Tolashe. "Umengameli uwumuntu ongaxhamazeli, othatha isikhathi sakhe uma enza into. Uwutholile umbiko odabeni oluthinta izimoto, maduzane ngeke ngimangale uma ehlangana naye uNksz Tolashe," usho kanje. Umfelandawonye wezinyunyana iSaftu, uzwakalise ukukhathazeka ngezinsolo ezibhekiswe nguNksz Tolashe. Ibuze ukuthi kungani uRamaphosa engamthatheli izinyathelo ezinqala uNksz Tolashe? "ONgqongqoshe baqokwa ngumengameli. Kungani ke ethuli uRamaphosa odabeni lukaNksz Tolashe? Kumele asichazele ukuthi usamethemba yini uNksz Tolashe." Ithe kwayena uRamaphosa umanxebanxeba odabeni oluthinta ipulazi lakhe iPhala Phala yingakho engathathi zinyathelo. UMagwenya ebuzwa ngabanye ongqongqoshe ababonakala befambula emsebenzini wabo okubalwa uNksz Siviwe Gwarube emnyangweni weMfundo ePhakeme ojube uphenyo ngolwethenda yezincwadi, uthe akulindwe uphenyo. "Maduzane kuzomenyezelwa izinyathelo ngezinto ezithinta uhlelo lwamathenda okuthengwa kwempahla kuhulumeni. Kunenkinga enkulu eyagqanyiswa yayiKhomishini kaJaji Raymond Zondo kanjalo nekaMadlanga," kusho uMagwenya.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Osaziwayo benhlangano Imvelo Social Development NPC. Kusuka kwesokunxele uMenzi Biyela, Thembinkosi Thwala, Swazi Mokoena, Ndumiso Dlamini noShon G AFONGQE isigqoko acela uxhaso kunoma wubani ongawasiza amaciko aqhuba umkhankaso wokuqwashisa ngezihlava ezihlukene ezihlasele abantu abasha nokufundisa ngamakhono. La maciko anenhlangano ebizwa ngokuthi Imvelo Social Development NPC. Usihlalo wayo umlingisi woZalo uThembinkosi Thwala, isekela lakhe umrepha uMpumelelo "Shon G" Gumbi, unobhala jikelele umlingisi uNdumiso Dlamini kuthi uzakwabo ekulingiseni uSwazi Mokoena abe yiphini lakhe bese kuba nomlingisi uMenzi Biyela ongumgcinimafa. UMenzi, ongumsunguli wenhlangano, uthe ukukhwabanisa nenkohlakalo okwenzeka kuhulumeni yikho okwenza imali iphelele ezandleni igcine ingafinyeleli lapho idingeka khona kakhulu. "Sicela uhulumeni nezinkampani ezizimele bafake isandla kwesikwenzayo ukuzei abantu abasha babe nekusasa eliqhakazile. Asiceli kuhulumeni kuphela kodwa noma ngabe uyinkinsela enoshisanyama KwaMashu ungasixhasa," kusho uMenzi olingise emidlalweni eminingi okubalwa kuyo iThonga, Uzalo neminye. Uthe nyakenye baqale uhlelo lokuhambela ejele iWestville beyohlomisa iziboshwa ngamakhono kwezokulingisa, ukucula, nokuqondisa imidlalo. Uthe baqale ngephakethe labo kodwa bathola uxhaso lwabe-Arts and Living Cultures ukuze baqhubeke kuze kube wuMashi. Udalule ukuthi sebentula imali yokwenza umcimbi lapho iziboshwa abaziqeqeshile zizokhombisa khona ezikufundile. Ngesikhathi besalinde lokho,uMenzi uthe sebehambela izikole beqwashisa ngobubhoklolo, ukuhlukumeza ngokobulili, ukusetshenziswa kwezidakamizwa nokunye. Uthe sebehambele izikole abale kuzo iChesterville High School, Thokozamnganga High School eShongweni nePhambili High School eSeaview. NgoMsombuluko bazoya eManzibomvu Primary School nasoZabeni Primary School. "Sizohambela izikole ezingu-14 ezifake umnikelo zithi ziyakuthanda esikwenzayo zicela sifinyelele nakuzona. Akwenzeki mahhala esikwenzayo ngoba kumele sihlele okokuhamba nendawo yokulala." Udalule ukuthi bafuna ukubuyisa ezemidlalo ezikoleni ukuze abafundi babe nabakwenzayo bangachithi isizungu ngezidakamizwa. Uthe bafuna nokuthatha ama-theatre angasanakiwe eThekwini bawasebenzise ukuze intsha izicijwe ngamakhono.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz  Velenkosini Hlabisa ABAHOLI be-IFP okuthiwa abezwani, okunguMengameli weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa noSihlalo weqembu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, bakhulume ngezwi elilodwa, bekhuza uqhekeko iqembu lethula umkhankaso wokubhalisela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UHlabisa noNtuli baxwayise ngokuthi labo abadala uqhekeko bazophazamisa umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Bakusho lokhu ngesikhathi beshiyelana inkundla emcimbini obuseMpangeni. UHlabisa uhlabe wahlikiza labo abathi ngeke bazigqoke izikibha ezinobuso bakhe kanye nalabo abathi ngeke besazigqoka izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi. Amalungu e-IFP asanda kunikezwa ilungelo lokuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa kodwa kunamalungu eqembu angafuni ukufaka izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Kusanda kusabalala inkulumo yelungu leqembu, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, lapho lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa ngesikhathi likhuluma nelungu lesiShayamthetho elingusihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal omisiwe, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UHlabisa uthe ukuba uButhelezi usekhona ubezokuba owokuqala ukugqoka isikibha esinobuso bakhe. Image: Independent Newspapers Archives UHlabisa uthe uButhelezi wayefuna ukuthi kube nezikibha ezinobuso bakhe ngesikhathi kubhekwe okhethweni lwango-2019. Ngaleso sikhathi uHlabisa wayengakabi umholi weqembu, wayemele i-IFP embangweni wesikhundla sikandunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal. "Ngathi Shenge angikabi umholi weqembu, asikwazi ukuba nezikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ongeyena umholi weqembu. Ngathi asisebenzise ubuso obaziwa abantu." UHlabisa uthe nangokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2021, uButhelezi waphinda wenza isicelo esifanayo kodwa bamchitha ngenxa yokuthi umkhankaso wokhetho wasuke waphazanyiswa ukubheduka kobhubhane iCorona. "Ngaphambi kokhetho lwango-2024, uMntwana waphinde wenza isicelo esifanayo. Ngebhadi ke wabe esekhothama. Sabe sesinquma ukuthi siqhubeke nokusebenzisa ubuso bakhe okhethweni lwango-2024, njengendlela yokuqhakambisa amagalelo akhe. "Umuntu othi yena akasezokusigqoka isikibha soMntwana ngoba uthanda uHlabisa, ungumkhohlisi. Umuntu othi yena wethembeke kuMntwana, akazekusigqoka isikibha sikaHlabisa, ungumkhohlisi. UMntwana wathi uzokuba owokuqala ukugqoka esikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa. Wena ngapha uhamba utshela abantu ukuthi angeke usigqoke isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa." UNtuli uthe asikho isidingo sokuthi amalungu e-IFP alwe wodwa ngoba iqembu linomholi oyedwa okunguHlabisa, wanxusa onke amalungu eqembu ukuthi aseke uHlabisa. "Kubaluleliile ukuthi sonke seseke umengameli emsebenzini wakhe. Asikwazi ukwehlukana. Sinomholi oyedwa, asinabo abaholi ababili. SinePhini likamengameli elilodwa, asinawo amaphini kamengameli amabili. SinoSihlalo waKwaZulu-Natal oyedwa, asinabo osihlalo baKwaZulu-Natal ababili. "Ngiyafisa ukugcizelela lokhu. Njengoba siya okhethweni, uma silibele ukuklwebhana sodwa azosehlula amanye amaqembu. Uma silibele ukwehlukana, azosehlula amanye amaqembu. Noma ubani ohola umkhankaso wokwehlukanisa iqembu loyo muntu uyisitha seqembu.
