Noma ngabe ubani osebenzela ukugxeka umengameli weqembu, usihlalo waKwaZulu-Natal, noma imuphi umholi weqembu, loyo muntu uyisitha sobumbano lwe-IFP."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umsunguli we-IFP, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi UFA olubonakala kwi-IFP kufanele lubakhathaze abaholi beqembu. Iqembu elinezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo lijwayele ukuba inyoka ezidla yona. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengakukholwa lokho abobuza kwi-ANC. I-ANC ilahlekelwe amandla nje namhlanje kungenxa yemibango yangaphakathi. Ngesikhathi i-ANC iya engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi yango-2007 kwakunezinhlangothi ezimbili, olweseka uJacob Zuma, nolwalweseka uThabo Mbeki. Sekuwumlando ukuthi kwanqoba uZuma nokwalandela ukuthi ababeseka uMbeki bahlubuke beyoqala inhlangano entsha, iCongress of the People. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwabeseka uMbeki kwaba ukuthi kwehle ukweseka kwe-ANC okhethweni lwango-2009. Ezingqungqutheleni zokukhetha ubuholi be-ANC ezilandele eyango-2007 kuhlezi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo. Abasohlangothini oluhlulwayo bayaye behlubuke beqale amanye amaqembu njengoba i-ANC isizele amaqembu afana ne-EFF ne-MKP. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwala maqembu uzwakale kakhulu kwi-ANC okhethweni lwango-2024 njengoba yahluleka ukuthola amavoti anele ukubusa ngokuzimela kuzwelonke nasezifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal neGauteng. Abaholi be-IFP isike yabashaya le nduku Ngesikhathi owayengusihlalo we-IFP, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi, esungula iNFP, i-IFP yalahlekelwa inqwaba yomasipala okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2011. I-IFP yasala nomasipala ababili nje kuphela. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengabhekile ingase ibaphinde le nduku. Sekunesikhathi eside ikhulunyelwa phansi eyoqhekeko kwi-IFP. Mumva nje nengane encane isiyabona ukuthi kunomfantu onqabayo ukuvaleka nodalwa abathile abafuna ubuholi obehlukile ngaphakathi kwi-IFP. Lokhu kugqame kakhulu ngesikhathi kusabalala inkulumo eqoshiwe ephehla udlame yelungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal elinguSihlalo woPhiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule nkulumo uMaphisa ukhuluma nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Kule nkulumo uNksz Ndlovu ukhala ngokubanjwa ngophondo kohlangothi lwabo emhlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Yile nkulumo efakazela ukuthi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezinezifiso ezingefani. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi abaholi abasohlangothini lwabo bavinjwa nangamatshe emigwaqweni ukuze bengayi emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi akufanele abasohlangothini lwabo bavume ukudlala abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uze asho nokusho ukuthi kufanele bashaywe, 'bafokofiswe', labo abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa noNkk Ndlovu bamisiwe njengoba bebhekene nekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. Akuyona eyokuqala inkulumo eqoshiwe esike yasabalala. Phambilini kuke kwasabalala enkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi kuyo kukhuluma usomlomo woMasipala waseNewcastle, uMnuz Thengi Zulu. Kule nkulumo lomuntu okukholakala ukuthi uZulu uzwakala ecija itulo lokuthi bazoludlisela kanjani ogageni uhlangothi ababanga nalo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Kusukela umsunguli weqembu osakhothama, Inkosi Mangosuthu kaMathole Buthelezi, wabeka phansi izintambo ngo-2019, ibilokhu ikhulunyelwa phansi eyezinhlangothi ezibangayo kwi-IFP. Kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibhekene ngeziqu zamehlo olunye olubizwa ngama-AU (abusekho ubunzima) kanye nelibizwa ngamaKKK (konke kuhamba kahle). Ama-AU kuthiwa ahamba noHlabisa ama-KKK wona kuthiwa afuna kukhishwe uHlabisa esikhundleni. Izimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP zigqame kakhulu emva kokukhothama kukaButhelezi ngo-2023 futhi sekubona ngisho nengane encane ukuthi inkulu inkinga lapha. Iphini lomholi we-IFP, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, lisanda kuxwayisa ngokuthi iqembu alikulungele ukubhekana nomonakalo ozodalwa ilaba abagqugquzela uqhekeko eqenjini. Ikhuluma emcimbini obuseNquthu, Inkosi ithe baqala into abangeke bayimele laba abagqugquzela ukwehlukana eqenjini. "Le nto yethu yokuthi sibhekane sodwa izosilimaza kakhulu. Nginganitshela mina ngingabazi ukuthi njengeqembu asikulungele ukubhekana nomphumela wale nto esiyiqalayo. Angiphinde nginichazele, njengeqembu asikakasawoti ukuze sikwazi ukubhekana nalokhu esikuqala manje ukuba sikukhande. Ngamanye amanye amagama le nto yokuthi sibhekane sodwa, silwe sodwa, izosishaya isibhuqe nya. Siyophaphama ngakusasa kungekho kwalezihlalo esinazo." Emlandweni wayo weminyaka engu-51 i-IFP ayikaze ibhekane nezimpi zalolu hlobo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe akwethusi ukubona izimpi zangaphakathi ezifufusa kwi-IFP. "UMntwana uyena umuntu obeyibambile, ubeyinomfi. Siyazi ukuthi ukukhethwa kukaHlabisa akuhambisananga nenqubo ejwayelekile. UMntwana nje owakhomba uHlabisa. I-IFP ibanjwe isikhathi eside uMntwana, kunguyena oyi-glue. Njengoba engasekho ayisekho leyo glue ebiyihlanganisile." UNdlovu uthe okunye okudala uqhekeko kwi-IFP ukuthi sekunezikhundla kuhulumeni. "I-IFP isemandleni komasipala, kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, nakuhulumeni kazwelonke. Izikhundla zizobangwa ngoba wonke umuntu ufuna isinkwa. Kukhona abantu abangajabule ngenxa yokuthi bona abazitholanga izikhundla." UMENGAMELI we-IFP leader uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: Leon Lestrade / Independent Media

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele woSiyamthanda Nxumalo, Samkelo Ndlovu, Kay Sibiya noSimphiwe Ngema - abalingisa phambili emdlalweni omusha wakwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi UBUHLUNGU nesilonda esisala komama abondla izingane ngabodwana ngenxa yobaba abangondli yikhona okuzogqama kakhulu emdlalweni omfishane ozokhonjiswa kwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi, ozoqala ukukhonjiswa ngoMsombuluko ngo-7 kusihlwa. Kulo mdlalo ozokhonjiswa iziqephu ezintathu kuzogqama uMbali olingiswa wuSamkelo Ndlovu, ongumama okhulisa umntwana womfana ngayedwana. UMbali unebhizinisi lokuhlela imishado, okuthi ngokuqhubeka kwesikhathi ahlangane noyise wengane yakhe ongondli. Kuthi esemaphakathi nezinhlelo zokuhlela umshado, athole ukuthi ozoshada uyise wengane yakhe uMandla, olingiswa wuKay Sibiya, ozoshada noSophie - olingiswa uSimphiwe Ngema. Exoxa ngokulingisa kulo mdlalo, uSamkelo uthe iKuningi ixoxa indaba yobaba abangazondli izingane zabo, bese futhi ubeka obala ukuthi lokhu kubahlukumeza kangakanani abantu besifazane abasuke bebhekene nomthwalo wokukhulisa izingane zabo ngabodwana. USAMKELO NDLOVU, omunye wabalingisi abazogqama emdlalweni omusha wakwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi “Kuzovela futhi kucace ngokusobala ukuthi le nkinga inomthelela omubi kangakanani emphakathini, ikakhulu ngoba sekwaze kwajwayeleka ukuthi umuntu wesifazane okhulisa umntwana yedwa kuthiwa unamandla ekubeni elimala ngaphakathi,” usho kanje. Eqhuba uthe okunye akuthanda ngalo mdlalo wukuthi uveza futhi ugqamise ukuthi abantu besifazane kumele bazikhulumele, bangavumeli izimo ezinjena zibacindezele. “Baningi abesifazane abanjengoMbali emphakathini esiphila kuwona abalwela ukuthi abantwana babo baphile impilo engcono ngakho ngithemba ukuthi lo mdlalo uzokhuthaza nabanye ukuthi benze okufanayo ukuze kunqotshwe le nkinga ezweni,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKA kwesokunxele usomabhizinisi ne-podcaster u-Amahle-Imvelo Jaxa, umculi weRn'B uLloyiso Gijana, uPhiona Okumu noBryan Johnson beSpotify bekwesinye sezigcawu zokubhunga ngomculo nobuciko ebesiseRosebank, eGoli ngoLwesithathu Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE ILOKHU ikhule njalo inzuzo yemali eyenziwa amaciko akuleli zwe ngokulalelwa komculo wawo kwiSpotify. Izibalo zangonyaka odlule zikhombie ukuthi ukulalelwa komculo wawo kungenise imali ebalelwa ngaphezulu kuka-R504 million, okusho ukwenyuka ngo-28%. Lezi zibalo zihlaluke esigcawini seSpotify saminyaka yonke sokucobelelana ngolwazi lwezomculo nezobuciko  i-Loud & Clear, ebesisemahhovisi amasha eSpotify eRosebank, eGoli kuleli sonto. Njengoba iSpotify igubha iminyaka ewu-20 yasungulwa, okuhlanganisa neyisishiyagalombili yethulwa kuleli zwe kusuka ngo-2018, lezi zibalo zikhombise ukukhula okukhulu okukhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli enza kahle ngokulalelwa komculo wawo. I-Loud & Clear iwuhlelo lwale nkampani eyisizinda sokulalela umculo wamazwe ehlukene emhlabeni, nolwaqala ngo-2021 ngenhloso yokuveza obala izibalo ezikhomba ukuthi umculo wamaciko ulalelwa kangakanani nokuveza ukuthi inzuzo yenziwa kanjani ukuze kungabi nakudideka emacikweni afaka umculo kuyona. Okugqame embikweni walezi zibalo yilokhu okulandelayo: Umqondisi omkhulu weSpotify kwiSub-Saharan Africa, uJoceleyne Muhutu-Remy, uthe lezi zibalo zikhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli awagcini ngokukhula nje ngobuciko, kepha alokhu engenise njalo emhlabeni wonke. “Ukuphumelela kwawo kukhomba ukuthi ayinyama kangakanani emhlabeni jikelele, okuzothi uma kuqhubeka kanjena agcine esenezigidigidi zabalaleli emhlabeni jikelele futhi kuwavulele amathuba amakhulu,” usho kanje. UNgqongqoshe wezokuXhumana nezobuChwepheshe, uMnuz Solly Malatsi, esitatimendeni asithumele ukuze sifundwe kulo mbuthano - ubonge iSpotify ngokukhetha iNingizimu Afrika nangokukholelwa kuyona nasemacikweni emikhakha ehlukene enza kahle. Ugqugquzele ukuthi kuqhutshekwe kuhlonzwe ikhono lamaciko futhi kulekelelwe kakhulu lawo asebenzisa izilimi zawo zomdabu ebucikweni bawo, bese esizwa nangengqalasizinda ezowalekelela ukuze athuthuke..

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Video Assistant Referee Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX NAKUBA i-South African Football Association (Safa) isikuqinisekisile ukuthi i-Video Assistant Referee (VAR) izoqala ukusebenza ngesizini ezayo ka-2026/2027 emidlalweni yeBetway Premiership kodwa onompempe bayayichitha eyokuma ngomumo ekuqaleni ukusebenza kwalolu hlelo. Usihlalo wekomiti lemali kwiSafa, uMxolisi Sibam, ukuqinisekisile esithangamini nabezindaba ngempelasonto, ukuthi sebeyitholile imali engu-R20 million abayinikwe nguMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko oholwa nguNgqongqoshe, uGayton McKenzie, ukuze kuqale ukusebenza kwe-VAR emidlalweni yePremiership. Nyakenye, uMcKenzie uveze ukuthi konke sekusezandleni zeSafa. Ngokusho kukaSibam, iSafa izosebenzisana nePremier Soccer League (PSL) ukwethula lolu hlelo lobuchwepheshe be-VAR, abahlela ukuthi luqale ukusebenza ngesizini ezayo. “Uhulumeni usesinikezile u-R20 million wokuthi siqale uhlelo lwe-VAR. Imali isikhona ebhange futhi ngingakuqinisekisa ukuthi ikwi-akhawunti eseceleni engahlangene namanye asetshenziswa yiSafa. Kuzofanele silandele yonke imigomo nemibandela yeSafa nekahulumeni,” kusho uSibam. “INingizimu Afrika yiyona ehamba phambili ezwenikazini lase-Afrika ngakho asifuni ukusalela ngemuva uma sekuziwa kwi-VAR. Asevele asekhona amazwe amane lapha e-Afrika aseyiqalile ukuyisebenzisa i-VAR ngakho asifuni ukusala ngemuva. Sizibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi ukuthi i-VAR iba yinto ngempela kuleli zwe.” Kwenzeka lokhu nje, sekuyisikhathi abalandeli bebhola baseNingizimu Afrika nabaqeqeshi bekhala ngokwethulwa kwe-VAR ngenxa yezinqumo zonompempe ezishayisa amakhala kweminye imidlalo yePremiership. Omunye wonompempe asebemnkantshubomvu olumane indlebe neSolezwe ngalolu hlelo lwe-VAR okubikwa ukuthi lungase luqale ngesizini ezayo, ukufanisa nokugagamela okushiwo yiSafa ngokuqala kwalolu hlelo lwe-VAR ngesizini ezayo. “Kuyiphutha ukuthi sebekulungele (abeSafa nePSL) ukuqala kwe-VAR. Mhlawumbe bona ngabe bathi sebekulungele ukuqala ukufundisa onompempe ngokusebenza kwe-VAR, hhayi ukuthi onompempe sebeyilungele i-VAR. Bayisikhombisa kuphela onompempe abadlalisa kwi-PSL abasaqeqeshelwe ukusebenzisa i-VAR. Baningi abasadinga ukuqeqeshwa kulolu hlelo ngakho kusazothatha isikhathi impela. Kuthatha izinyanga eziyisithupha ukuqeqesha onompempe ngolwazi lwe-VAR,” kusho lo nompempe ongeke adalulwe. . Lo nompempe uqhube wathi okunye okusazodala ubunzima ngokwethulwa kwe-VAR wukuthi amaqembu adlala kwiPremiership kawanazo izinkundla zawo njengoba ziphethwe ngomasipala. “Izinkundla zisetshenziselwa imicimbi ehlukene, kwesinye isikhathi amadili omculo nemicimbi yamaqembu ezepolitiki neminye. Ngakho amakhamera e-VAR angazithola esengcupheni yokucekeleka phansi, ekubeni kubiza ukufakwa kwawo ezinkundleni. Ngakho akukezukuba yinto elula ukuqala ngokushesha ukusebenza kohlelo lwe-VAR eNingizimu Afrika njengoba kucatshangwa.” U-Abdul Ebrahim oyinhloko yonompempe kwiSafa, usanda kucashunwa eyiqinisekisa eyokuqala kwe-VAR ekuqaleni kwesizini ka-2026/2027. Konompempe abaqeqeshelwe i-VAR, kubalwa u-Abongile Tom, Zakhele Siwela, Akhona Makalima, Jelly Chavani, Eugene Mdluli noLuxolo Badi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI woMkhambathi FC, uXolani Khumalo, ezakhe ezizotholana phezulu noMvoti FC kowamanqamu wesifundazwe weSafa KwaZulu-Natal, ABC Motsepe League eSugar Ray Xulu Stadium, eClermont, ngoMgqibelo UMQEQESHI woMkhambathi FC, uXolani “Sdoks” Khumalo, uyavuma ukuthi banengcindezi yokuwunqoba umdlalo wabo wamanqamu wesifundazwe weSafa KwaZulu-Natal ABC Motsepe League wokuhlunga iqembu elizomela isifundazwe kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke okuzabalazela ukukhushulelwa esigabeni seMotsepe Foundation Championship. UMkhambathi uzotholana phezulu noMvoti FC kowamanqamu wokukhipha inkunzi yaKwaZulu-Natal kwi-ABC Motsepe League ngoMgqibelo ngo-1 ntambama, eSugar Ray Xulu Stadium, eClermont. UMvoti uqede uqhwakele ngamaphuzu awu-59 ku-Stream A, uMkhambathi waqeda phezulu ngawu-55 ku-Stream B. Iqembu elizophumelela kulo mdlalo wangoMgqibelo, lizomela iKZN emidlalweni kazwelonke lapho kuzohlungwa khona amaqembu amabili azokhushulelwa kwiChampionship. AmaPlay-Offs kazwelonke e-ABC Motsepe League azobanjelwa eMthatha, e-Eastern Cape, ngoJuni 1-7. “Njengeqembu sinayo ingcindezi ngalo mdlalo esizowudlala noMvoti ngoba nangesizini edlule sahambe safika kowamanqamu lapho sahlulwa khona yiMidlands (Wanderers). "Nabaphathi (boMkhambathi) bafisa ukuthi iqembu likhushulelwe esigabeni seMotsepe Championship kule sizini, nangendlela abaleseka ngayo iqembu kusukela isizini iqala kuze kube manje. "Banezifiso ezinkulu ngaleli qembu ngoba bafuna ukulibona lidlala esigabeni esikhulu, limele indawo yaseMkhambathini,” kusho uKhumalo. “UMkhambathi uyiqembu elikhula ngesivinini elifiswa ngabaqeqeshi abaningi ukuliqeqesha. Nokho sikulungiselele ukubhekana noMvoti, siyakwazi esikulundele kubona, nabo bayakwazi abakulindele kithina. Ngakho silindele umdlalo onzima kodwa ozokwenza abathandi bebhola babheme bakholwe." UKhumalo odabuka KwaNomoya, eSahlumbe, ojoyine uMkhambathi kule sizini esuka kwiFC Drakensberg, usizana noNkosingiphile “Dimco” Ntinga oyiphini lakhe. UMkhambathi ufinyelele emzuliswaneni we-Last 16 weNedbank Cup, waguqiswa yiMilford FC ngo 3-0. “Nakho ukufinyelela kwethu kwi-Last 16 yeNedbank Cup kube yisikhuthazi esikhulu kubadlali bethu, kwenyusa nezinga labo lokuzethemba nasemidlalweni emqoka yeligi esiyidlalile," usho kanje uKhumalo. Uma kwenzeka uMkhambathi ugcina ngokuphumelela ukuya kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke uzoba nenye ingcindezi yokulandela ezinyathelweni zabakhaya bawo, iMidlands Wanderers, abaphumelele ukwenyukela kwiChampionship ngesizini edlule.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX ISINGENWE ngamanxusa aseMzansi indaba yokuboshwa komqeqeshi wakuleli, uRulani Mokwena, ezimkhalele ngeSonto e-Algeria. UMokwena wehlukane neqembu lase-Algeria. iMC Alger ngempelasonto, kwasabalala izindaba zokuthi useqashwe yi-Al Ittihad yaseLibya edlalelwa nguThembinkosi Lorch ayemqeqesha kwi-Orlando Pirates, Mamelodi Sundowns nakwiWydad Casablanca. Kuvele ukuthi uMokoena uboshiwe esikhumulweni sezindiza sase-Algeria, iHouari Boumediene Airport kulandela ukwephula umthetho owengamele imali yakhona, Kuthiwa ubezama ukuphuma nayo ngaphandle kwezwe. Iziko lezindaba, i-SABC, libike ukuthi uMokwena uthola usizo kwabamele iNingizimu Afrika e-Algeria. Lo mqeqeshi oneminyaka engu-39, oshiye i-Alger emuva ngempelasonto edlule kwezinyanga eziyishiyagalombili eyiqeqesha, kubikwa ukuthi ngokwemali azoyithola kwi-Ittihad, uzobalwa nabaqeqeshi abayikha ngamafosholo e-Afrika. UMokwena ushiye i-Alger esicongweni se-log kodwa ukukhishwa kwiCaf Champions League kubukeka kumdalele amazinyo abushelelezi kubaphathi beqembu.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates kwiDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, ejabula nomdlali wasemuva uJabu Mokone emuva kokuwina iligi ngempelasonto edlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX 'I-ORLANDO Pirates ingaba nenqanawe yenkulisa uma inganquma ukuyivusa.' Lawa ngamazwi omqeqeshi weqembu leZimnyama elingompetha beDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, oqophe umlando ngokuphakamisa le ndebe okokuqala selokhu le ligi yasungulwa ngo-2014. IPirates yehlule iSundowns ngo 2-0 emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto, ngempelasonto. Kulindeleke ukuthi leli qembu liyodlala phesheya kwezilwandle okuwuhambo oluhambisana nokuba ngompetha beDiski. EZimnyama zihlale esicongweni se-log amasonto angu-21. Eminyakeni edlule, iPirates ibihlala esicongweni kodwa igcine igudluziwe. IPirates idla umhlanganiso kwiDiski nje, ayisenayo inkulisa kwazise yavalwa eminyakeni edlule kulandela izinsolo zokukokotela iminyaka kwabadlali. Abadlali abayibamba kwiDiski bathungathwa njalo ngaphambi kokuqala kwesizini. IKaizer Chiefs neMamelodi Sundowns ngamanye amaqembu ashaya ngabadlali abakhuliswe ezinkulisa zawo. UKrieling owayeyiphini likaThabo Septhemba ngesikhathi bewina iligi yeDiski ngo-2023, uncome umsebenzi weqembu namalungiselelo esizini aseqophelweni. "Lokhu kuwuphumela wokuhlela izinto okwenziwa ngaphambi kokufika kwami eqenjini. Ngesonto lami lokuqala ngicabanga ukuthi kwakunabadlali abangu-45 engabahlola. Nganikwa umbandela wokuhlanganisa iqembu. Ngalehlisa ngasala nabadlali abangu-29, sasayinisa ababili phakathi nesizini sagcina sesinabangu-31. "Ngesikhathi ngilungiselela ukuqala kwesizini, abaningi abadlali babengakaze bakwenze lokho ngendlela engenza ngayo. Babemangele. Sasingagijimi kodwa kwakusebenza ibhola kakhulu. Ngabatshela ukuthi nizokhumbula ukuthi nanikhala silungiselela isizini, senithi siyiqembu eliqine kunawo wonke kule ligi. Ngingasho ukuthi bekunjalo, besiqine kunawo wonke amaqembu. Iqembu lisengakwazi ukuthi ukukhula. Ngicabanga ukuthi iPirates ingabumba enye yezinkulisa eziqinile eMzansi," kusho uKriel. "Noma ngabe iqembu likhetha ukwenzani. Ngisebenzela iqembu futhi ngingathanda ukuhlala. Njengomqeqeshi ngiyafisa inselelo yokuqeqesha esigabeni esiphezulu. Kodwa ngiyakwazi ukubekezela. Engikudingayo yikhefu neholidi, kuningi engikwenzele iqembu."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota Legend 55 eyokuvalelisa iHilux njengoba ngoJuni kulindeleke ukuthi kwethulwe entsha IMOTO: TOYOTA LEGEND 55 NGASO sonke isikhathi uma ngigudla ngaseningizimu yeTheku amehlo ami sengiwavula kakhulu uma sengingaseProspecton. Phela yilapho ifemu yakwaToyota South Africa Motors (Tsam) izinze khona. Yilapho futhi kukhiqizwa khona intandokazi yemoto eNingizimu Afrika, iHilux. Ngisho ngamabomu ukuthi yimoto hhayi iveni ngoba iHilux yodwa edayisa kakhulu okudlula zonke izimoto kuleli, hhayi kuphela amaveni. Ukuvula kwami amehlo mawala yingoba ngisuke ngithembe ukuthi kungenzeka ngizithele phezu kweHilux entsha osekubalwa izinyanga ukuthi iqale ukudayisa emagaraji. Ngempelasonto inhlanhla iwele ngakimi ngiyibona elolini kuN3 ngibuya emngcwabeni eMtshezi. Nokho ngiyibone kancane kwazise iloli belihamba ngangakwazi ukuba nesikhathi, ngabe ngikuchazela kangcono. Ngingakucebisa ukuthi ungalinge uyeke ukufunda le ngosi kwiSolezwe Ngempelasonto ngoba nakanjani ngoJuni uma seyethulwa sizobe sikhona bese sibuya nombiko ogcwele ngayo. Ngesikhathi isalindiwe, kwaToyota benze okuvame ukwenziwa ngamakholwa, okuwukulinda uMfundisi ngeculo. Iculo kulokhu yiLegend 55 okuyiyona ndlela kwaToyota abavalelisa ngayo iHilux eqale ukudayisa kuleli ngo-2016. Kusuka ngo-2004, kwaToyota bakha iHilux yokugubha iminyaka engu-35 bayibiza ngeLegend 35. Abaphindanga babheka emuva ngoba balokhu benza amanye amaLegend okuyi-40, 45, 50 njengoba beku-55 nje. Benze isiqiniseko sokuthi ungadideki nakancane ukuthi yiyo ngokuyiqopha igama layo ezindaweni eziningi. Ulithola ezicabheni ngaphambili, kwi-styling bar esihlukile kunamanye amaHilux nangemuva esikhenkeni. Ngingakangeni phakathi, khona ngaphandle, ukuze yehluke kwezinye bayenze yacwebezela kwi-grille, ezibukweni nasezimbanjeni zezicabha. Yize iToyota Hilux ngaphakathi ibukeka indala kunezimbangi kodwa yakhiwe yaqina ukuze ihlale iminyaka Amarimu angu-18 inch bese kuthi esikhenkeni kube nerabha ukuze sivikeleke uma ulayishe impahla engase iklwebhe. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi uyakwazi ukusikhiya isikhenke impahla ivikeleke ngaphakathi njengoba kune-roller shutter kodwa engasebenzi ngogesi. Uma usungena ngaphakathi awusoze ukhohlwe ukuthi uhamba ngani ngoba nakhona iqoshwe ezindaweni eziningi uLegend 55. Ngaphakathi futhi yilapho ekhombisa khona ukuthi izimbangi zintsha kunayo ngoba isashaya ngegiya elide ne-handbrake, yinye imbobo yokushaja nge-USB ne-touchscreen infotainment system ewumhlobo “mdi”. Kwi-touchscreen uyakwazi kodwa ukuxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto futhi iveza nengaphandle ukuze ungashayisi. Injini ehamba ngayo yi-2.8 litre GD-6 turbodiesel eno-gearbox oyi-6 speed auto. Inamandla angu-150kW ne-torque engu-500Nm. Engikuqaphelile wukuthi sengathi bayithuthukisile indlela entofontofo ngayo emgwaqweni noma ingafiki ezingeni le-Ford Ranger ezihambela yodwa. Yize izimbangi zinezinjini ezinamandla amakhulu kodwa ngiwezwe ekahle nakuyona isukuma uma unyathela. Njengoba iyi-4x4 bengihamba ngokukhululeka ngokuthi angisoze ngibhajwe ndawo ngoba zikhona zonke izinsiza ezifana ne-diff lock no-4 low range. Kudizili ibidla amalitha angu-9.9 ngo-100km futhi ethangini ungalindela ukuhamba ngaphezu kancane kuka-600km. Zonke zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi ayisishiyagalolunye noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-100 000km.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP “YIQINIISO elingenakuphikwa ukuthi akuwona wonke umuntu ojatshuliswa wuthando ngakho ngibone kukuhle ukuthi ngisebenzise ubuciko bomculo ukuzwakalisa ilaka lalabo abaphoxekile othandweni, ngibe ngiveza futhi ubuhle nobumnandi bokuthandwa.” Usho kanjalo umculi we-house ne-deep house, uSboniso L Musician elandisa ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elisihloko sithi Loss & Love EP, eliphume ngenyanga edlule nelididiyele izingoma ezinhlanu eziqukethe umyalezo owehlukene oweyamene nomuzwa wothando. USboniso waKwandengezi, eThekwini, udalule ukuthi kulo msebenzi usebenzisane nabaculi oDa Alto noBrandon Dhludhlu; kanjalo noDa Gifto - ofake isandla ekuphrojuseni izingoma zawo. “Lo msebenzi uyinhlanganisela yezingoma ezikhuluma ngobuhlungu bokuthanda umuntu kepha yena engakuthandi ngale ndlela omthanda ngayo, futhi iveza obala ukuthi ukuphoxwa ngabantu obathandayo kungenza ukuthi ugcine ungasakholelwa othandweni. Zikhona futhi izingoma ezimbalwa eziveza ukuthi nakuba kunjalo, kodwa lukhona uthando lweqiniso,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP Eqhuba, uthe okunye abhale nacula ngakho kwi-Loss & Love EP kusukela ezimweni abhekane nazo okwangempela empilweni yakhe, nabone kukuhle ukusebenzisa ubuciko ukuzelapha ngokukhipha ubuhlungu abuzwayo ngaphakathi enhlizweni yakhe. “Kungithathe cishe izinyanga ezimbili ukwenza lo msebenzi ngiwuqede, engisizwe kakhulu nawukuthi vele ngiwumuntu ohlale ese-studio isikhathi esiningi ngipheka umculo engihlela ukulokhu ngiwukhipha kancane, kancane ngize ngichume kule ndima,” kusho yena. Leli ciko igama lalo lokuzalwa wuSiboniso Msweli. Ligqame emculweni ngecwecwe lalo lokuqala eliphume nyakenye elithi The Weight of Silence; kanti ngale kwalokho selisebenze namanye amaciko esingabala kuwona oMngomezulu, uLance Hebron noKnightSA.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: AMACIKO akhale "ngokungcwatshwa" ephila yiPlayhouse eThekwini ngesikhathi ebhikisha ngoLwesihlanu Image: Sibonelo Ngcobo BAZODLULISELWA koKlebe nakwiSpecial Investigating unit (SIU) bonke abathinteka ekuphathweni budedengu kuka-R51.8 million owanikwa umfelandawonye wezinyunyana zamaciko, iCreative Industries Federation of South Africa (CCIFSA) wuMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko kuzwelonke phakathi konyaka-mali ka-2014/15 no-2023/24. Lokhu kushiwo wuNgqongqoshe uGayton McKenzie emuva kokuthola komnyango wakhe umbiko wophenyo acela ukuthi alwenziwe yiGobodo Forensic and Investigative Accounting (GFIA) ngokusebenza kwemali. Ngokwesitatimende soMnyango, uphenyo luthole ukuthi ngo-2016 kwenziwa ushintsho enkontilekeni yoMnyango neCCIFSA kwanyuswa imali yoxhaso ngo-R77,884 kokwakuvunyelwene ngayo. U-R5.4 million okwakumele ubuyiselwe emnyangweni ngo-2016/17 ngoba ungasetshenziswanga iCCIFSA yaqhubeka nokwenza ngawo ezinye izinhlelo ngeminyaka okwakungenasivumelwano kuyo. Kuthiwa umbiko weCCIFSA wokuthi imali iyisebenzise kanjani wawudukisa. U-R13 million okwakumele iCCIFSA iwusebenzisele uhlelo lweDowntown Music Hub wahlanganiswa nemali yayo kwi-akhawunti eyodwa nokuyinto okuthiwa kwakungamele yenzeke. Kuvela nokuthi iCCIFSA yahluleka ukuchaza ngokusetshenziswa kuka-R10 million wemiklomelo ebizwa ngokuthi Usiba. Uhlahlomali lwe-CCIFSA lwesicelo soxhaso lwaluveza ukuthi izothatha u-32% wesamba ikhokhele amaholo abasebenzi nezikhulu nokuyimali ephindeke kathathu ku-10% ogunyaziwe ngokwesivumelwano. UMcKenzie uyalele uMqondisi Jikelele woMnyango, uDkt Stella Khumalo ukuthi athathele izinyathelo abasebenzi abathinteka embikweni. Uthe uMnyango uzophinde udlulisele umbiko kuMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, i-SIU noKlebe ukuze baqhubeke nophenyo. "Umnyango uzophinde ubuyekeze ubudlelwano bawo neCCFISA obukhona nobangomuso." kusho yena. UMcKenzie uthe umbiko uqeda zonke izinkulumo ngokuthi uhlukumeza iCCIFSA. "Okuvezwe wuphenyo wukuthi akukho muntu ohlukunyezwayo. Uveza ukungaphathwa kahle kwemali yomphakathi, ukuhluleka ukuchaza ngokusetshenziswa kwemali, ukuhluleka ukubuyisa imali engasebenzanga nokungabeki ngendlela ukuthi imali isebenze kanjani. Abantu baseNingizimu Afrika namaciko le nhlangano okwakumele ibasebenzele bafanelwe yiqiniso ngokuthi kwenzekeni ngale mali," kusho uMcKenzie. UMengameli weCCIFSA kuzwelonke, uJoy Mbewana, uthe sekunesikhathi efuna ukuthola umbiko ogcwele njengoba namanje engakawutholi. Esitatimendeni somnyango kubikwe ukuthi umbiko ogcwele ngowawo wodwa ngaphakathi. "Awukwazi ukuba yinto yomnyango kungenjalo sizoya enkantolo. Siyawufuna ngoba sifuna ukuvala imilomo bonke asebesithukile ngezinsolo ezindala." Uthe uMcKenzie ungene ehhovisi wavala uxhaso abebeluthola ngaphandle kobufakazi bokuthi kukhona ukungaphathwa ngendlela kwemali. "Kwathi engena esikhundleni wakhwela wadilika kithina. Nasemngcwabeni kaWinnie Khumalo wathi sithola izigidi kodwa singabiki okuyinto engekho. Uma ngifika ehhovisi ngo-2019 lwase lwenziwe uphenyo kwavela lokhu akuvezayo manje. Akukusha. Thina sahlala phansi nomqondisi womnyango salungisa izinto nokuyingakho ngaphansi kobuholi bethu kungaveli lutho oluwugcobho," kusho uJoy. Khonamanjalo, iCCIFSA KwaZulu-Natal ibe nombhikisho ngaphandle kwasePlayhouse, eThekwini, izolo ikhala ngendlela lesi sikhungo esiphethwe ngayo. USihlalo wayo eKZN uThokozani "T'zozo" Zulu uthe bafuna umphathi wePlayhouse uLinda Bukhosini akhethe isikhundla esisodwa kwaziphethe. "Akatholakali uma kufanele aklame indima yakhe yokuba wumqondisi wezobuciko. Sifuna nokuthi kuvulwe iPlayhouse eseMayville osekunesikhathi ivaliwe. Okunye esikhala ngakho wukuthi iPlayhouse ithola u-R57 million kuhulumeni abathi ngowokukhokhela abasebenzi nonogada. Njengamaciko kumele sikhokhe uma siyisebenzisa sikhokhele nesikhathi esengeziwe sabasebenzi nokuyinto engalungile." Uthe babanike umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku eziyisikhombisa ukuthi baphendule. Imizamo yokuthola uBukhosini ayiphumelelanga njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso NAKUBA okuningi kubukeka sengathi kuvuna iMamelodi Sundowns embangweni wesicoco seBetway Premiership kodwa ikhombisa izimpawu zokuba nameva indlela yayo ebheke esicocweni sayo sesishiyagalolunye kulandelana uma uyiqhathanisa neyezimbangi zayo i-Orlando Pirates. Inhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiSundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, kayizange ikuphike lokhu ngesikhathi ikhuluma nabezindaba ebisesithangamini nabo kulandela ukulahla amaphuzu ngokubambana ngo 0-0 neRichards Bay FC ngeSonto, eMhlathuze Sports Complex. Umdlalo weSundowns olandelayo ibhekene kuwona neqembu elilwela i-Top 8, iPolokwane City kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku eSeshego Stadium, eLimpopo. Kubukeka kuzoba wumthwalo kwiSundowns ukuthi izodlalela eSeshego ekubeni kucacele ngisho ingane ukuthi ithwale kanzima kangakanani eMhlathuze okuyinkundla ethi kayifane. ISundowns izosuka kulowo mdlalo iphinde yamukele iPolokwane kodwa ekhaya ngoMeyi 3, bese kuba yiKaizer Chiefs esefomini kulezi zinsuku. Ngaphambi kokusonga isizini ekuhambeni nge-TS Galaxy ehlale iyithwalisa ubunzima iSundowns, izodlalela ekhaya kuqala neSiwelele FC. Yonke le midlalo iza kwiSundowns nezivivinyo ezinzima kulandela ukukhombisa kwayo izimpawu zokuba buthaka kwazise idlale ngokulingana kwemibili edlule yeligi. Maphakathi nale midlalo yeligi, kukhona owomlenze wokuqala weChampions League ne-AS Far yaseMorocco, ngoMeyi 15. Nakuba ingacentiwe indlela yePirates kodwa eyayo ikhombisa izimpawu zokuthamba yize kungelula ukuqagela umphumela kungakadlalwa. Imidlalo esalele iPirates ngeyeStellenbosch FC, Magesi FC, Durban City ne-Orbit College. UCardoso ukwamukele eMhlathuze ukuthi iBay ibuveze obala ubuthaka beSundowns ikakhulukazi uma behlasela. “IBay ibuveze obala ubuthaka bethu uma sihlasela ngakho-ke siyabonga ukuthi kukhona esikufundile kuwona,” kusho uCardoso sakubhuqa. “Siyasamukela isimo esikusona namaphutha esiwenzile siyawazi ngakho-ke akukho okuzoshintsha ngaphandle kokulungela ukubhekana nesivivinyo esilandelayo,” kushaya uCardoso ngamafuphi. Omunye umdlalo weBetway Premiership onamuhla iSiwelele FC izobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eFree State Stadium, eBloemfontein.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: BANGASE bavale isifundazwe sonke ngokhukhulelangoqo wesiteleka osonkontileka abakha imigwaqo, abakhala ngokungakhokhelwa wuMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, kusuka nyakenye. Lokhu bakuveze, esikhangisweni ebesizungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana iFacebook neWhatsApp. Lesi sikhangisi besiphelezelwa yinkulumo eqoshiwe yomunye wabakhahlamezekile, obezwakala ukuthi uthelwe ngezibonkolo. Kule nkulumo, lona wesilisa uzwakala ethi banenkinga noMnyango oholwa nguMphathiswa uSiboniso Duma, ongabakhokheli imali yabo. UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, usolwa ngokukhokhela osonkontileka abathandayo “Ezinye izindawo zokusebenza zimile. UDuma (onguMphathiswa woMnyango) nezikhulu zakhe bakhokhela abangani babo. Sicela yonke iZululand, ukushona phansi koMnambithi, ko-Estcourt, yiTheku, akuvalwe thaqa, ngisho no-N3,” kusho inkulumo. Lona wesilisa uqhubeka athi badlelwa impahla okufaka phakathi amaloli, izimoto nemizi. “Kuyaphela ngathi,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngokukhethwa kwephela emasini, wathi uDuma nezikhulu zakhe bakhetha abantu abambalwa, athe bangabangani bakhe babakhokhele, abanye babashiye kanjalo. “Sicela i-ANC isikhuzele uDuma. Uyasimosha, uyawuqeda uMnyango. Sidlelwa izimoto, amaloli, nakho konke okunye,” kusho lona wesilisa. Uveze ukuthi lokhu kwenzeka kusuka ngonyaka odlule. “UDuma uholela abantu abathandayo, abasenhliziyweni yakhe,” kuqhuba lona wesilisa. Uthe amamashi abo ufuna aqonde emahhovisi oMnyango asezindaweni ezehlukene. Ukhale ngokuthi kulo Mnyango bafika benezimoto, amaloli, ama-TLB, bese behamba bengenalutho, sebedayise yonke into. “Ngoba uma sekukhokhwa sewusebenzile, ukhokhelwa kabuhlungu,” usho kanje. Uthe bacwile ezikweletini, wakhala nangokuthi banabasebenzi abangakhokhelwe kusuka ngo-Okthoba nyakenye. “Sagcina ukukhokhelwa ngo-Okthoba ngonyaka ophelile. Kodwa izinkampani ezithandwa umhlonishwa zikhokhelwa nyanga zonke. Sizovala kwasani. Sizovala amahhovisi, sivale imisebenzi eyenziwa yizigwili eziseduze nenhliziyo yomhlonishwa,” kusho lona wesilisa ophethe ngokuqanganisa, ethi uDuma akavele ababulale okungcono. Kulandela ukusabalala kwezinsongo zombhikisho, ihhovisi likaDuma linameke isaziso ekhasini lalo leFacebook, esithi kuzoba nomhlangano ophuthumayo namuhla phakathi kwakhe nosonkontileka abakhahlanyezwe eyezinkokhelo ezibambezelekile. Ngokwalesi saziso, ebesikhashwa umbhalo othi: “Ukubambisana obunobuhlakani bokuzoqinisekisa ukuthi sixazulula izingqinamba ezimi phakathi kwethu neKwaZulu-Natal enempumelelo”, umhlangano uzobanjelwa emahhovisi alo Mnyango aseMerebank, eThekwini, ngo-12 emini namuhla.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: INTOKAZI engumculi yaseJohannesburg, uTyla, iphinde yaba ngundabamlonyeni futhi yanconywa njengomunye wosaziwayo abebegqoke kahle nakulo nyaka emcimbini wemfashini waseMelika owaziwa ngeMet Gala. Lo mcimbi odonsa amehlo omhlaba kusuke kuhloswe ngawo ukuthi abasiki bengqephu bakhiphe amangwevu, ezimpahleni ezehlukene ezintsha abafuna ukuzikhangisa. INTOKAZI yakuleli uTyla ephinde yadonsa amehlo ngengubo akade eyigqokile emcimbini walo nyaka amaMet Gala Okunye ngawo ukuthi baphinde bakhombisa amakhono abanawo, ekubuyiseni izingubo ezaqopha umlando, ezake zagqokwa osaziwayo abadala kuwona lo mcimbi. UTyla noDoja Cat ozalwa umlingisi wakuleli uDumsani Dlamini, babe ngabanye abanconywe ngendlela akade begqoke ngayo. Nangonyaka odlule uTyla waba ngomunye wosaziwayo abanconywa kakhulu njengoba kwase kungokwesibili eba yingxenye yalo mcimbi. Wafika kuwona egqoke ingubo okungathi isihlabathi sasolwandle. Abasiki bengqephu bancoma ubuhlakani nobuhle bengubo yale ntokazi, njengoba kulo mcimbi kumele kugqame imisiko engajwayelekile. Okunye okukhulumisile nonyaka, ukukhuza ibuya komculi uBeyonce nomndeni wakhe kulo mcimbi. Laba bese kuphele iminyaka engu-10 bengawuhambeli lo mcimbi kusukela baqala umndeni njengoba benezingane ezintathu manje. UBeyonce wagcinga ukubonakala ngo-2016. Nakuwona ufike wadonsa amehlo abaningi, njengoba ayenza eminyakeni edlule, egqoke ingubo okuvela ukuthi ibikhandwe ngohlobo lwamadayimane alandwe ezweni laseBotswana. UBeyonce ekhuluma nabezindaba kafushane kulo mcimbi uthe okumjabulisayo ukuthi ubuye esephelezelwa indodakazi yakhe yokuqala eneminyaka engu-14 uBlue Ivy.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, nephini lomholi weqembu, uDkt John Hlophe UMHOLI weMPK, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uveze eyokungenisa kosomathuba abalandela ibhodwe eliconsayo eqenjini ngesikhathi enza izinguquko. UZuma uthe umbiko wocwaningo abalwenzile uthole ukuthi iqembu lisengcupheni ngenxa yokujoyina kwabantu abajahe izikhundla. Ukusho lokhu esitatimendeni esifundwe okhulumela iMKP, uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, esethulwe ngoMgqibelo. UZuma umemezele ukusungulwa kohlaka lobuholi olusha iMKP Institute nokuhlakazwa kwesigungu esiphezulu iNational High Command. Uhlaka olusha lusungulwe emva kocwaningo oluthathe izinyanga ezingu-18. Uhlaka olusha luzoholwa iPhini lomholi weMKP, uDkt John Hlophe, futhi lona luzobika ngqo kuZuma. Amanye amalungu ohlaka olusha uNdhlela, uSotswebhu weMKP ePhalamende, Nkk Mmabatho Mokoena-Zondi, oyinhloko yeHhovisi likaMengameli kwiMKP, uMnuz Lindelani Mbambo, Nkk Khanyisile Litchfield-Tshabalala, uMnuz General Manana, noMnuz Oupa Mathebula. Uhlaka olusha ilona oluzoqoka isigungu esiphezulu esisha. "Iningi labantu abazoqokelwa esigungwini esiphezulu abantu ababe yingxenye yobuholi bokuqala ngesikhathi sikhankasela ukunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Abanye abazoqokwa sizobheka ebuholini bezifundazwe nakomakadebona ukuze sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iqembu limeleleke kahle yonke indawo." Uhlaka olusha lithweswe ijoka lokuqinisekisa ukukhulula abahlwempu emaketangeni enhlupheko kanye nokulwa nokungalingani uZuma athe kudla lubi ngaphansi kukahulumeni wokubambisana. UZuma uthe angeke bavume ukuthi iqembu liphazanyiswe osomathuba abafuna izikhundla. "Umbiko uthole ukuthi iqembu lisengcupheni ngenxa yosomathuba abafuna izikhundla, izimpi zangaphakathi nokungena kwabantu abahlose ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kweqembu. Angeke sivume ukuthi abantu abathanda izikhundla bathikameze umkhankaso wokukhulula abantu." UZuma uthe basemkhankasweni wokunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwangoNovemba, nokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2029. UZuma unxuse onke amaqembu amancane ukuba ahlangane kwakhiwe inhlangano eyodwa. "Imiphumela yocwaningo ikubeka ngokusobala ukuthi abantu bakhathele amaqembu ezepolitiki. Inkohlakalo yenze ukuthi abantu bengabe besawathemba amaqembu ezepolitiki. Yonke indawo abantu baphelelwe ithemba ngenxa yokwehluleka kwezinhlelo zikahulumeni ukushintsha impilo yabantu. Senze izinguquko ebuholini beMKP ngoba nakhu sifuna ukuthi iqembu likwazi ukwemukela abantu abaqhamuka ezinhlakeni ezahlukene."

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMGADLI weMilford FC, uSiphosethu Ndlabi, ezakhe ezidinga ukunqoba emdlalweni wokusonga isizini  yeMotsepe Championshio neHungry Lions kusasa ukuzibekisela indawo kum-PSL Promotion Play-Offs UMGADLI weMilford FC, uSiphosethu Ndlabi, ugcizelela ukubaluleka kokunqoba umdlalo wabo wokusonga isizini yeMotsepe Foundation Championship neHungry Lions ukuze bazibekisele indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs. IMilford izotholana phezulu neLions komunye wemidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngo-3 ntambama eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington. Okwenza umdlalo weLions neMilford ubhekwe ngabomvu wukuthi womabili la maqembu asembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs okulwela ukukhuphukela kwiBetway Premiership. IKruger United izogcotshwa ngokusemthethweni njengompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship kusasa ngemuva komdlalo wayo ne-The Bees, KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. IMilford, Lions, Cape Town City, neCasric Stars, yiwona maqembu asenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs neqembu elizoqeda endaweni ka-15 kwi-log yePremiership azodlalwa ngoMeyi 26 kuya kuJuni 13. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, iCity isendaweni yesithathu ngawu-51 ngokulinganayo neLions enawu-51, kweyesihlanu yiCasric ngawu-49. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay lidinga amaphuzu amathathu noma elilodwa emdlalweni walo wakusasa neLions ukuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. IStallions, efinyelele kowandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup, uma igcina ngokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs kuzobe kungokokuqala kusukela ngesizini ka-2023/24 okwakuyisizini yayo yokuqala kulesi sigaba kulandela ukuthenga isitifiketi seMotsepe Championship kuThongathi FC. “Sihlale isikhathi eside esicongweni se-log kodwa sagcina siphunyukwe yisicoco, ngakho akusasizi ukukhalela ubisi oluchithekile manje. Okumqoka kithina wukulwela ukubuya namaphuzu aphelele e-Upington kwiHungry Lions ukuze sikwazi ukuyodlala kumaPlay-Offs. AmaPlay-Offs sekuyilona themba lethu lokulwela ukungena kwiBetway Premiership,” kusho uNdlabi, odabuka eMmangweni, eLusikisiki. “Siyazi ukuthi sizobhekana nomdlalo onzima kwiHungry Lions nayo edinga amaphuzu njengathi njengoba nayo ilwela ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa sizibophezele ngokulwela ukuwunqoba lo mdlalo. Yize sazi ukuthi ukudlala ngokulingana nakho kusengasiphumelelisa ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa esizibophezele kukho wukuyolwela ukunqoba ngoba kungasithikameza kusifake engozini ukungena enkundleni sizitshele ukuthi siyodlalela ukudlala ngokulingana.” Ngaphandle komdlalo weMilford neLions, eminye imidlalo ebhekiwe ngoweCity neLeicesterford City eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto, noweCasric neGomora United, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars v Gomora United (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium); Kruger United v The Bees (KaNyamazane Stadium); Leicesterford City v Cape Town City (Dobsonville Stadium); Hungry Lions v Milford FC (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Venda FC v Highbury FC (Thohoyandou Stadium); Lerumo Lions v Black Leopards (North West University Stadium); University of Pretoria v Midlands Wanderers (Tuks Stadium); Baroka FC v Upington City (Global Stadium

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Nqobile Khoza wuyena omncane kunabo bonke kwabathweswe iziqu e-UKZN, ngeziqu zakhe ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences INTOKAZI encane kunazo zonke izitshudeni zemikhakha eyehlukene ezithweswe iziqu e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN), uNksz Nqobile Khoza, idalule ukuthi ukuqopha lowo mlando sekuyikhuthaze ukuthi iqhube imfundo ize igogode kwezesayensi. UNksz Khoza (20) uthweswe iziqu ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences, okuyisigaba sempilo asichaze ngokuthi simjabulisile futhi senza ukuthi wazizwa ethobekile futhi eshisekela nokuthi angabe esaphelela kusona - kepha aqhubeke nemfundo yakhe. “Ngijabule kakhulu ngakho futhi kwenza ukuthi ngizizwe ngithobekile kakhulu kozakwethu, ngakho ngiyaziqhenya ngokuthi ngikwaze ukuqopha umlando omuhle kangaka - nengibona ukuthi uzongikhuthaza kakhulu ukuqhubeka ngisebenze kanzima empilweni,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe okumkhuthaze ukwenza lezi zifundo wukuthi unothando lokushisekela ukwazi kabanzi ngomhlaba nakho konke okukuwona, nokuthi kusebenza kanjani. “Bengihlale nginentshisekelo yokwazi ukuthi umhlaba usebenza kanjani, nakho konke okwenzekayo kuwona nangawo ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani nomthelela wakho ezigigabeni zansuku onke esingenawo amandla okuzivimba nokuzilawula. “Uthando lwami lwalo mkhakha lukhuliswe wukufuna ukuqonda imvelo nokusebenza kwayo ngendlela ejulile, ngase ngigxila kwi-geology ngoba ngifuna ukuqonda kabanzi ngamatshe, amadalwa, imikhiqizo embiwa phansi nomhlabathi okusuka kuwona,” kulanda uNksz Khoza. Uthe ngenkathi esenza lo mkhakha, ubethanda kakhulu izifundo zawo ebezimxukuza ugebhezi futhi zenza ukuthi uthole ulwazi olunzulu lomlando wokudaleka kwezinto esizibonayo emhlabeni okubalwa kuzona i-Structural Geology, Palaeontology, Geochemistry, Sedimentology ne-Geological Evolution of Southern Africa. “Manje sengivele ngiqhubeka ne-honours degree in Geology, kanti izinhlelo zami ngekusasa wukuthi ngiqhubeke ngikhule kwezemfundo yalo mkhakha engikuwona, njengoba sekuvele kusezinhlelweni zami ukuthi uma ngiphothula i-honours, ngiqhubeke futhi nocwaningo lwe-Master's ezogxila kwi-structural geology, geophysics ne-GIS application in geology,” kusho yena. UNksz Khoza uthe wethemba ukuthi ulwazi azogcina enalo lwemfundo luzosiza ukuza nomehluko emkhakheni wezokumbiwa phansi, wase ekhuthaza abeza ngemva kwakhe ukuthi baphokophele ukufeza amaphupho abo kungakhathalekile ukuthi bangakanani ngokweminyaka.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Isidumbu sikhishwa emfuleni ithimba labatshuzi Kubulawe ngesihluku isalukazi esineminyaka engu-75 engcobo, e-Eastern Cape, sisolwa ngokuthakatha. Ngokwemibiko evelayo, kuthiwa amalungu omndeni wakhe amthathile amyisa emfudlaneni oseduze, amshaya ngepulangwe, amminza. Isidumbu sakhe esinqunu satholwe eduze nomfudlana sinemihuzuko ekhanda nasebusweni kanye nezibazi zokuklinywa entanyeni. Abasolwa babaleke endaweni yesigameko kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu njengoba amaphoyisa ephenya icala lokubulala. I-video ezungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana yalesi sigameko esiphazamisayo isiqubule ulaka emphakathini. Umphathiswa inwezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uBukiwe Fanta ukugxeke kakhulu ukubulawa kwabantu. Uthi lesi sibhicongo siyingxenye yezinkinga ezikhulayo e-Alfred Nzo Region, lapho sekubulawe abesifazane abane ngoMeyi kuphela.kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu ngesikhathi kubikwa.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMGADLI weKaizer Chiefs, uTashreeq Morris, okungenzeka anikwe inkontileka entsha eNaturena Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUNGENZEKA iKaizer Chiefs iphoqeleke ukushintsha umqondo ngomgadli, uTashreeqa Morris, ebihlele ukumchitha ekupheleni kwesizini. UMorris ushaye igoli emdlalweni wakhe wokuqala wesizini elibeke phambili iChiefs ngesikhathi ibhekene neSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngempelasonto. Amakhosi agcine enqobe ngo 2-0, aqinisekisa indawo yawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup. UMorris ngomunye wabadlali ezingakavuselelwa izinkontileka zabo eNaturena. Amakhosi asezame izikhawu ukumchitha kodwa kugcina kungenzekanga. Ngasekuqaleni kwesizini ubefunwa nguGavin Hunt esengumqeqeshi weDurban City kodwa wenqaba ngoba ethi ufuna ukudlalela iqembu eliseGauteng. Nakuba iChiefs ifuna ukumchitha kodwa kungenzeka ehlelwe yinhlanhla njengoba izodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup okuwumqhudelwano odinga abadlali abaningi. UMorris ubanga ijezi noFlavio da Silva otakule Amakhosi ezikhathini ezinzima, Ashley Du Preez, Khanyisa Mayo oshaye into ephansi ekubeni ebolekiwe no-Etiosa Ighodaro ohlale isikhathi eside engadlali ngenxa yokulimala. Umqeqeshi weChiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, uncome uMorris ngokungena ashaye igoli emdlalweni omqoka. "UMorris ngomunye wabadlali bethu futhi ubesebenza kanzima eziqeqesha. Besilinde isikhathi esifanele sokumfaka futhi ngicabanga ukuthi lesi bekuyiso sokumfaka esikimini. Sikuxoxile naye ubumqoka balo mdlalo. Kuyakhombisa ukuthi umdlali ngamunye esimbizayo ukulungele ukusebenzela iqembu," kusho uBen Youssef. IChiefs isalelwe yimidlalo emibili ngaphambi kokusonga isizini yePremiership ka-2025/2026, ngemidlalo emibili yaseThekwini. NgoMgqibelo izobhekana naMaZulu eMoses Mabhida Stadium, isonge kuyona le nkundla neChippa United ngoMeyi 23. Emuva kwalokho, kulindeleke ukuthi izikhulu zimemezele izinguquko kubadlali nakubaqeqeshi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMBHIKISHO wamanzi uholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe ZIFUNGE zagomela ukuthi zizoqhubeka nokuwuvala ngamathayi avuthayo umgwaqo uR66, eShowe, izakhamuzi ezingenawo amanzi eZiqwaqweni, eMlalazi. Lezi zakhamuzi esezinengekile zitshele Isolezwe ukuthi sekuphele izinyanga ezimbili zingenawo amanzi. Omunye wazo, uMnuz Ntethelelo Mpungose, uthe okubacasula kakhulu wukuthi izakhamuzi zaku-ward 9, okuyi-ward engumakhelwane wabo, zona zinawo amanzi. “Sizizwa sideleleka siyizakhamuzi zaku-ward 10. Asiqondi ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani ukuthi ku-ward 9 abekhona amanzi, kuthi kweyethu, kungaphumi ngisho iconsi kompompi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe bezwe ngandlebenye ukuthi kukhona abasebenzi bakaMasipala wesiFunda, iKing Cetshwayo, abathengwa yiqembu elithile lepolitiki ukuthi bavale amanzi ku-ward 9. “Asazi ukuthi lezi zinsolo ziyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa zisicabangisa okuningi ngoba ngempela asinikwa thina amanzi,” usho kanje. INDLALA yamanzi iholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe Uthe sebeze baqashe izimoto ezibabiza u-R200 ukuyobakhelela amanzi ku-ward 9. Uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi iningi alisebenzi, alinayo le mali. “Kudingeka ukuthi ukhiphe okungenani o-R200 ababili ngesonto ukuze uthole amanzi anele. Asinayo le mali. Eminye imizi iphethwe yizaguga. Ziphoqeleka ukuthi zihlephule empeshenini yazo ukuze zithole amanzi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe ezinye izaguga zisuke zingenayo le mali, zize zingene ezibophezelweni nabezimoto eziqashwayo ukuthi abahambe bayozikhelela amanzi, zizokhokha uma sezihole impesheni. Uveze ukuthi okunye okubaphatha kabi wukuthi akhona amaloli athunyelwayo ukuthi abahlinzeke ngamanzi kodwa abashayeli bawo, bawadayisela imindeni enemali. “Amaloli afika ebusuku azokwethela abanamathangi, abawakhokhela u-R500 amanzi. Abangenamali, basala kanjalo,” kusho uMpungose, othe nalokhu bafuna kungenelelwe kukho. Esinye isakhamuzi, uMnuz Sibusiso Mkhize, sithe, bazoqhubeka nokubhikisha kuze kuphume amanzi kompompi babo. “Sikhathele wukuxhashazwa. Balokhu bebika imbiba nebuzi, thina esikufunayo amanzi,” kusho uMkhize. Okhulumela uMasipala wesiFunda iKing Cetshwayo, uNkk Rekha Naidoo, uthe akusekude ukuthi inkinga yamanzi ebhekene nomphakathi waku-wadi 10 eMlalazi ixazululwe ngokugcwele. Uthe iziphathimandla zikamasipala waseKing Cetshwayo kanjalo nowaseMlalazi, zibe nomhlangano nezakhamizi ezithintekayo. "Ukuphazamiseka kwamanzi bekudalwa ukuthikamezeka kwesiphehli samanzi Kwahlokohloko. Lokhu kulungisiwe ngoLwesihlanu," kusho uNkk Naidoo. Uthe okunye ukwenzekayo ukuthi amanzi avulelwa imiphakathi ngezikhathi ezehlukene, okwenza bangakwazi ukuwathola ngesikhathi esisodwa amanzi. "Kulezo zindawo amanzi asuke engaphumi kuzona, siwahlinzeka ngamaloli," usho kanje. Uthembise ukuthi lesi simo esibonakala eZiqwaqweni, sizoshintsha esikhathini esingamasonto ambalwa kusuka manje njengoba kukhona izinhlelo zokuqeda inkinga yamanzi kuwadi 9 no-10. Uthe projekthi yokuqala edle uR65 million esisetshenzwe cishe u-78%, ezolungela ukunikezelwa emphakathini ezinyangeni ezimbili ezizayo, izohlinzeka ngamanzi imindeni engu-1 350 yaseNkume, Gawozi naseZiqwaqweni. Uveze ukuthi eyesibili edle uR72 million, izohlinzeka isibalo esifanayo semindeni yakuwadi 9, yona uthe isiku-92% umsebenzi osuqediwe kuyona.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMSUNGULI womcimbi wezindondo iThe Basadi in Music Awards uHloni Modise osememezele izindaba zokuthi sebekuvulile ukungenela lo mncintiswano futhi kulo nyaka kuzovuleleka nakwabesifazane bangaphandle kwakuleli Image: Hloni Modise Matau, CEO of Basadi in Music Awards/ Picture: Supplied IZINTOKAZI ezisemikhakheni ehlukene kwezikaqedizisungu eziqhamuka emazweni angaphandle, zizothola ithuba lokuqokwa okokuqala emcimbini wezindondo kulo nyaka ozobe ugubha iminyaka emihlanu wasungulwa iThe Basadi in Music Awards. Umcimbi wanonyaka uzobanjwa ngosuku olusazomenyezelwa kodwa ngenyanga yasebesifazane u-Agasti. Abahleli bomcimbi bamemezele izindaba zokuthi sebelivulile ithuba lokuthi abafuna ukuqokwa kuwo bangenele. UHloni Modise ongumsunguli wawo uthe ukwamukelwa kwemingenelo kuzovalwa ngoMeyi 30 ngo-12 ebusuku. “Kulo nyaka sihlele ukuhlonipha wonke umuntu wesifazane ngendlela ehlukile kunalena ebesijwayele ukwenza ngayo. Njengoba sigubha iminyaka emihlanu sihlele ukuthi sivulele nezinye izintokazi zakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika ukuthi zibe yingxenye yomcimbi okokuqala. Njengoba sesiqalile ukumemezela izinhlelo lokhu kusho ukuthi akusekho ukubheka emuva, sesiqale sona isikhathi somcimbi wezindondo walo nyaka,” kuchaza uHloni. Uthe ukuphumela kwamanye amazwe kuseyindlela yokukhulisa umcimbi ukuze ungagcini kuleli kuphela. “Sifuna ukukhulisa umcimbi, kungabukeki sengathi owakuleli kuphela, awuvulelekile nakwabanye, kithina ke lokhu kusho ukukhula. Simema ngisho abathandi balo mcimbi kuwona wonke umhlaba ukuthi babe yingxenye yawo ngokuqoka abantu abafuna ukubabona beqhudelana kuwo. Sifuna ukwaziwa emhlabeni nakuzo zonke izindawo esiya kuzona negalelo lethu libonakale,” kusho yena. UXoliswa Nduneni-Ngema ongumphathi weJoburg Theatre, eGauteng, lapho umcimbi ubanjwa khona minyaka yonke uthe kuyabajabulisa ukuba yingxenye yomcimbi walolu hlobo ongasagcini nje kuphela kuleli kodwa osuzokwaziwa i-Afrika yonke. Uthe ukuvuleleka kokuqokwa kwabazoqhudelana kulo nyaka kuyindlela entsha umcimbi ozoba iyona kusukela manje uqhubeke ubungaze impumelelo yomuntu wesifazane emikhakheni ehlukene.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umengameli Cyril Ramaphosa Image: File/IOL graphics UNGOTI wezomthetho ubona lulude ukhalo oluzohanjwa njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, ememezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe, iPhala Phala. Ungoti weDonda Attorneys, uMnuz Melusi Xulu, uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni lungase lunyomfe ukufakwa kwesicelo esiphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyijaji, uSandile Ngcobo. UXulu uthe uRamaphosa angase afake isivimbelo esizonqanda ukuqhubeka kohlelo lwasePhalamende lokumkhipha esikhundleni. URamaphosa umemezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imithetho ayephula ekusingathweni kodaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. Enkulumweni abeyibhekise ezweni, uRamaphosa uveze ukuthi ngeke asule esikhundleni. URamaphosa uthe uyasihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo kodwa wathi umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende unamaphutha. "Nginqume ukuphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Angikwenzi lokhu ngoba nakhu ngingalihloniphi ikomiti kodwa ngenza lokhu ngoba ngikholelwa ukuthi kunamaphutha embikweni wethimba." URamaphosa uthe umbiko wethimba ugcwele izinto ezingenabufakazi. "Inzwabethi yonke lena equkethwe umbiko wethimba." UXulu uthe kungase kuthathe isikhathi eside ukuthi inkantolo inqume esicelweni esizofakwa uRamaphosa. "Kungathatha izinyanga noma unyaka. Ukhumbule ukuthi uma icala ezolifaka enkantolo enkulu, uma kuwukuthi akuhambi ngendlela afisa ngayo kungenzeka adlulele enkantolo yamacala adlulisiwe. Angaze afike eNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. Uzokhumbula ukuthi isicelo se-EFF salalelwa ngo-2024 kodwa isinqumo size saphuma ngo-2026. Ngakho ke kunzima ukusho ukuthi icala lizothatha isikhathi esingakanani." UXulu uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni luzoqhubeka uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo. "Uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo bazoqhubeka nabakwenzayo. Kuzomele asifake isicelo sokuvimba ukuqhubeka kohlelo lokumkhipha esikhundleni. Uma engakwenzi lokho uzothi eqhubeka enkantolo nabo bebe beqhubeka ngapha." Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna ukuthi luqhubeke uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni yize ephonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe iPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nomsebenzi walo. "Uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli esikhundleni luwumsebenzi wePhalamende okungafanele umiswe ukuthi kunecala elifakiwe. Kufanele uhlelo luqhubeke kanye necala." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Thambo, uthe bebevele bekulindele ukuthi uRamaphosa uzophonsela inselelo umbiko. "Akananembeza. Silindele ukuthi uSomlomo (uNkk Thoko Didiza) asiphikise isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Nathi sizosiphikisa isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Yini emenze ukuthi alinde isikhathi eside ukuthi aphonsele inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nezinhlelo zalo. Izinhlelo zePhalamende akufanele zimiswe isicelo sikaRamaphosa."

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMSUNGULI weNtuzuma Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe baphume benethemba lokuthi izocabeka indlela eya phambili Isithombe: SITHUNYELWE UMSUNGULI weThekwini Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uwathole enenhlabathi amazwi ashiwo uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kulandela ukubulawa kwamalungu abo amathathu eBhambayi, eNanda, ngoMgqibelo. Esigamekweni okuthiwa senzeke ezintatha, abeqembu lemigulukudu badubule babulala amalungu eThekwini Neighbourhood Watch amathathu. Phakathi kwababulewe, bekukhona uMnuz Nkosinathi Mhlongo (41), Mnuz Mazuzo Nomonti (48) noMnuz Mdunyiswa Nozulela (64). Kuthiwa uNozulela noMhlongo bafele endaweni yesigameko, kwathi uNomonti washonela esibhedlela esiKwaMashu, iDkt Pixley Ka Seme Memorial. Kuvela ukuthi uMhlongo ubengowokudabuka KwaMaphumulo, kuthi uNomonti noNozulela babe ngabaseFlagstaff naseLusikisiki, e-Eastern Cape. Kuthiwa nakubasolwa abathathu okuthiwa bavulele ngenhlamvu kubafi, kufe ababili njengoba bese befayela ngenhlamvu bengasaboni ukuthi badubula bani. Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo ufele esigamekweni, kwathi owesibili washonela esibhedlela esifanayo. Lieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi Esitatimendeni esithunyelwe abezindaba, uMkhwanazi ugcizelele eyokuthi izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini kufanele zisebenzisane namaphoyisa, zigweme eyokufuna ukubhekana ngqo nezigebengu. “Siyakugqugquzela ukuzibandakanya kwemiphakathi empini yokulwa nobugebengu. Iyona ndlela engasiza ukuthi kunqotshwe ubugebengu kodwa izinhlaka zomphakathi ezifana neCommunity Police Forum (CPF) nezinye izinhlangano kufanele zibe amehlo nezindlebe zamaphoyisa, zingenzi into ezogcina ibeka impilo yamalungu azo engcupheni,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe zibonakele izigebengu zidubula amaphoyisa nokudweba isithombe esicacile sokuthi ngeke zicabange kabili ngaphambi kokuba zidubule umuntu ojwayelekile. “Sinxusa abaholi balezi zinhlangano ukuthi baziyamanise nemigomo yokusebenza kweCPF ebhalwe kuMthethosisekelo, bazibandakanye ezinhlelweni zokulwa nobugebengu ezivumelekile,” kusho uMkhwanazi. UJali uthe lesi sitatimende asehlanga kahle kubona. “Siyafisa uNdonga asihoxise lesi sitatimende esisihumushe ngokuthi sidutshulwa, silimale ngoba sizenza amaphoyisa. Kufike kuthiwe, asiwalekelele amaphoyisa, uma sesibulawa, bese kukhulunywa kanje,” kusho uJali. Uqhube wathi into ebasukumisa phansi bazibambele mathupha empini yobugebengu eNanda ukuthi uma ebizelwa izigameko zobugebengu amaphoyisa aye akhale ngokuthi awanele, kokunye athi amaveni awekho. Uthe bebengakulindele nhlobo ukuthi uMkhwanazi akhulume kanje emva kwesigameko. “Bekufanele uma ebona ukuthi kukhona esingakwenzi kahle, asondele kithi asinike umhlahlandlela ngoba iqiniso lithi ubugebengu buphumile esandleni eNanda. Uma sekushiwo kanje, sizizwa sengathi siyizimvu zomhlatshelo,” usho kanje. Uthe basalishumayela ivangeli lokuthi ayisukunyelwe phezulu eyobugebengu baseNanda, wathi kufanele kuphungulwe amaphoyisa aseziteshini ezingenabo ubugebengu obuningi, ayotshalwa eNanda, awoMkhandlu weTheku, aqinise izivimbamgwaqo eNanda, ukuvimba izigelekeqe ezicanasa ngezimoto nezibhamu ezizisebenzisa ukwenza ubugebengu, bese kusungulwa uhlelo lwama-wardens olubonakale luba wusizo eGoli. Uthe asengu-34 esewonke amalungu enhlangano yakhe asebulawe yizigebengu emalokishini aseThekwini, kusuka ngo-2022, nathe isigameko esenzeke ngoMgqibelo, sibashiye bekhathazekile ngoba sibadwebele isithombe sokuthi kusaqhubeka ukubulawa kwabo. Obekhona kwenzeka isigameko ocele ukungadalulwa, uthe iziwombe zokugqekezelwa kwabantu endaweni zaqala ngoLwesihlanu ebusuku, babikelwa ngazo. “Sahlangana saba yiqulu labaqaphi ababalelwa ku-16, sachusha emigwaqweni ehlukene endaweni. Izibhamu sasilokhu sizizwa ziqhuma ngapha nangapha kodwa singababoni nabafana,” kukhumbula owesilisa. Uthe bathi besachusha kanjalo, bavele bazithela kubasolwa abathathu behamba ngezinyawo, bazama ukubamisa babaseshe njengoba babesola ukuthi bayizigebengu. “Yilapho abavele bavulela ngenhlamvu bebhekise kithi, savele sasaphazeka yonke indawo, sibaleka. Kwadubuleka amalungu ethu amathathu,” usho kanje. Uthe yilapho ababona khona ukuthi ngesikhathi zivulela ngezulu lezandla izigebengu, kudubuleke nesisodwa sazo, safela esigamekweni. “Sazitshela ukuthi ababili bakwazile ukuphunyula babaleke kanti sizozwa emva kwesikhathi ukuthi kulaba ababalekile, owesibili naye ugcine efela esibhedlela,” kusho ulona wesilisa, othe bahlanu abagcine befa ngesigameko. Uveze eyokuthi ubugebengu obese buqale phansi endaweni obokugqekezelwa kwabantu, bakhonjwe ngezibhamu, bakhishiswe imali emabhange bese bephucwa amaselula.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMNDENI wakwaMhlongo ozophinde unekele abakuleli impilo yawo njengoba uhlelo oluthi KwaNjomane lukhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu USIMANGELE Mhlongo, oqale ukuduma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngomakaChicken, useveze ukuthi ukuvulela abantu babone izinkinga zabo njengomndeni kwenze baveza isithombe sempilo ephilwa eminye imindeni. Ukusho lokhu njengoba isizini yohlelo oluthi KwaNjomane ikhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu ngo-7 ebusuku. USimangele uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi bevela okokuqala njengomndeni impilo yabo yashintsha kakhulu. "Sakhula njengomndeni impilo yethu yashintsha, izinto sathanda ukuzibheka ngenye indlela. Izinselelo esasibhekene nazo zazinzima kakhulu kodwa kwathi uma zivela kwithelevishini izinto zaguquka. Mina njengomuntu owayehamba phambili ezintweni zomndeni ngabhekana nezingqinamba ezihlukene nxazonke, ngenxa yokuthi kwakumele ngithathe izinqumo njengosisi, umama kanye nomholi emndenini nokuyinto engabanga lula," kusho uSimangele. Kule sizini entsha uthe abantu kuzobathusa ukubona ukuthi naye uba nezinkinga ezinkulu abhekana nazo othandweni, nokuyinto eyehlela wonke umuntu. "Kuzocaca ukuthi nakimi izinto azihlali zihamba kahle othandweni, kuya le nale. Kodwa kukho konke ivangeli engihlala ngilikhuthaza ukuthi sihloniphane. Kimina kube nzima ukuthi ngithathe ubungoma nomndeni wami ngikubeke nje eceleni, ngaba nomhawu wokuthi ngizikhethe mina bese ngiyazethemba kukho konke engikwenzayo, lokho kwenze ngenza izinto eziningi engizithandayo futhi angizisoli ngokuthatha leso sinqumo," kusho yena. Uthe nakule sizini abalandeli bohlelo bazobona izinkinga abangazifihli ziqhubeka nokuhlasela umndeni wabo, ezinye zazo ezingakaze zixazululeke selokhu baqala ukuba semehlweni abantu. Bona uthe akukhona ukuzenzisa lokhu abakuvezayo njengoba bekholelwa ekutheni ukubonakala beveza amaqiniso kungasiza nabanye. "Ababukeli abazilungiselele ngoba lukhulu oluzayo, singumndeni sazitshela ukuthi asifuni ukuvezela abantu amanga, impilo esingayiphili, ngakho sibalethele lokhu abakufunayo nabakuthandayo," kuchaza yena.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, ungenele umbango wesikhundla esibhekwe ngabomvu engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal. UShelembe uphakanyiselwe emjahweni wesikhundla sephini likasihlalo weDA KwaZulu-Natal nokuyisikhundla esibangwa kakhulu. Bayisishiyagalolunye ababheke lesi sikhundla, kanti ingqungquthela izoba ngoMeyi 9. UShelembe uthe ukuqokelwa kwakhe kulesi sikhundla kuzoqinisa ubudlelwano beqembu neNdlunkulu kaZulu namakhosi, kuphinde kukhulise iDA ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Abantu abaphakamise igama lami bathe into yokuqala abayibona ibalulekile wukuthi siyibukele eduze into ethinta ubukhosi, umphakathi wasemakhaya, owasemalokishini kanye nabantu abahlala emapulazini. Mina ngisebenzile kakhulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Ngiqale ukusebenza kulezi zindawo ngo-2012. Ukukhankasa kulezi zindawo kwehlukile, akufani nasesilungwini lapho okwazi khona ukukhankasa ngokuthi ufonele abantu noma ubathumele imiqhafazo. Abantu basemakhaya badinga ukuthi usondele eduze kwabo, wakhe ubudlelwano nabo." UShelembe uthe kuningi akwenzile kusukela aqokwa ukuba axhumanise iDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu ngo-2023. Uthe wakwazi ukuhlela ukuthi umholi weDA osanda kuphuma esikhundleni, uMnuz John Steenhuisen, ayokotha iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. "Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal ukuba buyokotha iSilo. Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi besifundazwe ukuthi buyobona uNyazi (umholi wamaNazaretha ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni. Nemeya yaseMngeni (uMnuz Chris Pappas) maningi amakhosi engimxhumanise nawo. Lokhu ngikwenza ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi iKwaZulu-Natal yakhelwe kakhulu esisekelweni samasiko nenkolo." UShelembe uwusihlalo wekomiti elibhekele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand, aphinde abe uSotswebhu weDA kuMasipala AbaQulusi. Bobabili labo masipala baphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP neDA. UShelembe uzishaya isifuba ngokuthi uvundulule inkohlakalo eningi kule mikhandlu. UShelembe uyena umvusi wenyamazane ezinsolweni ezagcina ziholela ekuxoshweni kowayeyimeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusi, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. "EZululand ziningi izimenenja ezixoshiwe ezinye eziphenywayo ngenxa yomsebenzi owenziwe yikomiti engiliholayo. Kungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi kube nosihlalo wekomiti olwa ngale ndlela nenkohlakalo," kusho uShelembe. UShelembe uke waba ngumholi wophiko lwentsha kwiDA KwaZulu-Natal, njengamanje uyingxenye yethimba eleluleka Inkosi yaseNadi, eMgungundlovu, uVusizwe Zondi. UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, owine umklomelo wenyaka, iBetway Premiership Coach of The Month, okwesithathu kulandelana Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, uzobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ekhaya ngoLwesithathu eshayela phezulu kulandela ukudla umklomelo womqeqeshi ovelele wenyanga, iBetway Premiership Coach of The Month, okwesithathu kulandelana. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal osebuyisele iSundowns esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership, uqokwe njenge-Coach of The Month ngenyanga ka-Ephreli. Kule nyanga iSundowns iwine imidlalo emithathu, yadlala ngokulingana kwemibili kwemihlamu eyidlalile. Kulo mklomelo, uCardoso wehlule u-Abdeslam Ouaddou we-Orlando Pirates beChiefs, uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef abawine imidlalo emithathu kweyisithupha ngo-Ephreli. ISIBABULI se-Orlando Pirates, u-Oswin Appollis, siwine umklomelo womdlali ovelele, iBetway Premiership Player of The Month, nowegoli elivelele, iBetway Premiership Goal of The Month Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX Umklomelo womdlali wenyanga, iBetway Premiership Player of The Month, udliwe ngu-Oswin Appollis wePirates, owushebe nowegoli elihambe phambili, iBetway Premiership Goal of The Month. U-Appollis uwine ngegoli elishaye ngesikhathi bebhekene naMaZulu ngo 3-0 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena. Emidlalweni emine, u-Appollis ushaye amagoli amane, wakha elilodwa. UCardoso uzohola iSundowns uma isibhekene neChiefs eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu, ngo-7.30 ebusuku.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOMPEMPE wase-DRC, uJean-Jacques Ndala, okushaywa amakhala ngokuqokwa kwakhe ukudlalisa owamanqamu eCaf Champions League phakathi kweMamelodi Sundowns ne-AS FAR ngoMeyi 17, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli INHLANGANO eyengamele ibhola e-Afrika, iConfederation of African Football (Caf) iphonselwe inselelo ngesinqumo sayo sokuqoka unompempe waseDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC), uJean-Jacques Ndala,  njengezodlalisa umdlalo womlenze wokuqala wamanqamu weCaf Champions League phakathi kweMamelodi Sundowns ne-AS FAR Rabat yaseMorocco ngoMeyi 17. Owomlenze wokuqala uzodlalelwa eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoMeyi 17, kuthi owomlenze wesibili ugijinywe ngoMeyi 24 ePrince Moualy Abedellah Stadium, eRabat, eMorocco. Kuvela ukuthi iSundowns ne-AS FAR bathumele izikhalo ezisemthethweni kwi-Caf ngoMsombuluko beshaya amakhala ngokuqokwa kukaNdala. La maqembu akhala ngokuthi ukuqokwa kwalo nompempe kubukela phansi ubumqoka balo mdlalo wamanqamu weChampions League ngenxa yomlando wakhe ongemuhle. UNdala nguyena owayeshaya impempe emdlalweni wamanqamu we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) phakathi kweMorocco neSenegal ngoJanuwari, eMorocco. Sekungumlando ukuthi kulo mdlalo wamanqamu we-Afcon kwaba nezidubedube ngenxa yezinqumo zakhe ezishaqisayo. Kusolwa yena ngokuvumela iSenegal ibuyele enkundleni ngemuva kokuphuma enkundleni kulandela ukubeka kwakhe iphenathi. Kumanje kusalindwe isinqumo se-Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) ngemuva kokuba iSenegal idlulise isikhalo ikhala ngesinqumo seCaf sokunika iMorocco indebe ye-Afcon ekubeni kuyiyona iSenegal eyanqoba ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu. Ngokusho kwe-Morocco World News, imithombo engaphakathi kwi-Caf iqinisekisile komunye umthombo wezindaba waseMorocco, i-El Botola, ukuthi la maqembu azodlala owamanqamu weChampions League anemibuzo ngokuqokwa kukaNdala. Ikomiti le-Caf eliqoka onompempe likuqinisekisile ngeSonto ukuthi uNdala nguyena ozodlalisa owamanqamu weChampions League, azolekelelwe ngabakhaya bakhe uJulien Ngila noGradiel Munia njengabasizi bakanompempe. UJesse Moise uzoba yi-fourth official. U-Ahme Abdelaziz waseSudan uzoqhoqhobala i-Video Assistant Referee (VAR), esizwa ngu-Ahmed Shelmani waseLibya noDiana Chikotscha waseZambia.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs, uBrandon Petersen, usethubeni lokuthola indawo esikwatini seBafana Bafana esizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoJuni Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX SEKUFIKE isikhathi sokuthi umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, ashintshe umqondo ngabadlali beKaizer Chiefs ngoba sebebaningi okunzima ukuziba ukuthi bafanelwe yindawo eqenjini eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoba seCanada, Mexico nase-United States of America (USA) ngoJuni. Lona wumbono welinye lamabamba abaqeqeshi kwiChiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, awutshele abezindaba emuva kokubambana ngo 1-1 ne-Orlando Pirates emdlalweni wabakhaya ngempelasonto edlule. Ukuzitshwa nguBroos kwabadlali beChiefs kuba sematheni ngaso sonke isikhathi uma ezomemezela isikwati. Kuyaqapheleka nokho ukuthi ezikwatini ezimbili zalo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ezidlale kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) bebengabonwa nangokhalo abadlali baMakhosi. Kwi-Afcon yaseMorocco uMduduzi Shabalala weChiefs wayekubadlali okwakucushwe ngabo. Yize ukushiya ngaphandle abadlali baMakhosi kumakhela inzondo kubalandeli baleli qembu laseNaturena kodwa uBroos ubengakufihli ukuthi isizathu sakhe wukuthi akamboni oseqophelweni lomhlaba kuleli qembu laseNaturena. Ngokusho kukaBroos ngesikhathi ememezela iBafana ngaphambi kwemidlalo yobungani nePanama ngenyanga edlule, unozinti weChiefs uBrandon Petersen ubesethubeni lokuthola indawo kulesi sikwati kodwa wasala ngaphandle ngenxa yokugula okuphoqe ukuthi ayohlizwa esibhedlela. Lo nozinti osekungumlando ukuthi usebuyele esikimini seChiefs, ugile izimanga kowabakhaya waze waqokwa njengomdlali ovelele. Okuhle ngalokhu wukuthi uPetersen ukwenze phambi kwakhe uBroos obesenkundleni. Emuva komdlalo uBen Youssef uthumele umyalezo kuBroos ethi akuyena uPetersen yedwa okufanele abheke ngakuyena kwiChiefs uma eseqoka isikwati seNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba bayangqongqoza oBradley Cross, Lebohang Maboe noThabiso Monyane. “Ngokwami bacela kwabahlanu abadlali beChiefs engibona kubafanele ukuthi bangene endizeni ebheke kwiNdebe yoMhlaba neBafana,” kusho uBen Youssef. “Kufanele ukuthi kuzoba yisinqumo okunzima ukusithatha kuBroos ngoba kwiChiefs iyodwa bane kumbe bahlanu okufanele bangasali kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Kasinawo amandla okuphikisa uBroos ngezizathu zakhe kodwa uPetersen ngokwami wayevele ekulungele ukuba yingxenye yeBafana engakaxinwa nawukugula. “Ngicabanga ukuthi yinto efanayo nakuCross, Maboe noMonyane kodwa siyamethemba umqeqeshi." IFifa inqume ukuthi izikwati zeNdebe yoMhlaba ezisazophundlwa zithunyelwe kuyona ngoMeyi 13. UBroos uzomemezela isikwati sabadlali abangu-55 emasontweni azayo. IFifa inqume ukuthi wonke amaqembu adedele abadlali ngoMeyi 26. NgoJuni 1 iFifa ilindele ukuthi wonke amaqembu ayinike uhla lwabadlali abangu-23 kuya ku-26 azodlala ngabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-EVIDENCE Makgopa we-Orlando Pirates ejabula nozakwao uMakhehleni Makhaula emuva kokushaya elinye lamagoli abahlule ngawo iStellenbosch FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, ngoLwesibili ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-ORLANDO Pirates eqhubekile 'nokufaka ukushisa' kwiMamelodi Sundowns embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ngokuwola amaphuzu agcwele kwiStellenbosch FC e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. Amagoli aweze iPirates avalelwe phakathi ngu-Evidence Makgopa noPatrick "Tito" Maswanganyi esiwombeni sokuqala. Ukucosha amaphuzu amathathu kwePirates kuyenze yanciphisa igebe lafinyelela kwamabili phakathi kwayo neMamelodi Sundowns ezodlala neKaizer Chiefs ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. EZimnyama zisendaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-62 emuva kwemidlalo engu-27. Zilandela amaBrazilians aseqoqe awu-64 emuva kwemidlalo engu-27. ISundowns idinga ukuyiwina yonke imidlalo emithathu ukuze izowina isicoco seligi yePremiership ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulandelana. Nokho lokhu kuzoncika ekutheni eZimnyama ziyaqhubeka yini nokucosha amaphuzu emidlalweni emithathu ezisalele. IPirates ilwela ukuqeda ukucanasa kweSundowns kwiligi yaseMzansi nokuqeda ishobolo leminyaka lokwehlulwa yiligi. KoweStellies, iPirates ikhombise zibekwa ukuthi izimisele ngothola amagoli zibekwa kodwa ibihluleka ukugqobhoza udonga lwasemuva obelwakhiwe nguMosa Lebusa ohlukane neSundowns no-Olisa Ndah ochithwe ngeZimnyama. Nokho kugcine kubhidlike konke ngomzuzu ka-41 ngesikhathi uMakgopa ephakama phakathi kwazo lezi zitobha engqofela phakathi ibhola ebeligotshwe ngakwesokudla. Emuva kwaleli goli, iPirates ibuye ngamandla nokuphethe ngokuthi uMaswanganyi avalele phakathi elesibili ngemuva kwemizuzu emine. Esiwombeni sesibili, iStellies izamile ukubuya emdlalweni emuva kokwenza izinguquko kodwa yagcina ihlulekile ukushaya igoli. Emdlalweni olandelayo, iPirates izobhekana neMagesi ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ngo-8 ebusuku.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana UKUGCONANA sakuxabana uma behlezi ndawonye, okuhambisana namancoko avame ukuphetha ngempikiswano sekwakhele idumela nogazi umculi kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondli Msweli owaziwa ngeShoshozela. Abaconsi phansi kubalandeli ngenxa yama-video abavame ukuwenza behlezi ndawonye, kokunye baqophe bedla bebanga ukudla noma bexoxa futhi bephikisana ngezinto ezehlukene. Ukuthandwa kwabo kufakazelwa wukukhula kwezinombolo zabantu ababalandelayo manje njengoba uGqizile esenabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-378 000 kwiFacebook, abawu–190 000 nama-like awu-3 million kwiTikTok. UMsweli yena ulandelwa abantu abangaphezu kuka-175 000 kwiFacebook, abawu-26 000 nama-like awu-353 000 kwiTikTok. UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana Kuxoxwa noGqizile, owaziwa ngokuthi uBende - uthe lokho kwaqala sakudlala kwathi ngelinye ilanga baqopha i-video okwathi bangayifaka emakhasini abo kwiFacebook, abantu bakhombisa ukuyithakasela kakhulu. “Into yethu iqale ngokuthi umngani wami uMsweli vele uwumuntu onamancoko kakhulu, okuthi noma sizihlalele sixoxa into ebalulekile yena alokhu encokola. Kuqale lapho-ke ngokuthi uma ekhuzwa, angakhuzeki - kuze kusize ukuthi kungenelele mina uma kukhona esikuxoxayo  sizihlalele nezinye izinsizwa esizwana nesazana nazo,” kusho uGqizile. UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana Abaningi abake babone ama-video alezi zinsizwa bazokhumbula futhi bazi ukuthi zivame ukuphikisana ngamancoko azo okuthi uma kukhuzwa omunye, okhuzayo athi: “awukahle, awukahle wena” - osekuphenduke itemu elisetshenziswa nangabalandeli babo. “Yinto esizoqhubeka siyenze ngoba siyabona ukuthi abantu bayayijabulela kakhulu, futhi iyasiza ngokuthi isigcine sisematheni ebantwini - okungisiza kakhulu-ke mina njengoba ngibuye ngigxile emculweni ukuthi ngingalibaleki kubalandeli bami,” kulanda uGqizile. Lezi zinsizwa zineminyaka emithathu zazana manje. UGqizile udabuka KwaCholwane, eNkandla, kuthi uMsweli yena kube ngowaseCinci, eMpangeni. Okwamanje bahlala ndawonye KwaMashu, eThekwini.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ABADLALI bamaqembu ehlukene eHollywoodbets Super League, kwethulwa isizini entsha ka-2026 yeSuper League eSABC Studio, eGoli, izolo KUBUKEKA uzokwehla umthwalo wezindleko zokuhambela imidlalo emaqenjini eHollywoodbets Super League ngemuva kokuba iSouth African Football Association (Safa) ngokubambisana neHollywoodbets engabaxhasi, bememezele ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwamaqoqo amabili eligi yesizini ka-2026 yeHollywoodbets Super League. Lokhu kusho ukuthi isizini ka-2026 yeSuper League ezoqala ngochungechunge lwemidlalo  ngempelasonto kaMeyi 22-24, ezinkundleni zase-University of Johannesburg Soweto Campus, eSoweto, izobe inamaqoqo amabili okuyi-Super Rise no-Super Era. Kweminye imidlalo, amaqembu azodlala enkundleni eyodwa ngosuku. Amaqembu azoba yisishiyagalombili iqoqo ngalinye kule ligi enamaqembu angu-16. Ku-Super Rise kuboshelwe iMamelodi Sundowns Ladies, TS Galaxy Queens, University of Western Cape (UWC), University of Johannesburg, Stellenbosch FC, University of Pretoria, Ezemvelo Women’s FC neDiepkloof Ladies FC. Ku-Super Era kuboshelwe i-JVW FC, University of Fort Hare, Tshwane University of Technology (TUT), Richmond United Ladies, City Lads FC, First Touch Ladies neRamatlaohle FC. Le ligi kazwelonke yebhola labesifazane okuyiyona enkulu eNingizimu Afrika nephakela ngabadlali iqembu lesizwe lakuleli, iBanyana Banyana, yasungulwa ngo-2019 ngamaqembu angu-12. Amaqembu azodla umhlanganiso ku-Super Rise no-Super Era azodlala amaPlay-Offs okuhlunga iqembu elingompetha bakazwelonke beSuper League ekupheleni kwesizini ngoNovemba. Oyisikhulu esiphezulu kwiSafa, uLydia Monyepao, uthe lezi zinguquko kuhloswe ngazo ukwenza ibhola labesifazane ligqame liphinde limaketheke. “Amaqembu akuGroup A awezukuba nalo ithuba lokudlala namaqembu kaGroup B kuze kube sekupheleni kwesizini sekudlala ama-Play Off,” kusho uMonyepao izolo, kwethulwa iHollywoodbets Super League. “Sizokwenyusa izinga lokubukwa kwemidlalo ngokuba nemidlalo nama-festival (imidlalo edlalwa ngosuku olulodwa enkundleni eyodwa). Lokhu okusho ukuthi uma ukhuluma ngesibalo sezibukeli ezihambela imidlalo yebhola labesifazane, sizobona izibukeli eziningi, ezinye ezizobe zibuka kumabonakude. Lokho kuzonika bonke abadlali ithuba lokubonakala kumabonakude.”

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: INDAWO yesigameko kuQuarry Road lapho kungqongqe khona imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 Image: KZN HUMAN SETTLEMENTS UMNYANGO wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu KwaZulu-Natal uphezu kwezihlelo zokutholela inqwaba yabafundi basemijondolo eyakhele umqwaqo uQuarry Road, eThekwini, umfaniswano wesikole ukuze basheshe babuyele esikoleni. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umlilo ungqongqise imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 ngoLwesine, kwasala dengwane inqwaba yemindeni. Abakhahlamezekile kuthiwa bagcinwe ematendeni amabili amakhulu agxunyekwe endaweni yesigameko. Okhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Ndabezinhle Sibiya, uthe umlilo ushiye dengwane abantu abangu-477, okukhona kubo izingane ezingu-299 bese kuba abantu abadala abangu-178. “Njengamanje simatasatasa nokutholela abafundi umfaniswano wesikole njengoba kufanele babuyele esikoleni masinyane. UMphathiswa wezeMfundo uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka uhanjiselwe umbiko,” kusho uSibiya. Uthe olunye usizo ithimba elilunikeza abagilwa kule ndawo, olokubhalisa labo abalahlekelwe omazisi kanjalo nezitifiketi zokuzalwa zezingane. Uthe ngokuthola kwabo umlilo ocekele phansi izakhiwo kule ndawo uqale emjondolo womuntu wokufika kuleli, okuthiwa uvele wacela empunzini emva kwesigameko. Uthe ukuhanjiswa kosizo oludingwa amagilwa kufaka phakathi noMasipala weTheku njengoba besebenzisana nehhovisi leMeya uMnuz Cyril Xaba kanjalo nelikaNksz Thembi Simelane onguNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu ezingeni likazwelonke. Uthe amathimba alekelela kule ndawo azoqhubeka nokuba khona kuyo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abakhahlamezekile bayakuthola ukusizakala abakudingayo. Uveze nokuthi noMphathiswa wezeMpilo esifundazweni uNksz Nomagugu Simelane kanjalo nowezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga nabo bawathumele awabo amathimba ukuzonikezela ngosizo oluqondene neminyango yabo oludingwa abagilwa. Ubonge ezinye izinhlangano, athe zifake isandla ekunikezeleni ngosizo kulesi simo. Phakathi kwazo uthe kukhona iGift of the Givers Foundation esize ngomatrasi nezingubo zokulala, i-Al Imdaad Foundation enikezele ngamaphasela okudla, iRed Cross elekelele ngokudla okufudumele, i-Ikabawo Performing Arts Academy namalungu omphakathi abanikele ngokudla okuvuthiwe.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUVUKE umunyu kuNksz Thembile Biyela ekhumbula ubunzima adlule kubho empilweni ngenkathi ethweswa iziqu zobuthishela e-UKZN UKUTHUKWA ngapha nangapha, namagama angemahle ayebhekiswe kuyena ekhulelwe esemncane efunda emabangeni aphezulu, ukusebenzisele ukuthi kube yisikhuthazi sokuthi afeze okuhle nabekufisa ngempilo yakhe, wathweswa iziqu zobuthishela enyuvesi. Lowo uNksz Thembile Biyela waseNdwedwe, ongesinye sezitshudeni ezithweswe iziqu zemikhakha ehlukene e-University of KwaZulu-Natal kuleli sonto. Emukela lezi ziqu uNksz Biyela, uvukwe wumunyu ekhumbula bonke lobo buhlungu adlule kubo, wakhumbula unyaka owawunzima kakhulu kuyena u-2016 lapho akhulelwa khona esafunda uGrade 11, abaningi bemgxeka ngephutha alenza. “Izenzo zabantu kimina ngenkathi ngibhekene naleso simo zazenza ukuthi ngizizwe sengathi impilo yami ngeke isaya phambili. Babengihleka, bengihleba futhi bengiphatha kabi kangangokuthi ngisho nangenkathi sengibuyela esikoleni ngangizizwa ngingamukelekile,” usho kanje.
