KUVUKE umunyu  kuNksz Thembile Biyela, ekhumbula ubunzima adlule kubo empilweni ngenkathi ethweswa iziqu zobuthishela e-UKZN Eqhuba, uthe okunye okwafana nokuthela usawoti esilondeni wukuthi ukhulele ekhaya ebelingamile kahle emalini, kangangokuthi kwesinye isikhathi ubeya esikoleni engadlile. “Impilo ibe nzima ngokuphindiwe sengifeyila u-matric, okwenza ngazizwa ngiyisahluleki futhi kwenza ukuthi ngiqale nokukholwa yizinto ezimbi ezazishiwo abantu ngami.  Konke lokho kwacishe kwaqeda nya ngempilo yami,” kusho uNksz Biyela. Uthe emva kwalokho wahlala ekhaya iminyaka embalwa, esakhulisa umntwana  futhi ezama nokukhokha umoya. Wagcina ebuyele esikoleni waze waphasa u-matric ayesewenza okwesibili ngo-2020. Lokho kwamsiza ukuqhubeka nemfundo yakhe enyuvesi. Nalapho bekungelula neze njengoba bekumele ukuthi abhekane nomthwalo wokufunda, ebe ekhulisa umntwana. Ukubhimba kwemali kwakungamnike thuba kodwa waphokophela ngoba efisa ukusebenzisa imfundo ukucaba indlela yekusasa elihle. “Ngifuna ukuthi izingane zami zikhule zazi ukuthi noma ngabe kunzima kangakanani empilweni yakho, kepha akumele ukuthi uphonse ithawula - futhi ngifuna nokukhombisa abantu ukuthi ukuzala usemncane akukuhle kodwa akukuvimbi ukufeza amaphupho akho,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUKHONA nesisebenzi kwabathathu abaqothe abomndeni abayisikhombisa bomndeni waseNewark, eMandeni KUKHONA nobeyisisebenzi kwabathathu abasolwa ngecala lokubulala ngesihluku umndeni wabayisikhombisa eNewark, KwaDukuza, ngoLwesibili. Izidumbu zabafi okuthiwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-20 no-83, kuvela ukuthi zikhonjwe abasolwa eMelmoth, ngoLwesithathu. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe kubasolwa okuthiwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-21 no-28, kukhona oyedwa obeyisisebenzi emzini wabafi. Uthe kulindeleke ukuthi bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaDukuza, namuhla. Elandisa ngesigameko, uthe abagilwa baqale bathunjwa, besuswa ekhaya labo eliseNewark ngoLwesibili ebusuku, bayobulawa eMelmoth. “Yisisebenzi esihlanza indlu esihlabe umkhosi ngesigameko ngoLwesithathu ekuseni, kulandela ukuthi sifike ekhaya labagilwa, sathola ukuthi kugqekeziwe, amalungu omndeni ayisikhombisa wonke engekho, kanjalo nemoto ingekho,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe kube sekubizelwa endaweni yesigameko amaphoyisa aseNewark kanjalo namanye ama-unit amaphoyisa. Kuwona uthe kusebenzisane amaphoyisa aseNewark, abaphenyi baKwaDukuza, KwaDukuza Tactical Response Team, Provincial Counter Intelligence Unit, Provincial Counter Kidnapping Unit neProvincial Serious Violence Crimes Unit. Uthe uphenyo lwawo luqale lwawaholela KwaHlomendlini, eMandeni, lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona abasolwa ababili ngoLwesithathu. “Oyedwa wabasolwa utholwe neselula yoyedwa wabagilwa. Umkhondo ube usuwakhomba KwaDendethu, eSundumbili, amaphoyisa lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona umsolwa wesithathu,” kusho uNetshiunda. Udalule ukuthi umsolwa wesithathu yena utholwe nesibhamu. Uthe angu-11 amaselula abagilwa, atholwe kubasolwa. Uthe yilapho amaphoyisa ethole khona ukuthi oyedwa wabagilwa ubesebenzela abagilwa. Kwabe sekuvela nokuthi abasolwa ngokubambisana bagqekeze emzini wabagilwa, bababopha ngentambo. “Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo uqale wadlwengula umgilwa oneminyaka engu-20 ngaphambi kokuba babalayishe emotweni yomunye wabo (abagilwa), bayikhomba eMelmoth,” kusho uNetshiunda, othe bahambe ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-200km ukusuka emzini wabagilwa kuyiwa endaweni yesigameko. Uveze ukuthi amaphoyisa athole ukuthi umsolwa obedlwengule umgilwa (20) ekhaya lakhe, uphinde wamdlwengula okwesibili sekufikwe eMelmoth. Uthe emva kokumdlwengula isibili, ube esefuna ngodli imininingwane yabagilwa abathathu yasebhange nezinombolo zakhona eziyimfihlo. “Emva kokuthola le mininingwane, babe sebebadubula bebabulala bobathathu. Laba abanye abagilwa abane, bona bagwazwe, baze bafa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luveze ukuthi ngoLwesibili ebusuku kanjalo nangoLwesithathu ekuseni, kube nemali ekhishwe emabhange abagilwa izikhawu eziningi. UKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Mkhwanazi, uwashayele ihlombe amaphoyisa ngokusheshe ababophe abasolwa. Ube eseyalela abaphenyi ukuthi baqinisekise ukuthi ubulungiswa buyenzeka ukuze izihlobo zabagilwa zizothobeka amanxeba. Uthe kuyakhathaza ukuzwa ukuthi omunye wabasolwa ubeqashwe abagilwa. “Siyabanxusa abaqashi ukuthi abazikhathaze ngokuthola ulwazi ngomuntu abamqashayo, baphinde bayihlole indlela yabo yokuziphatha esolisayo,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe imvamisa, ezindaweni ezingamapulazi noma ezithe qekelele, amacala enziwa ngabantu ngabagilwa ababaziyo noma abasondelene nabo.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YINGXENYE yamalungu ebandla iSt Johannes National Church of Zion uMnuz Siboniso Sithole, uDkt Arch-Bishop Siyabonga Chiliza, uMnuz Luyanda Mlungwana noMnuz Thabiso Magwaza NGENYANGA ezayo kuhlelwe inkonzo yesikhumbuzo senhlekelele yengozi yesitimela eyadlula nemiphefumulo engu-87 kwathi abagibeli abawu-200 balimala kabi eDuffs Road, eThekwini, ngo-Okthoba 14, 1965. Omunye wabagqugquzeli bale nkonzo, uNksz Thobile Kweyama, uthe kuzobe sekungokwesibili bekhumbula le nhlekelele. UNksz Kweyama, oyiPhini likaNobhala ebandleni iSt Johannes National Church of Zion KwaMashu, uthe isikhumbuzo sizobanjelwa esigcemeni sakwa-C kuMtoti Road esidlangaleni. "Le nkonzo ibihlale yenziwa njalo ngonyaka ukukhumbula labo abasishiya. Nakuba kunjalo, kulo nyaka sifisa ukuyibeka kwelinye izinga elithe thuthu njengoba simema nomphakathi waKwaMashu nabasebenzi bakwaPrasa," kusho uNksz Kweyama. Ngokomlando oqoshiwe, lesi sitimela esehlelwa yilo mshophi sasilayishe abantu abamnyama ababebalelwa ku-1 500. Lesi sigameko senzeka ngezikhathi kusenobandlululo. Ngenhloso yokuziphindiselela, abagibeli bakhiphela ulaka lwabo kubasebenzi bakajantshi. Izinkumbi zabantu zahlangana zashaya inhlabaluhide, zamashela endaweni yesigameko. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi babebalelwa ku-100 000 abantu abahambela inkonzo yomngcwabo yalaba sebenzi abamnyama abangu-87. Ngokusho kwe-https://en.wikipedia.org, le ngozi yadalwa ngamabomu ngoba abantu abamnyama babegitsheliswa izitimela ezingekho ezingeni lokugibelisa abantu futhi zizindala ukuthi zazingagcwala zinyinyitheke abantu. "Kwakuwumhla ka-4 Okthoba 1965 isitimela esinamakhoshi awu-11 sakwaSouth African Railways sigcwele sichichima abantu abamnyama ababephakathi kuka-1 200 no-1 500, ababephuma kosebenza e-Effington, bezodlula eDurban Station, sebebuyela lapho babehlala khona elokishini KwaMashu ngezithuba zabo-5.28 ntambama. Emgwaqweni u-Effingham Road, izinqola ezintathu zokugcina zaphaphalaza maqede zagingqika. Ukhondathi nomshayeli bathi bezwa umsindo maqede isitimela sagingqika." Kulesi sigameko abagibeli batholakala becakazekile ebangeni eliqhele ngamamitha angu-300 ngakujantshi. Kuthiwa kwagcwala odokotela, abahlengikazi nabosizo lokuqala endaweni yesigameko. Omunye wabasinda kule ngozi wasola uhulumeni wamaBhunu ngokwenza itulo lokubulala abantu abamnyama ngale ngozi. Yingakho ibhungu elimhlophe elalino-25, uWalter Hartslief, lathi liyosiza endaweni yesigameko, iqulu labantu elalithukuthele ligane unwabu lambulala ngesihluku maqede lahlasela nomunye umsebenzi. Kwagwetshwa abantu abathathu ngokufa kukaHartslief.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-ADEN McCarthy weKaizer Chiefs evimba uThemba Zwane weMamelodi Sundowns emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IKAIZER Chiefs iqinise ithemba le-Orlando Pirates lokuwina isicoco seligi ibambana neMamelodi Sundowns ngo 1-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. IChiefs ibekwe phambili nguFlavio da Silva esiwombeni sokuqala, waphendula uBrayan Leon weSundowns kwesesibili. IChiefs ingene enkundleni izolwela ukubambelela endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ukuze izongena kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, iSundowns ibibheke ukunweba igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni njengoba imiswe kabi yiPirates esisele ngamathathu ekubeni isele nangomdlalo. Ukubamba iSundowns kweChiefs kusize yona kwayisondeza kwiCaf kodwa kuhlomulise kakhulu iPirates esidinga ukuwina imidlalo yayo emithathu, izibeke ethubeni elihle lokuwina isicoco seligi osekuneminyaka siyiphunyuka. Uma iSundowns, enamaphuzu angu-65, iwina imidlalo emibili eyisalele, izogcina inamaphuzu angu-71 okuyisibalo esifanayo iPirates, elandela ngawu-62, engafinyelela kusona uma ingaqoqa amaphuzu ayisishiyagalolunye emidlalweni emithathu yokugcina. Lokhu kusho ukuthi kungagcina kubalwa amagoli ukuze kutholakale umakhonya wesizini ka-2025/2026. Enkundleni iChiefs ilicacise zibekwa iqhinga layo lokuvimbela iSundowns ukuthi ingaliqali ibhola emuva. Lokhu kuthele izithelo ngomzuzu ka-25 ngesikhathi unozinti weSundowns, uRonwen Williams, ephasela iChiefs ibhola esiswini lagcina lifike kuMduduzi Shabalala, walidlulisela kuDa Silva olibeke phathi. ISundowns ilinyalelwe nguKeanu Cupido odlalise kabi nguSiphesihle Ndlovu, wakhishwa ngohlaka. Indawo yakhe ithathwe nguGrant Kekana. Kwenzeke esifanayo kuShabalala weChiefs odlaliswe kabi nguJayden Adams, kwangena uGaston Sirino. Esiwombeni sesibili, iSundowns ibuye yacindezela ngomfutho. Kuyilungele ngomzuzu ka-54 ngesikhathi uLeon eqobela phakathi ibhola ebeligotshwe nguThapelo Morena kwesokudla. Nokho, kuyomfeke izinhlelo ngesikhathi u-Adams ethola ikhadi eliphuzi lesibili ngenxa yokwenza sengathi udlaliswe kabi. Lokhu kuholele ekutheni iChiefs ithole intuba yokuphefumula, yakha amathuba angcono kodwa yahluleka ukuwasebenzisa. U-ADEN McCarthy weKaizer Chiefs evimba uThemba Zwane weMamelodi Sundowns emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: I-EFF isikhwele yadilika ehlanganweni iHelen Suzman Foundation, eye enkantolo ifuna kuphoqwe iPhalamende ukuthi licubungule ukuthi ngabe usakulungele yini umholi waleli qembu uMnuz Julius Malema, ukuba yilungu lekomiti lasePhalamende iJudicial Service Commission (JSC). Le nhlangano ikhala ngokuthi uMalema uhlale egxibha izimantshi namajaji kanti futhi usanda kulahlwa yicala. Okhulumela i-EFF uMnuz Sinawo Thambo, usole ipolitiki ngesinyathelo sale nhlangano sokuya enkantolo yaseWestern Cape, ifuna iPhalamende liyibheke kabanzi ekaMalema kuleli komiti eliphonsa imibuzo izimantshi namajaji azoqokelwa ezinkantolo ezehlukene. Uthe ngalokhu izama ukuvala umlomo abagxeka ezobulungiswa kuleli. "Le nhlangano ifuna kususwe abantu abagxeka ukusebenza kwezobulungiswa kuleli okuyinto efana nengcindezelo. Amajaji nezobulungiswa kumele bagxekwe uma kukhona ukungahanjiswa kahle kwezinto," usho kanje. Uthe sikhona isikhathi lapho amajaji kanjalo nezobulungiswa ezihluleka khona ukushushisa osopolitiki. Ubale udaba lwemali eyatholwa epulazini likamengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, iPhala Phala. "Le nhlangano ayikaze ithi vu ngendaba yePhala Phala. Kuyacaca ukuthi kukhethwa iphela emasini uma kuyiwa ezinkantolo," kusho uThambo. Ummeli wale nhlangano, u-Advocate Jason Whyte, ekhuluma neSABC, uthe ziningi izikhawu lapho uMalema elahlwa khona amacala ezinkantolo futhi babona engakulungele ukuba yingxenye yaleli komiti ePhalamende. "Usanda kulahlwa yicala lokuqhumisa isibhamu noma enikwe ithuba lokuthi adlulise isigwebo. Uhlale egxibha ezobulungiswa egxeka amajaji kanjalo nezimantshi ezibiza ngabantu abanobandlululo ekubeni esekomitini elibaluleke kangaka ezweni. IPhalamende yilona elijuba amalungu amaqembu ahlukene kwiJSC, ngakho kumele kube abantu abaqotho abajutshwayo," usho kanje. Uthe ngalesi sinyathelo abazami ukunqumela iPhalamende ukuthi lijube bani kwiJSC. "Sifuna wonke amalungu akwiJSC ahlale ebhekwa indlela aziphethe ngayo. Sifuna iPhalamende libheke ukuthi usakulungele yini ukuba yingxenye yekomiti," usho kanje. Uthe bazohlahla indlela eya phambili uma sekuphume isinqumo senkantolo. "Siyosihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo esiyophuma. Siyobe sesibheka ukuthi yiliphi igxathu elilandelayo esizolithatha." UMalema wakhwela wadilika emantshini uTwanet Olivier, eyamgixabeza ngeminyaka emihlanu ngokuqhumisa isibhamu engqungqutheleni ye-EFF ngo-2018. Wasola le mantshi ngokuba nobandlululo wayisola ngokuba yilungu le-AfriForum.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi Umafikizolo, ngelinye lamaciko agile izimanga ngokulalelwa kakhulu kwiSpotify ngonyaka odlule KUKHUTHAZWE amaciko aseNingizimu Afrika ukuba aqhubeke asebenzise izilimi zawo ezehlukene zebele nezomdabu ukukhombisa ubuciko bawo, nokuzigqamisa ngendlela ehlukile kunejwayele ukusetshenziswa amaciko akwamanye amazwe. Lokho kungenxa yokugqama komculo wesintu umaskandi, ongeminye yemikhakha yomculo elalelwe kakhulu kwiSpotify. Izibalo ezikhishwe yile nkampani zikhombe ukuthi ikhule ngo-37% indlela okulalelwa ngayo umculo oculwa ngolimi isiZulu, okusho ukukhula ngo-120% kule minyaka emibili edlule. INhloko yoPhiko loMculo e-Afrika eseNingizimu kwiSpotify, uPhiona Okumu, idalule ukuthi lokhu kukhomba ukuthi abantu bayawuthakasela umculo ovutshelwe kusetshenziswa izilimi zomdabu, okuwuphawu lokuthi inkulu imakethe yawo emhlabeni. U-Okumu usho njalo ekhuluma kwesinye sezigcawu zokucobelana ngezobuciko saminyaka yonke ebesenziwe yiSpotify emahhovisi ayo amasha aseRosebank, eGoli, ngoLwesithathu. “Lokhu kukhombisa ukuthi akuphoqelekile ukuthi uze usebenzise izilimi zakwamanye amazwe ukugqamisa ubuciko bakho, ngakho sikhuthaza namanye amaciko asafika endimeni ukunganqeni ukucikoza esebenzisa izilimi zawo zebele ezehlukene,” usho kanje. Lezi zibalo zifakazelwe wukuthi umculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo ugile izimanga kwiSpotify nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko, okuvela ukuthi idobe abantu abangaphezu kuka-15 million bayilalela. U-Okomu uthe okunye okubajabulisile wukuthi ibalelwa ngaphezu kuka-R504 million inzuzo yemali engeniswe wukulalelwa komculo wamaciko akuleli zwe ngonyaka odlule, nokuthi abe wu-67% amaciko akuleli zwe okube nezingoma zawo ebezingena zishintshana ohlwini lweziwu-50 ezisuke zihamba phambili ngenkathi kuqhubeka unyaka odlule. “Ngale kwalokho, sithole nokuthi ungaphezu kuka-74% umculo ovutshelwe eNingizimu Afrika ofinyelele emazweni omhlaba ahlukene nyakenye, okube yisibalo esikhulu kakhulu nesingakaze sifinyelele kusona phambilini,” usho kanje.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUKHALWE ngamacala asazohlehla ezinkantolo zakuleli, ukungalungiswa kwezinkantolo kanjalo nezinye izinselelo ezibhekene nabasebenza eMnyangweni wezobuLungiswa kuncishiswa isabelomali salo mnyango. Lokhu kuvezwe abamaqembu ahlukene ePhalamende ngesikhathi kunenkulumo-mpikiswano ngesabelomali salo mnyango esethulwe nguNgqongqoshe wezobuLungiswa nokuThuthukiswa koMthethosisekelo, uNksz Mmamoloko Kubayi. UNksz Kubayi uveze ukuthi isabelomali salo nyaka sehliswe ngo-R332 million, kanti singu-R26.3 billion. "Ngizizwile izikhalo zokuthi ezinye zezinto ngeke zenzeke ngenxa yokuncishiswa kwesabelomali. Zikhona izinhlelo esizoqinisa kuzona okubalwa ukuqinisa ithimba elisebenzisana namaphoyisa nokulandelela okuphuma kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzwanele Manyi weMKP, ukhale ngokuthi amacala asazohlehla ngenxa yokungavalwa kwezikhala. "Kunezikhala ezevile ku-1 600 ezingavaliwe, nezinkantolo azilungiswa ngesikhathi okwenza kube nzima ukusebenza. Lokhu kukhomba ukuthi abasebenzi basazothwala kanzima ekubeni umnyango ubaluleke kakhulu ekushushiseni abakhohlakele." Namanye amalungu ePhalamende akhalile ngokungalungiswa kwezinkantolo, ukuhlehla kwamacala kanjalo nezinye izingqinamba ezikhona. UNksz Kubayi uthe basemkhankasweni wokuvala izikhala ezivulekile ngenxa yokukhushulelwa ezikhundleni kwabasebenzi. "Sibeke u-R2.7 billion wokunyusa amaholo ezimantshi, isiyonke imali yamaholo ingu-R16 billion okuwu-62% wesabelomali. Silwa nobugebengu ngokuqinisa ukubhaliswa kwama-sim card njengoba ubugebengu benzeka kakhulu kusetshenziswa ubuchwepheshe. Sibekele izinkampani zokuxhumana umnqamulajuqu wokuthi zihambisane nemigomo yeRICA, ezizohluleka ukwenza lokhu sizozithathela izinyathelo. Silwa nenkinga yokusabalala kwama-sim card angabhalisiwe kuleli ukunqanda ubugebengu." Uthe bandisa nezinkantolo ezizobhekana namacala athinta udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane. "Sibuyekeza nemigomo ethinta umqulu onamagama abantu asebelahlwe amacala okuhlukumeza ngokocansi ukuze uvuleleke. Ngaleyo ndlela kuzoba lula ukubona asebeke balahlwa amacala."

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City osabambile, uPitso Dladla, okulindeleke kucace maduze ngekusasa lakhe ekuholeni leli qembu ngesizini ezayo ngemuva kokulinqobela indebe yeNedbank Cup USIHLALO weDurban City, uFarouk Kadodia, uveza ukuthi kuzocaca maduze ngekusasa lomqeqeshi waleli qembu osabambile, uPitso Dladla. UKadodia olumane indlebe neSolezwe, ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi sebelinde ukusongwa kwale sizini esezihubela sakusha kuyona ngaphambi kokuthatha isinqumo ngethimba labaqeqeshi elizohola leli qembu ngesizini ezayo. UDladla uthathe izintambo zokuqeqesha njengebamba ngoFebhuwari, ngemuva kokukhonjwa indlela kukaSinethemba Badela. Ngaphansi kwesandla sikaDladla odabuka eNewtown, oThongathi, eThekwini, iCity iqophe umlando ngeledlule ngokuba yiqembu lokuqala laKwaZulu-Natal eliphakamise indebe yeNedbank Cup ngokuguqisa i-TS Galaxy ngo 2-1 kowamanqamu ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Ngaphezu kwalokho, isenethuba lokuqeda kwi-Top 8 ngesizini yalo yokuqala kwiBetway Premiership njengoba isendaweni yesikhombisa kwi-log. Inselelo ebhekene noKadodia wukuthi uDladla akazo iziqu zokuqeqesha ezifanele njengoba ngesizini ezayo bezodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Ngokomthetho weCaf, uDladla ngeke avumeleke ukuhlala ebhentshini njengoba eneziqu zokuqeqesha uCaf B License esikhundleni sezeCaf A noma ezePro License. Lokhu kusho ukuthi iCity izophoqeleka ukuqasha umqeqeshi oneziqu ezifanele, uDladla abuyele esikhundleni sokuba yiphini. “Sizolibuyekeza ithimba labaqeqeshi ngezinhloso ezinhle ngekusasa leqembu. Leli yithimba lesikhashana njengoba singakamqoki ngokugcwele umqeqeshi oyinhloko. "Sesisalelwe yimidlalo emibili ukusonga isizini, ngakho isinqumo ngethimba labaqeqeshi sizosithatha uma kuphela isizini. "Siyazazi izinhlelo esinazo ngesizini ezayo ngakho silinde kuphele isizini kucace ukuthi siyangena kwi-MTN8 noma cha,” kusho uKadodia.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMFUNDISI Makitaza webhantshi eliwolintshi emukela umklomelo wakhe ISIZULU sithi umuntu ubongwa esefile kodwa uMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu uphume eceleni njengojosaka ngokuhlonipha izingwazi zawo zisadla anhlamvana. La maqhawe abeke induku ebandla emikhakheni ehlukahlukene athulelwe isigqoko emcimbini obusePietermaritzburg City Hall ngoLwesine. Kwabachonywe uphaphe lwegwalagwala kuMgungundlovu District Legends Music Experience Awards kubalwa umakadebona emculweni we-jazz uThemba Mokoena, inkakha emculweni wokholo uSam "Mfundisi Makitaza" Zondi, usonkondlo uBotsotso "Ibhubesi LaseMgungundlovu" Mahlaba, owayengumsakazi weRadio Maritzburg ne-P4 Radio uBrian Zuma, umlingisi woZalo uZama Magubane-Ngcobo onguMaDongwe, owayedlalela iMamelodi Sundowns uSandile "AK47" Ndlovu, umsunguli wenhlangano egqugquzela ukuhlolwa kwezintombi kuleli uDkt Nomagugu Ngobese nabanye. Lo mcimbi wezindondo bewenziwe ngokubambisana wuMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu, uMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, CCIFSA, KwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation, ABASA ne-MKP Protection Services. Phakathi kwezicukuthwane ebezizimazise le ndumezulu bekukhona iMeya yalo Mkhandlu, uMzi Zuma, iMeya yaseRichmond uMelikhaya Ngcongo neyaseMpofana uMaureen Magubane, iNhloko yoMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal uDkt uNtokozo Sifunda namakhosi asezindaweni ezakhele lo mkhandlu. Kulo mcimbi akuhlonishwanga kuphela izingwazi ezibeke induku ebandla kodwa kutuswe nalezo ezingamavulandlela. UZuma ubonge kakhulu labo qolothakamango ngokuqhakambisa uMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu ngamagalelo abo. "Kumqoka kakhulu ukuhlonipha izingqalabutho zisadla anhlamvana, hhayi ukulinda zize zidlule emhlabeni. Amagalelo ala maqhawe emphakathini, ngeqhaza alibambe kwezobuciko, emculweni nakwezemidlalo, kuklame enkulu indima ekuhlanganiseni umphakathi wezinhlanga ezihlukene nabantu bamazinga angafani ndawonye." Uthe basawadinga la maqhawe ekwakheni umphakathi, asize ekucijeni abaseza ngemuva kwawo. "Asebenzise amakhono awo ukusabalalisa imiyalezo ekhuluma ngezihlava ezikhahlameza umphakathi kulezi zinsuku njengodlame lomndeni, ukukhulelwa kwentsha, izidakamizwa nokunye okuningi." UZuma ugcizelele ukuzibophezela ekutheni lo mcimbi wenziwe minyaka yonke futhi izingwazi zingatholi izindondo kuphela kodwa ziklonyeliswe nangezipho ezizozikhuthaza. IMEYA yaseMgungundlovu uMzi Zuma UMADONGWE, wengubo emnyama, emukela umklomelo wakhe UBRIAN Zuma emukela indondo yakhe kubagqugquzeli UBOTSOTSO Mahlaba, ongakwesokunxele, emukela indondo yakhe

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Izimoto ezinikelwe umnyango kaCogta UTHATHWE emalini yezinye izinhlelo zoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambinsana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal u-R 19 million okuthengwe ngawo izingqovungqovu zezimoto ezinikwe imikhandlu yamakhosi angu-30 KwaZulu-Natal. Ingxenye yemali ethenge lezi zimoto ezingundaba mlonyeni bekuhlelwe ukuthi kuholelwe abasebenzi abebezoqashwa umnyango. Lokhu kuqukethwe empendulweni ebhalwe phansi yoMphathiswa woMnyango, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, obephendula imibuzo yelungu leDA, uNksz Marlaine Nair. UButhelezi uveze ukuthi banqume ukuthi imali bathenge ngayo izimoto ngenxa yokubambezeleka kohlelo lokuqashwa kwabasebenzi abebezoholelwa ngale mali. Enye imali bekufanele ithenge imishini yamakhompyutha. "Sithathe yonke le mali engazange isebenze sabe sesithenga izimoto, asizange sisebenzise ngokweqile isabelomali soMnyango." UButhelezi uthe bazoqhubeka nokuthenga izimoto ezizonikelwa emikhandlwini yamakhosi. Uveze ukuthi izimoto zohlobo lweFord Everest ezingu-12 ebiza u-R772 259 ngayinye, kanye nama-GWM P300 D/C angu-18 abiza u-R563 494 ngayinye. UNksz Nair uthe usephinde wabhalela uButhelezi eminye imibuzo. Uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi izimoto azithengangwa yini ngemali ebibekelwe ukulekelela omasipala noma ukubhekana nezinhlekelele. UNksz Nair uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi imikhandlu yamakhosi izokwazi yini ukumelana nezindleko zalezi zimoto okubalwa ukufaka uphethroli, ukukhokhela imishwalense, ukulungisa izimoto namasondo. UNksz Nair uthe ufuna ukuthi uMnyango uchaze kahle ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo olulandelile ngesikhathi ukhetha imikhandlu yamakhosi enikwe izimoto. Ukuthengwa kwezimoto sekususe umsindo njengoba ubuholi benhlangano yobuholi bomdabu, iCongress of Traditional Leaders of SA (Contralesa) KwaZulu-Natal busola ukuthi uButhelezi wakhetha iphela emasini ngesikhathi aba izimoto. Ngesikhathi kwethulwa izimoto uMnyango wathi zizonikwa amalungu endlu yobuholi bomdabu KwaZulu-Natal, osihlalo kanye namaphini osihlalo bezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni. Abaholi beContralesa KwaZulu-Natal baveza ukuthi kukhona osihlalo abashiywa ngaphandle ngesikhathi kwabiwa izimoto, bathi kukhona amakhosi angebona osihlalo kodwa ahlomula. Ngokohlu lwamakhosi ahlomula oluqukethwe empendulweni kaButhelezi, bayisithupha osihlalo abathola, kwathola amaphini osihlalo amabili. Kunezifunda ezingu-11 KwaZulu-Natal. Uhlu luveza ukuthi kunamakhosi angu-14 angamalungu engeziwe ezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni ahlomula. IContralesa KwaZulu-Natal isanda kubika izikhalazo zayo kusihlalo wekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza komnyango ePhalamende, uDkt Zweli Mkhize.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMFUNDO Vilakazi osuke ebhentshini washayela iKaizer Chiefs igoli ngesikhathi inqoba kwiSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership Sekhukhune United (0) 0 OMUNYE wabaqeqeshi ababanjiswe umsebenzi kuze kuphele isizini kwiKaizer Chiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, ufisa kube kuyagcina ukuthi iqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu njengaleli laseNaturena, lizabalazela ukuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup. UBen Youssef ukusho lokhu ngaphambi kokuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele kwiSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership izolo ebusuku, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Womabili la maqembu kuqale umdlalo enethuba lokumela iPremier Soccer League (PSL) kwiConfed Cup ngesizini ezayo ngokuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership. Kube ngubuqhawe bukaTashreeq Morris obuqinisekise indawo yeChiefs kwiConfed Cup ngegoli alishaye ngomzuzu ka-86. Leli goli lilandelwe yiphenathi kaMfundo Vilakazi naye obesanda kungena. “Kufanele sizihluphe ngokuthi iqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu njengeChiefs lilwela okungaphezulu kweConfed Cup kumasizini ezayo,” kusho uBen Youssef kwaSuperSport. “Siyaqonda ukuthi womabili amaqembu abheke umphumela ofanayo kwazise abanga indawo eyodwa kodwa kukithina ukuthi sikhombise ukuthi iChiefs yiqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu. “Sinethuba lokuqoqa amaphuzu athile uma siyinqoba yonke imidlalo esisalele ngakho-ke sihlele lokho. Akufanele nokho kumasizini ezayo ukuthi sikwamukele kalula ukuthi silwela ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu ngoba iChiefs nabalandeli bayo bafanelwe ngokungcono kunalokho,” kusho uBen Youssef. Kudlalwe kwaze kwafika ekhefini lingekho iqembu elikhombisa izimpawu zokuyifuna ngabomvu indawo kwiConfed Cup okufakazelwa ngukuthi onozinti bebezipholele nhlangothi zombili. Isiwombe sesibili siqalwe nguThabo Cele noReeve Frosler abangene ezindaweni zikaThabiso Monyane noSibongiseni Mthethwa abangabuyanga kwesesibili. Ukungena kwalaba badlali kuqondane nokuthi kube sengathi neChiefs iyawukhuphula umdlalo kwaze kwangena noMorris obese kuphele unyaka agcina ukubonakala enkundleni. Ukuqhubeka kokubanda kwalo mdlalo esiwombeni sesibili kuze kwaphela ngamagoli asheshayo ngemizuzu yokugcina ashaywe ngoMorris noVilakazi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IKOMITI lasePhalemende elibhekelele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi lihlezi imbashalala uMasipala waseThekwini ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo, ukuqasha ngokwenzelela ophikweni lwamaphoyisa omkhandlu nezinsolo zocansi ezibhekiswe kwimenenja yomkhandlu. Ikomiti libhalele iMeya yomkhandlu, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, licela ukuba ichaze ngalezi zinsolo kanye nezinye. IMEYA yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba UMasipala weTheku kulindeleke ukuthi uphekwe ngebhodwe elincane uma usuvele phambi kwekomiti ukuzochaza ngalezi zinsolo. Encwadini ebhalwe usihlalo wekomiti, uMnuz Songezo Zibi, ikomiti licele ukuba uXaba achaze kabanzi ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo ekuqashweni kwamaphoyisa kamasipala. Ngo-2024, kwasuka umsindo ngesikhathi kuqashwa amaphoyisa kamasipala angu-500 emva kokuthi owesifazane wabonga wanconcoza kunobhala wegatsha le-ANC athi waba nesandla ekutheni kuqashwe umzukulu wakhe. UZibi ucele uXaba ukuba achaze ngophenyo olwenziwe ngalezi zinsolo. "Sicela uchaza ukuthi yiziphi izinhlelo ezikhona zokuqinisekisa ukuthi akubi khona ukwenzelela uma kuqashwa?" UZibi ucele uXaba ukuba alethe umbiko ogcwele ngezinsolo zocansi ezibhekene nomenenja yomasipala, uMnuz Musa Mbhele, ezenziwa yiPhini lemenenja yomkhandlu, uNksz Kim Makhathini. "Iyiphi inkampani eyaqashwa ukuba iphenye izinsolo? Ubani owaqasha le nkampani futhi yabiza malini? Ngabe ukhona omunye umsebenzi le nkampani eyake yawenza lapha emkhandlwini? Ubani owagunyaza ukuqashwa kwayo?" Image: RSA Parliament UZibi uyalele uXaba ukuba achaze ngokuqashwa kukankosikazi wesikhulu sezezimali emkhandlwini, uDkt Sandile Mnguni. "Imiphi eminye imisebenzi ake wayenza lapha emkhandlwini? Obani abagunyaza ukuqashwa kwakhe?" Ikomiti lifuna ukwazi ukuthi obani abanikazi bamaloli amanzi aqashwe umkhandlu. "Ngabe imalini asebekhokhelwe yona kule minyaka emihlanu eyedlule?" Ikomiti lifuna ukwazi ngokubambezeleka kohlelo lokwakhiwa kwezindlu eNanda olubizwa ngeNamibia 8 Housing Project. Lolu hlelo lwezigidi zamarandi lwaqala ngo-2019. Ikomiti liyalele umkhandlu ukuba uchaze ngohlelo lokufakwa kwengqalasizinda yokuthuthwa kwendle olwaqala ngo-2019. "Iluphi uhlelo olwalandelwa ngesikhathi kukhishwa ithenda yalo msebenzi? Kungani izinkampani zingakaze zikhokhelwe? Yini eyenze ukuthi uhlelo lubambezeleke? Ngabe luzoqedwa nini lolu hlelo?" Ikomiti licele uXaba ukuthi achaze ngo-R60 million owabhubhudlwa ngonyakamali owedlule. UXaba uyalelwe ukuba aphendule le mibuzo namhlanje. Okhulumela uXaba, uMnuz Mluleki Mntungwa, uthe bayitholile incwadi kaZibi kodwa wathi ngeke aphawule ngezinto okubuzwa ngazo kule ncwadi. UMntungwa uthe ubuholi bomkhandlu buzophendula kahle ngalezi zinto emhlanganweni abazokuba nawo namalungu ekomiti. "Engingakusho nje ukuthi sizokuba nomhlangano namalungu ekomiti kuleli sonto. Angikwazi ukungena kulezi zinto okubuzwa ngazo kule ncwadi."

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: 1008617120__20260430__0 ULehlogonolo Chauke, odume ngelikaShebeshxt ULehlohonolo “Shebeshxt” Chauke (31) uvele okokuqala eNkantolo yesiFunda ePolokwane ngamacala okugebenga nokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nokuzama ukubulala. Ubhekene namacala angu-20 esewonke, amanye awo inqwaba yokuzama ukubulala. Udaba luhlehliselwe umhla ka-28 Meyi 2026 ukuze kuvunyelwe umbuso ukuthi uqedele ukudalula okuqukethwe emadokodweni abekwe endaweni eyodwa. Umsolwa ugqunywe esitokisini kusukela aboshwa ngonyaka odlule. Uzohlala esitokisini. UFadiel Adams evele enkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown Image: Sibonelo Ngcobo/Independent Media Umholi weqembu lezepolitiki i-NCC nelungu lePhalamende, uFadiel Adams, unikezwe ibheyili ka-R10 000. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-14 Agasti 2026 ukuze kuqhutshekwe nokuqhubeka. Njengengxenye yemibandela yebheyili, ummangalelwa uyalwa ukuba angaxhumani, ngokuqondile noma ngokungaqondile, nanoma ibaphi ofakazi boMbuso kanye/noma ukushushiswa. Ummangalelwa uyalelwa ukuba azibike mathupha eHhovisi Lamaphoyisa aseMitchells Plain Police Station phakathi kwehora le-06h00 no-20h00 njalo ngoLwesibili nangoMgqibelo, kusalindwe ukuphothulwa kwalolu daba. USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza namhlanje bajoyinwe umsolwa wesine ozinikele emaphoyiseni uBafana Sindane. Namhlanje babuyele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga icala lahlehliselwa uMsombuluko. Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers Abammangalelwa bepulazi lezidakamizwa eSwartruggens Babuyela esitokisini abammangalelwa anga-11, abatholwe epulazini elikhiqiza izidakamizwa eSwartruggens, eNorth West. Laba nammangalelwe abayisihlanu (5) badabuka eMexico, uFabian Astorga, Jesus Alonso, Medina Astorga, Luis Alberto Ramirez Rios, Jose Andres Medina, Jacquelin Lopez Madrid(owesifazane); abantu ababili (2) baseMozambique, u-Ismael Afiado Massinge, uLourenco Constantino Cumbane; oyedwa (1) ongowaseZimbabwe, uTobias Soyani kanye nezakhamuzi zaseNingizimu Afrika ezintathu (3), uTyron John Schutte, uKyle Schutte, uVusi Amos Mkambi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano lwe-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi SEKUYISIKHATHI eside i-University of KwaZulu-Natal  (UKZN) ilokhu ingesinye sezikhungo ezihlale zenza imicimbi yokuthweswa izitshudeni iziqu, okuwuphawu lokuzihlonipha nokuzibongela ngenxa yomsebenzi wazo omuhle wemfundo emikhakheni eyehlukene. Omunye walabo abahlale beseqhulwini futhi bezikhandlela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi konke kuhamba ngohlelo kuleyo micimbi wuDkt Normah Zondo, uMqondisi jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN osebenzisana nehhovisi lomphathi wenyuvesi ukwenza lokho. Nokho wenze okuhlukile kulokhu, njengoba kuthe kuklonyeliswa izitshudeni nezifundiswa emikhakheni eyehlukene naye wabizwa kwizifundiswa ezithweswe iziqu zobodokotela, athi kukhuthazwe yigebe alibone phakathi kwabasebenzi benyuvesi nezitshudeni. UDkt Zondo uthe ucwaningo lwakhe belubheka ukungena nokuphuma kwezitshudeni emanyuvesi, kusuka ngenkathi zifika zizokwenza unyaka wokuqala kuze kufike esiphethweni sohambo lwemfundo yazo ngokwehlukana kwemikhakha yazo. UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo, ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi “Ngaphambi kokuthi zihambe, izitshudeni zincika kwabenyuvesi ukubhekena nezifundo zazo. Nokho uma sezingasekho emanyuvesi, zibhekana nenkinga yengcindezi yokuthungatha umsebenzi. Inselelo wukuthi ziba nenkinga yokungakutholi ukwesekwa lapho zizama ukusebenzisa amava ezikufunde ngaphandle ukwakha impumelelo ngemfundo,” kulandisa yena. Uthe ucwaningo lwakhe luveza ukuthi uhambo lwezitshudeni alulingani futhi luveze nokuthi lezo zitshudeni ezisuke zingazi muntu lapho ezisuke zikhona zibhekana nenkinga nengcindezi yokungakwazi ukwenza umsebenzi nokulindeleke kuzona. “Ocwaningweni lwami ngiveza amasu okumele kwenziwe ukweseka lezo zitshudeni ohambweni lwazo olunjalo ukuze zizethembe futhi zingathwali kanzima uma sezisebenza kwamanye amazwe noma ezindaweni ezingazazi nezingazejwayele,” usho kanje. Uthe ingxenye enkulu yocwaningo lwakhe ubevame ukuyenza ekuseni kakhulu andukuba aye emsebenzini, ebusuku kakhulu andukuba alale, emva kwemihlangano yasemsebenzini nangasemva kwemicimbi eyahlukene yase-UKZN. Kanti okumsize ukuphothula izifundo zakhe, abezisheba nomsebenzi wase-UKZN nowokuba wuMengameli we-International Education Association of South Africa (IEASA), uDkt Zondo ubengajahe ndawo kepha wazisebenzisa njengokuthi ziyingxenye yohambo lwakhe lokuba wumholi.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMPHATHISWA eMnyangweni wezeMpilo eKZN, uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi, esegqoke izevatho  zase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD BEKUMNANDI kudelile enkonzweni yebandla i-United Congregational Church of Southern Africa (UCCSA) egatsheni laseMzinyathi njengoba bekwamukelwa njengelungu elisha uMphathiswa eMnyangweni wezeMpilo KwaZulu-Natal, uNkk Nomagugu Simelane-Mngadi ngeSonto. Kule ndumezulu yenkonzo bekukhona abaholi bomphakathi nabazalwane bamahlelo ahlukahlukene. Kubaholi ababonakale kule nkonzo bekukhona noMphathiswa woMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uMbali Shinga, owayenguMphathiswa wezemiDlalo, ezobuCiko namaSiko kulesi sifundazwe uWeziwe Thusi nowake wawuphatha lo mnyango uHlengiwe Mavimbela. UMhlonishwa uShinga uthe bebengayile ukuyoqhuba ivangeli lokuhambela imiphakathi kuphela kodwa bebeyoqinisa ubudlelwano phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu abasemazingeni aphansi. "Bekuwumoya obugcwele intokozo, indumiso nenhlokomo njengoba besihlabelela futhi sigwaba ndawonye siqhakambisa iqhaza elinamandla elibanjwe yinkolo nobumbano emphakathini." UMphathiswa uthe ubuye wanikezwa ithuba lokugibela esteji lapho egcine esemukelisa izaguga zebandla izinduku zokudondolozela. Uthe kuye kusho lukhulu lokho ngoba bekuqinisekisa ukuzibophezela koMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi ekwesekeni abantu abadala, uvikele isithunzi sabo futhi uqinisekise ukuthi bazizwa besabalulekile futhi benakekelwa emphakathini. "Imizuzu efuze lena isikhumbuza ukuthi ukulethwa kwentuthuko akusiyo inqubomgomo kodwa kuwukuxhumana kwabantu, ukubanakekela nokuba sempilweni yabo," kusho uShinga. UMphathiswa uthe imfudumalo nothando olukhonjiswe yibandla kukhombise ubumqoka bokweseka abantu, ikakhulukazi abadala nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abekho abashiywa ngaphandle. Eqhuba uMphathiswa uthe ukubambisana kuveza iqhaza elimqoka elibanjwe ngabezenkolo ekwesekeni imiphakathi, ikakhulukazi ngezikhathi ezinzima. Uthe njengohulumeni bazoqhubeka nokuzibophezela ekusebenzisaneni nabezenkolo ukuze baqinise izinhlelo zokulekelela imiphakathi yaKwaZulu-Natal. "Ngokubambisana, ngenkolo nokulethwa kwentuthuko, siyaqhubeka nokugcina isithunzi, ukwakha nokunakekela imiphakathi," kuphetha uMphathiswa woMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal. UMHLONISHWA uMbali Shinga ebingelela uNkk Weziwe Thusi e-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMPHATHISWA uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi ephahlwe nguNkk Weziwe Thusi noMphathiswa uMbali Shinga ngesikhathi emukelwa njengelungu elisha lase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMHLONISHWA uHlengiwe Mavimbela ubekwabebehambele inkonzo yase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMPHATHISWA uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi efunga njengelungu elisha lase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/UCCSA UMPHATHISWA uMbali Shinga emukelisa abefundisi base-UCCSA izinduku zokudondolozela zezaguga Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD OMUNYE wabaholi be-ANC ophikweni lwabesifazane eyingxenye yabazalwane ebebehambele inkonzo yase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD BEKUKHONA amahlelo ahlukahlukene enkonzweni yokwamukela uMphathiswa uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: USomlomo wePhalamende likazwelonke, uNkz Thoko Didiza, usenqume uhlelo oluzolandelwa iSishayamthetho sikazwelonke ukuphendula isinqumo esikhishwe yiNkantolo YoMthethosisekelo Image: Tumi Pakkies/ Independent Newspapers USomlomo wePhalamende likazwelonke, uNkz Thoko Didiza, usenqume uhlelo oluzolandelwa iSishayamthetho sikazwelonke ukuphendula isinqumo esikhishwe yiNkantolo YoMthethosisekelo ngoLwesihlanu, ziyi-8 kuMeyi 2026, odabeni oluthinta i-Economic Freedom Fighters ebisola uSomlomo wePhalamende kanye nabanye, mayelana noMthetho 129I weMithetho yeSishayamthetho sikazwelonke kanye nombiko wePhaneli lezobulungiswa elizimele liholwa owayengumengameli wamajaji uSandile Ngcobo. Ngokwesitatimende esikhishwe yiPhalamende, siveze ukuthi uDidiza uyasihlonipha isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo futhi uzohambisana ngokugcwele nomyalelo neziqondiso zeNkantolo. Kuvezwe uhla olulandelayo njengezinyathelo ezizokwenziwa: 1. Ngokuhambisana nokufundwa okubuyekeziwe koMthetho we-129I, uSomlomo uzokwazisa ngokusemthethweni isiGungu Sikazwelonke ngombiko wethimba elizimele ngokwethula amajenali afanelekile ePhalamende. 2.USomlomo uzohlinzeka umengameli wakuleli ngekhophi yombiko wethimba elizimele ngokushesha, njengoba kuyalele inkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. 3. Ngokuhambisana nesinqumo senkantolo, uSomlomo uzoqala inqubo yokuhlela ikomidi elizophenya icala ngokweMithetho 129J kuya ku-129O yeMithetho yesiGungu Sikazwelonke ukuze kucutshungulwe inqubo yophenyo yesigaba sama-89 ehlongozwe kuMthethosisekelo kanye neMithetho yesiGungu. 4. USomlomo uzodlulisela ngokusemthethweni umbiko wethimba elizimele eKomidini elizophenya icala njengoba kuyalele inkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. 5. USomlomo uzodlulisela isinqumo senNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ekomidini elincane lePhalamende likazwelonke lokubuyekezwa kwemithetho ukuze licubungule izichibiyelo ezidingekayo zeMithetho yesiGungu sikaZwelonke ngokulandela okutholwe, ukufundwa, kanye neziqondiso zeNkantolo. Ikomidi elincane lizobika ngomsebenzi walo ekomidini lemithetho, lona elizohambisa izincomo zalo esiGungwini Sikazwelonke ukuze sizicubungule. 6. USomlomo uzonquma uhlelo olufanele, izinhlelo zenqubo, izikhathi ezibekiwe kanye nezinyathelo zokweseka isikhungo ezidingekayo ukuze ikomidi eliphenya icala likwazi ukwenza futhi liqedele umsebenzi walo ngempumelelo, ngokungakhethi nangohlaka loMthethosisekelo kanye neMithetho yesiGungu sikaZwelonke.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UPhakelumthakathi Ndabandaba noXolani Khumalo KUKHALWE ngokushoda kobuholi kuhulumeni wakuleli ngokubhukula kwabantu bemasha bekhala ngesihlava sokwanda kwabantu bakwamanye amazwe, abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Lokhu kugqame ngesikhathi kunempikiswano esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal, ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Amalungu esiShayamthetho abeshintshana, aveze ukuthi lolu daba luyaphuthuma njengoba abantu sebediniwe ukusonga izandla kukahulumeni, abamsola ngokungenzi lutho ngalolu daba. Phezu kokuba uhulumeni eveza ukuthi kukhona akwenzayo ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho njengoba kunenqwaba ephindiselwa emazweni abo kodwa abahola la mamashi bathathwe njengamaqhawe asukumele izwe lawo. Izishoshovu zamasiko okunguNgizwe Mchunu, noPhakelumthakathi bahola amamashi aqale esifundazweni, adlulela kuGompo City, ePitoli naseGoli, ukuzwakalisa ukungenami ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNksz Nompumelelo Gasa weqembu iMKP, uthe abantu bakuleli bazosolwa ngokuba nenzondo kubantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ngenxa yokusukuma balungise izwe labo. Uthe kodwa akunjalo, ababuswa yinzondo kodwa balungisa isimo abasibona siphuma esandleni. "Bangamaqhawe abantu ababhukulile, bahola amamashi okukhala ngesihlava sokwanda kwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Batshengise ukuthanda nokukhathalela izwe labo ngokusukumela inkinga abayibona ikhula," usho kanje. Ukhale ngokuthi abantu bakuleli balinda amahora amade emitholampilo nasezibhedlela ngenxa yokugcwala kwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UMnuz Mongezi Twala we-EFF okunguye ophakamise ukuthi kubhungwe ngalesi sihlava, usole ukungabikhona kobuholi obuqotho ezweni ngalesi sihlava esihlasele ezweni. "Yingakho abantu bebhukulile bazihola bona ngoba bebona ukuthi abukho ubuholi kuleli. Sinenkinga yemingcele kuleli, abantu bakwazi ukuzingenela baphume noma yikanjani," kusho uTwala. UMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula weqembu i-IFP, uthe uhulumeni unomkhankaso wokulwa neyabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho njengoba kunomkhankaso wokukhuculula le nkinga. Uthe kunomkhankaso oholwa nguNdunankulu, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, othi "engangeni ngesango iyafohla", olwa nale nkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Kunemithetho ecacile ezweni ethinta ukuqashwa kwabantu abavela kwamanye amazwe. Abanye osomabhizinisi baphula imithetho yezwe ngokuqasha abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze babakhokhele imali encane." UNksz Sizophila Mkhizwe we-ANC, ugxeke ukushiswa kwezitolo nodlame wathi bayahambisana nekhwelo leSilo, lokuthi kumele amamashi abe nokuthula. "Izinkinga zomphakathi akumele zibuswe ngosomathuba. Uhulumeni unezinhlelo zokubuyisela emuva abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Kuvakashelwa namabhizinisi kubhekwe abantu abaqashiwe khona abavela kwamanye amazwe ukuthi ngabe bakuleli ngokusemthethweni," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzamo Billy we-DA, uthe le nkinga ayivumbikanga manje, wathi isineminyaka ikhona. "Inkinga isuka kude ngaphansi kwe-ANC, imingcele ingaqashiwe ngendlela efanele. Inkohlakalo edla lubi kanjalo nezinye izinto okubalwa nokwehliswa kwesabelomali. Akumele kuvunyelwe umphakathi uzithathele umthetho ngezandla." UMphathiswa wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uNksz Mbali Shinga we-NFP, uthe inkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho kumele ilungiswe kulandelwe umthetho. "Sifuna abantu abakuleli balandele imithetho yezwe."

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMSHAYISIBHAKELA waseMpangeni, uTholumusa 'Mfundisi' Ngema nesikhulu seBoxing South Africa, uMandla Ntlanganiso Image: Isithombe:FACEBOOK UHLOSE ukubuyisa isithunzi sebhande laKwaZulu-Natal uphromotha wesibhakela, uSandile Vilakazi, oqoke ukuthi libangwe abashayisibhakela abangomakadebona. UVilakazi ongumphathi weSiyathaba Boxing Promotions, uhlele izimpi ezizoba ngoFebhuwari 28, e-APN Portuguese Hall, eThekwini. Impi yosuku izoba ngeyebhande leKZN Featherweight phakathi kukaTholumusa "Mfundisi" Ngema (6-3-3) waseMpangeni noSithembiso Maduna (13-6-0) waseMnambithi. Bobabili laba bashayisibhakela sebebuya ezimpini zamabhande aseMzansi nawaphesheya kwezilwandle lapho bexhimfane khona nezimbangi ezaziwayo kwezamankomane. Ngaphezu kwalokho, akhona amabhande asebeke bawawina okubalwa kuwona awesifundazwe. Okufanayo ngalaba bashayisibhakela ukuthi babobili babhekane nembangi eyodwa, uKhanyisani Mbokazi waseMandeni, ezimpini zabo zakamuva. UMaduna ukhale ngaphansi kuMbokazi ngo-Okthoba nyakenye, Eshowe. UNgema wagcina ukungena eringini ngoMashi 2024 ekhala ngaphansi kuMbokazi eMtshezi. UVilakazi uthe uqoke ukuqhatha uMaduna noNgema ngoba efuna ukubuyisa izimpi ezidonsa abantu esibhakeleni saseKZN. "Ngifuna ukukhombisa ukuthi ibhade laseKZN linaso isithunzi, yingakho ngiqhatha abashayisibhakela abanesipiliyoni. Kufanele kucace ukuthi ibhande lesifundazwe akuyona into enikwa abashayisibhakela abasezingeni eliphansi. Lisenaso isithunzi. Ngifuna ukubuyisa loya mbango wokufuna ukukhipha inkunzi kubashayisibhakela basesifundazweni. Yikho ngikhethe abashayisibhakela asebeqinile," kusho uVilakazi. Ngaphandle kwempi kaMaduna noNgema, kukhona enye ebhekwe ngabaningi ezoba phakathi kukamakadebona, uPrince Dlomo (17-15-1) waseMgungundlovu owayengumpetha we-SA Junior Welterweight noPhumelele Ngcobo (4-0-0) wasePinetown, osekuyikluma kwezamankomane. UDlomo waphatha ibhande laseMzansi phakathi kuka-2021 no-2023, walivikela amahlandla ambalwa kubashayisibhakela abahlonishwayo okubalwa kubona uXolani Mcotheli wase-East London. Walephucwa nguNtethelelo Nkosi waseMtubatuba, emqingqa ngo-2023. "Ngifuna ukumhlola uPhumelele ukuthi usekuliphi izinga ngesibhakela. Le mpi izokwenza ngikubone lokho ngoba uzolwa nebhokisa ebelingumpetha waseMzansi futhi elalivikela ibhande kaningi. Akusizi ukuhlala nebhokisa, ulokhu ulivikela ngokulinika izimpi ezilula. Akulisizi lokho. Sibheke ukuthi uPhumele asiphase lesi sivivinyo," kusho uVilakazi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMSHAYISIBHAKELA waseDundee, uNhlakanipho "GTI" Kunene, uzimisele ngokuwinela iKwaZulu-Natal ibhande le-IBO Mini-Flyweight azolibanga noNhlanhla "Showtime" Tyirha e-East London ngoMeyi 23 Image: Isithombe:SITHUNYELWE AKAYINGENI eyokuhlonipha iqhawe lakhe eringini umshayisibhakela waKwaZulu-Natal, uNhlakanipho "GTI" Kunene ozobanga ibhande le-International Boxing Organisation (IBO) Mini-flyweight noNhlanhla "Showtime"" Tyirha e-East London ngasekupheleni kwenyanga. Impi kaKunene (8-0-0) noTyirha (12-3-0), ikwezihlelwe yiGround Up Promotions ezizoba seJan Smuts Stadium ngoMeyi 23. Kulezi zimpi, umakadebona owayengumpetha we-IBO Lightweight, uXolisani "Nomeva" Ndongeni waseMthatha, uzoxhimfana noSanele Msimango waseNchanga njengoba esephanyeka amagilavu emgibeni. Kwebhekwe ngabomvu, uLindelani "TWT" Sibisi waseDundee uzovikela ibhande le-SA featherweight kuBongani Fule. UKunene (24), ongumpetha we-WBF Intercontinental Minimumweight, uthe uzimisele ngokuwina ibhande kumshayisibhakela akhule ebukela kuyena. "Ngiyamazi uTyirha kusukela ngisalwa esigabeni sama-amesha. Ngikhule ngibukela kuyena, eyiqhawe lami. Ungumshayisibhakela osebenza kanzima futhi ozinikelayo. Kumele ngigqame nami kule mpi," kusho uKunene. Ithuba elitholwe nguKunene lokulwela ibhande lomhlaba esisindweni seMini-Flyweight liyivela kancane kwazise akekho umshayisibhakela waseKZN owake wawina ngisho ibhande laseMzansi kulesi sisindo. "Leli thuba lifike kahle ngisesimeni esihle nangokomoya, kungekho okungikhathazayo futhi ngisanda kuwina ibhande le-WBF ngoMashi. Ngiyazi ukuthi KwaZulu-Natal akekho umshayisibhakela owake wawina ibhande lomhlaba esisindweni esincane. Ngiyajabula kakhulu ukuthi ngithole leli thuba ngoba ibhande le-IBO yibhande lomhlaba. Leli thuba lizoshintsha impilo yami futhi alehleli noma ngubani. Ngaphezu kwalokho, lizoletha ushintsho eKZN futhi lizongakhela igama emphakathini eDundee. Okukhulu wukuthi ngizoba yisibonelo entsheni yangakithi ukuze ibone ukuthi kuyaphileka ngezemidlalo,"usho kanje. Nakuba uKunene egcwele ukuzeithemba kodwa kumele agawule abheke kuTyirha owawina ibhande le-SA light Flyweight empini yesine eqale isibhakela esikhokhelayo ngo-2018. "Ngiyazi ukuthi bona bazitshela ukuthi bathole ibhokisa elisezingeni eliphansi abazozenzela kulona. Lokho ngeke kwenzeke. Ifulegi leKwaZulu-Natal ngizoliphakamisela phezulu, iDundee ngifuna ukuyibeka phezulu. Ngizokubeka eceleni ukuthi ngikhule ngibukela kuyena. Ayikho inhlonipho engizomnika yona eringini. Ngiyazi ukuthi ngizoba ngcono kunaye eringini ngosuku lwempi," kusho uKunene.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUPHELE isonto kumi nse ukufunda nokufundisa esikoleni iSiyathuthuka Secondary eNewtown A, eNanda, abazali abawotha ubomvu, befuna kuqashwe ngokugcwele uthishomkhulu abathi usebe yibamba isikhathi eside. Ngokusho komunye wabazali, ocele ukungadalulwa, abazali abebedinwe begane unwabu, bazifake ngoLwesine olwedlule izingidi ezingaziwa esangweni lesikole. Uthe ngaphezu kwengidi eyaziwa yisikole, ejwayele ukufakwa unogada, kukhona ezinye ezimbalwa ezifakwe abazali abadiniwe. “Abazali bathi izingidi zizophuma uma uMnyango wezeMfundo usuthumele incwadi yokumqasha ngokugcwele uthishomkhulu oseneminyaka emithathu eyibamba kulesi sikhundla,” kusho umzali. Uqhube wathi abazali bazwakalise ukuwuthakasela umsebenzi owenziwa uthishomkhulu yingakho bebona sengathi uMnyango uyanwabuluka uma ungamqashi ngokugcwele. Uthe banovalo lokuthi uMnyango uzovele uqashe uthishomkhulu ozobe evela ngaphandle, kanti bona bafuna kuqashwe ibamba. Uveze ukuthi ibamba selifundise kulesi sikole isikhathi eside kanti lathatha izintambo zokubamba emva kokuhamba kukathishomkhulu owayekhona eminyakeni emithathu edlule. “Kuthikamezeke ngempela ukufunda njengoba izingidi zafakwa ngoLwesine olwedlule. Okusho ukuthi sekuphela isonto abafundi bengafundi,” kusho umthombo. Uthe abazali abafake izingidi bafunga bagomela ukuthi zizokhishwa uma kufika le ncwadi abathi bafuna ukuyibona ngamehlo. Uveze ukuthi ukhona umhloli oke wazama ukuzohlola isimo ngoLwesithathu esuka ehhovisi lesifunda ePinetown. Uthe ugcine engakwazanga ukungena ngaphakathi, abazali bamyalela ukuthi akhulume nabo khona ngaphandle kwesango lesikole njengoba ebefike engayiphethe incwadi yokuqasha ibamba ngokugcwele. NOTE: Kushoda i-comment ye-SBG neye-DOE.
